name: China Vanke Co., Ltd.
summary: China Vanke Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development and sale of properties in the Mainland China, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company operates through Property Development and Property Management segments. It develops residential buildings, commercial offices, and other ancillary facilities. The company also provides property management and related services to purchasers and tenants of its own developed residential properties, shopping arcades, and office buildings, as well as to properties developed by external property developers; and undertakes construction contracts. In addition, it is involved in logistics and warehousing, hotel and resort, education, and housing rental businesses. The company was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen GuoHua Network Security Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen GuoHua Network Security Technology Co., Ltd. engages in mobile Internet services, emergency security, and smart cities businesses. The company focuses on mobile application security, big data security, Internet of Things security, mobile security consulting, mobile security training, mobile security detection, mobile security reinforcement, mobile security awareness, mobile security management, and other product systems. It is also involved in the mobile game distribution and operation services business. Shenzhen GuoHua Network Security Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Fountain Corporation
summary: Shenzhen Fountain Corporation engages in real estate development, clean energy, transportation, and waste management activities in China. The company operates various fleets of electric vehicles (EVs) at residential and tourism developments under the HANSOME EValet brand, as well as light truck EVs for intra city logistics; and provides power-charging infrastructure at various transportation hubs and residential communities. It also develops low carbon neighborhood; and operates city chilling stations to provide cooling services to the communities, and infrastructure for cold chain food and beverage storage and logistics, as well as cold chain retail spaces and EV cold chain distributors. Shenzhen Fountain Corporation was founded in 1990 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Zhenye (Group) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Zhenye (Group) Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, management, and rental of real estate properties in China. The company provides residence, commercial properties, villas, etc. It is also involved in the shantytowns transformation and distinctive town construction activities. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Quanxinhao Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Quanxinhao Co., Ltd. owns and operates hotels in China. The company operates the Grand hotel located in Shenzhen and the Asia Gulf hotel located in Xiamen. It also provides property management, financial information consulting, venture capital, financial investment, equity investment, and investment management services. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: China Baoan Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Baoan Group Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of cathode and anode materials for lithium battery manufacturers worldwide. It also researches on drive systems for new energy vehicles sand automotive assembly plants; manufactures and sells precision metal parts that are used in hard disk drives, hydraulic equipment, and auto parts, as well as parts for other purposes; researches and develops new graphite materials; and develops and manufactures military drilling simulators. In addition, the company offers power-charging connectors for new-energy vehicles; AC/DC power charging connector products for electric vehicles; and ear-nose-throat and respiratory system products. Further, it plants lian tree; researches and development, manufactures, and sells neem products; develops and manages real estate projects; and invests in venture capital, financial, and industrial investment projects. Additionally, the company engages in the wholesale and retail of pharmaceutical products; operation of a chain of hospitals; and provision of hemorrhoid products. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Ecobeauty Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Ecobeauty Co., Ltd. distributes natural gas machines and natural gas in China. It is involved in the storage, transportation and distribution, sale, maintenance, and management of natural gas and liquefied gas; and the manufacture and installation of machines, equipment, and related components. The company was formerly known as Beijing Shenhuaxin Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Ecobeauty Co., Ltd. in May 2016. Shenzhen Ecobeauty Co., Ltd. is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shahe Industrial Co., Ltd
summary: Shahe Industrial Co., Ltd. develops, operates, and manages real estate properties in China. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Konka Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Konka Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, produces, and sells electronic products in China and internationally. It offers televisions, refrigerators, washing machines, personal electronic appliances, and kitchen and bathroom appliances; and home AV, IPTV set-top boxes, OTT terminals, digital TV receivers, digital products, wearable and health products, electric products and switch plugs, power banks, mobile communication equipment and terminal products, daily-use and automotive electronic products, satellite navigation and transportation systems, fire-fighting and security systems, office equipment, computers, displays, and large screen display systems. The company also provides LED back light, illumination, and light-emitting devices; packaging products; Touch TV AIO wireless broadcasting television transiting equipment; and emergency broadcast system equipment, electronic parts and components, molds, plastic and rubber products, packing materials, security and monitoring products, wireless and cable digital television systems and system integration services, and technical consultancy and after-sale paid services. In addition, it engages in the provision of wholesale, retail, import and export, and relevant support services of the aforesaid products; maintenance and technical consultant services for electronic products; ordinary cargo transportation, domestic and international freight forwarding, and warehousing services; management of supply chain; consultancy on enterprise management; self-owned property leasing and management services; and outsourcing services of information technology and business procedures, as well as recovers waste electrical appliances and electronic products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Konka Electronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Konka Group Co., Ltd. in August 1995. Konka Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen China Bicycle Company (Holdings) Limited
summary: Shenzhen China Bicycle Company (Holdings) Limited engages in the production, assembly, purchase, and sale of bicycles and electric bicycles. It offers bicycles under the EMMELLE brand. The company also engages in the lithium battery material, and jewelry and gold businesses. It offers its products through various e-commerce platforms. Shenzhen China Bicycle Company (Holdings) Limited is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the wholesale and retail, food processing and manufacturing, and leasing and commerce service businesses in the People's Republic of China. The company wholesales and retails rice, wheat, rice in the husk, corn, sorghum, and cooking oil and other grains and oil, as well as sells fine tea, beverage, and condiment; processes flour, rice, cooking oil, tea and natural plants, beverage and condiments etc.; and provides import and export trade, warehousing and storage, logistics and distribution, and quality inspection and information technology services; and property leasing and management, and commerce operation management services. It offers bread flour under Jinchangman, Yingshanhong, and Hongli brands; cake and steamed bun flour under Clivia and Canna brand names; high-gluten and biscuit flour under the Sunflower brand; caramel treats flour under Feiyu brand; moon cake flour and other various flour under Yuejixiang brand; rice products under Shenliang Duoxi, Guzhixiang, Jinjiaxi, Runxiangliangpin, Hexiang, Shenliang Yushuiqing, etc. brands; and cooking oil Shenliang Duoxi, Shenliang Fuxi, Hongli, and Shenliang Yushuiqing, etc. brand names. The company also provides rice, flour, oil, and coarse cereals under Shenliang Yushuiqing brand name; instant tea powder, tea concentrate, and other tea products under Golden Eagle brands; tea under the Jufangyong, Gutan, and Fuhaitang brands; oyster sauce, chicken essence, and seafood sauce under Tri-Well brand name; and chrysanthemum tea, lemon tea, herbal tea, and other drinks under Shenbao brands. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Shenbao Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. in February 2019. Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1975 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China. Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Food Group Co., Ltd.

name: Shenzhen Zhongheng Huafa Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Zhongheng Huafa Co., Ltd. produces and sells injection molded parts, light packaging materials, and LCD whole machines primarily in Central and South China, and Hong Kong. It is also involved in property leasing and management operations. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Huafa Electronics Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Zhongheng Huafa Co., Ltd. in September 2007. Shenzhen Zhongheng Huafa Co., Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Kaifa Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Kaifa Technology Co., Ltd. provides electronics manufacturing services worldwide. The company manufactures computers and storage products, communication products and consumer electronics, semiconductors, medical equipment, automotive electronics, and commercial and industrial products; and provides packaging and testing services for integrated circuits and semiconductors. It also offers research and development, and production services for automation equipment, utility metering systems, and Internet of Things systems. Shenzhen Kaifa Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Tellus Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Tellus Holding Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the sale and maintenance of cars in the People's Republic of China. It engages in the inspection and repair of motor vehicles; manufacture and maintenance of automobiles; sale of accessories; sale of jewelry; manufacture of inspection equipment for motor vehicles; and rental and management of real estate properties. It also provides resource asset management services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Tellus Machinery Holding Company Limited and changed its name to Shenzhen Tellus Holding Co., Ltd. in March 1993. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: FIYTA Precision Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: FIYTA Precision Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in timepiece business primarily in China. It is involved in the designing, production, sale, import, and export of watches, driving units, watchcases, watchbands, and other spare and accessory parts; timepieces; general merchandise, jewelry, stationery articles, handicrafts, toys, diamonds, ornaments, and gifts; timing instruments; and hard materials, such as hard alloy and ceramics. The company also engages in the wholesale, retail, and repair of watches and components; distribution of leather wares, pens, ties, tie clips, electronic products, materials, instruments and meters, office equipment, and communication equipment; advertising business; and brand planning, property management, leasing, commerce, and investment activities. In addition, it offers conference services. The company was formerly known as FIYTA Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to FIYTA Precision Technology Co., Ltd. in December 2019. FIYTA Precision Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: China National Accord Medicines Corporation Ltd.
summary: China National Accord Medicines Corporation Ltd. engages in the distribution of medicine and pharmaceutical products. The company offers Chinese traditional patent, bio-chemical, biological, and diagnosis medicines, as well as antibiotics; chemical preparations; shaped packing food products; chemical products; and various commodities and techniques. It also engages in the sale of drugs, medical apparatus, and instruments; offers freight transportation, storage, loading and unloading, other business, and professional consultation services; provides glass wares, cosmetics, and daily merchandise, as well as goods agency services; import and export of technology; leasing of house properties; and wholesaling and retailing of health products. As of December 30, 2019, the company operated a network of 5,021 drugstores, including 3,744 direct-operated stores and 1,277 franchised stores covering 20 provinces, autonomous regions, and municipalities in China. The company is based in Shenzhen, China. China National Accord Medicines Corporation Ltd. is a subsidiary of Sinopharm Group Co., Ltd.

name: FAWER Automotive Parts Limited Company
summary: FAWER Automotive Parts Limited Company manufactures and sells automotive parts and components of environment control systems, chassis systems, steering and transmission systems, safety systems, engine accessory systems, etc. in China. The company offers climate control systems; steering and driving systems; engine accessory systems, such as differential locks, electric fuel pumps, oil pumps, clutch master cylinders, water pumps, and throttle bodies; chassis accessory systems, including engine beam, sub-bracket, rear axis welding, control arm, front frame, and oil pan assembly systems; and suspension and running systems comprising subframe-passenger, leaf spring commercial trucks, rear suspension passenger, passenger strut assemblies, shock absorbers for commercial vehicles, coil springs, torque rods, and control arm assemblies; braking systems; and other products consisting of fasteners, airbags, body control modules, grip brakes, torsion bars, brake camshafts, wiring harnesses, sun visors, gear controls, and automotive instrument clusters. It also exports its products to the United States, France, Italy, South Korea, Japan, and countries in the Middle East. The company was formerly known as Fawer Automotive Parts Company Ltd. and changed its name to FAWER Automotive Parts Limited Company in December 2007. FAWER Automotive Parts Limited Company is based in Changchun, China.

name: Grandjoy Holdings Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Grandjoy Holdings Group Co., Ltd. operates as a real estate development company in China. It develops residential and industrial properties. The company is also involved in the rental of properties. The company was formerly known as COFCO Property Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Grandjoy Holdings Group Co., Ltd. in March 2019. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. Grandjoy Holdings Group Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of COFCO Hong Kong Limited

name: China Tianying Inc.
summary: China Tianying Inc. engages in urban environmental service and energy businesses in China and internationally. The company offers urban environmental services, such as waste sorting and collection, smart transportation, urban environment management, sanitation, renewable resource recovery, and waste disposal services. It also undertakes various projects, including waste separation and treatment projects, such as waste-to-energy power plants, circular economy industrial parks, construction and demolition waste treatment projects, food waste treatment projects, and landfill gas recovery and power generation projects; and smart city projects. The company was formerly known as China Kejian Co., Ltd. and changed its name to China Tianying Inc. in June 2014. China Tianying Inc. was founded in 1984 and is based in Nantong, China.

name: Shenzhen Nanshan Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Nanshan Power Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells power and heat. It operates through three segments: Power and Heat Supply, Fuel Oil Trade, and Other Business. The company generates power using gas turbine and waste heat, as well as operates natural gas and cogeneration power plants. It is also involved in the sludge drying activities; the design and operations management of sludge treatment and disposal facilities and engineering; and the provision of environmental pollution control and utilization domain technology development, transfer, and advisory services. In addition, the company offers technical advisory service for the construction projects of gas-steam combined cycle power plant; undertakes the maintenance and overhaul of the operating equipment of gas-steam combined cycle power plant; and imports and exports goods and technologies. Further, it engages in the fuel oil self-supporting or import agent business; trading diesel, lubricating oil, liquefied petroleum gas, natural gas, compressed gas and liquefied gas, and chemical products; the provision of investment, construction, and technical services for liquefied petroleum gas, natural gas, and related facilities; and leasing wharfs and oil depots. Additionally, the company offers fuel oil warehousing, freight transportation, and gas turbine spare parts agency services. Shenzhen Nanshan Power Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Tunghsu Azure Renewable Energy Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tunghsu Azure Renewable Energy Co.,Ltd. provides energy services in China. It operates photovoltaic and wind power stations; and provides smart energy services and clean energy materials, as well as offers ecological management, water environment restoration and operation, soil and mine restoration, and hazardous and solid waste treatment services. The company was formerly known as Baoan Hongji Real Estate Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tunghsu Azure Renewable Energy Co.,Ltd. in July 2016. Tunghsu Azure Renewable Energy Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: Shenzhen Centralcon Investment Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Centralcon Investment Holding Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development business. It is also involved in the hotel management, business management, industrial operation, property management, and capital operation activities. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Changcheng Investment Holding Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Centralcon Investment Holding Co., Ltd. in March 2014. Shenzhen Centralcon Investment Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Oceanwide Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Oceanwide Holdings Co., Ltd. invests in, develops, constructs, manages, and sells real estate properties in China and internationally. The company provides financial services in the areas of securities, trust, insurance, futures, asset management, and Internet finance, as well as in real estate. The company was formerly known as Fan Hai Construction Group Company Limited and changed its name to Oceanwide Holdings Co., Ltd. in April 2014. Oceanwide Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Beijing, China. Oceanwide Holdings Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Oceanwide Holdings Group Company Limited.

name: Shenzhen Kingkey Smart Agriculture Times Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Kingkey Smart Agriculture Times Co., Ltd. engages in the farming, feed, and agricultural products businesses in China. The company is involved in the breeding and sale of pigs, broilers, porks, eggs, other fresh agricultural and feed products, chickens, ducks, and fishes. It also provides transportation, water supply, real estate development, property management, and financial investment services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Kondarl (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Kingkey Smart Agriculture Times Co., Ltd. in April 2020. Shenzhen Kingkey Smart Agriculture Times Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Desay Battery Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Desay Battery Technology Co., Ltd. operates in lithium battery industry in China and internationally. The company offers small and medium-sized lithium battery packages and mobile power management systems. It serves consumer electronics manufacturers. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Worldsun Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Desay Battery Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2005. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Tianma Microelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianma Microelectronics Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and supplies LCD and LCM products worldwide. Its products include TN-LCD, STN-LCD, TFT-LCD, CF, and LTPS AM-OLED products for various applications, such as mobile phone, tablet PC, PDVD and DPF, DSC and DVC, smart wearable, automotive, and home automation applications, as well as industrial, medical, and monochrome displays. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: China Fangda Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Fangda Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells curtain wall systems and materials in China and internationally. It operates in five segments: Curtain Wall, Rail Transport, Real Estate, New Energy, and Others. The company's primary products include energy-saving curtain walls, photo-electricity curtain walls, LED colour-display curtain walls, PVDF aluminium plate and graphene aluminium plate materials. Its construction curtain walls are used on high-level buildings; and large-area public venues, such as airports, stations, cultural centres and exhibition centres, day lighting roof, shaped construction with external retaining, and decoration functions. The company is also involved in the assembly and processing of metro screen doors; development and operation of real estate properties; property management; research and development, installation, and sale of photovoltaic equipment; and design and construction of photovoltaic power plants. China Fangda Group Co. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: North Huajin Chemical Industries Co.,Ltd
summary: North Huajin Chemical Industries Co.,Ltd provides petrochemicals, chemical fertilizers, road asphalt, and lube base oils in China. It also offers synthetic resins, organic chemical raw materials, and plastic products. The company was formerly known as Liaoning Hua Jin Tong Das Chemical Company Limited and it changed its name to North Huajin Chemical Industries Co.,Ltd in February 2014. North Huajin Chemical Industries Co.,Ltd was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Panjin, China.

name: Shenzhen Zhongjin Lingnan Nonfemet Co. Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Zhongjin Lingnan Nonfemet Co. Ltd. produces and sells non-ferrous metals in China and internationally. The company undertakes cross-industry and cross-region operations that include mining, processing, smelting, manufacturing, research and development, construction materials, real estate development, trade, warehousing, and financial service. Its product portfolio includes fine lead ore, fine zinc ore, mixed lead/zinc ore, fine sulfur ore, electrolytic lead, fine zinc, silver, fine cadmium, germanium ingots, germanium dioxide, indium ingots, sulfuric acid, zinc sulfate, section aluminum, curtain walls, steel stripes, nickel hydroxide, zinc powder for batteries, and fibrous nickel powder. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Huaqiang Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Huaqiang Industry Co., Ltd. operates as an electronic components distributor in China. The company is also involved in the distribution and supply chain management of integrated circuit, storage, devices, and various passive elements; publishing of electronic components supply and demand information; online transactions; and logistics distribution, financial supply chain, and data study activities. In addition, it develops and manages e-commerce service platform; and trades in electronic products. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: ZTE Corporation
summary: ZTE Corporation provides integrated telecommunications and information technology (IT) solutions worldwide. It operates through three segments: Carriers' Networks, Government and Corporate Business, and Consumer Business. The company offers wireless products, such as baseband units, AAU series, ultra-broadband radio series, indoor coverage, small cell base station series, and microwave products. It also provides cloud core network products that comprise hardware devices, cloud platform systems; HD voice and video, intelligent pipeline, and user data convergence; CloudStudio GSO, NFVO, and VNFM; and cloud integration products. In addition, the company offers fixed network services, including optical and copper access, and smart home products; transport network, such as optical network, mobile backhaul, router, Ethernet switch, and network control and management systems; multi-media solutions; energy solutions comprise telecom power and data centre; and data management solutions. Further, it provides cloud computing products that include cloud platform, storage, and desktop products; cloud video products, such as video conferencing and IoT platform, contact centre, coalition emergency response systems, and meeting infrastructure; and smart phone and mobile internet products, as well as 5G, consulting and integration, technical, digital operation, intelligent O&M customer support, and learning services. Additionally, the company offers wireless access, cloud core and transport network, fixed access, and AI and bigdata solutions. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Norinco International Cooperation Ltd.
summary: Norinco International Cooperation Ltd. operates as an engineering contractor in Asia, Africa, Europe, and internationally. It is involved in the construction of various projects, such as railways, roads and bridges, civil construction, municipal facilities, petroleum, power plants, industrial manufacturing, and environmental protection. The company also develops real estate properties, such as residential and commercial projects; and provides architectural decoration services. In addition, it offers services in the field of power engineering, mining facilities, heavy-duty vehicles and equipment, integrated logistics services, solar lighting, etc. Further, it researches, develops, and manufactures packaging containers. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China. Norinco International Cooperation Ltd. is a subsidiary of China North Industries Corporation.

name: China Greatwall Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Greatwall Technology Group Co., Ltd. provides computer components and consumer digital products in China. It also provides PCs/notebooks, tablets, and all-in-one products; power products, such as PC power supply, server power supply, networking power supply, LED power supply, PC adaptor, and power bank products; and servers. The company offers its products for use in infrastructure and solutions, finance, medical care, transportation, education, and other industries. The company was formerly known as China Great Wall Computer Shenzhen Co., Ltd. and changed its name to China Greatwall Technology Group Co., Ltd. in March 2017. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Huakong Seg Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Huakong Seg Co., Ltd. does not have significant operations. Previously, the company was involved in the design, manufacture, and sale of electronic components. Shenzhen Huakong Seg Co., Ltd. is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Neptunus Bioengineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Neptunus Bioengineering Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceutical products primarily in China. It offers pharmaceutical products in the areas of anti-tumor, cardiovascular disease, and other disease. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Tagen Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Tagen Group Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the urban construction, comprehensive development, and urban service businesses in China. The company offers construction services in the fields of municipal engineering, construction engineering, rail transit engineering, road maintenance, etc. It also develops real estate projects, including mid-to-high-end residences, affordable housing, office buildings, hotels, urban complexes, industrial parks, etc. In addition, the company undertakes daily maintenance projects of roads, bridges, tunnels, and traffic safety facilities; provides property management and shed reform services. Further, it operates sewage treatment plants and pipe projects; designs and constructs general contracting projects; undertakes space development and utilization projects; builds smart city; and provides engineering services, as well as acts as a construction agent. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Tonge (Group) Co., Ltd. Shenzhen Tagen Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1963 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Guangju Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Guangju Energy Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, storage, warehousing, transportation, trading, and distribution of petroleum products and liquefied petroleum gas. The company stores, transports, and trades in chemicals; wholesales and retails refined and fuel oil; and invests in securities. It is also involved in the development, management, and leasing of real estate properties; production and supply of power and heat; construction of power plant stations; and provision of technical consulting services. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Guangju Energy Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Shennan Petroleum Group Co., Ltd.

name: CITIC Offshore Helicopter Co.,Ltd.
summary: CITIC Offshore Helicopter Co.,Ltd. engages in offshore oil and general aviation development activities in China. The company provides sea navigation, aviation maintenance, aviation training, capital operation, and drone services. It has a fleet of approximately 70 helicopters. The company was formerly known as China National Offshore Helicopter Professional Company. CITIC Offshore Helicopter Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Yihua Healthcare Co., Ltd.
summary: Yihua Healthcare Co., Ltd. provides medical and elderly care services in China. The company offers integrated medical and logistic services, including medical facilities maintenance, environmental management, safety management, and medical auxiliary services. It also provides medical professional engineering, hospital management, and online medical services. In addition, the company operates as a membership aging communities; and provides old-age management services. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: China National Complete Plant Import & Export Corporation Limited
summary: China National Complete Plant Import & Export Corporation Limited operates as a general trading company in Asia, Africa, and Latin America. The company exports equipment for various industries, such as transportation and infrastructure. It exports products related to machinery, agricultural products, textiles, light industrial products, educational supplies, chemical products, building materials, electronic machinery, solar energy systems, etc. The company is also involved in the contracting of foreign projects. China National Complete Plant Import & Export Corporation Limited was founded in 1959 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Anhui Fengyuan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Fengyuan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells biological pharmacy, chemical pharmacy, and traditional Chinese medicines primarily in China. The company offers antipyretic-analgesic, cardiovascular, antibiotic, nervous system, anti-tumor, antiulcer, and hormone drugs, as well as nutraceuticals. It also provides general medicines for vitamin and mineral deficiency; medicines for resisting parasitic diseases and microorganisms; coenzymes; and antiviral and uterine contractive medicines. In addition, the company offers sedative-hypnotic drugs; drugs for curing mesenteric stress syndrome; drugs for lowering blood pressure; and drugs for curing benign prostatic hyperplasia. It also exports its products to Europe, North America, Africa, Southeast Asia, and Central Asia. The company is based in Hefei, China.

name: Wasu Media Holding Co.,Ltd
summary: Wasu Media Holding Co.,Ltd engages in media and cable network businesses in China. It offers interactive TV, 3G mobile TV, and Internet TV services. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Genuine Unicom New Material Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wasu Media Holding Co.,Ltd in October 2012. Wasu Media Holding Co.,Ltd was founded in 1994 and is based in Hangzhou, China. Wasu Media Holding Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Wasu Digital TV Media Group Co., Ltd.

name: Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science and Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of construction and agricultural machinery in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company operates through Construction Machinery, Agricultural Machinery, and Financial Services segments. It offers concrete machineries, including truck and trailer mounted concrete pumps, dry mortar products, concrete placing booms, concrete mixing plants, truck-mounted concrete mixers, truck-mounted line concrete pumps, and self-propelled boom concrete pumps; and truck, all-terrain truck, and crawler cranes, as well as various tower cranes. The company also provides road construction and pile foundation machineries, earth working machineries, material handling machineries and systems, specialized vehicles, and vehicle axles; road building and maintenance machineries; hoisting machineries; and forklift trucks and other products for infrastructure and real estate construction. In addition, it offers various agricultural machineries, such as tractors, grain harvesters, and drying machines. Further, it provides finance leasing, commercial factoring, and bond issuance services. Additionally, the company leases and trades in equipment and machineries; researches and manufactures machine software; manages tourism resource; and offers hydraulic products. The company was formerly known as Changsha Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science and Technology Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science and Technology Co., Ltd. in October 2011. Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science and Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shijiazhuang ChangShan BeiMing Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Shijiazhuang ChangShan BeiMing Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells textile products in China. The company offers yarns, fabrics, clothing products, home textiles, and industrial textiles. It also operates a cloud data center; provides consulting, implementation, operation, and maintenance services for smart cities; and operates an online dispute resolution platform for resolving social contradictions. The company was formerly known as Shijiazhuang Changshan Textile Company Limited and changed its name to Shijiazhuang ChangShan BeiMing Technology Co., Ltd in October 2017. Shijiazhuang ChangShan BeiMing Technology Co., Ltd is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Xinjiang International Industry Co.,Ltd
summary: Xinjiang International Industry Co.,Ltd engages in oil and petrochemical, energy trade, real estate, financial investment, and other businesses in China and internationally. The company is involved in the refining, warehousing, transportation, wholesale, and retail of oil; import and export of coke, and fuel and heavy oil; and development and sale of real estate properties. It also produces biodiesel. Xinjiang International Industry Co.,Ltd was founded in 1999 and is based in Urumqi, China.

name: Shenwan Hongyuan Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenwan Hongyuan Group Co., Ltd. provides various financial services to corporate, professional institutional, individuals, and non-professional institutional customers. It operates through four segments: Enterprise Finance, Personal Finance, Institutional Services and Trading, and Investment Management. The Enterprise Finance segment offers equity financing, debt financing, financial advisory, equity investment, and debt and other investment services. The Personal Finance segment provides securities and futures brokerage, stock-backed lending, margin financing, securities lending, and investment advisory services, as well as sells financial products. The Institutional Services and Trading segment offers prime brokerage, and research and consultation services for professional institutional clients; and equity, and fixed income currencies and commodities proprietary trading to institutional clients. The Investment Management segment provides asset management, mutual fund management, and private equity fund management services. The company was formerly known as Shenyin Wanguo Securities Co., Ltd and changed its name to Shenwan Hongyuan Group Co., Ltd. in January 2015. Shenwan Hongyuan Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Urumqi, China.

name: Jiangsu Eastern Shenghong Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Eastern Shenghong Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of civilian polyester fiber related products. It also engages in the production and supply of thermoelectric power. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Midea Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Midea Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells home appliances, and robotic and automation systems in China and internationally. It operates through four segments: Heating & Ventilation, as well as Air-Conditioner; Consumer Appliances; Robotics and Automation System; and Others. The company offers split, window, portable, and dehumidifier residential air conditioners (ACs); light commercial ACs; and commercial ACs, such as variable refrigerant flow, DC inverter air-cooled chillers and mini chillers, chiller terminals, rooftop, and ATW and commercial heat pump water heaters. It also provides T-type, side by side, three cycle independent, two doors no frost combi, double layered tempered glass, and double crispers refrigerators, as well as wine coolers, and freezers; laundry products comprising washing machines and tumble dryers; kitchen appliance products, such as hoods, hobs, ovens, microwaves, slow cookers, dishwashers, and food waste disposers; and small appliances, including kettles, blenders, juicers, mixers, rice cookers, pressure cookers, induction cookers, contact grills, air fryers, fans and heaters, etc. In addition, the company offers air conditioner, refrigerator, and heat pump heating compressors; household and light commercial air conditioner, and washing machine motors; smart logistics solutions; and manufactures and sells robots. Further, it engages in sale, wholesale, and processing of raw materials of household electrical appliances; and financial business involved in customer deposits, interbank lending and borrowings, consumption credits, buyer's credits, petty loans, factoring, and finance leases. Additionally, the company provides Internet of Things solutions for intelligent appliances. It markets its products under the Midea, Little Swan, MDV, Clivet, GMCC, Welling, MR, TOSHIBA, HICONICS, SUNYE, DORNA, and SERVOTRONIX brand names. Midea Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.

name: Weichai Power Company Ltd.
summary: Weichai Power Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells diesel engines, automobiles, and other major automobile components in China and internationally. It operates through Engines, Automobiles and Automobile Components, and Intelligent Logistics segments. The company provides design, development, production, sale, repair, and import and export of engines and auxiliary products, automobile axles, gear boxes and components, and other automobile components; hydraulic pumps and motors; hydraulic valves; gears and gear transmission devices; ancillary casting and casting products of hydraulic components; internal combustion engines, new energy powertrain systems and ancillary products; technical consultation and technical services; leasing of self-owned houses; steel; business management services; and forklift trucks, and warehousing technology and supply chain solution services. It offers its products under various brands, including Weichai Power Engine, Fast Gear, Hande Axle, Shacman Heavy Truck, and Linder Hydraulics. Weichai Power Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Weifang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Tangshan Jidong Cement Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tangshan Jidong Cement Co.,Ltd. produces and sells cement, ready-mixed concrete, and clinker in China. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Pacific Shuanglin Bio-pharmacy Co., LTD
summary: Pacific Shuanglin Bio-pharmacy Co., Ltd. engages in the biochemical engineering, pharmaceutical industry equipment, and medical materials businesses in China. Its lead products include human serum albumin, human immunoglobulin, intravenous human immunoglobulin (PH4), human rabies immunoglobulin, hepatitis B human immunoglobulin, tetanus human immunoglobulin, tianqi analgesic cream, musk herd cream, musk bone paste, anti-inflammatory analgesic cream, dieshangling plasters, and medical gauzes. The company is also involved in the development of porcine pulmonary surfactants, shaqifang compounds, a1-protease inhibitors, human coagulation factor VIII products, and human fibrinogens. In addition, it engages in the investment, consultation, and technology promotion of pharmaceutical and biotechnology development projects; real estate development; and electronic product information consultation, as well as in the provision of electricity. The company was formerly known as Southern Shuanglin Bio-pharmacy Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Pacific Shuanglin Bio-pharmacy Co., Ltd. in April 2021. Pacific Shuanglin Bio-pharmacy Co., Ltd. is based in Taiyuan, China.

name: Changhong Huayi Compressor Co., Ltd.
summary: Changhong Huayi Compressor Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells various compressors in China and internationally. Its products are used in refrigerators, freezers, water dispensers, ice machines, and dehumidifiers. The company was formerly known as Huayi Compressor Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changhong Huayi Compressor Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Changhong Huayi Compressor Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Jingdezhen, China.

name: Shandong Shengli Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Shengli Co., Ltd. engages in the agro-chemical, plastic pipe, natural gas and oil products, and other industrial investment businesses in China. The company engages in the investment, construction, operation, and management of natural gas pipelines and natural gas urban pipeline networks; and transmission and distribution of liquefied natural gas (LNG) and compressed natural gas (CNG). It also researches and develops, produces, and sells herbicides, fungicides, and pesticides; and provides polyethylene pipes for use in urban gas transmission and distribution, water supply and drainage, environmental protection, chemical industry, etc. The company operates approximately 60 CNG filling stations, 20 LNG filling stations, 3 CNG mother stations, and an LNG liquefaction plant. Shandong Shengli Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Jinan, China.

name: Zangge Holding Company Limited
summary: Zangge Holding Company Limited produces and sells potassium chloride under the Blue Sky brand in China. It also produces magnesium chloride under the Airline brand. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Golmud City, China.

name: Shenyang Machine Tool Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenyang Machine Tool Co., Ltd. provides cutting, milling, boring, and drilling solutions. The company offers horizontal and vertical lathes, and turning and milling centers; and special machinery, such as pipe thread, axle, differential case, hub, pipe coupling, sucker rod, and wheelset machines, as well as flexible machining units using turning in place of grinding. It also provides gantry type machining, horizontal milling and boring machining, vertical machining, and high speed machining centers; CNC milling and boring lathes/machining centers; and CNC drilling machines. It serves automobile, wind energy, aviation, coal mine machinery, shipbuilding, electronics, rail transport, and engineering machinery industries. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenyang, China.

name: Tunghsu Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tunghsu Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the development and sale of liquid crystal glass substrates and equipment in China. It also offers energy buses, and single-layer graphene and graphene-based lithium-ion battery related products; and purchases and sells memory chip products, peripherals and e-sports main computers, LCD screen modules, and whole machine products. In addition, the company is involved in the development and sale of real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Shijiazhuang Baoshi Electronic Glass Co., Ltd. Tunghsu Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Bohai Leasing Co., Ltd.
summary: Bohai Leasing Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a leasing company in the People's Republic of China. The company offers leasing services for aircraft, containers, infrastructure and real estate, high-end equipment, ships and maritime equipment, and new energy vehicles. It also provides insurance, securities, and Internet financing services. The company was formerly known as Bohai Capital Holding Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Bohai Leasing Co., Ltd. in November 2018. Bohai Leasing Co., Ltd. Was founded in 1993 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Minsheng Holdings Co.,Ltd
summary: Minsheng Holdings Co.,Ltd provides financial services in China. The company offers property, car, civil, and rights certificate pawn services, as well as consultation and evaluation services; and mergers and acquisitions, and equity investment services. It also provides risk management consulting, property and personal insurance brokerage, and reinsurance brokerage services. The company was formerly known as Minsheng Investment Management Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Minsheng Holdings Co.,Ltd in April 2014. Minsheng Holdings Co.,Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Hefei Department Store Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Hefei Department Store Group Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, operates department stores in China. The company operates 26 department store shopping centers, 191 supermarkets under the Jiafu name, 26 hundred electrical appliances stores, 300 chain stores, one hundred cross-border direct sales centers under the Tesco name, 3 large agricultural product wholesale markets, and 22 standardized vegetable markets. It is also involved in the small loan business, e-commerce and cross-border direct sales, airport entry port operation, and online and offline integration, as well as domestic and foreign trade combined industrial system services. The company was founded in 1959 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Changsha Tongcheng Holdings Co.,Ltd
summary: Changsha Tongcheng Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in merchandising business in China. The company operates department stores, including shopping malls, electrical appliance chains, specialty stores, and supermarkets. It also provides tourism and hotel, and pawn broking services. The company operates four hotels, including commercial, leisure vacation, and conference hotels. In addition, it is involved in property management and investment activities. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Nanjing Public Utilities Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Public Utilities Development Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the passenger transportation business in China. The company owns approximately 2,363 taxi vehicles. It offers passenger taxi, electric taxi, highway passenger transportation, and tourist-chartered passenger transportation services; and operates gas pipelines. The company also engages in the sale of automobiles; car purchasing, licensing, repair, insurance, display, entertainment, maintenance, and parts supply activities; construction, real estate development, commercial housing sale, and leasing activities; and power generation business. In addition, it engages in outbound tourism, inbound tourism, domestic tourism, airline ticketing, business travel exhibition, and e-commerce businesses. Further, the company provides small loans and financial services for agriculture, rural areas, small and medium-sized enterprises, and self-employed individuals; and driving school training, and other services. The company was formerly known as Nanjing Zhongbei (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nanjing Public Utilities Development Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Nanjing Public Utilities Development Co., Ltd. is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Hubei Yihua Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei Yihua Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemicals and fertilizers in China and internationally. The company offers liquid chlorine, industrial sodium hydroxide, high purity hydrochloric acid, and polyvinyl chlorides. It also manufactures, installs, and trades thermoelectric and chemical machinery products. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: XCMG Construction Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: XCMG Construction Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, and sale of construction machinery in China. It provides subsurface excavation bogies, bridge construction equipment, dredgers, and drills; hoisting, road, concrete, pilling, firefighting, sanitation, mining, trenchless, boring, and other construction machineries; and loaders, excavators, heavy-duty and forklift trucks, and aerial working equipment. The company also exports its products. The company has a strategic cooperation agreement with Cummins Inc. to develop digital and networked technologies and applications. XCMG Construction Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Xuzhou, China.

name: Inner Mongolia Xingye Mining Co., Ltd.
summary: Inner Mongolia Xingye Mining Co., Ltd. engages in the mining, extracting, and smelting of non-ferrous and precious metals. Its products include lead, zinc, silver, tin, copper, iron, bismuth, tungsten, and other non-ferrous metals. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Chifeng, China.

name: Huatian Hotel Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huatian Hotel Group Co.,Ltd. operates hotels in China. The company operates hotels that offer mall, food, banquet, spa, and other services. Huatian Hotel Group Co.,Ltd. is based in Changsha, China.

name: Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, develops, constructs, and operates expressways and bridges in the People's Republic of China. The company is also involved in the toll collection, management, and maintenance of the Guangfo Expressway, the Fokai Expressway, and the Jingzhu Expressway Guangzhu section; motor transportation and warehousing operations; and the provision of car rescue, maintenance, and cleaning, as well as spare parts supply services. In addition, it invests in technical industries; and offers related consulting services. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Fokai Expressway Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd. in June 1993. Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China. Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Guangdong Communication Group Co., Ltd.

name: Zhang Jia Jie Tourism Group Co., Ltd
summary: Zhang Jia Jie Tourism Group Co., Ltd. engages in the development of tourism resources, construction of tourism infrastructure, provision of various tourism related services, and development of tourism technologies in China. The company also provides hotel, restaurant, entertainment, and leasing services; and develops real estate properties. It operates primarily in Zhangjiajie and Western Hunan, Hunan province, as well as in other regions. The company, formerly known as Zhang Jia Jie Tourism Development Co., Ltd., was founded in 1992 and is based in Zhangjiajie, China.

name: Shandong Chenming Paper Holdings Limited
summary: Shandong Chenming Paper Holdings Limited engages in the pulp production and paper making in Mainland China and internationally. It operates through Machine Paper, Financial Services, and Investment Real Estate segments. The company offers offset paper, white paper board, coated paper, lightweight coated paper, household paper, electrostatic copy paper and thermal paper, and glassine paper; and paper making raw materials and machinery. It also generates and sells electric and thermal power; manufactures, processes, and sells wood products, laminated boards, and fortified wooden floorboards; provides cement, wall materials, panel, and coal; and purchases and sells waste, as well as offers financial leasing services. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of catering services; hotel services; forestry, saplings growing, and processing and sale of timber and paper products; and mining, transportation, logistics, arboriculture, customs declaration, property management, trading, machinery manufacturing, printing and packaging, and investment management businesses. Shandong Chenming Paper Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Shouguang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Wuhan Department Store Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Department Store Group Co., Ltd. engages in the development and operation of retail industry in Hubei province, China. It operates shopping malls and supermarket chains. The company was founded in 1959 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Lvjing Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Lvjing Holding Co., Ltd. engages in real estate development business in China. Its project portfolio comprises villas, houses, merchants, and their supporting facilities. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: China Reform Health Management and Services Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Reform Health Management and Services Group Co., Ltd. offers medical insurance management services in China. It is involved in business that covers 177 medical insurance in 25 provinces. It is also involved in the pharmaceutical and medical business. The company was formerly known as SeaRainbow Holding Corp. and changed its name to China Reform Health Management and Services Group Co., Ltd. in May 2018. China Reform Health Management and Services Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Haikou, China.

name: NanHua Bio-medicine Co., Ltd
summary: NanHua Bio-medicine Co., Ltd. provides stem and immune cell storage, noninvasive genetic testing, and biological research and technical services. The company is based in Changsha, China.

name: Hainan Jingliang Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Jingliang Holdings Co., Ltd. processes, produces, and sells foodstuffs, agricultural and sideline products, oils and fats, and snack foods in China. The company offers soybean oils, rapeseed oils, sunflower seed oils, sesame oils and pastes, and others under the Gu Chuan, Lv Bao, Gu Bi, Huo Niao, and Tian Yi brands. It also develops, produces, and markets snack foods and breads, such as potato chips, and cakes and pastries under the brands of Little Prince, MS Dong, Jianqiang De Tudou, and Gu Chuan. The company was formerly known as Hainan Pearl River Holding Company Limited. Hainan Jingliang Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Haikou, China.

name: Zhongrun Resources Investment Corporation
summary: Zhongrun Resources Investment Corporation engages in the mineral exploitation and real estate investment businesses in China. It explores for precious metals, such as gold, silver, etc.; and nonferrous metals. The company has 19 mining rights and 12 exploration rights in Sichuan, Tibetan, Inner Mongolia, etc., as well as internationally. It also invests in and develops real estate properties. The company was formerly known as ShanDong ZhongRun Investment Holding Group Co., Ltd. Zhongrun Resources Investment Corporation is based in Jinan, China.

name: Zhuhai Port Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Port Co.,Ltd. engages in port logistics, energy, and infrastructure construction businesses in China. It invests in and operates port terminals, as well as engages in the provision of ship transportation and other businesses. The company also provides traditional freight, warehousing, bonded VMI, trade logistics, supply chain finance, and other logistics value-added services, as well as shipping, freight forwarding, tally, tugboat, customs declaration, and other port and shipping support services. In addition, it invests in, operates, and services clean energy sources, such as coal-fired power generation, wind power generation, and natural gas power generation projects; and constructs, operates, and maintains city pipeline gas. Further, the company develops port city projects, as well as provides property management and other services. Additionally, it provides financing leasing, supply chain finance, insurance brokerage, and industrial development funds for shipping, cargo owners, and other enterprises. The company was formerly known as Fuhua Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhuhai Port Co.,Ltd. in September 2010. Zhuhai Port Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Huasu Holdings Co.,Ltd
summary: Huasu Holdings Co.,Ltd manufactures and distributes construction materials in China. The company is also involved in garment processing business. Its products include profiles, doors, and windows, as well as clothing products. Huasu Holdings Co.,Ltd is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Sichuan Xinjinlu Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Xinjinlu Group Co., Ltd. produces and sells chlor-alkali chemicals and plastic products for industrial use in China. The company primarily offers polyvinyl chloride (PVC) resin, caustic soda, liquid chlorine, hydrochloric acid, interior wall decoration material, calendar leather, automotive interior leather and films, decorative film, and others. It also provides sodium alkali and potash, potassium hydroxide, special PVC resin, sodium hypochlorite, sodium hydroxide, and calcium carbide; and chemical design, warehousing, and other services. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Jinlu Group Co., Ltd. Sichuan Xinjinlu Group Co., Ltd. is based in Deyang, China.

name: Livzon Pharmaceutical Group Inc.
summary: Livzon Pharmaceutical Group Inc. engages in the research, development, production, and distribution of pharmaceutical products in the People's Republic of China. Its products include Ilaprazole enteric coated tablets for the treatment of duodenal ulcers and reflux esophagitis; Laprazole sodium for injection to treat peptic ulcer hemorrhage; Leuprorelin Acetate Microspheres for injection; Urofollitropin for injection to treat anovulation and sufferers; Perospirone Hydrochloride for the treatment of schizophrenia; Anti-viral Granules to treat upper respiratory tract infection and influenza; and Shenqi Fuzheng Injection for the treatment of weakness and tiredness, lassitude, spontaneous sweating, vertigo, and for the patients of lung cancer and stomach cancer. The company also offers active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and intermediates, such as diagnostic kit for IgM/IgG antibody to coronavirus; and diagnostic reagents and equipment, including diagnostic kit for human immunodeficiency virus antibody, diagnostic kit for anti-nuclear antibody panel, and diagnostic kit for tuberculosis specific infected T cells. In addition, it provides biologic products, traditional Chinese drug medicine, biochemical drugs, microbiological preparations, antibiotics, and pharmaceutical raw materials. The company also exports its products. Livzon Pharmaceutical Group Inc. was founded in 1985 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Chongqing Yukaifa Co., Ltd
summary: Chongqing Yukaifa Co., Ltd. operates as a real estate development company in China. It is also involved in municipal asset, exhibition, and property management businesses. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Chongqing, China.

name: Rongan Property Co.,Ltd.
summary: Rongan Property Co.,Ltd. develops and sells real estate properties in China. The company develops residential properties for home buyers and upper sizers; and commercial properties. It also operates and leases office buildings and mixed-use commercial buildings; and provides property development operating and management services, including planning, design, development management, marketing, and client management services. In addition, the company offers professional property management services for residential and commercial office buildings. Rongan Property Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Jiangsu Sihuan Bioengineering Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Sihuan Bioengineering Co., Ltd. engages in the pharmaceutical business in China. It offers Drewson, an anti-tumor biotherapeutic drug for the treatment of renal cancer, malignant melanoma, and cancerous thoracic and peritoneal effusion; and Xinde Lusheng for the treatment of kidney cancer, melanoma, lung cancer, gastric cancer, malignant lymphoma, breast cancer, ovarian tumor, bowel cancer, bladder cancer, head and neck tumor, leukemia and cancerous pleural effusion, etc. The company also provides Xin grain health, a recombinant human granulocyte colony stimulating factor injection; and Tourbo, a recombinant human erythropoietin injection for the treatment of anemia caused by renal insufficiency, including dialysis and non-dialysis patients. Jiangsu Sihuan Bioengineering Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Jiangyin, China.

name: Changhong Meiling Co., Ltd.
summary: Changhong Meiling Company Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical appliances in China. It also researches, develops, manufactures, and sells low temperature freezerand refrigeration, air-conditioners, kitchen and toilet products, home appliances, water purifier, and washing machines, as well as sells white goods. In addition, the company engages in the sale of prepackaged food, dairy products, general merchandise, alcohol, beverage, agricultural and crop planting products; imports and exports technology and self-support goods; develops and maintains e-commerce software; and offers technology development, information, technical transfer, Internet, domestic ad designing, production, and agency services. Further, it is involved in e-business of agricultural products; after sale services of washing machines; and produces and sells of Internet of Things equipment's, and computer hardware and software. The company offers its products through various channels, such as chains, wholesale, e-commerce, and others, as well as exports its products to approximately 130 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Hefei Meiling Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changhong Meiling Company Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Changhong Meiling Company Co., Ltd. is based in Hefei, China.

name: Lonkey Industrial Co.,Ltd.Guangzhou
summary: Lonkey Industrial Co.,Ltd.Guangzhou manufactures and sells detergents in China. The company offers washing powders, liquid detergents, soaps, fabric and homecare cleaning products, and personal care products. It offers its products under Langqi, Gaofuli, Tianli, Renaissance, Weikeyi, Kuan'an, and Jiannengjing brands. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Guangzhou Lingnan Group Holdings Company Limited
summary: Guangzhou Lingnan Group Holdings Company Limited engages in the tourism, hotel, exhibition, and travel businesses in China. It provides outbound tourism, domestic tourism, inbound tourism, etc.; operates international and domestic air ticketing agents, conventions, scenic spot development and management, overseas study consultation, property management, information technology consulting services, computer technology development, technical, and other services; and travel agency. The company also operates hotels. In addition, it engages in the planning, organizing, and reception of various exhibitions and conferences. Additionally, the company offers various imported or domestic cars, commercial vehicles, station wagons, and taxis on long-term and temporary rental basis, as well as for conferences, travel, wedding banquets, and guest transfers; and other car services. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Dongfang Hotel Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangzhou Lingnan Group Holdings Company Limited in May 2015. Guangzhou Lingnan Group Holdings Company Limited is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Xueda (Xiamen) Education Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Xueda (Xiamen) Education Technology Group Co., Ltd. engages in the development, operation, and management of real estate properties. It is involved in the development of residential communities and commercial projects; and sale and lease of commodity housings, office buildings, and commercial plazas. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Unigroup Xue Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xueda (Xiamen) Education Technology Group Co., Ltd. in April 2021. Xueda (Xiamen) Education Technology Group Co., Ltd. is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Guangxi Liugong Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangxi Liugong Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells construction machinery. The company offers excavators, wheel loaders, skid steer loaders, backhoe loaders, dozers, motor graders, rollers, pavers, cold planers, cranes, mining trucks, crushers, drilling rigs, diaphragm wall rigs, trench cutters, and material handling equipment, as well as parts and maintenance services. It serves agriculture, demolition, forestry, general construction, landscaping, material handling, mining, oil and gas, port, quarry and aggregate, road construction, and utility industries. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Liuzhou, China.

name: Guangdong Guanghong Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Guanghong Holdings Co., Ltd. primarily supplies meat food in China. It also publishes and sells primary/middle school textbooks through 60 train stores. The company offers its meat products through frozen food store and frozen food distribution center. Guangdong Guanghong Holdings Co., Ltd. is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Bingshan Refrigeration & Heat Transfer Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Bingshan Refrigeration & Heat Transfer Technologies Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, sale, installation, and maintenance of industrial and commercial refrigeration and air-conditioning equipment in China. It also engages in refrigerated and frozen food storage business; and the provision of after-sales, maintenance, warranty, and other services. The company was formerly known as Dalian Refrigeration Company Limited and changed its name to Bingshan Refrigeration & Heat Transfer Technologies Co., Ltd. in December 2019. The company was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Dalian, China.

name: Guangzhou Hengyun Enterprises Holding Ltd
summary: Guangzhou Hengyun Enterprises Holding Ltd. generates and sells power and heat in China. It operates coal-fired units with a total installed capacity of 1.08 million kilowatts. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Zhuhai Huajin Capital Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Huajin Capital Co., Ltd. engages in the equity investment, asset management, physical, incubator, and other businesses in China and internationally. It offers investment management, private equity fund management, venture capital, venture capital consulting, and venture management services; and real estate finance and asset management services. The company also researches and develops optical and electromechanical precision mechanical equipment, including lithium ion battery production equipment, plug-in aluminum electrolytic capacitor, and chip electrolytic capacitor production equipment; and constructs, operates, manages, and consults water purification plants and environmental projects. In addition, it engages in technology incubator, technical services, property management, and park construction and operation activities; and enterprise management, product development, and investment and technology consulting activities. The company was formerly known as Leaguer Stock Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhuhai Huajin Capital Co., Ltd. in April 2017. Zhuhai Huajin Capital Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Guangdong Shunna Electric Co., Ltd
summary: Guangdong Shunna Electric Co., Ltd. provides power transmission and distribution equipment in China. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: Wedge Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Wedge Industrial Co., Ltd. invests in, develops, sells, and operates real estate properties in China. It also engages in power generation and steam heat supply activities. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Wanze Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wedge Industrial Co., Ltd. in May 2013. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Tianjin Guangyu Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Guangyu Development Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development business in China. The company develops, constructs and sells high-rise flats, villas, townhouses, etc. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Nankai Gode Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tianjin Guangyu Development Co., Ltd. in June 2005. Tianjin Guangyu Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Yunnan Baiyao Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Yunnan Baiyao Group Co.,Ltd engages in the pharmaceutical business in China and internationally. It provides health products, drugs, medical instruments, Chinese medicine resources, and tea. The company offers its products under the Yunnan Baiyao, Yunfeng, Tong Qiaoqiao, Yunjian, Life, Jinkoujian, Langjian, Yangyuanqing, Caizhiji, Baiyao Health, Leopard Seven, Qiancaotang, Qiancao Meizi, and Tianzihong brand names. Yunnan Baiyao Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1902 and is based in Kunming, China.

name: Zhongtian Financial Group Company Limited
summary: Zhongtian Financial Group Company Limited provides various financial services. The company offers various insurance products; investment banking services, such as capital management, wealth management, and brokerage; private banking services; and investment funds, as well as professional financial asset trading platforms. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Guiyang, China.

name: Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co.,Ltd
summary: Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co., Ltd., designs, manufactures, and markets lighting products and electrical equipment in the People's Republic of China and internationally. Its products primarily include LED light sources and luminaries, automotive LED luminaries, traditional lighting products, and switches and sockets, as well as LED indoor and outdoor lighting products, electrical tapes, and switch panels. Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: An Hui Wenergy Company Limited
summary: An Hui Wenergy Company Limited produces and supplies electricity and heat in China. The company generates electricity through thermal power, hydropower, nuclear power, and environmental protection power units. It also invests in, develops, and manages high-tech and foreign exchange earning projects; and undertakes power, heat, energy, and related projects, as well as power construction related to the development of raw materials. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Gpro Titanium Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Gpro Titanium Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells titanium powder in China. Its products are used in coating, papermaking, chemical fiber, ink, plastic tube, film, rubber, and leather, cosmetic, and other fields. The company also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Africa, the United States, and other countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Jilin Gpro Titanium Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gpro Titanium Industry Co., Ltd. in March 2017. Gpro Titanium Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1957 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Jinyuan EP Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinyuan EP Co., Ltd. engages in the cement, concrete, and environmental businesses. It offers cement and ready-mixed concrete; and cement kiln co-disposal of hazardous solid waste, as well as rare metals recycling services. The company was formerly known as Jinyuan Cement Co., Ltd. Jinyuan EP Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Addsino Co., Ltd.
summary: Addsino Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the military and civilian integration business in China. It offers electronic blue army plate products, such as microwave darkroom testing, electromagnetic environment monitoring, passive radar calibration, simulated radar, and target simulator systems; and alleged communication sections, including network equipment, wireless devices, and wired equipment. The company also provides simulation and equipment information solutions comprising parachute training simulators, heavy vehicle simulators, digital earth solutions, and joint combat simulation deduction platforms; and electromagnetic protection and lightning protection grounding products, such as electromagnetic information security and protection equipment. In addition, it offers rail transit and automotive electronics consisting of motor controller, dual main gas engine management system, lithium battery management systems, vehicle controllers, and AFC system integration solutions; and power equipment, such as SG224 brushless three-phase synchronous generators, multi-machine parallel series diesel generator sets, automotive power station series, trailer type mobile power station series, low noise series diesel generator sets, and basic series generator sets. The company was formerly known as ChinaScholars Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Addsino Co., Ltd. in August 2015. Addsino Co., Ltd. was founded in 1955 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangling Motors Corporation, Ltd.
summary: Jiangling Motors Corporation, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, assembles, manufactures, and sells automobiles, engines and automobile related parts, and dies and tools in China and internationally. Its products include commercial vehicles, light trucks, heavy trucks, pickup and light buses, SUVs, and MPVs, as well as light EVI trucks and buses, and other products. The company also produces and sells engines, castings, and other components. Jiangling Motors Corporation, Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Nanchang, China.

name: Create Technology & Science Co.,Ltd.
summary: Create Technology & Science Co.,Ltd., an investment holding company, primarily researches, develops, produces, and sells high voltage insulators, and clean environmental protection equipment and engineering products in China and internationally. It offers purification equipment, power transmission and transformation high voltage porcelain insulators, precision bearings, surveying and mapping instruments, and abrasives. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Gansu Jingyuan Coal Industry & Electricity Power Co., Ltd
summary: Gansu Jingyuan Coal Industry & Electricity Power Co., Ltd. engages in the coal mining business in China. It is also involved in the thermal power and heat supply, gas power generation, and other businesses. The company is based in Baiyin, China.

name: ADAMA Ltd.
summary: ADAMA Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a crop protection company. The company operates through Crop Protection (Agro), and Intermediates and Ingredients segments. It develops, produces, and commercializes herbicides, insecticides, and fungicides for farmers to protect from weeds, insects, and diseases. The company also offers intermediate materials and ingredients, such as food additives, Lycopan, synthetic aromatic products, dietary supplements, food colors, texture and flavor enhancers, food fortification ingredients, and other chemicals. In addition, it provides fragrance products for perfume, cosmetics, body care, and detergents industries; industrial products; and consumer and professional solutions. Further, the company engages in the other non-material activities. It primarily operates in Europe, North America, Latin America, the Asia Pacific, India, the Middle East, and Africa. The company was formerly known as Hubei Sanonda Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ADAMA Ltd. in December 2018. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. ADAMA Ltd. is a subsidiary of Syngenta Group Co., Ltd.

name: SINOPEC Shandong Taishan Pectroleum Co.,Ltd.
summary: SINOPEC Shandong Taishan Pectroleum Co.,Ltd. purchases and sells petroleum oil products in China. The company's principal products include gasoline, diesel oil, lubricating oil, and other petrochemicals. It is also involved in the supply of natural gas. The company is based in Taian, China.

name: Ningxia Western Venture Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningxia Ningdong Railway Co., Ltd. offers railway construction services.
