summary: RiseSun Real Estate Development Co.,Ltd develops and sells real estate properties in China. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Langfang, China.

name: Neoglory prosperity Inc.
summary: Neoglory prosperity Inc. operates as a commercial real estate company. The company also manufactures and sells precision machineries. In addition, it is involved in the tourism industry. The company is based in Ma'anshan, China. Neoglory prosperity Inc. is a subsidiary of Neoglory Holdings Group Co. Ltd.

name: Beijing Bewinner Communications Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Bewinner Communications Co., Ltd. operates as a mobile Internet service provider in China. The company offers mobile value-added services; virtual operator services; and mobile game distribution services. It also engages in the Internet of things and mobile resale businesses. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangsu Tongrun Equipment Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Tongrun Equipment Technology Co.,Ltd produces and sells metal tool cabinets in China. It offers precision sheet metal parts, photo-voltaic inverters, electrical control cabinets, high and low voltage circuit breakers, agricultural products, etc. The company also provides HV/LV complete-set switchgears and HV/LV electrics. It also exports its products to approximately 140 countries. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Torin Office Furniture Co., Ltd. Jiangsu Tongrun Equipment Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2002 and is based in Changshu, China.

name: Beijing BDStar Navigation Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing BDStar Navigation Co., Ltd. provides satellite navigation, and positioning products and services worldwide. asic products, automotive electronics, special application, and industry applications & operational services. The company provides high precision and navigation products, such as GNSS SoC chips, modules, and boards; GNSS antennas, including survey, choke ring, aviation, Helix/UAV, beacon, smart, and OEM antennas, as well as H-RTK GNSS modules; and wireless data links comprising OEM modems, external radios, and accessories. It also offers iridium antennas; mobile base station antennas, including regular base station and integrative concealment antennas; and RF passive components comprising low and high temperature co-fired, and microwave dielectric ceramics; and soft magnetism ferrite materials. In addition, the company provides passive, active, monopole/dipole, and special antennas; GNSS, CATV, Bluetooth, and WIFI modules; and ceramic substrates comprising LTCC, HTCC, and composite substrates. Further, it offers automotive electronic products, such as infotainment system, reconfigurable instrument cluster, heads-up display, and T-BOX; and automotive engineering services, including automotive electronics testing and verification engineering, and software development services, as well as services for driving assistance, infotainment, and related systems. The company's products are used in various applications, such as measuring, mapping, mechanical control, vehicle monitoring, automotive electronics, precision agriculture, aero logical sounding, precision timing, etc. Beijing BDStar Navigation Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Beijing Shiji Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Shiji Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides software solutions and services for the hospitality, food service, retail, and entertainment industries in China and internationally. It also offers payment gateways; data management solutions; IT services for restaurants; POS hardware, kitchen printers, and screens; inventory management software for restaurants; and e-commerce platforms for stores, products, orders, purchasing, delivery, maintenance, storage, finance, loyalty programs, and reporting. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Baoxiniao Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Baoxiniao Holding Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of clothing products in China. Its products include men's suit, jackets, shirts, single pants, coats, suit pants, and vests. The company sells its products through approximately 1,500 sales outlets and online sales network. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Wenzhou, China.

name: Hunan Gold Corporation Limited
summary: Hunan Gold Corporation Limited engages in the exploration, mining, processing, smelting, and refining of gold ingot, tantalum, tungsten, and niobium products in China. Its principal products include gold, fine bismuth, antimony oxide, yttrium oxide, tungsten concentrate, and ammonium paratungstate products. It is also involved in the mine development and design, mechanical repair, and logistics and international trade activities. The company offers its products under the Chenzhou brand. The company was formerly known as Chenzhou Mining Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hunan Gold Corporation Limited in May 2015. Hunan Gold Corporation Limited is based in Changsha, China.

name: Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd
summary: Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd provides integrated circuit (IC) assembling and testing services to the semiconductor industry worldwide. It provides wafer-level, flip chip, flip chip interconnection, ball grid array, plastic qual flat no-lead and dual flat no-lead, small outline, small outline transistor, dual-in-line, transistor outline, and plastic single-in-line packaging series products. The company's products are used in AP/PA/BB/RFIC chips, wireless LAN, card, switch, power management, memory, and standard analog, etc.; package solution for applications in computing, gaming, and high bandwidth networking/communication devices; networking, memory, microprocessors, graphic processors, logic, and micro-controllers; and consumer products, automotive devices, and analog ICs. Its products are also used in wireless/RF and analog devices, portable products, data storage systems, notebook computers, and pagers; power supplies, converters and power motor controls, hand-held instruments, battery powered consumer products, etc.; and automotive consumer and communications products. The company was formerly known as Nantong Fujitsu Microelectronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd in December 2016. Tongfu Microelectronics Co.,Ltd was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nantong, China.

name: Jiangxi Zhengbang Technology Co.Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Zhengbang Technology Co.Ltd. operates in the agricultural industry in China. The company offers rice products, feed, veterinary drugs, and pesticides. It also engages in the livestock and poultry breeding business. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Nanchang, China.

name: Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and after-sales service of screw compressors in China. Its products include screw refrigerating, refrigerant, and air compressors, as well as vacuum pumps. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Hanbell Machinery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd. in December 2005. Shanghai Hanbell Precise Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Wuhan Sante Cableway Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Sante Cableway Group Co., Ltd. operates in the tourism industry in China. The company invests in, constructs, and operates approximately 20 sightseeing ropeway and scenic spots projects, including Huashan cableway in Shaanxi; Qiandao Lake cableway in Zhejiang; Fanjing Mountain scenic spot in Guizhou; and Monkey Island scenic spot in Hainan. It also operates a tourism complex. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Jiangsu Alcha Aluminium Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Alcha Aluminium Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, processing, and sale of aluminum foils, coated aluminum foils for air conditioner, and aluminum strips and plates in China. Its primary products include fin stock for air conditioner, aluminum non-clad and clad materials for heat exchanger of automobile, PS sheet and plates, blind stock, aluminum alloy sheets, etc., as well as alloy foils for automotive parts. The company also exports its products to approximately 30 countries. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Alcha Aluminium Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Alcha Aluminium Group Co., Ltd. in May 2019. Jiangsu Alcha Aluminium Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in Changshu, China.

name: Invengo Information Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Invengo Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides radio frequency identification technology, products, and systems solutions in China and internationally. The company offers retail tags, fixed and portable readers, retail equipment, and application software for retail application; and book equipment products, such as book labels, self-help library products, self-service lending systems, mobile inventory systems, book sorting systems, and security access control systems. It also provides railway application products, including car number labels, reading devices, portable readers, compilers, and simulation testing equipment; and textile washing products comprising textile washing labels, reading and writing equipment, RFID cabinets, application software, and other products. In addition, the company offers travel application products consisting of passport products, and reading writing instruments; and RFID products, such as electronic tags, readers, and antennas and others. Invengo Information Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Everjoy Health Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Everjoy Health Group Co., Ltd. produces and sells tiles in China. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Hainan Development Holdings Nanhai Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Development Holdings Nanhai Co., Ltd. manufactures, sells, and installs specialty glass, aviation materials, and PV curtain walls in China and internationally. The company offers glass products, including silica sand, low-e energy efficient glass, ultra-clear TCO glass, glass substrates, aviation glass, high-speed train glass, fire-proof glass, etc.; low-e energy-saving sheet, low iron TCO sheet, low iron PV sheet, and special sheet glass products; special fabricated glass products, such as electronic and solar glass, as well as energy-saving and safety architectural glass products, such as laminated glass, insulated glass, tempered glass, ceramic frit glass, fire-rated glass, bullet-proof glass, etc.; and ultrathin, tinted, and low iron glass products. It also provides single/double silver low-e IGU, temperable low-e, heat reflective glass, flat/bent tempered/HS glass, flat/bent laminated glass, flat/bent IGU, ceramic frit glass, bullet-resistant glass, fire-rated glass, laminated glass, 3D heat curved glass etc. In addition, the company offers high precision electron, electric appliances, solar energy anti-reflective, and anti-glare glasses, as well as magic mirror glass for LCD screens, shield glass, AZO coating glass, coating glass, super flat strengthened glass, glass bases, glass for electronic scales and home electronic appliances, etc. Additionally, the company provides curtain wall, skylight, and cladding systems, as well as aluminum windows and doors. Further, it offers design, processing, construction, and maintenance services; and custom design and engineering, testing, material procurement, fabrication drawing, in-house fabrication, and overseas delivery. The company was formerly known as AVIC Sanxin Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hainan Development Holdings Nanhai Co., Ltd. in June 2020. Hainan Development Holdings Nanhai Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Ningbo Donly Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Donly Co.,Ltd researches and develops, produces, and services transmission equipment in China. The company offers gearboxes, motors, couplings, and transmission products primarily used in metallurgy, mining, water conservancy, electric power, petrochemical, building materials, ports, light industry, environmental protection, and other industries. It also engages in development, production, and sale of automatic control devices and automatic induction doors, for medical door, commercial door, and industrial door systems, as well as offers engineering services. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Donly Transmission Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningbo Donly Co.,Ltd in January 2014. Ningbo Donly Co.,Ltd was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.

name: Hongbaoli Group Corporation, Ltd.
summary: Hongbaoli Group Corporation, Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells polyether and isopropanol products in China. The company offers polyether polyol for use in refrigerator insulation, spray foam, building board, and pipe insulation materials; polyurethane exterior insulation board for use in exterior wall insulation/internal insulation/self-heat insulation, and other wall insulation; and isopropanolamine for use in surfactants, pharmaceutical and pesticide intermediates, metalworking fluids, and oil and natural gas applications. It also provides propylene oxide for use in polyether polyols, propylene glycol and ether, lubricant synthesis, surfactants, detergents, and insecticides; dicumyl peroxide for use in rubber vulcanizing agents, cable crosslinkers, shoe material initiators, flame retardant additives, etc.; and lithium battery material. In addition, the company offers supply chain finance. It serves the home appliances, construction, flexible packaging, transportation, shoes, medical, electronics, and other industries. Hongbaoli Group Corporation, Ltd. also exports its products to approximately 50 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Nanjing Hongbaoli Corporation, Ltd. and changed its name to Hongbaoli Group Corporation, Ltd. in May 2015. Hongbaoli Group Corporation, Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Guilin Layn Natural Ingredients Corp.
summary: Guilin Layn Natural Ingredients Corp. produces plant-based sweeteners, flavors, and botanicals in China and internationally. The company offers stevia, a plant based sweetener sourced from the leaves of the plant; monk fruit extract, a plant-based sweetener sourced from a fruit; lovia; natural flavors; and functional ingredients, as well as nutraceuticals. It also provides food and beverage ingredients; and animal and pet nutrition products under the TruGro brand. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Guangdong Orient Zirconic Ind Sci & Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Orient Zirconic Ind Sci & Tech Co., Ltd. produces and sells zirconic products. The company offers zirconium dioxide, zirconium oxychloride, stabilized zirconia, zirconia ceramic structure, zirconium silicate, fused zirconia, zirconium sponge, and ceramic knife, as well as structural parts, such as zirconium ceramic parts, cutting blades, ceramic plates/precision gauges, ceramic plungers, and various parts. Its products are used in various applications and fields, including nuclear energy, special ceramics, biological ceramics, optical communication devices, solid-fuel battery, weapons, and aerospace fields, electronic ceramics, imitation jewel, ceramic glaze color, high fireproofing, and various new materials and industries. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: Shenzhen Hifuture Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Hifuture Information Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, sells, installs, and distributes network integrated solutions of electrical equipment with insulation and miniaturization in China and internationally. The company offers electric distribution net products, such as medium pressure products, IA gas insulated ring network cabinets, IA solid insulating rings, intelligent switch on columns, Hdkf products, box type fixed switchgears, box type ring network switching equipment, Withdrawout metal clad and metal enclosed switchgears, outdoor high voltage AC drop type fuses, prefabricated substations, tube bus product information products, SMC products, and cable accessories, as well as system solutions. It also provides network traffic management services based on the marketing with data; and researches, develops, and distributes mobile games. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Hifuture Electric Co., Ltd. Shenzhen Hifuture Information Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangzhou Zhiguang Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Zhiguang Electric Co., Ltd. provides energy technology products and services. The company offers motor control, grid control, electric power cable, energy conversion, and power automation products. It also provides turnkey solution for large industrial electrical power saving and efficiency projects, and energy conservation and efficiency enhancement in large-sized power plants; optimal utilization of regional energy and integrated energy systems; and design for power engineering, as well as offers electricity investment, electricity distribution, and electricity services. Guangzhou Zhiguang Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Batian Ecotypic Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Batian Ecotypic Engineering Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of compound fertilizers in the People's Republic of China. It offers nitro phosphate fertilizers. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Anhui Truchum Advanced Materials and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Truchum Advanced Materials and Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the metal base material processing business in China and internationally. The company offers copper alloy plates/strips, copper alloy wires, conductive copper bars, cold-rolled ribbon steel products, and precision welded tubes for use in various industries, such as power electronics, hardware, automobile, machinery, LED and rail traffic, etc. It also provides thermal equipment for carbon and carborundum based composite materials, high temperature composite materials, ceramic based composite materials, high-end vacuum heat treatment, and powder metallurgy manufacturing enterprises. The company was formerly known as Anhui Jingcheng Copper Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Anhui Truchum Advanced Materials and Technology Co., Ltd. in July 2015. Anhui Truchum Advanced Materials and Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Wuhu, China.

name: Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd. produces and sells chemical fibers in China and internationally. It offers various functional fibers, such as black and flame-retardant fibers, and long bundle wire, as well as conventional viscose fibers. The company also operates hospitals, rehabilitation centers, and pharmaceutical retail chains. In addition, it offers health management, pharmaceutical logistics, and teleconsultation services, as well as distributes pharmaceutical products. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Aoyang Technology Corporation Limited. and changed its name to Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd. in September 2018. Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: YOOZOO Interactive Co., Ltd.
summary: YOOZOO Interactive Co., Ltd. engages in the development, distribution, publishing, and operation of mobile and Internet games. Its browser-based games include The Legend of the Condor Heroes, Touken Ranbu-online, The Lost Tomb, League of Angels and League of Angels II, The Great Emperor, The General, and Thirty-Six Straragems. The company also offers mobile games, such as The Advisors Alliance, Junior Monkey King, Legacy of Discord-Furious Wings, Junior Three Kingdoms, The Great Emperor-online, Super Fighter, League of Angels, and Kongfu Fantasy, as well as Mob, a mobile developer platform. The company was formerly known as YOOZOO Games Co., Ltd. and changed its name to YOOZOO Interactive Co., Ltd. in April 2021. YOOZOO Interactive Co., Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Guangzhou Kingteller Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Kingteller Technology Co.,Ltd. provides financial self-service devices and integrated solutions for the retail banking industry worldwide. The company offers a range of lobby and TTW cash dispensers, and cash recycler systems; VTM systems; pan financial equipment; media dispensers; and banknote sorters, as well as ATM spare parts card readers, printers, belts, touch screens, and EPP keypads. It also provides software solutions, including KT CAMERA, a video monitoring system; and KT VIEW, a real-time monitoring, as well as financial self-service terminals. In addition, the company offers support services, such as remote support through email, MSN, SMS, SKYPE, and hot-line support services; on-site support services comprising software installation, network integration, and hardware troubleshooting services; technical training services; and spare parts, as well as local partner's support services consisting of ATM installation, daily maintenance, and upgradation services. Guangzhou Kingteller Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Yanhua Smartech Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Yanhua Smartech Group Co., Ltd. engages in construction and operation of smart cities. The company is involved in smart city construction, consulting, energy saving, smart medical, tourism, public security, and hotel activities. Shanghai Yanhua Smartech Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of optical, electrical, fluid technology, and integrated solutions in China. Its electrical connectors include various connectors comprising circular, rectangular, data transmission, filter, and network electrical connectors, as well as RF coaxial series adapters; and optical connectors comprise optical passive connectors, optical transceiver modules, and optical and electrical equipment and systems. The company also provides interconnect solutions. Its products are used in the aviation, aerospace and military, telecom and data center equipment, railway transportation, new energy vehicle, power equipment, petroleum equipment, medical equipment, intelligent equipment, and other civil industrial fields. The company also exports its products to approximately 30 countries and regions, including Europe, the United States, Israel, Australia, Korea, India, etc. The company was formerly known as China Aviation Optical-Electrical Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd. in July 2016. AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Luoyang, China.

name: Ninestar Corporation
summary: Ninestar Corporation operates as an imaging products and service provider. Its principal products include laser printers, copiers, integrated circuit chips, replacement print consumables, and cartridge core components. The company was formerly known as Apex Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ninestar Corporation in May 2017. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhuhai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Nanjing Yunhai Special Metals Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Yunhai Special Metals Co., Ltd. engages in mining and non-ferrous metal smelting and processing in China and internationally. It offers magnesium, aluminum, strontium, and other raw materials that are used in transportation, 3C electronics, and aerospace industries. The company's products include magnesium grains and rods, magnesium alloy ingots and extrusion sheets, and aluminum alloy ingots and billets. It also provides strontium metal and master alloy products; and die casting and extrusion products, as well as micro channel flat tubes. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Eternal Asia Supply Chain Management Ltd.
summary: Eternal Asia Supply Chain Management Ltd. provides supply chain services platform services worldwide. It offers B2B/O2O sourcing/distribution, B2B2C/O2O retail, O2O financial service, O2O terminal marketing, and O2O value-added services platform services. It connects brand enterprises, logistic service providers, financial institutions, value-added service providers, and various groups to create a business ecosystem. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Tianshui Huatian Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianshui Huatian Technology Co., Ltd. operates as an IC packaging and testing company. The company offers lead frame packaging products; and analog and mixed signal/RF testing services, as well as wafer probing, test development, and design and simulation services. It has operations in China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Singapore, South Korea, the United States, etc. Tianshui Huatian Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Tianshui, China.

name: China Quanjude(Group) Co.,Ltd
summary: China Quanjude (Group) Co., Ltd. operates Chinese restaurants under the Quanjude and Mingzhu brand name in China. The company produces and sells roast duck and various cooked food products; lotus leaf cakes, sweet noodles, and other roast duck accessories; and mooncakes, dumplings, and Yuanxiao products under the Quanjude and Fangshan brand name. It also offers pasta and the courtesan brand palace cakes; and chili sauce under the Sichuan hotel brand. In addition, the company provides Fortress Garden pasta food products. Further, it offers Chinese food catering services. China Quanjude (Group) Co., Ltd. was founded in 1864 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Guangzhou Grandbuy Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Grandbuy Co., Ltd. primarily operates department stores in China. It also operates shopping and professional stores; and acts as a wholesale agent, as well as engages in online shopping business. The company is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Costar Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Costar Group Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, sells, and services optical components and parts in China. It provides various shape and special material optical lens; optical prisms for use in light engine for advanced LCDs, DLPs, and LCOS displays, as well as DVD series prisms and dichroic mirrors; and special type components, such as high-precision optical components for large-diameter super-smooth optical plano-surface and super-smooth optical spherical-surface, as well as high-power laser optical components, aspherical, infrared components, coating products, etc. The company also designs and manufactures various lens assembly, projection lens, monitoring lens, fingerprint device lens, fixed focus projection lens, and zoom projection lens; light engines, including DLP, portable LED, minisize LED embedded type, single and three panel LCOS, large type three-DLP, and laser light engines; and optical auxiliary materials. In addition, it provides mechanical parts; photoresistance cells; and single piece or glued optical low pass filter products used in digital cameras, monitoring systems, digital vidicon, etc. Costar Group Co., Ltd. exports its products to Japan, the United States, Germany, South Korea, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. The company was formerly known as Lida Optical and Electronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Costar Group Co., Ltd. in 2019. Costar Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Nanyang, China.

name: Sichuan Chengfei Integration Technology Corp.Ltd
summary: Sichuan Chengfei Integration Technology Corp.Ltd designs, develops, manufactures, and sells tools and dies in China. It offers dies for outer skin panels, such as the body side, roof, doors, and fenders used in cars; auto panel dies and panels; and stamping dies. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Chengdu, China. Sichuan Chengfei Integration Technology Corp.Ltd is a subsidiary of Aviation Industry Corporation of China.

name: Shenzhen Jinjia Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Jinjia Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, and production of packaging products and packaging materials in China. The company's products include cigarette packets, and products for electronic supplies and daily necessities. It also develops materials, such as laser holographic transfer anti-counterfeiting papers and transfer films. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Jinjia Color Printing Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Jinjia Group Co.,Ltd. in April 2016. Shenzhen Jinjia Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: YOUNGY Co.,Ltd.
summary: YOUNGY Co.,Ltd. provides energy saving and environmentally-friendly materials. It produces lithium concentrate, industrial and battery grade lithium carbonate, and lithium hydroxide monohydrate; lithium battery system; lithium salts; and lithium battery equipment, such as polymer battery automatic packaging, fixture forming, automatic air extractor, automatic liquid injection, automatic winding and ear welding, and automatic grouping machines. The company was formerly known as Luxiang Co., Ltd. and changed its name to YOUNGY Co.,Ltd. in August 2015. YOUNGY Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Shandong Ruyi Woolen Garment Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Ruyi Woolen Garment Group Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells worsted woolen fabrics and garments in China, Germany, and internationally. It offers professional clothing, and uniforms; functional wool fabrics for use in various clothing characteristics, such as anti-UV, anti-static, waterproof, oil-proof, anti-fouling, cool, moisture-permeable, heat-storing, machine washable, flame-retardant, and illuminating protection; and ecological wool fabrics. The company was formerly known as Shandong Jining Ruyi Woolen Textile Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Ruyi Woolen Garment Group Co., Ltd. in June 2017. Shandong Ruyi Woolen Garment Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jining, China.

name: Wuhan Fingu Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Fingu Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. develops and sells RF components and devices for mobile communication antenna feeder systems. The company provides filter products, such as duplexers, combiners, tower mounted amplifiers, etc.; and POI, dielectric materials, and microwave products. Wuhan Fingu Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: SZZT Electronics CO.,LTD
summary: SZZT Electronics CO.,LTD provides financial payment information security products primarily in Asia, America, Europe, and the Middle East. The company offers point of sale, kiosk, encrypted pin pad, component, and tax products, as well as financial security payment solutions. It serves the banking, traffic, retail, medical care, tourism, and O2O industries. SZZT Electronics CO.,LTD was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangdong Jiaying Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd
summary: Guangdong Jiaying Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of Chinese medicines in Mainland China, Taiwan, Hong Kong and Macao, Southeast Asia, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company provides medicines primarily for the treatment of throat, cold, orthopedics, rheumatism, gynecology, heat-clearing, and gastrointestinal diseases. It offers products in various dosage forms, such as powders, tablets, capsules, granules, and pills. The company sells its products through distribution agencies and sales outlets. Guangdong Jiaying Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is based in Meizhou, China.

name: Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd. engages in green, general contracting, environmental services, and investment businesses in China. The company is involved in the provision of engineering services, including design, construction, and maintenance services; and nursery, flower cultivation, and landscape businesses. It also undertakes the construction of urban roads and environmental facilities, infrastructure projects, urban special environmental management projects, etc.; and rural and scenic ecological environment construction projects. In addition, the company offers environmental consulting, management, professional construction, and ecological repair integrated services; water supply, sewage treatment, solid waste treatment, and hazardous waste disposal services; lake watershed management and soil remediation services; and environmental monitoring and testing services. Further, it engages in fund and industrial project investment activities. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Green-Land Biological Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2014. Yunnan Yuntou Ecology and Environment Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Kunming, China.

name: Jiangsu Jiuding New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Jiuding New Material Co.,Ltd. produces and sells glass fiber yarn, fabrics, and FRP products in China. Its fiberglass products include building materials, such as EIFS and wall reinforcement, roofing waterproof, and stone reinforcement products; continuous filament mat; knitted fabrics for chopped strands mats and veil; woven roving for boats body, sports mechanics, military, automotive, etc.; fiberglass joint tapes; fiberglass alkaline-resistant mesh; and roving for wind turbine blades, high-pressure pipes, pressure cylinders, pultrusion, filament winding, and weaving applications. The company also offers e-glass fiber grinding wheel reinforced mesh, e-glass fiber wheel reinforced mesh, e-glass fiberglass yarns and rovings, e-glass fiber cloth, aluminum water filter base fabric, and high silica mesh and fabric for insulation, corrosion resistance, heat resistance, reinforcement, and other use. In addition, it provides pultrusion profile, a composite material for cooling tower, infrastructure, electricity insulation, chemical industry, and industrial and consumer goods applications; grille, a structural plate; and chemical environment protection equipment. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries, including North America, Europe, Southeast Asia, Japan, and South Korea. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Jiuding Group. Jiangsu Jiuding New Material Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Rugao, China.

name: Xinjiang Goldwind Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Goldwind Science & Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides wind power solutions in China and internationally. It operates through four segments: WTG Manufacturing, Wind Power Services, Wind Farm Development, and Other Business. The company engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of wind turbine generators and wind power components; development, construction, maintenance, operation, and sale of wind farms; and provision of wind power related consultancy and maintenance services. It is also involved in the manufacture and sale of wind power equipment and accessories; development and operation of water treatment plants; provision of finance leasing services; and development and operation of solar power generation projects. Xinjiang Goldwind Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Urumqi, China.

name: Zhe Jiang Hai Liang Co., Ltd
summary: Zhe Jiang Hai Liang Co., Ltd researches, develops, fabricates, sells, and services copper products in China. The company offers copper tubes, bars, and fittings; aluminum products; and copper-aluminum compound bars, including copper alloy tubes, HVAC tubes, seamless copper water/gas tubes, precision copper bars, copper/brass fittings, aluminum multi-port extrusions, aluminum profiles, and copper-aluminum compound bars, as well as inner grooved copper coils, copper alloy tubes, and lead-free copper bars. It also provides copper pipes, rods, pipe connectors, new conductor materials, copper processing equipment, etc.; and copper coil tubes; copper, brass, and copper-nickle straight tubes; copper, brass, and electrical conduct fittings; copper and brass bars; copper bus bars; aluminum tubes; and denitration catalysts, as well as equipment manufacturing services. The company's products are used in various applications, such as air conditioning and refrigeration, HAVC, water desalination, nuclear power, thermal power, equipment manufacturing, automotive industry, electrical, transportation, hardware machinery, and other industries. It also exports copper pipes and their connectors. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhuji, China.

name: Dalian Huarui Heavy Industry Group Co., LTD.
summary: Dalian Huarui Heavy Industry Group Co., Ltd. manufactures, sells, and services technical equipment primarily in China. The company offers bulk material handling, port, coke oven, metallurgic, and lifting machineries; bridge and gantry cranes; cranes for metallurgical plants; laminar spray welded rollers and galvanized sink rollers, as well as furnace rollers for cold rolling mills; wind turbines components; high-end castings; and ship crankshafts. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1914 and is headquartered in Dalian, China.

name: XinJiang GuoTong Pipeline CO.,Ltd
summary: XinJiang GuoTong Pipeline CO.,Ltd designs and manufactures prestressed concrete cylinder pipes in China. It also provides other hi-tech concrete products and plastic pipes. The company's products are used in various fields, including water resource projects, municipal works, electric power projects, agricultural irrigation projects, etc. XinJiang GuoTong Pipeline CO.,Ltd was founded in 2001 and is based in √É¬úr√É¬ºmqi, China.

name: Zhejiang Hailide New Material Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Hailide New Material Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial polyester yarns, plastic materials, and tire cord fabrics in China and internationally. The company's products include industrial polyester filament yarns; digital printing, coating, and decorative materials; and PET tire cord fabrics. Zhejiang Hailide New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Haining, China.

name: Xinjiang Zhundong Petroleum Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Zhundong Petroleum Technology Co., Ltd. provides oilfield dynamic monitoring and oil recovery technology solutions for oil and gas exploration companies in China and internationally. The company offers petroleum technology, oil field management, construction and installation, and transportation services. Its services include oilfield dynamic monitoring well testing; production testing; downhole operations, including clearing and preventing wax, profile control, water plugging, acidification, fracturing, coiled tubing operations, application of oilfield nitrogen technology, and workover; power electrical installation engineering; storage tank machinery cleaning; and transportation services. It also manufactures and sells oilfield chemical additives, such as polyacrylamide, clay anti-swelling agent, wax, crosslinking agents, flooding additives, and organic salts aggravating agent products, as well as produces oil products, including oil additives, chemical additives, drilling additives, and cementing additives. Xinjiang Zhundong Petroleum Technology Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Changji, China.

name: Hefei Urban Construction Development Co., Ltd
summary: Hefei Urban Construction Development Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development business under the Amber brand name. The company develops and constructs residential, commercial, and office buildings. It operates primarily in Hefei, Chaohu, Feidong, Bengbu, Xuancheng, Guangde, Sanya, Hainan, China, and internationally. The company is based in Hefei, China.

name: Shenzhen Feima International Supply Chain Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Feima International Supply Chain Co., Ltd. provides supply chain management services in China and internationally. It offers coal procurement, logistics, warehousing, and distribution services to coal terminal users; import and export customs clearance, and procurement and sales execution services; corporate or government overseas contracting and foreign aid services, as well as operates a non-ferrous metal e-commerce platform. The company is also involved in the straw and garbage power generation, and other solid waste renewable resources processing and utilization business, and industrial park construction, as well as IT electronics business. Shenzhen Feima International Supply Chain Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shanghai Hongda New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Hongda New Material Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells silicone rubber products in China. The company's products include low-grade miscellaneous, die, high-grade sealing key, extrusion wire, flame retardant extrusion wire, heat-resistant extruded wire, cable joint, standard extrusion, ordinary vapor and nipple, high-grade nipple, swimming cap, high temperature resistant, flame retardant, car accessory, paper feeding rubber roller, gas phase rubber roller, general rubber roller, insulating, and water vapor resistant glue products; and ordinary molding adhesive, high-grade molded products, high resistance and tear gas, high temperature resistant steam adhesive, general molded products, low compression set, and conductive plastic products. Its products are used in various keyboard keys; wires and cables insulation; power, electricity, and household appliances sealing's; transportation insulation, moisture, weather resistance, and aging products; food, medical care, hygienic non-toxic, high temperature resistant, and physiologically inert; and high temperature resistant parts in the automotive field. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Hongda New Material Co., Ltd. Shanghai Hongda New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Yangzhong, China.

name: Topsec Technologies Group Inc.
summary: Topsec Technologies Group Inc., together with its subsidiaries, research, develops, manufactures, and sells wires and cables in China. It offers low voltage cables, such as control, insulated halogen-free low-smoke, and armored power cables, as well as copper core cross-linked polyethylene insulated copper wires; medium voltage cables, including copper core XLPE insulated PVC sheathed power cables; and high voltage cables, such as XLPE insulated power cables. The company also provides special cables comprising aluminum alloy, mineral flexible, marine, and frequency conversion environmental protection cables, as well as offers wire products. In addition, it offers security and data products, including security gateway, security detection, secure access, data security, cloud security, and data and other related products; and security consulting, safe operation and maintenance, security research and development, security cloud services, etc. for government, finance, energy, telecommunications, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Nanyang Topsec Technologies Group Inc. and changed its name to Topsec Technologies Group Inc. in November 2020. Topsec Technologies Group Inc.  was founded in 1985 and is based in Shantou City, China.

name: Shenzhen Dawei Innovation Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Dawei Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells auxiliary brake products in China. The company primarily offers hydraulic and current retarders, and controllers. It also exports its products to Italy, Australia, South Korea, Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam, Ghana, Panama, Cuba, Turkey, Tunisia, Chile, the United Arab Emirates, and Oman. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Terca Technology Co., Ltd and changed its name to Shenzhen Dawei Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2020. Shenzhen Dawei Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Noposion Agrochemicals Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Noposion Agrochemicals Co.,Ltd develops, produces and sells agricultural inputs. The company offers pesticide preparations and plant nutrition products; and professional agricultural services, including technical and personnel support, farming, financial, agricultural information, agricultural products supply chain, and other services, as well as sensors and actuators. It provides its products under the Nuopuxin, Rui Defeng, Standard, and Nuopuxin names. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Sanquan Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanquan Food Co., Ltd. produces and sells frozen food products in China. It offers private kitchen series products; dumplings; children's series products; soup dumplings; pastries; desserts; convenient fast food products; Western food products; and rice products. The company also operates sanquan.com, a B2C online shopping platform. It offers its products under the Sanquan Ling brand name. The company was formerly known as Zhengzhou Sanquan Foods Co., Ltd and changed its name to Sanquan Food Co., Ltd. in July 2013. Sanquan Food Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Holitech Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Holitech Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells components for smart terminals in China. It offers liquid crystal display modules, touch control modules, camera and fingerprint identification modules, cover glasses, RFPCB and flexible printed circuit boards, electronic paper eco-chain modules, backlight modules, and 5G materials, as well as components of wireless charging modules. The products are used in various fields, such as communication equipment, consumer electronics, household appliance, office equipment, digital products, automotive electronics and electric vehicles, finance, industrial control, medical device, smart wearable equipment, smart retail and smart home products. The company was formerly known as Shandong Liaherd Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Holitech Technology Co., Ltd. in May 2014. Holitech Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Zibo, China.

name: SHENZHEN TOPRAYSOLAR Co.,Ltd.
summary: SHENZHEN TOPRAYSOLAR Co.,Ltd. operates as an integrated solar manufacturer in China, Europe, North America, Africa, and internationally. The company offers solar glasses, solar cells, solar wafers, and solar ingots. It also provides on grid and off grid solar panels, such as mono and poly crystalline solar panels; and regular, flexible, folding, and solar blanket panels. In addition, the company offers solar consumer products comprising solar chargers that include electronic chargers, automotive products, charge regulators, and accessories; solar power kits; solar lightings; and solar home improvement products, as well as solar battery chips, solar power systems, solar energy absorbers, and water heater systems. Further, it provides EPC services, which comprise design, procurement, installation, and civic works, as well as operation and maintenance services for solar projects. It also develops and operates solar power plants with a capacity of 110MW in Dingbian, China. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hengkang Medical Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Hengkang Medical Group Co.,Ltd provides medical services, pharmaceuticals, health care, and daily products in China and internationally. It operates hospitals. The company also manufactures pharmaceutical products in the areas of pain, cold, cough, gynecology, cardiovascular, digestive, and urinary systems. In addition, it offers Chinese herbal medicines, infusion, and hemostasis products, as well as daily care products, including toothpaste and toothbrush. The company was formerly known as Gansu Duyiwei Biological Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hengkang Medical Group Co.,Ltd in January 2014. Hengkang Medical Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: CASTECH Inc.
summary: CASTECH Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells crystals, optics, and laser components primarily in China. The company offers NLO, laser, magneto-optical, birefringent, AO and EO, and scintillation crystals, as well as oven and temperature controller accessories; precision optics, including coatings, materials, windows, mirrors, prisms, polarizers, cylindrical lenses, spherical lenses, waveplates, and beam splitters; and laser components, such as AO and EO devices, isolators and rotators, attenuators, beam expanders, fiber collimators, and laser lenses. It also exports its products to North America, Europe, Japan, and other Asian countries. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Yuyue Medical Equipment & Supply Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yuyue Medical Equipment & Supply Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and markets medical equipment in China and internationally. The company provides respiratory products, such as oxygen concentrators, nebulizers, oxygen regulators, oxygen intake devices, and BreathCare CPAP products; homecare products, including electronic blood pressure monitors, sphygmomanometers, stethoscopes, thermometers, and pulse oximeters; and blood glucose meters. It also offers hospital instruments comprising oxygen generators, medical diagnostic equipment, suction apparatus, and medical disposable products; and rehabilitation products consisting of rehabilitation care series, anti-decubitus mattress, and tracks for neck ache. The company was formerly known as Yuwell medical. Jiangsu Yuyue Medical Equipment & Supply Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Danyang, China.

name: Sanlux Co.,Ltd
summary: Sanlux Co., Ltd manufactures and sells various rubber V-belts. It offers classical wrapped, wedge wrapped, classical and wedge raw edge cogged, conveyor, banded classical and wedge, double, and agricultural V-belts, as well as air and water hoses. The company also provides automobile belts, such as raw edge cogged and laminated belts, raw edge plain belts, and timing and poly V-belts. It serves customers in approximately 70 countries and regions, including Europe, the United States, Asia, and Africa. Sanlux Co., Ltd was founded in 1984 and is based in Shaoxing, China.

name: Puyang Refractories Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Puyang Refractories Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells refractory products for the steel industry worldwide. It offers functional and amorphous refractory products; and refractory materials, such as permeable bricks, bricks, bulk materials, skateboard nozzles, magnesium carbon/aluminum magnesium carbon, etc., which are used in steel, non-ferrous smelting, power, petrochemical, foundry, and other industries. The company also provides contracting services for the design, installation, and construction of various thermal equipment refractories. It exports its products to the Americas, Europe, the Commonwealth of Independent States, Southeast Asia, Africa, the Middle East, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Puyang Refractories Limited Company and changed its name to Puyang Refractories Group Co., Ltd. in June 2007. Puyang Refractories Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Puyang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Anhui Jiangnan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Jiangnan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. researches, produces, and sells explosives in China. The company offers explosives, including emulsion, powdery emulsion, expanded ammonium nitrate, and modified ammonium explosives; and on-site mixed explosives, such as porous ammonium, mixed emulsion, and heavy ammonium fry explosives. It also provides explosive products comprising source columns, detonating cords, and detonating tube detonators. In addition, the company offers engineering blasting services, which include mine, tunnel, earth and stone, and demolition blasting services; and blasting products, such as emulsifiers, polycrystalline diamonds, nano cerium oxide, and explosive compounds. Further, it develops, constructs, and operates wind farms and photovoltaic power plants. Anhui Jiangnan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Xiamen Hexing Packaging Printing Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Hexing Packaging Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells packaging materials in China. It offers corrugated cartons that are primarily used as packaging products for protecting products, facilitating transportation, and handling and improving publicity; pre-printed corrugated paperboards; color printing used in middle-to-high-end commodity packaging; pearl foams; honeycomb paperboards; and molded pulp. The company also provides designing and manufacturing services for various kinds of books, periodicals, instructions, and other products. It serves customers in household appliance, electronics, food products, beverages, cosmetics, daily-use chemical products, pharmaceuticals, automobile parts, kitchen and sanitary wares, and other areas. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Hongbo Co., Ltd.
summary: Hongbo Co., Ltd. engages in the security printing business in China. The company is also involved in the color printing of boutique albums, books, magazines, and posters; development, production, and sale of smart cards; and import and sale of olive oil and red wine. In addition, it develops, produces, and sells Internet of Things applications and related derivative products in the fields of alcohol traceability, lottery, and smart cards; and engages in the lottery and packaging businesses. The company was formerly known as Fujian Hongbo Printing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hongbo Co., Ltd. in August 2013. Hongbo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.

name: iFLYTEK Co.,Ltd
summary: Iflytek Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. The company develops and offers software and chip products. It also provides machine translation systems; intelligent speech, medical image, and cognitive intelligence based auxiliary medical systems; and smart voice court hearing systems for politics and laws. In addition, the company offers smart education products for teaching students; AI voice assistants, vehicle-mounted AI systems, and all-in-one infotainment systems for smart automobiles; and call center solutions for channeling voice self-services. Iflytek Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Allwin Telecommunication Co., Ltd.
summary: Allwin Telecommunication Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells radio frequency, microwave, and wireless communications network coverage system products in China and internationally. It offers repeater series products, including wireless wideband, wireless channel selective, fiber optic, and frequency shifting repeaters, as well as boosters, micro-cell boosters, base station extending systems, and bi-directional tower-mounted amplifiers. The company also provides microwave passive components, such as micro-strip and cavity power splitters, micro-strip and cavity power couplers, single-band and multi-band combiners, 3 dB hybrid couplers, attenuators, and load components. In addition, it offers antenna series products comprising indoor ceiling omni-directional, indoor panel directional, outdoor panel directional, outdoor yagi directional, grid parabolic, corner, outdoor directional, and special antennas. Further, the company provides network management monitor systems, repeater-supported network software systems, digital multimedia broadcasting gap fillers, and mini-repeaters. Additionally, it offers solutions for the coverage of scenic spots, sea areas, tunnels, roads and railways, suburban and rural areas, stadiums and exhibition centers, university campus, and residential districts, as well as for indoor coverage; and for the dispatch of wireless network resources, upgradation of 3G indoor coverage system, and elevators. Allwin Telecommunication Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenyang, China.

name: Qiming Information Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Qiming Information Technology Co.,Ltd provides products and services in the areas of smart manufacturing, smart cars, and smart cities in China. The company's management software products include ERP, intelligent manufacturing, smart logistics, collaborative office, basic research and development, market consulting service, big data value-added application, and industrial Internet platform, as well as management software implementation services. It also provides intelligent networking, new energy, vehicle diagnostic, automotive electronic testing, and electronic and electrical architecture development services. In addition, the company offers smart logistics, smart transportation, and car information security services; and Qiming Cloud platform solution. Further, it provides solutions for vehicle manufacturers, including electronic and electrical design and integration testing, diagnostic communication development, comfort system electronic control unit development, battery system design and trial production, trial engineering, high-voltage electrical design, powertrain test and system solution verification, control strategy consulting, power system design, and MBD and integration testing services. Qiming Information Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Changchun, China.

name: Guangdong Tapai Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Tapai Group Co., Ltd. offers cement and concrete products in China. Its products are used in the industrial and civil buildings, concrete and underground engineering, high-rise buildings, roads and bridges, airport runways, and port terminals. The company is based in Meizhou, China.

name: Shandong Minhe Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Minhe Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in breeding, slaughtering, and processing chicken in China and internationally. It offers chicken products, fresh and snack foods, conditioning products, and bio-organic fertilizers. The company also engages in the biogas power generation activities. Shandong Minhe Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Penglai, China.

name: Xiamen anne co.ltd
summary: Xiamen Anne Corporation Limited engages in the digital copyright and marketing, business information paper, and lottery marketing businesses in China. It offers online copyright services; and professional services for digital content, integrated social media operation, and marketing and value-added services on intellectual property of content, as well as provides services on e-commerce promotion, Internet marketing, Internet operation, brand marketing, and PR scheme based on professional analysis of market. The company also specializes in supplying and servicing of national lottery manufactures and paperless lottery sales. In addition, it offers business information papers, such as POS papers, commercial bills, logistics and product labels, copy papers, fax papers, computer printing papers, ink-jet papers, photo papers, and other office papers, as well as lottery invoices and other commercial papers under the Anne, King, Little Mars, Tropical fish, Bright Color, Thanks, Jinhao, Yahao, Style, POS, Fuzhi, and Furi brand names. The company is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Zhejiang Dahua Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Dahua Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the security video surveillance industry worldwide. The company offers network, high definition composite video interface (HDCVI), PTZ, and thermal cameras; network and HDCVI recorders; video intercoms, including kits, accessories, emergency phone terminals, and IP and analog products; and access control products, such as controllers, modules, turnstiles, accessories, AI, and time attendance solutions. It also provides alarms; traffic enforcement, entrance and exit, parking, mobile products/solutions, MPT, and related software and accessories; transmission solutions comprising PoE, ePoE, access, aggregation, and core switches, as well as related accessories and platforms; display and control solutions, including video management platform (VMP), decoders, splicing controllers, network keyboards, LCD monitors and video walls, LCD digital signage, LED displays, and interactive LCD displays; and video conferencing solutions. In addition, the company offers face recognition, vehicle analysis, event detection, and structuring servers; security screening; IP and cloud storage products; drones; memory cards and internal SSDs; and cable accessories, power, cabling, and audio solutions, as well as detectors and software solutions. It serves transportation, building, retail, banking and finance, critical infrastructure, and warehousing and logistics industries, as well as the government. Zhejiang Dahua Technology Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shandong Humon Smelting Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Humon Smelting Co., Ltd. engages in the exploration, mining, selection, and smelting of gold in China. It also produces silver, cathode copper, electrolytic lead, vitriol, and liquid sulfur dioxide. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Shenzhen Topway Video Communication Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Topway Video Communication Co., Ltd. constructs, operates, and maintains cable television (TV) networks that provide cable TV viewing and related value-added services in Shenzhen, China. It offers digital TV and broadband services. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Topway Video Communication Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Media Group Co. Ltd.

name: Aotecar New Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Aotecar New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of automotive a/c compressors. It offers scroll compressors, electric compressors, fixed displacement piston compressors, and variable displacement piston compressors. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Kingfield Garments Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Aotecar New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2015. Aotecar New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Shenzhen Chengxin Lithium Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Chengxin Lithium Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells fiberboard products in China. The company provides medium (high) density fiberboards used in furniture, door, and reinforcement Wood flooring, and decoration industries. It is also involved in forest planting and sales activities. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Goertek Inc.
summary: Goertek Inc. researches, develops, produces, and sells electro-acoustic components, optical components, electronic accessories, and related products worldwide. The company offers smart wearable products, such as smart watches and bands; smart viewable products, including VR HMD and panorama cameras; smart viewable peripherals; smart audio products comprising ear and headphones; smart lamps; and smart robotics, voice-controlled speakers, and unmanned aerial vehicles. It also provides components consisting of sensors, microphones, speakers and receivers, loud speakers, linear vibration motors, antennas, and optical component modules, as well as game controllers and data gloves. Goertek Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Weifang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Joyoung Co.,Ltd
summary: Joyoung Co.,Ltd provides kitchen products in China. The company offers soybean milk machines; juicers, blenders, rice, induction, and electric cookers, as well as cooking machines; and noodle machines. It also provides kitchen appliances consisting of hoods, water heaters, disinfection cabinets, gas stove, steam boxes, and dishwashers, as well as water purifiers. The company provides its products in approximately 30 provinces, municipalities, and autonomous regions in China, as well as exports to approximately 20 countries, including Japan, the United States, Singapore, Indonesia, Thailand, and internationally. Joyoung Co.,Ltd was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Jinan, China.

name: Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd. produces and sells packaging products in China and internationally. The company develops packaging materials; designs packaging concepts; produces and sells cosmetic and food plastic packaging products; designs and manufactures technological equipment and molds; offers cosmetic additives and cosmetics; designs battery packaging products; and designs and manufactures automobile light weighting products. It is also involved in packaging recycling and RFID tag customization activities; and offers multilayer tubes, injection products, blowing bottles, injection blowing-molds, and coating and vacuum metalizing products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Beauty Star Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd. in January 2021. Shenzhen Leaguer Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hangzhou Binjiang Real Estate Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Binjiang Real Estate Group Co.,Ltd, a real estate company, engages in the real estate development business in China. It is also involved in the sale and rental of apartments. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Azure Corporation
summary: Jiangsu Azure Corporation operates as a metal logistics and distribution company. It provides supply chain services, including warehousing, sorting, cutting, packaging, distribution, and processing of metal materials. The company is also involved in the research and development, production, and sale of LED chips. In addition, it offers lithium-ion batteries used in power tools, smart homes, new energy power travel, and other products. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Aucksun Co., Ltd. Jiangsu Azure Corporation is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Weihai Huadong Automation Co., Ltd
summary: Weihai Huadong Automation Co., Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells CNC systems, CNC machine tools, and related parts in China. Its products include cylindrical grinding machines; surface grinders; vertical and horizontal milling machines; gantry grinding and milling machines; milling machines; and functional accessories. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Weihai, China.

name: Zhongshan Broad-Ocean Motor Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhongshan Broad-Ocean Motor Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and marketing of micro motors and energy vehicle powertrain systems in China. It offers construction and home electrical motors, new energy vehicle powertrain systems drive motors and controllers, and vehicle rotating electrical appliances, as well as hydrogen fuel cell modules and engine systems under the Dayang Motor brand. The company also leases new energy vehicles. It also exports its products to 40 countries on 5 continents. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Zhongshan, China.

name: Lianhe Chemical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Lianhe Chemical Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, markets, and sells chemical products in China. It offers crop protection products, performance chemicals, and pharmaceuticals. The company also provides a range of engineering services and equipment manufacturing services. Lianhe Chemical Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Taizhou, China.

name: Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co.,Ltd
summary: Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co.,Ltd engages in retailing business in Hunan, Guangxi, Jiangxi, Sichuan, and Chongqing. It offers products and services through supermarkets, department stores, e-commerce, and other retail formats. The company was formerly known as Better Life Commercial Chain Limited Liability Company. Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co.,Ltd was founded in 1995 and is based in Xiangtan, China.

name: Shanghai RAAS Blood Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai RAAS Blood Products Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes blood products in China and internationally. It offers human albumin, human immunoglobulin, coagulation factor, and other products. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Wisesoft Co., Ltd.
summary: Wisesoft Co., Ltd. provides technologies, systems, and services for the air traffic field in China. It offers flight flow management systems, portable emergency air traffic control systems, air traffic management integrated information management systems, radar control simulators, desktop tower simulators, tower control simulators, program control simulators, and multi-channel digital synchronous recorders. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Yantai Tayho Advanced Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Yantai Tayho Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of high-tech fibers in China. The company offers Newstar Spandex, a polyurethane elastic fiber that is used in underwear, socks, tights, sportswear, swimwear, laces, and suits, as well as in medical and hygiene textiles, and automotive interiors. It also provides Newstar Meta-aramid, an aromatic polyamide fiber, which is used in aerospace, high-speed trains, firefighter apparels, training uniforms, work wear, environmental protection, industrial high-temperature materials, automobile hoses, senior sound dampers, electrical insulation, and other areas. In addition, the company offers Taparan Para-aramid fibers for use in various applications, including rubber tube structures, strengthening fabrics, tire cords, packing, sealing, optical cable reinforcement, etc.; Tametar anti-static fibers for use in 3T fabric, industrial filtration, and anti-static fabric applications; and Metastar Aramid papers. The company was formerly known as Yantai Spandex Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yantai Tayho Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. in September 2011. Yantai Tayho Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Suzhou Hailu Heavy Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Hailu Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells energy saving and environmental protection equipment. The company undertakes environmental engineering projects; and offers boilers for use in various industries, such as power generation, steel making, non-ferrous, coking, petrol-chemical, chemical, and paper making. It also provides nuclear power equipment, such as basket shell, bubblers, accumulators, high temperature gas cooled reactors, hangers, etc.; heavy pressure vessels and vessels of special materials; and marine and on-land cryogenic products. The company also exports its products to the United States, Europe, Japan, Africa, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and internationally. Suzhou Hailu Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Lier Chemical Co.,LTD.
summary: Lier Chemical Co.,LTD. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of agrochemical products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers chloropyridine, organophosphate, sulphonylurea, and substituted urea type, as well as low-toxicity, low-residue safe pesticides. It also provides herbicides, including glufosinate-ammonium, diquat, flumioxazin, clodinafop-propargyl, clopyralid, fluroxypyr-meptyl, triclopyr, diuron, bensulfuron-methyl, linuron, pyrazosulfuron-ethyl, nicosulfuron, flufenacet, mefenacet, and quinclorac; fungicides, such as epoxiconazole, iprodione, and difenoconazole; and insecticides comprising chlorpyrifos and pyriproxyfen, as well as active pharmaceutical ingredients and preparations. In addition, the company offers chemical intermediates, including 2-chloropyridine; 2,3-dichloropyridine; 2,5-dichloropyridine; 2,6-dichloropyridine; 2,3,4-trichloropyridine; 2,3,5-trichloropyridine; 2,3,6-trichloropyridine; nitrapyrin; pentafluoropyridine; 2,3,5,6-tetrachloro-4-methylsulfonylpyridine; 6-chloropyridine-2-carbonitrile; 3,6-difluoropyridine-2-carboxylic acid; 2,2'-bipyridine; 2-chloro-4'-fluoroacetophenone; 2-chloro-2',4'-difluoroacetophenone; and 2-fluoro-3-nitrobenzoic acid. Further, its intermediates comprise (E)-4-(dimethylamino)but-2-enoic acid hydrochloride; 4,4'-dichloro-[3,3']bipyridinyl; clopyralid-methyl; methyl 3,4,6-trichloropicolinate; 2,4,5-trichloropyridine; 7-fluoro-6-nitro-4-hydroxyquinazoline; N-(3-chloro-4-fluorophenyl)-7-fluoro-6-nitroquinazolin-4-amine; 4-bromocrotonic acid; 4-N-(3-chloro-4-fluorophenyl)-7-[(3S)-oxolan-3-yl]oxyquinazoline-4,6-diamine; 2-amino-N-(2-chloro-6-methylphenyl)-1,3-thiazole-5-carboxamide; and 5-chloro-8-hydroxyquinoline. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Mianyang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Sichuan Shengda Forestry Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Sichuan Shengda Forestry Industry Co., Ltd engages in the exploration, development, and production of liquefied natural gas (LNG) in China. It is also involved in the pipeline transmission and distribution of gas; operation of gas stations; and LNG logistics transportation services. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Talkweb Information System Co.,Ltd.
summary: Talkweb Information System Co.,Ltd. provides online education and mobile games in China and internationally. It offers Internet-based education services for 0-18 year olds. The company also operates preschool education institutions; and primary schools and middle schools that offer learning management system and personalized learning system, including learning, homework, exams, and assessments, as well as personalized after-school learning services. It has approximately 15000 partnered kindergartens; and 25000 primary and middle schools. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.

name: Jiangsu Nhwa Pharmaceutical Co., LTD
summary: Jiangsu Nhwa Pharmaceutical Co., LTD produces and sells central nervous system drugs in China and internationally. It offers drugs in the anesthesia, psychiatry, and neurological categories. The company also provides APIs in the areas of central nervous system, anesthetic and sedative, anti-fungal, and others. In addition, it is developing various cardiovascular products, such as Iptakalim, an anti-hypertension drug. The company has a collaborative research agreement with the Ann Romney Center for Neurologic Diseases at Brigham, and Women's Hospital and Biodextris to develop a novel immuno-stimulatory therapy for neurologic disorders. Jiangsu Nhwa Pharmaceutical Co., LTD was founded in 1978 and is based in Xuzhou, China.

name: New Hua Du Supercenter Co.,Ltd.
summary: New Hua Du Supercenter Co.,Ltd. operates a chain of hypermarkets, supermarkets, and department stores. The company has a network of stores in Fuzhou, Xiamen, Zhangzhou, Quanzhou, Sanming, Longyan, Putian, Nanping, Ningde, Shantou, Nanchang, Zhangzhou, and Hangzhou cities. New Hua Du Supercenter Co.,Ltd. is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Yunnan Xiyi Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Xiyi Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile engine connecting rod-based automotive components, machine tools, and other industrial products primarily in China. It offers rod assemblies, CNC machining centers, rod blanks, expansion broken links, link molds, ray machines, vertical rocker millings, vertical milling heads, aprons, machine tailstocks, aluminum rods, expansion broken links, linear guide rail gantry machining centers, vertical universal rocker millings, CNC gantry millings, and ream column products. The company provides its products under the XiYi brand name. It also exports its products to the United States, Japan, and internationally. Yunnan Xiyi Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1939 and is based in Kunming, China.

name: Zhefu Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhefu Holding Group Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, primarily engages in the research and development, manufacture, installation, and service of hydropower equipment in China and internationally. It offers conventional hydro turbine-generator units; pump-storage units; and tidal power generation units, as well as mechanical and electrical works for EPC projects. The company also provides nuclear power equipment; and motors and generators. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Fuchunjiang Hydropower Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhefu Holding Group Co., Ltd. in January 2014. Zhefu Holding Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Tonglu, China. Zhefu Holding Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Tonglu, China.

name: Shaanxi Provincial Natural Gas Co.Ltd
summary: Shaanxi Provincial Natural Gas Co.Ltd, a natural gas company, engages in the planning, construction, operation, management, and distribution of natural gas in Shaanxi Province, China. It operates Jingbian to Xi'an, Xianyang to Baoji, Xi'an to Weinan, Baoji to Hanzhong, Hanzhong to Ankang, etc. pipelines with a total mileage of approximately 3,300 kilometers. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Xi'an, China.

name: CETC Cyberspace Security Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: CETC Cyberspace Security Technology Co., Ltd. provides professional network information security products and services for the government, military, and enterprises in China. It offers software cryptographic modules, PCI cryptographic cards, trusted cryptographic modules, server cryptographic machines, signature verification servers, cloud server cryptographic machines, key management systems, IPSec/SSLVPN, security authentication gateways, and digital certificate authentication. The company also provides firewalls, network isolation and information exchange systems, endpoint security management systems, security operation platforms, security auditing systems, and zero-trust systems; and secure mobile office system, and secure paperless meeting system, as well as OrangeMessage, a secure instant messaging platform. In addition, it offers data security protection products, such as database encryption and access control, and file encryption and access control; integrated data encryption and access control product; and unified data security management platform. The company was formerly known as Westone Information Industry Inc. and changed its name to CETC Cyberspace Security Technology Co., Ltd. in January 2023. CETC Cyberspace Security Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Shanghai Metersbonwe Fashion and Accessories Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Metersbonwe Fashion and Accessories Co., Ltd. researches, designs, develops, produces, and distributes casual wear products in the People's Republic of China.
