The company is also involved in the franchisee distribution activity. It offers its products under the Metersbonwe, ME&CITY, MooMmoo, Me&City Kids, and CH'IN brand names. The company was founded in 1933 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Shanghai Metersbonwe Fashion and Accessories Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Shanghai Huafu Investment Ltd.

name: Huaming Power Equipment Co.,Ltd
summary: Huaming Power Equipment Co.,Ltd provides voltage regulation solutions in China. The company offers conventional, vacuum, dry, and gas insulated on-load tap changers; and cage and drum de-energized (off-circuit) tap changers for transformers. It also provides accessories, such as motor drive units, online oil filters, controllers, and other accessories. The company's products as used in chemical, metallurgical, and railway projects, as well as power grids, and energy and other sectors. In addition, it provides training and after-sales services. The company also exports its products to approximately 80 countries in the United States, Asia, Europe, Africa, and Oceania. The company was formerly known as Shandong FIN CNC Machine Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huaming Power Equipment Co.,Ltd in July 2016. Huaming Power Equipment Co.,Ltd was founded in 1989 is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Beijing Oriental Yuhong Waterproof Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Oriental Yuhong Waterproof Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells waterproof materials in China. The company offers bituminous and self-adhesive waterproof membranes, waterproof coatings, rigid waterproof, system supporting, and sealing materials. It also engages in the non-woven fabric and building renovation businesses. The company's waterproofing solutions are used in buildings, roads, bridges, railways, airports, and water conservation facilities. It sells its products through home improvement companies and building material outlets to approximately 100 countries and regions, including Germany, Brazil, Venezuela, Poland, Angola, South Africa, India, etc. Beijing Oriental Yuhong Waterproof Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Sichuan Crun Co., Ltd
summary: Sichuan Crun Co., Ltd provides energy conservation and environmental protection equipment manufacturing and engineering services in the People's Republic of China. The company develops, manufactures, and sells lubrication, cooling, and hydraulic equipment; and system solutions and services primarily in various industries, such as wind power, solar power, petroleum and natural gas, etc. It also develops and manufactures waste heat recovery boilers, biomass boilers, wound tube heat exchangers, power station auxiliaries, boiler parts, etc. In addition, the company provides EPC project services for small power plants; and energy conservation and emission reduction engineering services for power plants primarily in the industry of building materials, metallurgy, thermal power, etc. Sichuan Crun Co., Ltd was founded in 1992 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Crystal-Optech Co., Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Crystal-Optech Co., Ltd researches, develops, and manufactures optical imaging, LED, micro display, and reflective materials in China. The company offers optical imaging products, including optical low pass filters, infra-red cut filters (IRCF), blue glass IRCF, IRCF with black masks, IRCF and lens assemblies, and IRCF switchers, as well as spacer wafers, pattern coatings, resin IRCF, CMOS covers, lens covers, and UV filters; projectors comprising polarization beam splitters, integral type color wheels, sequential color recaptures, color selective mirrors, LCOS seal glasses, and heat-dissipating bands; and watch cover glass products. It also provides doublet spherical lenses, spherical mirrors, miniature triangular prisms, total reflection prisms, and combination prisms; and ultra AR coatings, AR coated covers, and high reflection coatings, as well as narrow band pass, long pass, dual band pass, triple band pass, and RGB filters. In addition, the company offers short focus projectors and smart glass, head-up display, and compact projector products; sapphire crystals products, and flat sapphire substrate and patterned sapphire substrate for LEDs; sapphire optical products; reflective material series; and safety protection products. Its products are primarily applied in digital, mobile phones, security monitoring, computers, and other digital camera lenses, as well as semiconductor illuminations, micro projectors, smart glasses, road traffic marks, and safety protections. Zhejiang Crystal-Optech Co., Ltd was founded in 2002 and is based in Taizhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Huachang Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Huachang Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells agrochemicals, basic chemicals, fine chemicals, and biochemical products in China. Its products include compound fertilizers, carbamide, industrial sodium carbonate, ammonium chloride, liquid anhydrous ammonia, nitric acids, industrial methyl alcohol, sodium and potassium borohydride, trimethyl borate, hexamethyleneimine, 1,2-propanediol, light calcium silicate building blocks, and amino acids. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Guilin Sanjin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guilin Sanjin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, produces, and sells traditional Chinese and natural medicines in China. The company primarily offers Guilin watermelon frost and lozenge, and Sanjin tablets under the Chinese TCM brand, as well as Naomaitai capsules. It also produces contemporary TCM preparations. The company was founded in 1967 and is based in Guilin, China. Guilin Sanjin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Guilin SanJin Group Co.,Ltd.

name: Zhejiang Wanma Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Wanma Co., Ltd. produces and sells power cables. The company offers 1-500kV XLPE, plastic, computer, low voltage, 1-35kV aerial, waterproof, underground, prefabricated branched power, and aerial insulation cables, as well as set cables for special conditions. It also provides wires and cables for electrical equipment; bare, aluminum stranded, and steel-cored aluminum stranded wires; copper and aluminum rods; special, mine, coaxial, silicon rubber, and fluorin plastic cables; and cable accessories, such as cable terminals and middle connectors. The company offers its products for use in electrical power, communication, petrochemistry, railway, metallurgy, and steel industries. It has operations in China, Southeast Asia, Japan, the United States, the European Union, and Russia. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Hunan Friendship&Apollo Commercial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hunan Friendship&Apollo Commercial Co.,Ltd. engages in retailing and distribution businesses in China. Its operating formats include department stores, outlets, shopping malls, specialty stores, and online shopping platforms under the Friendship, Apollo, Friendship & Apollo Spring, Friendship & Apollo Outlets, and Friendship & Apollo Appliances brand names. The company's product categories comprise apparel, gold and jewelry, daily necessity, home appliance, cosmetic, and tobacco and alcohol products. It is also involved in the micro-credit and investment guarantee businesses, as well as renting properties. The company operates seven department stores, four shopping malls, and two outlets, as well as chain stores; and F&A Overseas Purchase and F&A WeChat Store online platforms. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.

name: Hangzhou Lianluo Interactive Information Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Lianluo Interactive Information Technology Co.,Ltd operates as an e-commerce company in China. It is involved in the various activities, such as e-commerce services platform; eSports and broadcasting networks; distribution and production of television and movies; and operation of airport media, as well as investment activities. The company also provides Internet financial services; and smart devices under MOPS brand that include virtual reality retinal glasses, smart masks, battery cases, Bluetooth headsets, and other related products. Hangzhou Lianluo Interactive Information Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Accelink Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Accelink Technologies Co,Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, supplies, and sells optoelectronic devices for optical communications industry primarily in China. The company offers receptacle optical interfaces, optical amplifiers, fiber-optical amplifiers, EDFA modules, transceivers, transceiver modules, and integrated coherent receivers, as well as passive components, including switches, splitters, DCMs, attenuators, wavelength management components, micro-optics, inter connect and cabling components, and functional modules. It also provides active optical cables, integrated modules, OLT modules, and datasheets; and subsystem, such as integrated WDM system, data center interconnects, optical line protection systems, optical line monitor systems, ultra-long haul systems, access products, optical TAPs, TAPs and NPBs, fiber capacity multiplication systems, instruments, and serial device servers. In addition, the company offers solutions for 100G, DATACOM, FTTX, DWDM, and intelligent options; optical line protection, ultra-long haul optical transmission, integrated WDM, optical TAP, fiber capacity multiplication, optical line monitors, and data center integration. It exports its products to telecommunications companies in approximately 20 countries and regions. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Wuhan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Bosun Co., Ltd.
summary: Bosun Co., Ltd. researches, manufactures, and sells diamond, power, and TCT tools under the BOSUN brand name in China and internationally. The company's diamond tools comprise diamond blades, diamond cup wheels, diamond core bits, and polishing pads; and power tools include core drill machines, table and floor saws, and floor grinders. It also offers TCT tools, such as solid wood, man-made board, non-ferrous, and steel cutting saw blades, as well as general purpose woodworking products; and RTS and LBT products, laminated board cutting saw blades, and other products. The company was formerly known as Bosun Tools Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Bosun Co., Ltd. in June 2019. Bosun Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Tianrun Industry Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianrun Industry Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells crankshafts in China. It offers crankshafts that are used in marine, heavy-duty and light-duty, and passenger car applications, as well as in connecting rods, and castings and forgings; and con-rods, forgings, and precision machines. The company markets and sells its products through a network of agents and distributors under the TIAN brand. It also exports its products to South Korea, India, Turkey, the United Kingdom, Italy, Japan, the United States, etc. The company was formerly known as Tianrun Crankshaft Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tianrun Industry Technology Co., Ltd. in April 2020. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Weihai, China. Tianrun Industry Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of thyssenKrupp AG.

name: Zhejiang Asia-Pacific Mechanical & Electronic Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Asia-Pacific Mechanical & Electronic Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells automotive brake systems in China, North America, Europe, Australia, and internationally. The company offers brake calipers, vacuum boosters, brake discs, disc brake assemblies, drum brake assemblies, clutch lines and pumps, and other products. Its products are used in cars and heavy-duty trucks. Zhejiang Asia-Pacific Mechanical & Electronic Co.,Ltd was founded in 1979 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Worldunion Group Incorporated
summary: Shenzhen Worldunion Group Incorporated provides real estate services in China. The company offers new house, e-commerce, stock, and overseas transaction services. It also provides apartment and home decoration solutions for institutional and C-end customers; short-term financing services for property owners; community housekeeping services; and asset matching service solutions. In addition, the company offers house rental services; pension operation services; sample community services; commercial assets business planning, investment attraction, sales, and operation services; property management and other services for industrial and commercial properties, and urban industrial parks; and advisory services, including suggestions on policies, landing planning, and project development for local government, developers, and other institutional customers. Further, it provides financial investment and asset financing services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Worldunion Properties Consultancy Incorporated and changed its name to Shenzhen Worldunion Group Incorporated in May 2019. Shenzhen Worldunion Group Incorporated was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Baolingbao Biology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Baolingbao Biology Co.,Ltd. manufactures corn-based health and food ingredients in China and internationally. The company offers isomalto-oligosaccharide, galacto-oligosaccharides, fructose-oligosaccharides, and erythritol products; high fructose corn syrups, crystalline fructose products, sugar alcohols, and resistant dextrin-soluble corn fiber and polydextrose products; starch sugars, such as trehalose, maltodextrin, and glucose syrup products; terminal products; and corn steep liquors, corn husk sprayed products, and corn gluten meal products. It also provides agglomerated powder and organic products. The company's products are used in various food items, such as beverages, dairy, bakery, candy, meat, honey, seafood, canned food, condiment, health food, infant nutrition, fermentation, and animal nutrition, as well as in various fields, including daily chemicals, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, etc. Baolingbao Biology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Yucheng, China.

name: Tibet Cheezheng Tibetan Medicine Co., Ltd.
summary: Tibet Cheezheng Tibetan Medicine Co., Ltd. together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, production, and sale of Tibetan medicine in China. It provides drug products in the areas of cardiovascular, respiratory, digestive, urinary and reproductive system, nervous system, musculoskeletal system, and gynecological disorders. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Nyingchi, China.

name: Guangdong Chaohua Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Guangdong Chaohua Technology Co., Ltd. primarily produces and sells printed circuit boards in China and internationally. The company offers single-sided, double-sided, and multilayer printed circuit boards. It also provides paper based laminates and composite base copper clad laminates; electrolytic copper foils; solder masks, resistant inks, and legends; wood pulp papers for CCL; and CNC drilling machines. The company is based in Meizhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Success Electronics Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Success Electronics Co., Ltd develops and manufactures sensors, capacitive touch screens, small and medium size LCDs and corresponding modules, and glass cover products. It offers TN, HTN, STN, CSTN, and TFT LCDs; and GFF, OGS, and GG capacitive touch screens. The company also provides a range of touch and display integrated solutions for smart phone manufacturers. Its products are used in communications terminals, household appliances, automotive electronics, digital products, and other industries. The company exports its products to Europe, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, and other countries. Shenzhen Success Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Suzhou Hesheng Special Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Hesheng Special Material Co., Ltd. produces and sells composite materials for household appliances in China and internationally. The company offers polyethylene terephthalate composite materials for use in appliances, including refrigerators, water heaters, air conditioners, microwave ovens, washing machines, range hoods, etc.; and decorative products, such as yacht and train interiors. It also provides VCM and PCM composite materials. Suzhou Hesheng Special Material Co., Ltd. is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Saturday Co.,Ltd
summary: Saturday Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and markets footwear products primarily in Mainland China. It offers its products under the ST&SAT, FBL, SAFIYA, MOOFFY, RIZZO, IIXVIIX, and GAVAKLAS brand names. The company was formerly known as Foshan Saturday Shoes Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Saturday Co., Ltd. in March 2016. Saturday Co., Ltd. is based in Foshan, China.

name: Luolai Lifestyle Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Luolai Lifestyle Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, markets, and sells home textiles. The company offers sofas, dining tables, picture frames, and jewelry for living rooms, dining rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, and other household space; bedding, toys, home life supplies, furnishings, and other ancillary products; lace products; towels, bathrobes, home wear, and bath supplies; and fragrance products. It also provides four piece sets, fillings, products for babies and kids, home clothes, toiletries, smart home products, and other products through Dapu.com. The company offers its products under the Luolai Home, LOVO, Luolai Kids, Lavie Home, Yolanna, Sheridan, Uchino, Zucchi, Millefiori, LAVIE PARFUMS, Bassetti, and Lexington brands. It operates approximately 3,000 stores in China. The company was formerly known as Luolai Home Textile Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Luolai Lifestyle Technology Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Luolai Lifestyle Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Shenzhen Salubris Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Salubris Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of medicines for cardiovascular, anti-diabetic, antineoplastic, and orthopedic therapeutic in China. It offers cardiovascular and cerebrovascular products, such as allisartan isoproxil, benazepril hydrochloride, and clopidogrel bisulfate tablets, as well as bivalirudin and pamidronate disodium injections; recombinant SeV-hFGF2/dF Injection for treatment of diabetic foot disease; and anti-tumor and orthopedics medicines. The company also provides anti-infection products comprising cefonicid sodium, ceftazidime, ceftriaxone sodium, cefminox sodium, cefuroxime sodium, cefepime hydrochloride, and cefodizime sodium injections, as well as azithromycin dispersible and levetiracetam tablets. In addition, it offers biotechnological drugs, such as recombinant protein and monoclonal antibody drugs. Further, the company is involved in import, licensing-in, and licensing-out medicines for Europe markets. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Salubris Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Xinlitai Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.

name: Guangdong Jingyi Metal Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Jingyi Metal Co., Ltd. engages in copper processing business in China. The company offers thread copper tubes, micro heat pipes, cable copper tubes, microwave brass tubes, and precision copper fittings for gas. It also provides supply chain trading platform. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: HeNan Splendor Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HeNan Splendor Science & Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and promotes rail transit measurement and control technologies for the rail transit industry in China. The company's products and solutions for the national railways include railway signal centralized, hump signal centralized, railway track comprehensive, frequency shift track circuit outdoor, railway power environment, signal room UPS and battery online, railway communication tower, high-speed railway natural disaster and foreign body intrusion limit, wireless shunting locomotive signal, and railway integrated video monitoring systems. Its national railway products and solutions also comprise railway signal centralized monitoring handheld terminal systems; electric service integrated data analysis platform systems; electric heating channel snow melting system equipment; high-speed railway perimeter intrusion alarm systems; distributed self-discipline scheduling centralized systems; and train dispatching command, wireless shunting locomotive signal, electric dispatching command center, operation guarantee mobile terminal, computer interlocking, and axle counting systems. In addition, the company offers urban rail transit signal maintenance support, environment and equipment monitoring, urban rail transit integrated monitoring, urban rail transit automatic ticket inspection, CCTV monitoring, and automatic train monitoring systems for urban rail transit. Further, it provides special railway transportation command integrated systems for dedicated line railways, as well as pre- and after-sale services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Hunan Boyun New Materials Co.,Ltd
summary: Hunan Boyun New Materials Co.,Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells powder metallurgy composite materials in China. The company offers carbon/carbon composite and powder metallurgy products for use in aviation, aerospace, railway, automotive, metallurgy, chemical, shipbuilding, and construction machinery and other fields. It also provides powder metallurgy equipment. The company also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Russia, and other CIS countries. Hunan Boyun New Materials Co.,Ltd is based in Changsha, China.

name: Anhui ZhongDianXinLong Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui ZhongDianXinLong Science and Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, sells, and services of smart energy-using products for electrical machinery manufacturing industry in China. It offers smart city products, including high-definition network cameras; soSCMS, a security-oriented smart city integrated management platform; ITS-CMS, an intelligent transportation central control platform software; an Internet of Things (IoT) information collection product; backend application platforms, including public security integrated information resource, video information integrated application, multimedia emergency response command and dispatch, and alarm and video application platform; and panoramic, surveillance, and smart checkpoints and integrated electronic police cameras, as well as infrared thermal imagers. The company also provides intelligent energy storage systems, high and low voltage power supplies and components, automation products, and transformers. In addition, it engages in the development, investment, design, construction, and operation and maintenance of distributed and centralized photovoltaic power plants. The company was formerly known as Anhui Sinonet & Xinlong Science & Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Anhui ZhongDianXinLong Science and Technology Co., Ltd. in February 2025. Anhui ZhongDianXinLong Science and Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Wuhu, China.

name: Fujian Sunner Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Sunner Development Co., Ltd. engages in breeding, slaughtering, processing, and selling chicken in China. The company is headquartered in Nanping, China.

name: Fujian Nanping Sun Cable Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Nanping Sun Cable Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells wires and cables in China. It offers aluminum alloy conductor XLPE insulated power cables, mining rubber flexible cables, control cables, PVC insulated wires, PVC and XLPE insulated power cables, overhead insulated cables, and photovoltaic cables. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Nanping, China.

name: Shenzhen Comix Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Comix Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells office supplies in China and internationally. The company offers filing products comprising view and ring binders; LAF products; display books; clip boards; suspension files; button and zipper bags; report, expanding, refill, box, and pressure files; file cases; indexes and dividers; and name card and card holders. It also provides desktop stationeries consisting of staplers, punches, staple removers, file boxes and trays, transparent drawers, file cabinets, book stands, pen stands, magnetic clip boxes, binder clips, colored clips and bands sets, paper clips and staples, clips and pins, scissors, utility knifes, replacement blades, key boxes, and steel scudding knifes. In addition, the company offers student stationery products, such as pencil sharpeners, scissors, erasers, rulers, stapler sets, and little polo bear series; paper products, including notebooks, easy sticks, copy papers, and note papers; and writing instruments comprising gel-ink and ball pens, pencils, permanent markers, whiteboard markers, highlighters, and refills. Further, it provides pocket, desktop, and office calculators; office equipment consisting of shredders, binding machines, laminators, laminating films, time recorders, lubrication sachets, and equipment accessories; and conference and presentation products, such as board series, white boards accessories, projection screens, laser pointers, and projector table series. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Comix Stationery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Comix Group Co., Ltd. in September 2014. Shenzhen Comix Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Yanghe Brewery Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yanghe Brewery Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. produces, packages, and sells liquors, wines, and spirits. It offers its products under the Yanghe and Shuanggou brands, as well as under the Yanghe, Shuanggou, Yanghe Spirit Classic, Zhenbaofang, Dream Blue, and Su trademarks. The company also engages in the commerce; waste material recycle; assets/investment management and information consultation; biological engineering research, enzyme preparation research, and technology transfer; network technology development, technical consultation, and software development activities. It is also involved in the freight transport, warehouse, and import and export business of self-run goods, agency goods, and technology; industrial investment, online business consultation, enterprise management consulting; sale of food and gifts; and house lease activities. In addition, the company provides movable and real estate investment services, and building construction services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Suqian, the People's Republic of China.

name: Langold Real Estate Co., Ltd.
summary: Langold Real Estate Co., Ltd. operates as a real estate development company in China. It develops and operates shopping centers, hotels, residential and office buildings, apartments, industrial parks, and other properties. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Xinjiang Beixin Road & Bridge Group Co., Ltd
summary: Xinjiang Beixin Road & Bridge Group Co., Ltd. engages in the construction of roads and bridges in China and internationally. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Urumqi, China.

name: Vtron Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Vtron Group Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services control room and video wall collaboration total solutions worldwide. The company's video wall solutions include display cubes, narrow bezel LCD panels and indoor LED displays, video wall processors, and visualization interactive system for barrier-free collaboration. It also provides video wall control software; and interactive digital boards. The company's products are primarily used in traffic control, energy and utilities, security and military, public emergency centers, broadcasting, corporate, and advertising industries. The company was formerly known as Vtron Technologies Ltd. and changed its name to Vtron Group Co.,Ltd. in January 2017. Vtron Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Zhongli Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Zhongli Group Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells wires and cables in China and internationally. It provides power, wind, control, data, marine, mine, rail transit, photoelectric composite, electronic line of certification, automobile, board coaxial, communication, and aluminum alloy cables, as well as overhead conductors and steel core aluminum standard wires. The company also offers distribution, dielectric self-supported fiber optic, feeder, and home segment cable products, as well as outdoor central beam tubed optical fiber and outdoor self-supporting optical fiber cable products; polymer materials; solar products; and packaging products. In addition, it provides WLAN, smart grid, shipboard cable, high-speed railway cable, rail transit, new energy cable, and automobile cable solutions, as well as FTTX optical-fiber network integrated and solar roof solutions. Further, the company offers intelligent communication automatic net equipment; and operates photovoltaic power stations. It serves communication, equipment manufacturing, rail transit, power, mining, ship and ocean engineering, solar new energy, electric power transmission, architecture, aerospace device, photovoltaic and wind energy power station, and automobile industries. The company was formerly known as Zhongli Science and Technology Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Zhongli Group Co., Ltd. in February 2017. Jiangsu Zhongli Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1988 and is based in Changshu, China.

name: Beijing Orient Landscape & Environment Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Orient Landscape & Environment Co., Ltd. engages in the water system management, solid waste and hazardous waste treatment, and tourism businesses. It is involved in the management of contaminated water bodies, riverway basins, sponge city, and township sewage treatment, etc.; and resources regeneration, waste treatment, resource utilization, and harmless treatment of industrial hazardous wastes, etc. The company was formerly known as Beijing Orient Landscape Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Orient Landscape & Environment Co., Ltd. in January 2015. Beijing Orient Landscape & Environment Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Guangdong Haid Group Co., Limited
summary: Guangdong Haid Group Co., Limited, together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, produces, sells, and services animal feed products in China and internationally. It offers feed for aquatic animals, livestock, and poultry; aquatic animal seedlings; animal healthcare products; and biological products. The company's products primarily include feeds for chickens, ducks, pigs, fish, shrimps, dogs, and cats; and farmed species, such as pig, shrimp, and fish fry, as well as veterinary drugs, vaccines, and other products. It is also involved in the pig breeding and farming activities; and provision of financial services to the dealers and farmers. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China. Guangdong Haid Group Co., Limited is a subsidiary of Guangzhou Haihao Investment Co., Ltd.

name: Sichuan Development Lomon Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Santai Holding Group Co., Ltd. provides financial outsourcing services in China. The company offers business process combing, platform centralized management, and big data analysis and service solutions for various business processes of the banking industry. It also provides phosphorus chemical products, including industrial grade monoammonium phosphate, feed-grade calcium hydrogen phosphate, and fertilizer-grade monoammonium phosphate. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Sunsea AIoT Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunsea AIoT Technology Co., Ltd. provides end-to-end Internet of Things (IoT) products and services to telecom operators, ICT equipment vendors, system integrators, and enterprise customers in China and internationally. It offers cable broadband products in various categories, such as OSP, corridor, central office, passive optical components, and customer premise; wireless sites, including shelter, towers, and outdoor cabinets; base station and landscaping antennas, and feeder accessories; small cell products; and new energy products, including energy efficiency control systems, refrigerants, and LED lighting products. The company also provides IoT industry solutions, including smart water supply, smart lighting, smart transportation, smart parking, smart logistics, smart building, smart environment, and location based solutions. In addition, it offers MediaFirst platform operation, CDN/UDN, and IPTV value-added services; micro module data center, closed aisle, and integrated data center solutions; data center products, such as equipment cabinet, power supply, and refrigeration systems; and cloud computing, network function virtualization, software defined network, big data and business agility suite, and other solutions. It also serves health, agriculture, environment, energy, transportation, and industrial manufacturing industries. The company was formerly known as SUNSEA Telecommunications Co., Ltd. Sunsea AIoT Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen New Nanshan Holding (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen New Nanshan Holding (Group) Co., Ltd. manufactures, sells, and operates prefabricated buildings in China. The company's products include Tetris Space buildings, Flat-Pack modular products, Easy House, Yahgee Domus, containers, and PREKIT eco-friendly products, as well as accessories, such as portal frame structures, foldable sheds, mini sheds and removable fences, construction sites, events, scene spots, and others. It sells its products to approximately 100 countries and areas. The company was formerly known as Yahgee Modular House Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen New Nanshan Holding (Group) Co., Ltd. in November 2015. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen New Nanshan Holding (Group) Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Nanshan Development (Group) Incorporation.

name: Guangdong Zhongsheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Zhongsheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers Chinese and chemical medicines. It is also involved in the research and development of products in the fields of ophthalmology, cardiovascular, cerebrovascular, respiratory, digestive, diabetes, tumor, and senile degenerative diseases. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Zhejiang Jiuli Hi-Tech Metals Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jiuli Hi-Tech Metals Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells stainless steel pipes and tubes worldwide. Its products include austenitic stainless steel pipes/tubes, duplex stainless steel, corrosion and high temperature resistant alloys, ferritic stainless steel, precipitation hardening stainless steel, clad/lined pipes, titanium alloys, and pipe fittings. The company's products are used in civil nuclear power, thermal/hydro electric generation, oil and gas, refinery, chemical, offshore engineering and shipbuilding, seawater desalination and water treatment, natural gas, and instrumentation tubing industries, as well as aerospace, auto, fertilizer, chemical fiber, pulp and paper, food, etc. industries. Zhejiang Jiuli Hi-Tech Metals Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Huzhou, China.

name: Letong Chemical Co.,LTD
summary: Letong Chemical Co.,LTD researches, develops, produces, and sells medium and high-end ink coatings in China. The company offers cigarette packing, UV, printing, PVC and aluminum foil, water-based, and anti-counterfeit specialty inks, as well as composite watches. It also provides powder, automotive, and plastic coatings; and printing spray solutions. The company also exports its products. Letong Chemical Co.,LTD was founded in 1996 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Hainan Strait Shipping Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hainan Strait Shipping Co.,Ltd. engages in the sea passenger transportation business in China. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Haikou, China. Hainan Strait Shipping Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Hainan Port and Waterway Holding Co., Ltd.

name: Henan Huaying Agricultural Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Huaying Agricultural Development Co., Ltd. engages in the duck/chicken farming, breeding, and hatching business in China. It is involved in the duck/chicken slaughtering and processing; poultry sales; and feed production activities, as well as provision of frozen products and cooked food products. The company also provides meatballs, grilled fried, duck blood, and sauces and brines, as well as leisure products. It offers products under the Huaying brand name. The company also exports its products to approximately 20 countries and regions, such as Korea, Japan, Singapore, South Africa, the Middle East, and Central Asia. Henan Huaying Agricultural Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Xinyang, China.

name: Ningbo Ligong Environment And Energy Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Ligong Environment And Energy Technology Co., Ltd researches, develops, sales, and services online monitoring equipment in the People's Republic of China. Its products and solutions include smart grid online monitoring, which cover substation monitoring, transmission class, scheduling class, power quality class, and others; environmental monitoring; environmental protection and power information; and environmental governance comprising heavy metal treatment, soil repair, wastewater treatment, and atmospheric desulfurization and denitrification. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Ligong Online Monitoring Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningbo Ligong Environment And Energy Technology Co., Ltd in April 2016. Ningbo Ligong Environment And Energy Technology Co., Ltd is based in Ningbo, the People's Republic of China.

name: JiangSu Yabaite Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: JiangSu Yabaite Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and production of metal roofing envelopment systems, intelligent metal roofing systems, and distributed roofing photovoltaic power generation systems. The company is headquartered in Yancheng, China.

name: Shanghai Pret Composites Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai PRET Composites Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells modified plastic products primarily for automobiles in China. The company offers toughened, reinforced, and filling modified polypropylene; high impact-resisting, medium heat-resisting and impact-resisting, high heat-resisting, low-gloss, electroplating grade, and blow molding grade acrylonitrile-butadiene-styrene (ABS); and weather resistance, low-gloss, conventional, electroplating, and high-flow polycarbonate and ABS, as well as liquid crystal polymers and other materials. It also serves communication, engineering, electrical, and other industries. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Shenzhen Hongtao Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Hongtao Group Co., Ltd. engages in building decoration industry in China. The company offers decorative design and construction in the areas of architectural decoration, decoration design, building curtain wall, urban and road lighting, building intelligence, mechanical and electrical equipment installation, and fire protection facilities. It is also involved in the research and development, production, and sale of decorative materials. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Hongtao Decoration Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Hongtao Group Co., Ltd. in March 2019. Shenzhen Hongtao Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang Yongtai Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yongtai Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of fluorinated aromatic chemicals in China. It offers intermediates of cardiovascular, anti-diabetes, nervous system, anti-infection, and anti-virus pharmaceuticals, as well as pharmaceutical raw materials and preparations; agrochemical products, such as fluorinated intermediates of herbicides, fungicides, and insecticides; and electric chemical products, which include fluorinated monocrystal intermediates, lithium hexafluorophospate, and lithium bisimide for lithium batteries, as well as monocrystals and color filters for tablet display, etc. The company also provides APIs; and engages in the wholesale and retail of pesticide formulations. It serves chemical sub-industries, such as liquid crystals, pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, etc. The company also sells its products to the United States, the European Union, Japan, and India. Zhejiang Yongtai Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Linhai, China.

name: Shenzhen Fuanna Bedding and Furnishing Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fuanna Bedding and Furnishing Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes home textile products in China and internationally. It offers home furnishing accessories, such as cushions, towels, and blankets; female home furnishing products, including home dresses, home bags, and silk scarves; and customized lady dresses. The company offers its products under the Fu Anna, Visha, Xin and Le, Cool Chizhi, Shengzhihua, and Fuannameijia brands. Shenzhen Fuanna Bedding and Furnishing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shanghai Xinpeng Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Xinpeng Industry Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells metal electromechanical parts primarily in China. The company manufactures various kinds of tooling and metal parts through stamping and sheet metal processes. Its products include molds, motors, stampings, auto parts, and plasma base plates, as well as OEM and CNC products. The company serves multinational corporations. Shanghai Xinpeng Industry Co.,Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Shandong Delisi Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Delisi Food Co., Ltd. engages in live pigs slaughtering business in China. It offers low-temperature meat products, chilled and fermented meat, seasoning, fast food, and biological products, as well as food processing services. The company is headquartered in Zhucheng, China.

name: Anhui Wantong Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Anhui Wantong Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the transportation information system integration, application software development, and operation and maintenance services in China. It provides system integration solutions used in expressways, port terminals, urban intelligent transportation, trunk roads, inland waterways, logistics tracking and justice, taxation, insurance, education, and other industry information fields. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Zhejiang Xianju Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Xianju Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells steroids and hormones worldwide. It offers active pharmaceutical ingredients, such as steroid drugs, and male and female hormones; intermediates; and finished formulations in the form of tablets, capsules, granules, soft capsules, powder inhalations, creams, gels, injections, and powder-injections. The company was founded in 1972 and is based in Xianju, China.

name: ZYF Lopsking Aluminum Co., Ltd.
summary: ZYF Lopsking Aluminum Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of aluminum alloy profiles in China and internationally. The company offers aluminum doors and windows, apparel, industrial profiles, special alloy profiles, curtain walls, energy-saving curtains, accessories, and project cases, as well as aluminum alloy casting rods and other products. Its products are applied in construction, cycles, photovoltaic solar energy, LED lighting, elevator decoration, rail transportation, machinery and chemical industry, electronics, aerospace, automotive, indoor and outdoor furniture, heat exchange systems, and other fields. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Lopsking Aluminum Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ZYF Lopsking Aluminum Co., Ltd. in December 2020. ZYF Lopsking Aluminum Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Kehua Data Co., Ltd.
summary: Kehua Data Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of renewable energy and data center products under the Kehua brand name worldwide. It offers central inverters, inverter containers, and central distribution systems; energy storage systems and converters, and storage batteries; grid-tied PV and string inverters; solar controllers, off grid inverters and chargers, single and three phase inverters, and 48V inverters; charging modules, and AC and DC chargers; combiner boxes and Pb-C batteries; and other customized products. The company also provides online transformer-based, online transformer less, modular, line interactive, offline, lithium, and DC UPS; telecom inverter, static transfer switch, and industry UPS systems; and customized products comprising voltage and frequency adjustable UPS systems. In addition, it offers accessories, including 3 phase ATS racks, 3 phase bypass maintenance racks, 3 phase input racks, 3 phase lightning protection racks, 3 phase UPS distribution racks, batter racks, lead-acid batteries, MMBMs, PDU modules, single phase composite racks, single phase lightning protection racks, SNMPs, 3 phase voltage regulators, AC distribution cabinets, active power filters, battery cabinets, chargers, distribution cabinets, outdoor cabinets, power distribution cabinets, rack battery cabinets, and wall-mounted lightning protection products. Further, the company provides data center systems; and SNMP adapters, data collection devices, data center monitoring and management systems, data acquisition modules, leakage sensor modules, contact monitor modules, and GSM modules. The company was formerly known as Kehua Hengsheng Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kehua Data Co., Ltd. in January 2021. Kehua Data Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Renrenle Commercial Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Renrenle Commercial Group Co.,Ltd. operates hypermarkets, boutique supermarkets, boutiques, department stores, and online shopping supermarkets in China. It operates 128 stores in Guangdong, Shaanxi, Sichuan, Tianjin, Chongqing, Guangxi, Fujian, Hunan, Jiangxi, and other provinces. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Tianjin Saixiang Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Tianjin Saixiang Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the development and production of radial tire production equipment in China. The company also offers transportation jigs; machining systems for robot industry, including surface polishing, casting machining, welding, painting, rubber coating, assembling and transportation, etc.; and logistics system, automobile manufacturing equipment, and automobile exhibition equipment. It also exports its products to France, the United States, Germany, Japan, England, Italy, and India. Tianjin Saixiang Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 1989 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Changchun UP Optotech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Changchun UP Optotech Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of photoelectric measurement and control equipment, optical materials, and other products in China. Its principal products include TV goniometers, antenna pedestals, photoelectric theodolite optical and mechanical subsystems, aviation/aerospace camera optical and mechanical subsystems, radar antenna pedestals, medical testing instruments, K9 optical glasses, etc. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Changchun, China.

name: Shenzhen Selen Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Selen Science & Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of new materials in China. The company also exports its products to Europe, the United States, South America, Southeast Asia, and internationally. It offers double-sided tapes, optical tapes, protective films, functional tapes, TAC products, graphite sheets, and aluminum-plastic composite films. The company also provides electronic/pharmaceutical/food industry clean-room engineering design, construction, and maintenance integrated solution; ultra clean products research, production, and sales integration services; and clean room products, such as clean-room apparels, clean-room consumables, purification apparatus, air filters, lithium battery package materials, and consumables. In addition, it offers personal care products, including regenerated cellulose long fiber non-woven fabrics; and plastic packages, plastic molds, and blowing molds for use in medical, medical apparatus and instruments, chemical, and other fields. The company serves information technology, consumer electronics, new energy, petroleum refinement, biopharmaceutical, food, daily chemical, automobile manufacturing, and aerospace. Shenzhen Selen Science & Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Juli Sling Co., Ltd.
summary: Juli Sling Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells rigging products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers textile slings, mooring ropes, chain slings, wire ropes, steel wire rope slings, clamp lifting beam pulleys, lifting clamps, cables, and steel tie rods; and engages in the crane and steel works. It serves the nuclear power, wind energy, hydro power, ship building, metallurgy, bridge construction, mining, aerospace, ocean engineering, machinery, transportation, port construction, spatial structure, machinery manufacturing, and other lifting industries. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Baoding, the People's Republic of China.

name: Ciwen Media Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ciwen Media Co., Ltd. engages in the investment, production, and distribution of TV series and films. It is also involved in the mobile leisure game development, promotions, and artist agency and related businesses. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Hexin Industry Group Co. Ltd and changed its name to Ciwen Media Co., Ltd. in January 2016. Ciwen Media Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Haining China Leather Market Co.,Ltd
summary: Haining China Leather Market Co.,Ltd operates professional leather market in China. The company also operates an online mall that offers leather, fur, suede, luggage, and household items; and provides import and export foreign trade and policy support services, as well as supply chain financial solutions. In addition, it develops residential real estate properties; and operates hotels. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Haining, China.

name: GUANGDONG CHJ INDUSTRY CO.,LTD.
summary: GUANGDONG CHJ INDUSTRY CO.,LTD. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and retail of jewelry and fashion handbags under the CHJ Jewellery, VENTI, and FION brands in China. It operates approximately 1,000 franchised outlets. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Shanghai Zhezhong Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Zhezhong Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells sets of switching equipment in China. It operates through Industrial and Building Installation Industry segments. The company offers complete sets of switching equipment; spare parts; and PHC pipe piles. It also provides building installation services. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Zhezhong Construction Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Zhezhong Group Co., Ltd. in March 2015. Shanghai Zhezhong Group Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China. Shanghai Zhezhong Group Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shanghai Kang Feng Investment Management Company Limited.

name: Taier Heavy Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Taier Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, markets, and services metallurgical equipment in China. The company offers industrial universal shafts, gear couplings, shear blades, sliding plates, mandrels, compactors, automobile-transmission shafts, automobile spare parts, and others. It also provides wire rod coil compactors; bar bundling, H-beam tying, strapping, and spray marking machines; and de-coilers/re-coilers, as well as compactor spare parts. The company was formerly known as Anhui Taier Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Taier Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. in February 2013. Taier Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Ma'anshan, China.

name: Nantong Jinghua Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Nantong Jinghua Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of APIs and pharmaceutical intermediates in China. Its primary products include Phenylbutazone, Primidone, Phenobarbital, Fluorouracil, Propylthiouracil, Piroxicam, and Flucytosine APIs. The company was founded in 1957 and is based in Nantong, China.

name: Edifier Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Edifier Technology Co., Ltd. provides audio solutions for home, consumer electronics, and PC multimedia applications. It produces and sells sound bars and speaker systems; Bluetooth, portable, bookshelf, home theatre, gaming, and computer speakers; accessories comprising speaker stands and cables, and wireless and wired remotes; and speakers for TV and living rooms, as well as headphones. The company offers its products through a network of distributors in North America, South America, Europe, the Middle East, and the Asia Pacific regions. Edifier Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: S.F. Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: S.F. Holding Co., Ltd. provides integrated express logistics services in China and internationally. It operates in three segments: Express, Freight, and Other. The company offers warehousing management, sales forecasting, big data analysis, and financial management services; express services, such as time-definite express, economy express delivery, intra-city instant delivery, warehousing, and international express delivery; and freight services focusing on less than truckload service. It also provides cold chain logistics services for customers in the fresh produce, food products, and pharmaceutical segments; and value-added services, such as insurance, cash on delivery, packaging, and food preservation services. In addition, the company offers freight forwarding, inbound and outbound express delivery, goods delivery, cargo transportation, supply chain management, aviation cargo transportation, telecommunication, industrial investment, financing, factoring, leasing, asset and wealth management, and property management services. Further, it provides technical development and maintenance services; information technology development and consulting services; management consulting services; and business information and business management consulting services. The company was formerly known as Maanshan Dingtai Rare Earth & New Material Co., Ltd. and changed its name to S.F. Holding Co., Ltd. in February 2017. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China. S.F. Holding Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Mingde Holding Development Co., Ltd.

name: Yantai Jereh Oilfield Services Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Yantai Jereh Oilfield Services Group Co., Ltd. provides integrated solutions for the oil and gas, power, and environmental management sectors worldwide. It offers various equipment, such as drilling and workover equipment, cementing fleets, fracturing spreads, coiled tubing units, nitrogen pumping units, heating equipment, plunger pumps and spares, simulation training systems, flowline products, well control equipment, and wellhead equipment; and gas compressors. It also provides integrated oilfield and management services, drilling and completion services, workover and stimulation services, and oil production services; and oilfield surface, gas field surface, pipeline, and liquefied natural gas (LNG) engineering services, as well as oil and gas storage, oil refinery and petrochemical, and LNG/CNG fueling services. In addition, the company provides consulting services, such as investment opportunity study, design, preliminary feasibility-study and feasibility-study report, general-planning design, evaluation of post-production, and others; engineering services consisting of conceptual design, process design package, FEED and basic design, and detail design services; procurement services; construction management services; and modular fabrication services. Further, it offers ecological remediation, solid waste treatment, wastewater treatment, and equipment manufacturing services; and engages in fossil and new energy, and combined energy generation activities. The company was formerly known as Yantai Jereh Equipment Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yantai Jereh Oilfield Services Group Co., Ltd. in November 2007. Yantai Jereh Oilfield Services Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Dalian Zeus Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: Dalian Zeus Entertainment Co., Ltd. develops and publishes games for mobile devices, PCs, and consoles. It is also involved in the Internet advertising, iOS app distribution, and film and TV production businesses. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Xingmin Intelligent Transportation Systems (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Xingmin Intelligent Transportation Systems (Group) Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and distributes steel wheels in China. The company offers tubeless, snow wheel, steel, and agricultural and forestry engineering series products. Its products include steel wheels for passenger cars, light trucks, heavy trucks, trailers, and agricultural and forestry machineries, as well as snow wheels. The company offers its products under the Xingmin brand name. It also exports its products to approximately 40 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Shandong Xingmin Wheel Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xingmin Intelligent Transportation Systems (Group) Co., Ltd. in July 2016. Xingmin Intelligent Transportation Systems (Group) Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Longkou, China.

name: Shenzhen Hemei Group Co.,LTD.
summary: Shenzhen Hemei Group Co.,LTD. engages in the tourism, finance, smart technology, and Internet technology businesses in Japan and internationally. It operates 200 boutique stores that provide jewelry, men's wear, women's wear, casual wear, sportswear, children's wear, and shoes primarily in France, Italy, Germany, Switzerland, and Spain. The company also offers products and services, such as consumer loans, industrial investment, financing, financial services, brand funds, etc. In addition, it provides smart home, intelligent hardware, and new energy products; and Internet technology products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Haoningda Meters Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Hemei Group Co.,LTD. in May 2016. Shenzhen Hemei Group Co.,LTD. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Sichuan Fulin Transportation Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Fulin Transportation Group Co., Ltd. engages in the road transportation business in China. The company provides passenger, travel, charter, car rental, maintenance, and ticket inquiry, as well as advertising services. It also offers station, taxi and urban bus operations, vehicle maintenance and inspection, driver training, insurance concurrent agency, and cross-border investment services. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Henan Senyuan Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Senyuan Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sales of high, medium, and low voltage power generation, transmission, and distribution equipment in China and internationally. It also researches and develops, designs, produces, constructs, installs, operates, and maintains energy power plants, port power supply facilities, energy saving, and emission reduction facilities. The company's products include charging station equipment; high and medium voltage switchgears; pre-installed transformer substation and switching station; switchgears for rail traction; medium voltage switch elements; medium/low voltage electric power quality correction equipment; microprocessor protection devices and systems; transformers; medium voltage mutual inductors and embedded poles; low voltage switch elements and switchgears; photovoltaic power generation systems; insulators; molding copper contact/rows; and intelligent independent power supply systems. Its products are used in national grid, energy, rail transit, petrochemical, building materials, municipal, medical and health, metallurgy, and other fields. Henan Senyuan Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Changge, China.

name: Shanxi Tond Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanxi Tond Chemical Co., Ltd. researches, produces, sells, imports, and exports civil explosives, silica products, and on-site mixed explosives in China. The company offers ammonium nitrate explosives, emulsified explosives, and ammonium fry; and white carbon black for ordinary rubber products, white carbon black for tires, carrier silica, silicone for silica rubber, silica aerosol, silica thickening and thixotropic agents, silica for coatings, inkjet silica, and silica matting agents. It also provides engineering blasting services. The company is based in Xinzhou, China.

name: Anhui Shenjian New Materials Co.,Ltd
summary: Anhui Shenjian New Materials Co.,Ltd engages in researching, producing, and selling saturated polyester resins for powder coatings in chemical materials field in China. The company offers hybrid polyester resins; outdoor polyester resins, including resins for TGIC and Primid powder coating; and PU resins. Anhui Shenjian New Materials Co.,Ltd is based in Wuhu, China.

name: Hanwang Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hanwang Technology Co., Ltd. designs and develops handwriting recognition, optical character recognition, and handwriting input products worldwide. The company offers WISEreader, a portable electronic book; Dictionary Pen, a multifunctional scanning pen; HWPen that integrates handwriting technology and electromagnetic induction technology for different modes of computer handwriting board; Tablet, a professional painting tool for art; Scan Pen for text readers; Mini Scanner, a portable hand-held offline data input device designed for mobile office working; MousePen, which is used for writing, reading, and identify pictures and text on the screen; and bionic flapping wing. It also provides office application products, such as high-speed professional scanners, starter edition scanners, and documents cameras; Face Go; and C-pen and E-signature products. In addition, the company offers PM2.5 Detector, a handheld instrument that conducts real-time measurement of the concentration and quality of airborne particles; and household indoor air purifiers and haze removal machines. Its products are primarily used in e-government, personal office, mobile communication, digital home appliances, and other applications. Hanwang Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shandong Longji Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Longji Machinery Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells automotive brake parts in China. Its products include brake rotors, drums, calipers, and pads, as well as heavy duty drums and discs; and hubs. The company also exports its products. Shandong Longji Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Longkou, China.

name: Hangzhou Zhongheng Electric Co., Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Zhongheng Electric Co., Ltd. provides electric power information and electronics products in China, Asia, Africa, Europe, the United States, Oceania, and internationally. The company offers communication power supply, HVDC, electric power supply, electric vehicle charging piles, mobile charging vehicles, remote supply new energy, metro PSD power supply, and smart lighting drive power supply products, as well as electric power information technology and energy Internet products. It also provides communication power supply; electric operation power supply; new energy electric vehicle charging/swap system; smart lighting; energy storage products; and power supply integrated solutions. The company serves power grid enterprises, power generation companies, and industrial enterprises. Hangzhou Zhongheng Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Qianjiang Yongan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Qianjiang Yongan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells taurine in China and internationally. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Qianjiang, China.

name: Taihai Manoir Nuclear Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Taihai Manoir Nuclear Equipment Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, and production of nuclear power equipment and other equipment materials. It provides equipment and materials, and services for nuclear power, energy, shipping, metallurgy, petrochemical, marine engineering, aviation, high-speed railway, nuclear reprocessing, and other areas. The company was formerly known as Danfu Compressor Co.,LTD. Taihai Manoir Nuclear Equipment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Yantai, China. Taihai Manoir Nuclear Equipment Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Yantai Taihai Group Co., Ltd.

name: Canny Elevator Co., Ltd.
summary: Canny Elevator Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, installation, and maintenance of elevators. The company offers high speed, machine room less, panorama, hospital, freight, and home-use elevators under the CANNY brand; and heavy-duty and public traffic type escalators, as well as moving walks. It provides its products for residential and commercial, public, and other projects, as well as city complexes and hotels. The company also exports its products to approximately 100 countries and regions. Canny Elevator Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Taiji Computer Corporation Limited
summary: Taiji Computer Corporation Limited provides information technology services primarily in China. The company designs and constructs information systems; and provides consulting, infrastructure, strategic planning, system design, software development, system integration, operation and maintenance outsourcing, and other value added services, as well as industry solutions for integrated IT service systems. It also offers smart city integration, public safety, intelligent building management, data center, and information security solutions. The company serves various industries, such as government, finance, energy, manufacturing, and public utilities. Taiji Computer Corporation Limited was founded in 1987 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shenzhen Zowee Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Zowee Technology Co., Ltd. researches, designs, manufactures, and sells products for use in communication products, computers, consumer electronics, etc. worldwide. The company also provides electronics manufacturing services, including mold development and manufacturing, as well as molding and spray printing; supply chain management; printed circuit board assembly; product assembly and packaging; system integration and testing; and production track systems and automation systems development. It serves the mobile terminal, network communication, intelligent home, wearable, automation, and consumer products sectors. The company was formerly known as Zowee Technology Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Zowee Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2007. Shenzhen Zowee Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Yatai Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yatai Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, produces, sells, and exports pharmaceutical products in China and internationally. The company offers tablets, capsules, patches, powder injections, and troches. It also provides chemical agents and raw materials, and diagnostic reagents, as well as pharmaceutical research and development outsourcing services. Zhejiang Yatai Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Shaoxing, China.

name: NAURA Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: NAURA Technology Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of electronic equipment and components in the People's Republic of China. The company offers semiconductor equipment, including etching equipment, physical vapor deposition and chemical vapor deposition equipment, oxidation/diffusion equipment, cleaning systems, annealing, and other semiconductor equipment, as well as flat panel display manufacturing equipment, gas mass flow controllers, and other components; and vacuum, atmosphere-protective, and continuous heat treatment equipment, as well as crystal growth equipment, which are used in new energy, new materials, vacuum electronics, aerospace and magnetic materials, and other fields. It also provides turn-key lithium ion battery solutions, including mixer series, coater series, slitting machine series, rolling mill series, winding machine series, laminating machine series, and automatic assembly lines for chip packaging, test equipment, drying equipment, battery pack production line, energy storage cabinets, and others. In addition, the company offers precision components, such as precision resistors, tantalum capacitors, quartz crystal devices, microwave components, power supplies, hybrid integrated circuits, and electronic components for use in aerospace, aviation, automatic control, power electronics, precision instrument, and rail transport industries. The company was formerly known as Beijing Sevenstar Electronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to NAURA Technology Group Co., Ltd. in February 2017. NAURA Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Weixing New Building Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Weixing New Building Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of plastic pipes in China. The company's products include PPR, PE, polypropylene-random-copolymer, PE-XB, F-PPR, and PP-R/AL pipes for water supplying applications; PE corrugated, PVC-U, and PE pipes for sewerage applications; PB-R, PE-RT II, PE-RT I, PB, and PB-XB pipes for heating applications; and hoses and plumbing accessories. It also offers HDPE same-floor drainage system, floor radiant heating system, comfortable hot water circulation system, SPM comfortable drainage system, and central hydraulic balance system solutions. The company offers its products under the Weixing, annette, and KALE brands. Zhejiang Weixing New Building Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Linhai, China.

name: China Transinfo Technology Co., Ltd
summary: China Transinfo Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a transportation operator and traffic data service provider. The company offers traffic solutions and security system for the urban transportation, highway transportation, rail transportation, civil aviation, water transportation, and other fields. China Transinfo Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shandong Chiway Industry Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shandong Chiway Industry Development Co.,Ltd. produces and sells aluminum anti-counterfeit caps and composite anti-counterfeit printing aluminum plates. It also offers combined anti-counterfeit caps, cold-punching molds, injection molds, aluminum anti-counterfeit bottle covers, aluminum plate composites, and anti-counterfeiting printing bases. The company also provides garden planning and design, engineering construction, antique construction, green maintenance, and flower seedling services. The company was formerly known as Shandong Lipeng Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Chiway Industry Development Co.,Ltd. in February 2021. Shandong Chiway Industry Development Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Zhejiang Yasha Decoration Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Yasha Decoration Co.,Ltd primarily engages in the interior and exterior decoration, curtain wall, design and construction, home automation, and building intellectualization, and other activities in China. It offers decoration services for high star hotels, as well as large public architecture and high-end residences. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shandong New Beiyang Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong New Beiyang Information Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of thermal printing, identification, and smart system integration products in China. Its products include teller cash recyclers, automatic sorting systems, smart vending lockers, smart food pickup lockers, smart micro market products, embedded scanners, cash deposit modules, bank note sorters, parcel lockers, embedded scanners and printers, industrial and desktop label printers, label and receipt mobile printers, thermal receipt printers, kiosk impact and label printers, scale printers, kiosk thermal printers, impact receipt printers, and scale printers. The company also manufactures and installs parcel lockers in residential communities, office buildings, campuses, and retail centers, as well as offers hardware and software solutions, including installation, operation, and maintenance services. It serves logistics, finance, and other industries. The company also exports its products to various countries and regions in Europe, North America, and the Asia-Pacific. Shandong New Beiyang Information Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Weihai, China.

name: Hubei Guochuang Hi-tech Material Co.,Ltd
summary: Hubei Guochuang Hi-tech Material Co., Ltd engages in the real estate intermediary service business and the research, development, production, and sale of modified and emulsified asphalt in China. The company offers SBS modified, high viscosity modified, rubber, colored, and retardant asphalt; and high modulus asphalt mixture additives, emulsified asphalt and modified emulsified asphalt, cement asphalt mortars, asphalt pavement regeneration reductants, asphalt pavement waterproof and oilrepellent agents, bridge preventive curing coating materials, and epoxy asphalt steel bridge maintenance materials. It is also undertakes road maintenance projects. In addition, the company provides road engineering maintenance equipment includes micro-surfacing, sand fog sealing layer, ultra-thin wear layer, synchronous gravel sealing, reclaimed asphalt pavement, warm asphalt pavement, cold repair, and snow melting anti-icing equipment. Hubei Guochuang Hi-tech Material Co.,Ltd is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Chongyi Zhangyuan Tungsten Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongyi Zhangyuan Tungsten Co., Ltd. engages in the mining, beneficiation, smelting, and powder producing activities in China. It offers APTs, tungsten oxide, tungsten powders, tungsten carbide powders, inserts, rods, buttons, and special parts under the Zhangyuan brand. The company is also involved in tungsten alloy and cemented carbide producing; and deep processing and trading activities. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Ganzhou, China.

name: Shandong Hongchuang Aluminum Industry Holding Company Limited
summary: Shandong Hongchuang Aluminum Industry Holding Company Limited develops, manufactures, and sells aluminum finishing products in China. The company offers aluminum plates, strips, and foils. It provides container aluminum foils for packing boxes; household aluminum foils that are used in food packing; flexible packaging foils for food packaging after lamination; and beer sealing aluminum foils. The company also offers fin-stock aluminum foils for use in air conditioners; and pharmaceutical aluminum foils, which are used in pharmaceutical packing, including ptp flexible pharmaceutical packing. It also exports its products to Europe, North America, Australia, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Loften Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Hongchuang Aluminum Industry Holding Company Limited in May 2017. Shandong Hongchuang Aluminum Industry Holding Company Limited was founded in 2000 and is based in Binzhou, China.

name: Nanjing Sciyon Wisdom Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Sciyon Wisdom Technology Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells industrial automation and informatization products and solutions in China and internationally. The company offers smart control products, such as smart management systems, intelligent safety production management systems, equipment monitoring and accident prediction systems, intelligent maintenance and training systems, intelligent simulation and training systems, manufacturing execution systems, and intelligent manufacturing information systems, as well as smart control center products. It also provides intelligent control products, such as distributed control, digital electro-hydraulic control, failure safe control, intelligent combustion optimization, intelligent ammonia injection zone control, equipment fault diagnosis and early warning, and intelligent operation optimization systems, as well as touch screens, universal/marine turbine controllers, and integrated/medium-scale programmable controllers. In addition, the company offers smart devices comprising intelligent electric actuators, personnel positioning system, condenser online cleaning robots, boiler furnace parameter measurement systems, warehouse empty preheaters, ranging cable systems, air powder parameter measurement, combustion system parameter detection, and optimization control, smart inverters, and AC servo drives. Further, it provides training and other support services. Nanjing Sciyon Wisdom Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Beijing Unistrong Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing UniStrong Science & Technology Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures high-precision products and services for the geospatial marketplace worldwide. It offers a range of solutions for various fields of applications and industries, such as building and construction, land survey and cadastral survey, geographic information systems (GIS) data collection, 3D scanning, agriculture and smart farming, and land and structure monitoring. The company provides its products and services for original equipment/design manufacturer, machine control and guidance, survey and mapping, GIS, L-band correction services, marine, field mobile worker, monitoring, and unmanned systems markets.
