Beijing UniStrong Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. produces and sells critical components for IoT intelligence, telecommunication equipment, metal precision, LED technologies, and interconnect solutions. The company offers flexible circuits, flexible circuit assembly products, flexible circuit module assembly products, rigid printed circuit boards (PCB), flexible printed circuits, rigid-flex PCBs, and PCB assembly and box build products for automotive, telecom equipment, consumer electronics, high-reliability systems, telecommunications infrastructure, and consumer technology applications. It also provides HD electronic display products, such as indoor fine-pitch RGB and outdoor RGB products for HD displays, TV backlights, mobile phones, and other lighting applications. In addition, the company offers telecom equipment and metal precision products comprising base station antennas, RF filters, technical ceramic products, sheet metal products, stamping parts, die-casting products, and CNC and thermal products for the automotive, communication base station, and medical treatment applications. It provides its products and services in mainland China, Taiwan, South Korea, Finland, India, Sweden, Germany, Poland, Estonia, the United States, and Mexico. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Dongshan Sheet Metal Liability Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. in 2007. Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Beijing Dabeinong Technology Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Dabeinong Technology Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the feed business for farmers and growers. It offers pig feeds, livestock and poultry feeds, and veterinary drug vaccines, as well as rice, corn crop, and other seed products. The company is also involved in the agricultural Internet and industrial chain technology financial services. Beijing Dabeinong Technology Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Yibin Tianyuan Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Yibin Tianyuan Group Co., Ltd. produces and distributes chlor-alkali chemicals in China and internationally. Its products include chlorine products, such as ion exchange membrane method sodium hydroxide, liquid chlorine, synthetic industrial hydrochloric acid, trichloroethylene, tetrachloroethylene, artificial rutile, and industrial calcium chloride; PVC products comprising suspension polyvinyl chloride resins; and fine chemical products consisting of hydrazine hydrate and technical grade sodium tripolyphosphate. The company also comprise pipe fittings and plate products, such as PVC-O water supply pipes, PVC drains, PVC electrical bushings, PE gas pipes, PPR hot and cold water pipes, wood plastic products, and upscale ecological interior floor products; building materials, including Portland cement; and calcium carbide. The company is based in Yibin, China.

name: Visionox Technology Inc.
summary: Visionox Technology Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and sells organic light emitting display products worldwide. The company provides active-matrix organic light-emitting diode display and passive-matrix organic light-emitting diode flexible display products that are used in the consumer electronics, communications, railways, petroleum, chemical, metallurgy, machinery, industrial control instruments, finance, health care, automotive displays, and other industries. It also provides aftersales services. The company was formerly known as Blackcow Food Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Visionox Technology Inc. in June 2018. Visionox Technology Inc. was founded in 1996 and is based in Chaoyang, China.

name: Shenzhen Sunyes Electronic Manufacturing Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sunyes Electronic Manufacturing Holding Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of electronic manufacturing solutions, and provision of services for electronic manufacturing systems in China and internationally. The company offers soldering equipment, such as soldering stations, lead-free solder bars/wires, rework stations, soldering pots, desoldering pumps, solder wire stands, smoke absorbers, electric irons, hot air guns, thermometers, and system testers. It also provides fastening technology products comprising electric screwdrivers, electric power supplies, torque meters, digital force gauges, automatic screw suppliers, torque screwdrivers, dispensing controllers, tape dispensers, and ceramic screwdrivers. In addition, the company offers antistatic technology products, including ionizing blowers and air guns, surface resistance testers, wrist strap testers, multi-functional testers, and body antistatic products, as well as antistatic wrist straps, brushes, tweezers, and racks. Further, it provides optical technology products consisting of magnifying lamps and magnifiers; moisture-proof cabinets; and hand tools and other products, such as pliers, counters, spring balances, alcohol bottles, and others. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guizhou Xinbang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guizhou Xinbang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of Chinese herbal medicines and biological drugs in China and internationally. It offers cardiovascular and cerebrovascular, digestive system, endocrine, tumor and immune regulation, blood system, rheumatism and rheumatoid, urinary system, antipyretic analgesic, cold medication, gynecological treatment, and anti-infective drugs. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Guiyang, China.

name: Jiangsu Changqing Agrochemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Changqing Agrochemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pesticides in China, Europe, the United States, and Southeast Asia. Its technical materials comprise fomesafen, acifluorfen, fluoroglycofen-ethyl, lactofen, clomazone, imazethapyr, bromoxynil octanoate, nicosulfuron, benazolin-ethyl, clethodim, tricyclazole, fenoxanil, imidacloprid, acetamiprid, diafenthiuron, mesotrione, s-metolachlor, clodinafop-propargyl, dicamba, indoxacarb, fipronil, thiamethoxam, indoxacarb technical concentrate, clethodim mother liquor, cyhalofop-butyl active compound, prosulfuron active compound, pretilachlor active compound, azoxystrobin active compound, glyphosate active compound, chlorpyrifos active compound, triazophos, dimethazone, and triasulfuron active compound materials; and formulations include insecticides, bactericides, and herbicides. The company is based in Yangzhou, China.

name: Beijing Lier High-temperature Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Lier High-temperature Materials Co.,Ltd. produces and sells various refractories for the iron and steel, and coal chemical industries. The company offers ladle, blast furnace, and tundish refractories; refractories for heating furnaces; and refractory materials for converters and electric furnaces, and waste incinerators, as well as the non-ferrous metallurgical industry. It also provides casting function series refractory materials, including tundish upper nozzles, long nozzles, stopper rods, and immersion nozzles for thin slab continuous casting, as well as tundish nozzles with zirconium; and refractory insulation fiber products. The company has operations in China, Russia, Ukraine, Malaysia, Vietnam, Indonesia, India, Thailand, and internationally. Beijing Lier High-temperature Materials Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. researches and develops medicines. The company offers raw materials, drugs, and medicinal plastic bottles. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1951 and is based in Tianjin, China. Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tianjin Pharmaceutical Holdings Ltd.

name: Jiangsu Lianfa Textile Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Lianfa Textile Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the textile business in China. It is involved in yarn spinning, dyeing, weaving, finishing, and printing activities. The company offers fabric products, such as long-staple length cotton fabrics, texture fabrics, natural fabrics, and functional finishing fabrics; garments, including men's formal and casual shirts, and women's formal shirts and casual wear; and yarn products. It also supplies steam and compressed air; and engages in the thermal power generation, trading, logistics, and water treatment activities. The company exports its products to 36 countries, including Japan, the United States, Europe, and South East Asia. Jiangsu Lianfa Textile Co.,Ltd was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Nantong, China.

name: Wuxi Double Elephant Micro Fibre Material Co.,Ltd
summary: Wuxi Double Elephant Micro Fibre Material Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells artificial and synthetic leather products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers micro fiber leather products, including microfiber shoe, furniture, automotive trim, case and bag, cleaning, and ball leather products; and micro fiber suede, as well as microfiber package leather for ornaments. It also provides PU synthetic leather products, such as PU shoe, furniture, automotive upholstery, case and bag, vanity, ball, garment, and glove leather products, as well as PU wiping leather for wine boxes. In addition, the company offers PVC artificial leather products comprising PVC shoe, case and bag, vanity, furniture, garment, ball, automotive trim, glove, and mahjong table upper leather products, as well as semi-PU embossed leather and PVC flocking products. Further, it provides plastic films. The company also exports its products in Asia, Europe, Americas, Africa, and Oceania. Wuxi Double Elephant Micro Fibre Material Co.,Ltd is based in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China. Wuxi Double Elephant Micro Fibre Material Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Jiangsu Shuangxiang Group.

name: Fujian Star-net Communication Co., LTD.
summary: Fujian Star-net Communication Co., Ltd. provides information-based solutions for enterprise customers in China. It offers network communication equipment, cloud computing, POS terminal, desktop cloud, wireless and broadband access, unified communications, and video information application products and services in the areas of disaster prevention and reduction. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Hunan Mendale Hometextile Co.,Ltd
summary: Hunan Mendale Hometextile Co.,Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells home textiles products in China and internationally. It offers suites, blankets, and pillows. The name was formerly known as Changsha Mengjie Quilted Products Industry Co., Ltd and its changed name to Hunan Mendale Hometextile Co.,Ltd in January 2001. Hunan Mendale Hometextile Co.,Ltd was founded in 1956 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Lets Holdings Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Lets Holdings Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of construction materials in China and internationally. It provides concrete manufacturing and construction services for the nuclear power, high-speed rail, subway, water conservancy, and other projects, as well as for ports, bridges, tunnels, and highways. The company also offers technical construction services, such as surveying, designing, testing, evaluation, consulting, and training for the life cycle of engineering feasibility study, construction, and operation and maintenance. In addition, it provides information and intelligent services for the Chinese construction industry; Internet-based industry supply chain big data services; and BIM- based building information and industrialization of intelligent system services. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Academy Of Building Research Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lets Holdings Group Co., Ltd. in October 2019. Lets Holdings Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of pharmaceutical products in Hong Kong, the United States, Europe, Mainland China, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Finished Dose Pharmaceutical Products, Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (API), and CDMO. Its pharmaceutical products consist of finished dose pharmaceutical products, which primarily include enoxaparin sodium injection; API products, including heparin sodium API and enoxaparin sodium API; and other products, including pancreatin API. The company is also involved in the provision of research and development, manufacturing, quality management, and program management services; and development and manufacture of recombinant pharmaceutical products, critical non-viral vectors, intermediates for gene therapy, and naturally derived pharmaceutical products. In addition, it engages in property management, investment management and consulting, biopharmaceutical technology development and consulting, and equity and venture investment activities; research, development, and production of biopharmaceuticals; and trading of medical products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in February 2017. Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Aishida Co.,Ltd
summary: Aishida Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of cookware and kitchen electric appliances worldwide. It offers cooking utensils, including pressure cookers, woks, frying pans, soup milk pots, steamers, kettles, kitchen sets and accessories, and other products; home appliances consisting of rice and electric pressure cookers, electric kettles, soymilk machines, electric baking pans, induction cookers, multifunctional cooking machines, and juice and bread machines; and environmental appliances, such as filters. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Aishida Electric Co., Ltd and changed its name to Aishida Co., Ltd. in November 2019. Aishida Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in Wenling, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Jiaxin Silk Corp., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jiaxin Silk Corp., Ltd. manufactures and sells silk fabrics and garments, and other silk-related products. It is involved in cocoon purchasing and drying, throwing, fabric manufacturing, and printing and dyeing, as well as the manufacture and export of garments primarily under the brand names of BCBG, Max Studio, Michael Kors, UESS, Armani Exchange, Mac & Jac, Marmaxx, Buffalo, Massimo Dutti, Zara, Max & Co., Bimba & Lola, French Connection, Lindex, Kookai, Marc Jacobs, Cavalli, Trussardi, etc. in Europe, the United States, Japan, and internationally. The company is based in Jiaxing, China.

name: NavInfo Co., Ltd.
summary: NavInfo Co., Ltd. provides digital map content, Internet of Vehicles and dynamic traffic information service, and location-based vertical application services worldwide. The company offers ADAS maps, high-precision maps, navigation engines, and ADAS chips. It serves car navigation, consumer electronic navigation, the Internet and mobile Internet, government, and enterprise applications. NavInfo Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Xuchang Yuandong Drive Shaft Co., Ltd.
summary: Xuchang Yuandong Drive Shaft Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells drive shafts in China. The company provides small drive and tractors shafts, and drive shaft parts, as well as products for pickup trucks, SUVs, and powered mechanical cars. Its products are also used in construction machineries. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Xuchang, China.

name: Zibo Qixiang Tengda Chemical Co., Ltd
summary: Zibo Qixiang Tengda Chemical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and markets various chemical products in China. Its products include methyl ethyl ketone, isobutylene, maleic anhydride, disproportioated products, butadiene rubber, and carboxyl styrene butadiene latex, as well as tert-butanol and MTBE products. The company also exports its products to the United States, Japan, Canada, South Korea, and India. The company is based in Zibo, China.

name: Jiangsu Yoke Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yoke Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of electronic semiconductor materials, cryogenic composite materials, and plastic additives materials. It also offers flame retardants for plastics. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Yixing, China.

name: Glodon Company Limited
summary: Glodon Company Limited provides professional application software and support services to the construction industry. The company offers various products and services, such as cost management, BIM construction, digital enterprise. It operates in China, the United States, the United Kingdom, Finland, Sweden, Singapore, Hong Kong, Malaysia, Indonesia, India, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Glodon Software Company Limited and changed its name to Glodon Company Limited in June 2016. Glodon Company Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: YanAn Bicon Pharmaceutical Listed Company
summary: YanAn Bicon Pharmaceutical Listed Company researches and develops, produces, and sells pharmaceutical intermediates, pesticide intermediates, and new energy and materials products in China. It offers medical products under the Weizheng and DoctorBaby brands. The company also provides lithium hexafluorophate, a material of lithium battery electrolytes for use in anti-cutting gloves, and military and defense equipment, as well as aerospace composites, ocean vessels, naval vessel ropes, deep-sea fishing trawls, deep-sea anti-wave cages, sports equipment supplies, construction engineering reinforcements, and other high performance composites. In addition, it offers drug intermediates, such as 7-ADCA; trichloropyridin-2-Ol sodium; 5,5-dimethylhydantoin; and benzaldehyde. The company was formerly known as JiangSu Bicon Pharmaceutical Listed Company and changed its name to YanAn Bicon Pharmaceutical Listed Company in October 2018. YanAn Bicon Pharmaceutical Listed Company was founded in 2007 and is based in Nantong, China.

name: Hunan Hansen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Hansen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. produces and sells Chinese and western medicines in China and internationally. It provides medicines in injection, oral liquid, tablet, capsule, granule, syrup, ointment, tincture, pill, and other forms. The company is based in Yiyang, China.

name: Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a civil-military integration enterprise that researches, develops, produces, and sells radar systems, remote sensing, satellite navigation, digital systems, analog simulation, and security storage for space, aviation, and ground industries. It offers wall probing radar, Mini-SAR, the millimeter-wave radar, the phased array radar, and the slope stability radar used in national defense, public security, frontier defense, geological disaster monitoring, regional protection, and automobile active safety. The company is also involved in processing algorithms of multi-source remote sensing data, and anti-radiation remote sensing data processing SOC chips; and provides real-time onboard, ground raw data, and specialized data processing, as well as system integration services. In addition, it provides baseband processing chips, serialization modules, and complete machines used in general and specialized military equipment, as well as signal acquisition, tracking, observation processing, and PVT solution services. Further, the company offers digital design and simulation, experiment verification, performance evaluation, and operational maintenance in the field of radar systems, satellite navigation, and electronic warfare. Additionally, it provides LNA, BUC, microwave frequency conversion, matrix switch, mediation, spectrum monitoring, automatic detection, frequency domain situation, and equipment status monitoring services; and embedded military-use storage devices, secret-related computer storage disks, portable storage devices, and large-scale information storage systems. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Changfa Refrigeration Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd. in November 2015. Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: Wuhan Guide Infrared Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Guide Infrared Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of infrared thermal imaging systems primarily in Asia. The company offers localization cooled and uncooled IR detectors; system integration cores and modules; law enforcement and temperature measurement systems; personal vision products; and automotive thermal imaging obstacle avoidance systems. Its infrared products are used in various applications, including electric power, metallurgy, petrochemical, construction, firefighting, law enforcement, inspection and quarantine, security and surveillance, ADAS night vision system, and others. The company a strategic cooperation agreement with Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. to develop and market Foresight's QuadSight sensor system combined with guide infrared applications to customers in China. Wuhan Guide Infrared Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Wuhan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hangzhou Hikvision Digital Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Hikvision Digital Technology Co., Ltd. provides video-centered intelligent Internet of Things solutions and big data services worldwide. The company offers network cameras, PTZ cameras, explosion-proof and anti-corrosion series products, network video recorders, data center and storage products, and power-over-Ethernet and Wi-Fi kits; and turbo HD cameras, DVRs, PTZ cameras, and portable products. It also provides transmission products, including network switches, cables, and wireless bridges; display and control products, which include digital signages, interactive tablets, monitors, LCD video walls and displays, and controllers; and intelligent traffic products that include signal control and traffic flow systems, smart surveillance and AID systems, entrance and exit management products, checkpoint and intersection violation systems, and parking guidance products. In addition, the company offers access control products comprising face recognition and card terminals, controllers, turnstiles, fingerprint terminals, readers, electrical locks, and kits; video intercom products, 2-wire, 4-wire, 8-wire, and IP products and doorbells; security, thermography, and common vision thermal cameras; alarm products, including intrusion alarm panel, intrusion detector, emergency alarm, and security radar products; CCTV, access control, mobile, traffic, transmission and display, and video intercom product accessories; and HiLook IP, turbo HD, and transmission products. Further, it provides HikCentral Professional, an integrated security software for video security, access control, intrusion alarm, etc.; HikCentral Enterprise; Hik-Connect mobile app; and Hik-ProConnect, a cloud-based solution. It serves the public security, transportation, retail, education, healthcare, financial institutions, intelligent buildings, and other markets. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Aisidi Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Aisidi Co., Ltd. provides supply chain services in China and internationally. It operates through four business segments: Intelligent Terminal Products, Communication Service, Financial Service, and E-Commerce Platform. The company offers mobile communication terminal products, digital consumer products, communication service, Internet, finance, etc. It also provides cross-border communications, leakage warning, multi-party communication, flow recharge services, etc.; and supply chain financial services, including small loans and trade financing, as well as commercial factoring and cross-border supply chain financing services to upstream and downstream customers. The company offers its services under the U.you brand through its sales groups and service network in 31 provinces across 300 local networks, as well as through approximately 30,000 offline sales outlets; and e√Ç¬óbusiness platforms. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: SUNA Co.,Ltd
summary: SUNA Co.,Ltd operates in the information and communication industry in China. The company offers government data collection and sharing, time and space information cloud, trusted electronic document management application, ecological civilization big data, grid service management, and practitioner management platforms; and travel, campus, fire protection, and prison solutions. It also offers indoor signal coverage integrated, netcom integrated coverage, customer, city village coverage, campus coverage, cell coverage, and sea area coverage solutions. The company was formerly known as Fujian Sunnada Communication Co.,Ltd and changed its name to SUNA Co.,Ltd in February 2018. SUNA Co.,Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Zhe Jiang Kangsheng Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhe Jiang Kangsheng Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells refrigeration piping systems and new energy vehicle parts in China. The company offers steel tubes, aluminum tubes, copper tubes, micro channel heat exchangers, condensers, and evaporators; pure electric tourist buses, pure electric buses, pure electric logistics vehicles, pure electric touring cars, and pure electric airport shuttle buses; and financing lease, small loans, and other financial services. It also provides aluminum sheets, air conditioning parts, and microchannel heat exchangers. Zhe Jiang Kangsheng Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Chun'an, China.

name: Rainbow Digital Commercial Co., Ltd.
summary: Rainbow Digital Commercial Co., Ltd. operates a chain of department stores, shopping malls, supermarkets, and convenience stores in China. It operates 68 general merchandise stores, 81 supermarkets, and shopping centers in 8 provinces and 25 cities, as well as 156 convenience stores. The company was formerly known as Rainbow Department Store Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Rainbow Digital Commercial Co., Ltd. in 2020. Rainbow Digital Commercial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangzhou Echom Sci.&Tech.Co,.Ltd
summary: Guangzhou Echom Sci.&Tech.Co,.Ltd provides design and manufacturing services worldwide. The company develops and produces black home appliances, including home TV, smart TV boxes, smart flat screen TV, business/home dual use large-screen ultra-high-definition televisions, and remote controls; and exterior structures of home entertainment products, such as monitors, commercial large-screen interactive integrated machines, various players, digital set-top boxes, outdoor advertising machines, and laptops. It also provides various accessories for home appliances; automotive interior and exterior decoration products comprising instrument panel, door guard plate, column, and bumper assembly products; audio products of flat-panel TVs and monitors; kitchen appliances; double-color injection machines, household electrical appliances, and laser scoring machines; and automotive front and rear bumpers, car dashboards, interior and exterior trims, and other precision molds and parts. In addition, the company designs, manufactures, sells, and leases building materials; and produces template components that are used in various building structures, including walls, columns, beams, and plates. Guangzhou Echom Sci.&Tech.Co,.Ltd was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Das Intellitech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Das Intellitech Co., Ltd. provides intelligent building and energy management solutions in China. The company offers central air-conditioning energy management systems; central air-conditioning energy saving control systems; C3 card systems; and smart home products, access control products and accessories, and consumer and attendance products. It also offers energy monitoring and management platform for urban buildings; metro integrated monitoring software system for rail transit lines; and community integrated management platform. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Sichuan Kelun Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Kelun Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, distributes, and sells pharmaceutical products in China and internationally. It offers infusion and non-infusion products, and new injection package. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China. Sichuan Kelun Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Sichuan Kelun Industry Group CO., LTD.

name: COFCO Capital Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhongyuan Special Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, sale, and servicing of industrial special equipment and special steel precision forgings in China. Its industrial special equipment products include oil drilling tools, dynamic mandrels, fan main shafts, cast pipe molds, ultra high pressure containers, forged steel cold rolls, hydraulic cylinders, etc.; and special steel precision forgings comprise mold steel, stainless steel, bearing steel, and special products. The company's products are used in petroleum, electric power, chemical, shipbuilding, metallurgy, machinery, military, and other equipment manufacturing industries. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Japan, South Korea, Africa, South Asia, and Southeast Asia countries and regions. The company is based in Jiyuan, China. COFCO Capital Holdings Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of COFCO Corporation

name: Guizhou Bailing Group Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guizhou Bailing Group Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells Chinese medicines in China. The company provides medicines in the form of tablets, capsules, granules, syrups, pills, powders, tinctures, sprays, and ointments for cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases, cough, cold, pediatric, and gynecologic diseases. Guizhou Bailing Group Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Anshun, China.

name: Kaiser (China) Culture Co., LTD
summary: Kaiser (China) Culture Co., Ltd operates in the Internet entertainment industry. The company is involved in the intellectual property operations; and research, development, and distribution of mobile games. It also produces and invests in films and television dramas, as well as animations; and invests in Internet culture industry. The company was formerly known as Kaiser (China) Holding Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kaiser (China) Culture Co., Ltd in September 2016. Kaiser (China) Culture Co., Ltd was founded in 1994 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Suzhou Victory Precision Manufacture Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Victory Precision Manufacture Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, production, and sale of precision mechanical modules primarily in China. The company's products are used in TV stands, TV front bezels and back covers, and notebooks. It serves a range of TV brands and manufacturers. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Zhejiang Unifull Industrial Fibre Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Unifull Industrial Fibre Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial polyester yarns, dipped tire cord fabrics, dipped conveyor belt fabrics, and dipped cords in China and internationally. The company also offers cord fabrics, cords, and canvas products; and lithium batteries and hydrogen fuel systems. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Huzhou, China.

name: Yunnan Lincang Xinyuan Germanium Industry Co.,LTD
summary: Yunnan Lincang Xinyuan Germanium Industry Co.,LTD mines, researches, develops, manufactures, and supplies tantalum products. It offers tantalum material products, such as district melting ingots, cerium oxide, and fiber-optic cerium tetrachloride used in infrared optics, solar cells, fiber optic communications, semiconductor specialty gases, PET catalysts, and other industries. The company also provides solar tantalum substrate, including solar germanium wafers used in space satellite solar cell, high-altitude surveillance drones, and ground high-concentration solar power stations; LED substrates for automotive applications; and semiconductor grade and semi-insulator gallium arsenide crystals and substrates used in nanoscale semiconductor integrated circuits and LED general illumination fields comprising microwave oscillators and amplifiers, fiber optic communication rate amplifiers, and other fields. In addition, it offers cooling and non-cooling infrared lenses consisting of fixed-focus lenses, continuous zoom lenses, and dual-field lenses, large diameter single crystals, infrared optical banks, optical grade germanium crystals, plastic optical components, and light windows. The company is based in Kunming, China.

name: Hangzhou Oxygen Plant Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Oxygen Plant Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells air separation units, petrochemical equipment, and industrial gases worldwide. It offers air separation equipment; air turbine compressors; steam heaters, adsorbers, three-bar valves, and other products; cooling systems; heat exchange and rectification systems; oxygen and nitrogen compressor units; liquid storage systems; and pump valve products. The company's petrochemical equipment include ethylene cold boxes, liquid nitrogen washing devices, liquefied natural gas plants, alkane dehydrogenation olefin plants, cold box separation systems, methanol to olefin devices, and CO/H2 separation devices. It also provides oxygen, nitrogen, argon, carbon dioxide and other conventional gases; and rare gases, such as antimony, bismuth, and other special gases for use in the petroleum, chemical, steel, non-ferrous metals, electronics, food, health, medical, biopharmaceutical, and other industries. In addition, the company offers environmental protection equipment, steel structural engineering, non-ferrous metal castings, cryogenic liquid transportation vehicles, and various types of process compressors. Further, it undertakes air-contracting and general contracting projects. The company was formerly known as HANGZHOU HANGYANG Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hangzhou Oxygen Plant Group Co.,Ltd. in December 2019. Hangzhou Oxygen Plant Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is based in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Andon Health Co., Ltd.
summary: Andon Health Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells health electronics and intelligent hardware products. It offers sphygmomanometers, nebulizers, blood glucose meters, thermometers, fetal heart rate instruments, electrocardiographs, oximeters, smart watches, and body weight scales. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Guangdong Taiantang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Taiantang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of traditional Chinese medicines in China. It offers medicines for the areas, including reproductive male, reproductive gynecology, cardiovascular, dermatology, pediatrics, respiratory, replenishment, digestive hepatobiliary, rheumatology, and health and other areas. Goangdong Taiantang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Zhejiang Wanliyang Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Wanliyang Co., Ltd. operates in the automobile transmission industry in China and internationally. The company develops, manufactures, and sells automotive products, including passenger car transmission and commercial vehicle transmission for use in sedans, SUVs, MPVs, micro trucks, light trucks, mid trucks, heavy trucks, buses, and other models. It also provides automotive interior products, such as dashboards, door panels, center consoles, columns, guards, bumpers, steering wheels, etc. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Wanliyang Transmission Company Ltd. and changed its name to Zhejiang Wanliyang Co., Ltd. in January 2016. Zhejiang Wanliyang Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Changjiang Runfa Health Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Changjiang Runfa Health Industry Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, sells, and services elevator system components in China and internationally. It offers solid guide rails used for vertical lift solid main rail tracks; rough guides for the processing of T-type solids; hollow guide rails for use in vertical sub-tracks; ladder rails for escalator rail and moving walkways; rail blanks; and elevator guide rails. The company also provides elevator parts, such as rail frames, weight boxes, upper and lower beams, columns, hanging round the doors, door rails, buffers, door pockets, door openers, connecting plates, pressure plates, whip guides, etc. In addition, it offers escalator parts, including sprockets, chains, aprons, inside and outside covers, upper and lower stills, truss, rails guides, guide wheels, brackets, bottom-oriented products, school-foot board brackets, and other parts. The company was formerly known as Changjiang Runfa Medicine Co., Ltd.. Changjiang Runfa Health Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Shenzhen Fastprint Circuit Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fastprint Circuit Tech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells PCBs in China and internationally. It offers backplanes, HDI boards, high frequency boards, high TG boards, halogen-free boards, flex and rigid-flex boards, and other boards for use in high-tech products; rigid multilayer PCBs, metal-substrate PCBs, HDI PCBs, high-speed signal transmission boards, and semiconductor test products; and IC substrates. The company also provides PCB design services, such as PCB layout design, signal and power integrity design, EMC design and rectification, high speed test, and automatic router training services; and PCB assembly services for electronics manufacturers. It primarily serves communications, aerospace, defense, IT, medical equipment, precision test equipment, and industrial control companies. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Harbin Gloria Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd
summary: Harbin Gloria Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of pharmaceutical products primarily in the People's Republic of China. It offers cardiac cerebrovascular medication, skeletal muscle system, vitamins and minerals, urinary system medication, antitumor medication, anti-infective drugs, respiratory medication, antihistamine, peptic, and other products. Harbin Gloria Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Harbin, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangsu Shentong Valve Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Shentong Valve Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells special valves in China and internationally. The company primarily offers butterfly valves, ball valves, gate valves, stop valves, check valves, control valves, special valves, etc. Its products are used in the fields of metallurgy, nuclear power, thermal power, chemical processing of coal, petroleum and natural gas gathering and transportation, petroleum refining and chemical, sea water desalination, etc. Jiangsu Shentong Valve Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Qidong, China.

name: Venustech Group Inc.
summary: Venustech Group Inc. provides network security products, trusted security management platforms, and specialized security services and solutions worldwide. The company offers security products, such as unified threat management, firewall, intrusion detection systems, intrusion prevention systems, Web application firewall, Web application audio systems, security operations center, database audit, and vulnerabilities scanning, and security management, as well as application delivery controller products. It primarily serves Chinese banking institutions, state-owned enterprises, and Chinese telecom operators. The company was formerly known as Beijing Venustech Inc. Venustech Group Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Zhejiang Runtu Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Runtu Co., Ltd. produces and sells dyes in China. It provides approximately 300 types of chemicals in dye, pigment, and additive categories. The company offers disperse, reactive, direct, blend, cationic, and vat dyes; and chemical intermediate products, textile auxiliaries, sodium hydrosulfite, sulfuric acid, and chlorinate alkali. It provides its products under the RUNTU, LONGYU, DRAGONPERS, RUIHUAZOL, and JIACHEN brand names. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Shangyu, China.

name: Zhongyeda Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhongyeda Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the distribution of industrial electrical products primarily in China. It also produces and sells system integration products. The company primarily offers low-voltage and medium-voltage transmission and distribution products; and industrial automation products. It provides electric vehicle charging systems, oil drilling electrical control systems, wind power electronic control systems, marine electric propulsion systems, and harmonic control products. The company's electrical industry solutions include design, equipment supply, software programming, platform building, system integration, electrical engineering, and operation and maintenance services. Zhongyeda Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: Longxing Chemical Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Longxing Chemical Stock Co., Ltd. produces and sells carbon black products under the Longxing brand in China. The company offers carbon black, precipitated silica, and polyvinylidene fluoride products. Its carbon black is used as reinforcing filler in all-steel, semi-steel radial tires, and inner tubes; used for auto parts, including sealing strips of doors and windows, oil tubes, dampers and brake pads, etc.; and serves as an ingredient in rubber, building materials, electronics, papers, plastics, color masterbatches, paints, fuels, chemical fibers, fiber coloring, printing ink, ink and papermaking, etc. The company also produces electricity, plastic woven products, and iron ore, as well as other products from coal tar deep processing. The company was formerly known as Hebei Longxing Chemical Stock Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Longxing Chemical Stock Co., Ltd. in January 2008. Longxing Chemical Stock Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shahe, China.

name: Zhejiang Kingland Pipeline and Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Kingland Pipeline and Technologies Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells oil and gas pipelines, and civilian pipelines in China. The company's principal products include hot-dip galvanized/black pipes, lined or PE coated GAL pipes, coated pipes, epoxy primer pre-coated hot-dip galvanized pipes, helical submerged-arc welded pipes, high frequency welded pipes, FBE/2PE/3PE coated pipes, PP-R/PE pipes, and fittings, as well as SAWL and HFW pipes. It provides products for use in oil and natural gas transportation pipeline projects, mine slurry and mine powder transportation line pipes, undersea line pipes, heating power pipeline projects, urban water supply and drainage projects, oil well casing pipes, extra high voltage power steel pipe towers, refining pipeline projects, and underground of urban gas steel pipelines. The company also offers 3PP/3PE/FBE coated pipes, internal coated pipes, ERW, PE gas pipes, PE water pipes, PP-R water pipes, and fittings for use in the municipal and architectural water supply and drainage, city gas transportation, rural water irrigation, electric power field, communication field, chemistry industry, medicine field, etc. In addition, it provides submerged arc welded longitudinal pipes for use in media transportation, including land/marine oil, gas, chemical, coal slurry, ore pulp, water, etc., as well as in offshore platform, power plant, chemical industry, building, bridge, structures, and others. The company also exports its products to approximately 30 countries. Zhejiang Kingland Pipeline and Technologies Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Huzhou, China.

name: Zhongnan Red Culture Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhongnan Red Culture Group Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of various steel materials of pipe fittings and flanges primarily in China. The company offers butt-welding, socket welding, and thread fittings, such as elbows, tees, reducers, caps, and stub ends; and skids and pressure vessels. It is also involved in piping prefabrication activity. The company's products are used in petrochemical, petroleum, chemical, ship building, textile, paper plant, power plant, metallurgical, food, machinery, pharmaceutical, construction, gas, nuclear power, offshore industries, etc. It also exports its products to the Middle East, Brazil, Japan, the United States, Korea, Singapore, India, Pakistan, Vietnam, Germany, and other countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Jiangyin Zhongnan Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhongnan Red Culture Group Co., Ltd. in May 2016. Zhongnan Red Culture Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Jiangyin, China.

name: Guangdong Shenglu Telecommunication Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Shenglu Telecommunication Tech. Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets antennas for communications, automotive electronics, RF devices, and other industries in the People's Republic of China. It offers backbone network transmission, base station, terminal, car, microwave, and Beidou antennas; and passive and active devices, TR modules, and smart vehicle information systems. The company also provides communication, 5G mobile communications, E-band, and V-band antennas, as well as RF microwave devices. In addition, it offers electrical performance testing services for communication antennas; environmental testing services for electronic communication products and automotive electronics; and other EMC electromagnetic compatibility testing services. The company was formerly known as Shenglu Antenna Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Shenglu Telecommunication Tech. Co., Ltd. in 2007. Guangdong Shenglu Telecommunication Tech. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: two
summary: two is a blank check company. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in San Francisco, California.

name: ZYNP Corporation
summary: ZYNP Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, tests, and supplies cylinder liners and power piston assembly systems in China and internationally. The company provides engine parts, automotive electronics, smart driving products, and smart equipment, as well as international trade services. It offers cylinder liners for the passenger car, commercial vehicle, construction machinery, agricultural machinery, shipbuilding, garden machinery, air compressor, military, and other power fields. The company primarily serves OEMs. ZYNP Corporation was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Mengzhou, China.

name: Foshan NationStar Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd
summary: Foshan NationStar Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells LED components and application products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers LED chips for lighting, display, and backlight applications; components for lighting, such as flip-chips, chip-on-boards, and CSPs for a range of applications comprising illuminaires, lighting fixtures, and LCD TV backlights; and display components. It also provides components for indicating that include plastic packages and cutting dicing, and other products; and LED display modules, backlights, and light bars with SMT lines and automatic backlight-lense mounting lines for various applications, which comprise home electronics, including air conditioners, LCD TVs, and billboards. In addition, the company offers non-visual LED devices, including ultraviolet, infrared, and horticulture LED devices; and LED lighting products, such LED battens, tubes, downlights, panels, strips, and modules for commercial, decoration, residential, and outdoor lighting applications. Foshan NationStar Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sales of advanced polymer materials in China and internationally. The company offers laminating film materials, including graphic products, cultural and creative design, image design, printing and packaging, eco laminating materials and laminating equipment, and electronic display products; and prisms, diffusers, cd-free QD films, blue-light transfer films, anti-blue light films, OLED tapes, and vehicle display materials. It also provides hard coating films, protective films, special adhesive tapes, and ITO films; optical insulation film products; carbon fiber decorative films, high performance PDLC films, and other products; materials for flexible displays; capacitive touch screens; and BOPET substrates, self-adhesive protective films, and optical film substrates. In addition, the company develops smart high definition glasses-free 3D display technology. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Kangde Xin Composite Material Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Kangde Xin Composite Material Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Changgao Electric Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Changgao Electric Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of power equipment in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers ring main units, metal-enclosed switchgears, disconnector switches, earthing switches, circuit breakers, and H-GIS and GIS equipment, as well as low/medium voltage switchgears and other products. It also offers engineering services comprising operation and maintenance, construction, equipment supply, design, financial support, and consulting in the areas of transmission and distribution, and renewable energy. The company was formerly known as Hunan Changgao Highvoltage Switchgear Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changgao Electric Group Co., Ltd. in December 2017. Changgao Electric Group Co., Ltd. is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Great Chinasoft Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Great Chinasoft Technology Co.,Ltd. operates as a financial technology company. It offers next generation banking solutions, intelligent product fusion solutions, enterprise mobility solutions, and open solutions. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Tianma Specialty Chemicals Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Great Chinasoft Technology Co.,Ltd. in June 2018. Great Chinasoft Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Songz Automobile Air Conditioning Co., Ltd.
summary: Songz Automobile Air Conditioning Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of air-conditioners for use in the commercial and passenger vehicles in China. The company offers air-conditioning systems that are used in various types of large and medium-sized passenger vehicles, passenger cars and commercial vehicles, trucks, light-duty buses, rail vehicles, and bus rapid transit system buses, as well as in transport refrigeration. It also provides spare parts, such as compressors, condenser fans, evaporator fans, and accessories. In addition, the company offers repair, maintenance, and technical support services. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Jiangsu Baichuan High-Tech New Materials Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Baichuan High-Tech New Materials Co., Ltd. produces and sells fine chemical products in China and internationally. Its products include acetates, acid anhydrides, plasticizer, polyatomic alcohols, insulating resins, and enamel wire paints, as well as propylene glycol ether and its esters. The company offers acetic ester products, such as n-butyl acetate, ethyl acetate, and propyl acetate; trimellitic anhydride and trioctyl trimellitate; trimethylolpropane, di-trimethylolpropane, and sodium formate; and glycol ether products, including propylene glycol monomethyl ether, propylene glycol monomethyl ether acetate, 2-methoxy-1-propanol, 2-methoxy-1-propanol acetate, and dipropylene glycol methyl ether. Its products have applications in various fields, such as paintings, cementing compounds, pharmaceutical and medical treatment, household appliances, carpentry furniture, finishing and decoration, toys for children, package printing, industrial equipment, road marking, etc. The company was formerly known as Wuxi Baichuan Chemical Industrial Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Jiangsu Baichuan High-Tech New Materials Co., Ltd. in March 2018. Jiangsu Baichuan High-Tech New Materials Co., Ltd. is based in Jiangyin, China.

name: OFILM Group Co., Ltd.
summary: OFILM Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells optic and photoelectric products. Its products include compact camera modules, touch panel modules, fingerprint recognition module, and electronic products of intelligent vehicles. The company's products are used in consumer electronics, as well as smart phones, tablets, PCs, smart cars, and wearable electronics. It operates in China, the United States, Japan, South Korea, and Europe. The company was formerly known as O-film Tech Co., Ltd. and changed its name to OFILM Group Co., Ltd. in March 2019. OFILM Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Ningxia Qinglong Pipes Industry Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningxia Qinglong Pipes Industry Group Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells concrete pressure water transmission pipes in China. Its products include prestressed concrete steel cylinder pipes, rebar-wound concrete steel cylinder pressure pipes, prestressed concrete pipes, and reinforced concrete drain pipes; impact-modified and hard polyvinyl chloride, and polyethylene pipes for water supply; steel mesh skeleton plastic composite pipes; and PE-RTII heat-resistant polyethylene heating pipes. The company also provides buried high density polyethylene piping systems for gas; intelligent water saving irrigation systems; ductile iron pipes; and urban underground integrated pipes. Its products are primarily used in water conservancy, electric power, urban water supply and drainage, water conservation, irrigation, urban gas transmission and distribution, and heating and transportation projects. The company was formerly known as Ningxia Qinglong Pipes Industry Co.,LTD. and changed its name to Ningxia Qinglong Pipes Industry Group Co., Ltd. in February 2020. Ningxia Qinglong Pipes Industry Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1974 and is based in Yinchuan, China.

name: Shandong Yisheng Livestock & Poultry Breeding Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Yisheng Livestock & Poultry Breeding Co., Ltd. engages in livestock and poultry business in China and internationally. The company is involved in the research and sale of broiler breeders, original breeders, ancestral pigs, feed, animal husbandry and veterinary, ecological dairy farming, milk processing, commercial chicken, ecological vegetables, manure biological treatment, and organic fertilizer processing. Shandong Yisheng Livestock & Poultry Breeding Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Yantai, China.

name: Ganfeng Lithium Co., Ltd.
summary: Ganfeng Lithium Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells lithium products in Mainland China, Hong Kong, rest of Asia, the European Union, North America, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Lithium Metal and Compound, Lithium Battery, and Lithium Ore Resource and Others. The company has interests in the Mount Marion mine located in Australia; Cauchari-Olaroz project situated in Jujuy Province, Northwest Argentina; Mariana project located in the Andes Mountains in Salta Province, Argentina; Sonora project situated in Mexico; Pilbara Pilgangoora lithium-tantalum project located in Western Australia; Ningdu Heyuan mine situated in Ningdu County, Ganzhou City, Jiangxi Province; and Avalonia project located in Ireland. It offers battery grade lithium carbonate, battery-grade lithium hydroxide, lithium chloride, butyl lithium, and lithium fluoride; lithium metals in the form of ingots, foils, rods, particles, alloy powder; polymer lithium battery; and lithium-ion motive power batteries, energy storage batteries, and consumer batteries, as well as copper lithium or lithium aluminum alloy foil. The company also explores for and sells lithium ores; and provides lithium battery recycling solutions. Its products are used in the manufacturing of electric vehicles, portable electronics, chemicals, and pharmaceuticals, as well as used by battery cathode materials manufacturers, battery suppliers, and automobile original equipment manufacturers. Ganfeng Lithium Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Xinyu, China.

name: Guangzhou Zhujiang Brewery Co., Ltd
summary: Guangzhou Zhujiang Brewery Co., Ltd engages in the production and dealing of beer and its related products. The company sells its products in Hong Kong, Macao, Canada, the United States, Russia, Finland, Costa Rica, the United Kingdom, Holland, Sweden, Denmark, Iceland, France, Spain, Portugal, Italy, and internationally. Guangzhou Zhujiang Brewery Co., Ltd was founded in 1985 and is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Cachet Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Cachet Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the wholesale and retail sale of pharmaceutical products in China. It is involved in the supply of medicines to hospitals; wholesale of biological products, medical instruments, and traditional Chinese medicines; pharmaceutical logistic operations; and manufacture of medicines. The company owns 150 chain stores in Beijing that sell medicines, health care foods, medical instruments, cosmetics, daily necessities, and traditional Chinese medicines. Cachet Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Wus Printed Circuit (Kunshan) Co., Ltd.
summary: Wus Printed Circuit (Kunshan) Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, manufacture, and sale of printed circuit boards in China. The company offers backplane, line card, power amplifier, antenna, and server products. Its products are used in communications, communications equipment, and automobiles markets. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Kunshan, China.

name: Guangzhou Haige Communications Group Incorporated Company
summary: Guangzhou Haige Communications Group Incorporated Company, together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, and markets communication and navigation equipment in China. It offers quality assurance solutions for the information application customers, such as government, finance, transportation, and national defense; TETRA system, a mobile communication system used in group dispatch and command communication in the field of specific mobile communication; RF chips for the satellite navigation systems; and environment test equipment and detection instruments for detecting and testing the electronic equipment. The company also provides portable, vehicular/shipborne/airborne, and fixed HF communication radio; satellite communication products, such as satellite geostations, satellite communication antennas, and satellite geostation product modules; and navigation equipment for the army arms covering naval and armored force, and artillery troops, as well as civil aviation, ship, and vehicle and time servicing. In addition, it offers system integration solutions for base station control radio, field integrated communication system, and Ethernet integrated communication system; and transmission control platform based on TDM, NGN, and ATM, as well as training, technical support, equipment maintenance, maneuver assurance services, etc. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Lithium Corporation
summary: Lithium Corporation, an exploration stage mining company, engages in the identification, acquisition, and exploration of metals and minerals in Nevada and British Columbia. It explores for lithium/boron/potassium, graphite, gold, and silver deposits. The company owns interests in the Fish Lake Valley property that includes 143 claims covering an area of approximately 11,360 acres located in northern Esmeralda County in west central Nevada; and San Emidio property comprising 10 claims, which cover an area of approximately 1,600 acres located in Washoe County in northwestern Nevada. It also holds interests in the BC Sugar Flake Graphite property covering an area 19,816 acres located in the Cherryville area of British Columbia; and Hughes claims located in the six discrete prospect areas of Nevada. The company was formerly known as Utalk Communications Inc. and changed its name to Lithium Corporation in September 2009. Lithium Corporation was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Elko, Nevada.

name: NET263 Ltd.
summary: NET263 Ltd. operates as a communication service provider. The company offers SaaS services to corporate customers in China; corporate communication and collaborative office services, such as integrated enterprise email, enterprise network disk, telephone conference, Web conference, video conference, and enterprise live broadcast services; cloud communication services; integrated communication services for enterprise customers; and IDC services. It also provides corporate virtual private networks and business voice services; corporate private network services; and enterprise wireless, messaging, and mobility services. In addition, the company offers integrated communication services comprising VoIP home phone and IPTV services for overseas Chinese families; mobile data roaming and cross-border mobile communication services Chinese outbound business travelers, Chinese immigrants, and international students; long-distance telephone services; and virtual mobile communications services. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shandong Sunway Chemical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sunway Petrochemical Engineering Co.,Ltd engages in the design, consulting, and EPC contracting in petrochemical/coal chemical industry in China. Its projects include AGO unit/VGO units, catalytic cracking units, FCC, hydrogenation units, and sulfur recovery units. The company also offers building engineering services; engineering consulting services; and design services for pressure vessels and pressure pipelines. Shandong Sunway Petrochemical Engineering Co.,Ltd was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Zibo, China.

name: Kingenta Ecological Engineering Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingenta Ecological Engineering Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of fertilizers in China and internationally. Its products include compound, slow/controlled-release, water soluble, bio, and other fertilizers; and chelated micronutrients. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Linshu, China.

name: Jiangsu Zhongchao Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Zhongchao Holding Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells wires and cables in China. The company's products include power cables, wires and cables for electrical equipment, bare wires, flame-retardant ultra-high voltage cross-linked cables, aluminum alloy overhead lines, computer cables, control cables, frequency conversion cables, compensation wires and cables, overhead wires, universal rubber sheathed flexible cables, branch cables, and intrinsically safe cables. Its products are primarily used in the construction and reconstruction of urban and rural power grids. The company also exports its products to India, Vietnam, Australia, Oman, Sudan, Tanzania, Nigeria, Kenya, Sri Lanka, Mauritius, South Africa, Brazil, Cyprus, and other countries. The company was formerly was formerly known as Jiangsu Zhongchao Cable Corporation and changed its name to Jiangsu Zhongchao Holding Co., Ltd. in September 2015. Jiangsu Zhongchao Holding Co., Ltd. is based in Yixing, China.

name: Zhejiang Shuanghuan Driveline Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Shuanghuan Driveline Co., Ltd. researches and develops, designs, manufactures, and sells gears in China and internationally. The company offers passenger and commercial vehicle, engineering and agricultural machinery, electric tool, and rail transit gears. It provides its products for conventional cars, electric cars, high-speed rail traffic, off-road machinery, motorcycles, ATVs, electric tools, industrial robots, and others. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Ningbo Sunlight Electrical Appliance Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Sunlight Electrical Appliance Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells thermostats and electric kettles. Its products include electric kettles, coffee machines, temperature controllers, and instant water cookers. The company markets its products in Russia, the United States, Ukraine, Belarus, Poland, the Czech Republic, Lithuania, Bulgaria, Belgium, the Netherlands, Hungary, Sweden, Norway, Chile, Argentina, Uruguay, South Africa, Nigeria, South Korea, Japan, Malaysia, Vietnam, and other countries and regions. Ningbo Sunlight Electrical Appliance Co.,Ltd was founded in 2004 and is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Fujian Rongji Software Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Rongji Software Co., Ltd. engages in the development and distribution of software products in China. The company offers software products for e-government, judicial, quality inspection information, and environmental information industries. The company also provides network engineering, data center, disaster recovery, information security, collaborative management, and system integration services. It primarily serves energy, telecommunication, finance, and manufacturing industries. Fujian Rongji Software Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Luxshare Precision Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Luxshare Precision Industry Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells cable assembly and connector system solutions worldwide. The company primarily offers cable assemblies, connectors, power cables, antennas, bare wires, coaxial and flexible cables, flexible printed circuit boards, precision hardware/plastic components, acoustic components, and smart wearables. Its products are used in enterprise, cloud, automotive, medical applications, as well as consumer electronics, such as computers, devices, and peripherals. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Shandong Polymer Biochemicals Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Polymer Biochemicals Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells oilfield chemicals in China and internationally. The company offers monomers, surfactants, and polymers. It is also involved in oil and gas engineering technology services; oil and gas exploration and development; and environmental water treatment businesses. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Dongying, China.

name: Jiangsu Changbao Steeltube Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Changbao Steeltube Co.,Ltd produces and sells various steel pipes and tubes primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company offers OCTG products for petroleum industry, including connection tubings and casings, coupling stocks, perforating gun carrier pipes, petroleum tool pipes, drill pipes, and slotted pipes; boiler tubes for power generation; steel tubes for auto industry comprising automobile precision tubes, piping for hydraulic cylinders, and axel tubes; petrochemical tubes, steel tubes for low temperature resistance, and high pressure fertilizer tubes; and steel tubes for engineering machinery industry, such as mechanical steel pipes, boom pipes, and piping for hydraulic cylinders. It also provides line pipes, geological drilling pipes, core barrels, rope corning drill pipe materials, gas cylinder pipes, and accumulator tubes, as well as steel pipes for marine engineering, structural purpose, and fluid transmission. The company exports its products to Europe, the Americas, the Middle East, CIS, Southeast Asia, Australia, Africa, and internationally. Jiangsu Changbao Steeltube Co.,Ltd was founded in 1958 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: Zhejiang Fuchunjiang Environmental Thermoelectric Co.,LTD.
summary: Zhejiang Fuchunjiang Environmental Thermoelectric Co., Ltd. generates and sells electricity and heat in China. It generates power using solid waste and garbage resources. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Fuyang, China.

name: Chengdu Xinzhu Road&Bridge Machinery Co.,LTD
summary: Chengdu Xinzhu Road&Bridge Machinery Co.,LTD provides system integration products and services to the public transportation and civil construction fields. The company offers rail transit systems; energy vehicles, including electric fast-charging city buses and logistics vehicles; and bridge functional components, such as bridge bearings, bridge expansion devices, pre-stressed anchors, and other products. It also provides traffic environment governance products comprising metal and non-metallic sound barriers, transparent sound insulation boards, wind barriers, light barriers, and other products; and solutions for land traffic safety operations and management of geological disasters. The company also exports its bridge functional components to Europe, Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. Chengdu Xinzhu Road&Bridge Machinery Co.,LTD was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Yantai Shuangta Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Yantai Shuangta Food Co., Ltd. primarily produces and sells vermicelli under the Longkou brand name in China. It also offers pea protein, pea starch, pea fiber products, mushroom, and biological gas; and healthy products, including mung bean protein products, weight control shakes, and food replacement shakes. The company was formerly known as Yantai Jinhua Cellophane Noodles Co., Ltd and changed its name to Yantai Shuangta Food Co., Ltd. in April 2008. Yantai Shuangta Food Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Zhaoyuan, China.

name: Shenzhen Grandland Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Grandland Group Co., Ltd. engages in the architectural design, decoration, and construction activities in China. It provides decoration services to public buildings and residences, hotels, commercial complexes, stadiums, office buildings, rail transit, etc. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Grandland Decoration Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Grandland Group Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Shenzhen Grandland Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Rainbow Heavy Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Rainbow Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. engages in equipment manufacturing, and energy conservation and environmental protection businesses worldwide. It offers a range of material lifting, offshore equipment, marine equipment, car parking equipment, engineering vessels, and other related products. The company offers its cranes under the GENMA brand. It also provides industrial wastewater treatment, sludge treatment, and hazardous solid waste disposal, as well as energy saving and recycling services. Jiangsu Rainbow Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Nantong, China.

name: Nantong Jianghai Capacitor Co. Ltd.
summary: Nantong Jianghai Capacitor Co. Ltd. engages in the manufacture, sale, and service of capacitors, related materials, and accessories in the People's Republic of China. The company offers aluminum electrolytic capacitors, including screw type, snap-in, radial, and polymer capacitors; film capacitors, such as DC-link and snubber capacitors; and super capacitors comprising radial, snap-in, and coin type capacitors. Its products are used in various fields, including industrial automation, power supply, consumer electronics, lifting equipment, transportation, and new energy sectors. The company also exports its products. Nantong Jianghai Capacitor Co. Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Nantong, the People's Republic of China.

name: Sinoer Men's Wear Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinoer Men's Wear Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells clothing products primarily in China. Its products include men's suits, shirts, and coats; T-shirts, jackets, and long-sleeved shirts; and women's coats. The company was formerly known as Zhucheng Pulanniao Clothing Co., Ltd. Sinoer Men's Wear Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Zhucheng, China.

name: Shanghai Challenge Textile Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Challenge Textile Co., Ltd. provides fabrics for men and women. It offers crafted, outdoor, and travel fabrics. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Dajin Heavy Industry Corporation
summary: Dajin Heavy Industry Corporation manufactures and sells steel structures in the onshore and offshore energy industry primarily in China. It offers onshore products, including onshore wind towers and other steel structure products; and offshore products consisting of offshore monopiles transition pieces, tripods, jackets, secondary steels, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Fuxin, China.

name: Zhejiang Jingu Company Limited
summary: Zhejiang Jingu Company Limited researches, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells steel wheels in China. It offers high vent, semi-fullface, full face, and light wheels; passenger car wheels; tubeless truck/bus wheels; trailer wheels; snow car wheels; UTV wheels; and agricultural vehicle wheels. It is involved in the production and sale of tubeless drop well steel wheels and auto parts; sale of automobile and motorcycle accessories; and provision of services, such as changing and repairing tires, dynamic balance, and four wheel alignment, as well as import-export business. The company also exports its products to Europe, the United States, and Southeast Asia. Zhejiang Jingu Company Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Fuyang, China.

name: Yotrio Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Yotrio Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells outdoor furniture products in China and internationally. Its product portfolio includes aluminum and steel products, meshes, wickers, resin wood and wood products, slings, creatop table tops, and glass table tops. The company sells its products under the Das Original, Royal Garden, SunVilla, and Outdoor Essentials brand names. Yotrio Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Linhai, China.

name: Shandong Molong Petroleum Machinery Company Limited
summary: Shandong Molong Petroleum Machinery Company Limited engages in the research and development, production, and sale of products for the energy equipment industry in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Pipe Products, Three Kinds of Pumping Units, Petroleum Machinery Parts, Tube Blank, and Others segments. It offers pipes for petroleum and gas extraction, fluid and structural pipes, petroleum pumping machines, petroleum pumps, petroleum pumping rods, cylinder liners for drilling rigs, valve parts, and casting and forging solutions . The company's products also include API and non API casing products, line pipe products, precision steel pipes, hydraulic prop tubes, fluid pipes, cylinder tubes, and boiler tubes; sucker rods; valve body, cylinder liners, gate valves, and billet products. Its products are used in petroleum, natural gas, coalbed methane, shale gas and other energy drilling, machinery processing, urban pipe network, etc. In addition, the company engages in the research of new materials for energy equipment; production and sale of metal casting and forging; sea water desalination activities; waste heat and gas power generation activities; and manufacture and sale of special oil metal materials. It also exports its energy equipment. Shandong Molong Petroleum Machinery Company Limited was founded in 2001 and is based in Shouguang City, China.

name: Tongding Interconnection Information Co., Ltd.
summary: Tongding Interconnection Information Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of optical preform, fibers and cables, various types of communication cables, and communication devices in the People's Republic of China. It also provides network security equipment and services, big data analysis and operation services, etc. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Tongding Optic-Electronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tongding Interconnection Information Co., Ltd. in January 2015. The company is based in Wujiang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhuhai Winbase International Chemical Tank Terminal Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Winbase International Chemical Tank Terminal Co., Ltd. engages in bulk liquid petrochemicals and finished oil products business in China. It is involved in the loading and discharging, storage, and transferring activities. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Rongsheng Petrochemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Rongsheng Petrochemical Co., Ltd. produces, markets, and sells petrochemicals, chemical fibers, and other related products in China and internationally. It offers synthetic fibers and films, including fiber and film grade polyester chips, bottle grade polyester chips, polyester pre-oriented yarns, draw textured yarns, fully drawn yarns, and PET films; synthetic raw materials, such as purified terephthalic acids, ethylene oxides, triethylene glycol, diethylene glycol, ethylene glycol, and P-xylene; and synthetic resins comprising ethylene-vinyl acetate copolymers, high density polyethylene, low-density polyethylene, and polypropylene. The company also provides olefins consisting of butene-1, hexene-1, butadiene, propylene, and ethylene; aromatics and phenols, including cumene, acetone, phenol, styrene, ethylbenzene, xylene, mixed aromatics, methylbenzene, and purified petroleum benzine; and acrylonitrile and special chemical products, such as dimethyl carbonate, methyl methacrylate, polycarbonate, bisphenol A, acetonitrile, and acrylonitrile.
