In addition, it offers intermediate and chemical raw materials comprising iso-butane, n-butane, petroleum cokes, liquid argons, liquid ammonia, methanol, liquid petroleum gas, isooctane, methyl tert-butyl ether, industrial hexane, pentane foamer, industrial aromatic hydrocarbons, high-flash aromatic naphthas, ethylene bottom oils, splitting decomposition C9 and C5, and sulphur; and oil products, such as jet fuels, diesel, and gasoline. The company was formerly known as Rongsheng Chemical Fiber Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Rongsheng Petrochemical Co., Ltd. in September 2007. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Hangzhou, China. Rongsheng Petrochemical Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Zhejiang Rongsheng Holding Group Co., Ltd.

name: Huasi Holding Company Limited
summary: Huasi Holding Company Limited manufactures and sells fur and leather clothing and accessories in China. It also operates stores. The company was formerly known as Huasi Agricultural Development Company Limited and changed its name to Huasi Holding Company Limited in June 2015. Huasi Holding Company Limited is based in Cangzhou, China.

name: Guangdong Jialong Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Jialong Food Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of food products in China. The company offers chicken powder, essence, juice, and other chicken products, as well as tomato sauce. It offers products under the Jialong and Jia Feng brands. The company is headquartered in Puning, China.

name: Jiangsu Huifeng Bio Agriculture Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Huifeng Bio Agriculture Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pesticides in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers pesticide, fertilizer, seed, medicine, and fine chemicals. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Huifeng Agrochemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Huifeng Bio Agriculture Co., Ltd. in August 2017. Jiangsu Huifeng Bio Agriculture Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Yancheng, the People's Republic of China.

name: Sichuan Yahua Industrial Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Yahua Industrial Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, produces, and sells civil explosive materials in China and internationally. It offers detonating equipment, including electronic, coal mine permissible millisecond electric, coal mine allowable instantaneous electric, and average delay electric detonators, as well as detonating tubes, plastic nonels, and ordinary detonating cords; and industrial explosives, such as rock expanded ammonium nitrate, rock emulsion, permissible emulsion, level 3 coal mine permissible emulsion, and powder emulsion explosives. The company also provides fine chemicals comprising powder composite oil phase, emulsion composite oil phase, emulsifier√Ç¬ñ1, and emulsifying agent S√Ç¬ñ80. In addition, it offers engineering blasting, transport of dangerous goods, and explosion working services, as well as lithium products and services consisting of lithium hydroxide monohydrate, clean lithium hydroxide monohydrate, lithium carbonate, and battery grade lithium carbonate. Its products are used in mining, hydraulic engineering, hydropower station, road construction, urban renewal, geological exploration, blasting processing, national defense, etc. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Qingdao Hanhe Cable Co.,Ltd
summary: Qingdao Hanhe Cable Co.,Ltd researches and develops, manufactures, and supplies cables and wires primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company offers power cables, cable accessories, submarine cables, optical power composite cables, electrical equipment wires and cables, overhead conductors, communication cables, radio-frequency cables, bus bar and prefabricated branch cables, nuclear plant cables, fire-resistant cables, and DC series cables. It also provides shipboard and mining cables, heat-resistant and high-strength aluminum alloy wires, carbon fiber wires, data cables, oil platform cables, wind farm cables, and flame retardant cables, as well as services of laying, installation, and completion test for cables and cable accessories. In addition, the company offers high-voltage electrical equipment status monitoring products for smart transformer substations and cable fault testing systems; electrical equipment testing services for customers in power, metallurgy, chemical and petroleum industries; electric power design, engineering, and installation services; and operation maintenance services for transformer substations. Its products are used in the fields of power, metallurgy, telecommunication, railway, petroleum and chemical, coal mining, construction, etc. The company also exports its products to approximately 30 countries and regions. Qingdao Hanhe Cable Co.,Ltd was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Qingdao, the People's Republic of China.

name: Kelin Environmental Protection Equipment, Inc.
summary: Kelin Environmental Protection Equipment, Inc. manufactures and sells environmental protection equipment in China. It offers bag filters, bag and electrical filters, desulfurization and denitration equipment, dry and wet electrostatic precipitators, ultra-high temperature filters, cyclone equipment, small filters, furnace shell equipment, cooling equipment, electrical and control equipment, conveying equipment, and auxiliary products. The company also provides EPC services. Its products are used in metallurgical, power, solid waste incineration, grain, building material, light industry chemical, non-ferrous metal, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Wujiang Baodai Dedusting Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kelin Environmental Protection Equipment, Inc. in 2007. Kelin Environmental Protection Equipment, Inc. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Shanxi Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanxi Securities Co., Ltd. operates as a security company in China. The company is involved in the underwriting and sponsorship of stocks and bonds, as well as commodity futures brokerage, financial futures brokerage, and futures investment consulting, and asset management businesses. It also provides institutional financing, and enterprise M&A, and trade financing services. Shanxi Securities Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Taiyuan, China.

name: Jilin Liyuan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin Liyuan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial and architectural aluminum profiles, special profiles, mechanical machining and assembling aluminum alloy parts, and railcar engine and body manufacturing parts in China. It also exports its products to 18 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Jilin Liyuan Aluminum Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jilin Liyuan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. in November 2013. Jilin Liyuan Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Liaoyuan, China.

name: Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd. engages in the TV and animation businesses in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It is also involved in the production and releasing of teleplay, supplemented by online teleplays; and research and development, and operation of mobile online games. In addition, the company develops IP derivative products; and manufactures toy products. Further, it invests in the culture, film, Internet, industry fund, financial services, and high and new technology industries; and researches and develops animations. The company was formerly known as Huawei Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd. in May 2016. Huawei Culture Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shantou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Souyute Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Souyute Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, design, development, marketing, and brand promotion of apparel products. It provides casual wear and leisure apparel products under the CELUCASN brand. The company operates approximately 2,000 clothing stores. It also provides supply chain management, brand management, and commercial factoring, etc. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Beijing Honggao Creative Architectural Design Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Honggao Creative Architectural Design Co., Ltd provides interior design services in China. It offers fine decoration construction, electromechanical installation, curtain wall construction, and construction general contracting services for hotels, office spaces, commercial complexes, medical, exhibition halls, and apartment clubs. It also engages in the equity investment activities; and provides mergers and acquisitions services in BIM, VR, design, consulting, construction technology, education and training, Internet, and construction industries. In addition, the company invests in and finances independent projects and cooperation with real estate enterprises. Beijing Honggao Creative Architectural Design Co., Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Pengdu Agriculture & Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd.
summary: Pengdu Agriculture & Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd. engages in the grain trade, beef cattle, dairy, mutton sheep, food distribution, and food supply chain businesses in China and internationally. The company trades in grain and oil, soybean, corn, and other bulk agricultural products; operates dairy farms and supplies milk; breeds and produces mutton sheep; and breeds and sells pigs. It is also involved in the breeding, slaughtering, processing, and cold chain logistics, as well as import, inspection, and quarantine of beef cattle; and distribution of food. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: GCL System Integration Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: GCL System Integration Technology Co., Ltd. provides solar energy solutions in China and internationally. It offers solar modules, trackers, solar panels, electric cabinets, cables, monitor software systems, mounting systems, inverters, and EV chargers; and lithium batteries that enable customers to optimize the use of their residential solar energy system, as well as home energy management systems. The company also provides solar cube 20K/50K for small population areas with weak power supply; G-Home solar kit for home owners; financial services, such as leasing and capital fund services; and smart operation and management platform comprising cloud data and risk management. In addition, it operates 2.5 MW solar block to supply energy to solar power plants; and offers cells, system integration, engineering procumbent construction, stored energy, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Chongqing Fuling Zhacai Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Fuling Zhacai Group Co., Ltd. develops and sells various appetizers in China. It offers mustard series, kelp silk series, dry radish series, and pepper series products. The company sells its products under the Wujiang brand name to chain stores, supermarkets, convenience stores, and farmer's markets. It offers its products in 34 provinces, municipalities, and autonomous regions; and 300 prefecture-level markets and 1,000 county-level markets, as well as exports to the European Union, the United States, Japan, and Hong Kong. Chongqing Fuling Zhacai Group Co., Ltd. is based in Chongqing, China.

name: Hangzhou Robam Appliances Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Robam Appliances Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells kitchen appliances under the ROBAM brand in China and internationally. Its products include range hood, gas hobs, sterilizer cabinets, steam ovens, electric ovens, microwave ovens, dishwashers, water purifiers, water heaters, purification tanks, electric pressure and induction cookers, electric kettles, and other kitchen appliances. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Tianjin Motor Dies Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Motor Dies Co., Ltd. provides dies for the automotive industry in China and internationally. It offers aluminum, body side, skin, inner, HSS, inner, progressive, stamping, and welding parts; and hot forming products. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tianjin, China.

name: Tatwah Smartech Co., Ltd.
summary: Tatwah Smartech Co., Ltd. engages in the Internet of Things smart industry, satellite and communication, Internet new media, and artificial intelligence businesses in China and internationally. It operates through Electronic Component Manufacturing, Software Industry, Intelligent Transportation, Information Technology Industry, Printing Trade, Consulting Services, and Others segments. The company develops, produces, and sells smart cards, smart electronic tags, and RFID card readers; Internet TV motherboards, electronic communication and remote start devices; household appliances; multimedia communication and digital imaging products; and computer hardware products. It also offers computer software application and technical services for telecommunication systems. In addition, the company provides printing services for packaging and decoration items; and information and technical consulting services. Further, it offers planning, construction, and operation services for communication operators; and intelligent audio and video system integration solutions. The company also exports its products. Tatwah Smartech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Lanfeng Bio-chemical Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Lanfeng Bio-chemical Co.,Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells pesticides, fungicides, insecticides, herbicides, and fine chemical intermediates in China and internationally. It offers thiophanate-methyl, cyclohexazone, benomyl, and carbendazim. The company is based in Xinyi, China.

name: Suzhou Boamax Technologies Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Boamax Technologies Group Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, designs, manufactures, and sells industrial grade structural CNC sheet metal products. It offers flue gas flow monitoring equipment used in the field of environmental protection, such as online monitoring about gas velocity, as well as pulverized coal flow rate and online monitoring of wind speed. The company also provides high voltage electrode boilers for the nuclear power project and for the enterprises and institutions to provide steam and hot water; and coal to electricity central heating projects that comprise integrated high voltage electrode boilers, off-peak electricity, energy storage technology, and other resources. In addition, it offers automation wet process equipment for the production of crystalline solar silicon cells; and precise sheet metal products for use in various fields, including electrical, communications, finance, medical, renewable energy, automotive, and other related fields. Suzhou Boamax Technologies Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Jinzi Ham Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jinzi Ham Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of fermented meat products in China, Southeast Asia, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan. The company offers Jinhua ham, low-salt ham, Bama fermented ham, ham broth, and other ham products, as well as Jinhua sausage, bacon, and other related meat products. It primarily serves catering hotels and food processing companies. The company is headquartered in Jinhua, China.

name: Kuangda Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuangda Technology Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of automotive interior fabrics and seat covers in China. The company offers woven, weft knitted, and warp knitted fabrics; chemical fibers; auto seat covers; and auto seat cushions. It is also involved in the investment, construction, and operation of solar photovoltaic power generation stations in various regions, including Qinghai, Yunnan, Jiangsu, Xinjiang, Inner Mongolia, Shanxi, and Shaanxi. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Kuangda Automobile Textile Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kuangda Technology Group Co., Ltd. in August 2015. Kuangda Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Kingnet Network Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingnet Network Co., Ltd. engages in the development, operation, and distribution of mobile and operations in China and internationally. The company offers and operates game brands and Ips, including Gods of War: Shadow Princess (MMO game for iOS and Android in Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan), Original Legend, Angel War, Eternal Alliance, Chinese Paladin (A New Beginning), Mobile Suit Gundam Series, OVERLORD Nobunaga's Ambition(The Way of Heaven), Legend of Sword and Fairy, Gu Long Heroes (Gu Long's martial arts series novels), Red Moon, Xuan-Yuan Sword, Hope 0L, Legend of Wonderland, Black Cat Sheriff, Monopoly, Sui Shi Ling (Chinese traditional culture festival IP), and Baigongling (traditional Chinese handicrafts IP). It also serves a broad user base through its online and offline distribution channels, including domestic and international platforms, multimedia account matrices, live broadcast, and short video incubation businesses. In addition, the company offers internet technology and animation products. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Shenzhen KSTAR Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen KSTAR Science and Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells data center infrastructure products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers data center products, such as UPS, battery, and precision cooling products, as well as integrated solutions for use in finance, communication, government, enterprise, and data center construction fields. It also provides PV inverters, including string, energy storage, central, container, monitoring, and combiner box inverters, as well as residential and commercial PV, and utility PV inverter solutions. Shenzhen KSTAR Science and Technology Co., Ltd. also offers its products and services to approximately 90 countries worldwide. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangsu Yinhe Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yinhe Electronics Co.,Ltd. engages in the new energy electric vehicle components, defense and military special equipment, and digital TV intelligent terminal equipment businesses in China and internationally. The company offers new energy electric vehicle products, including intelligent chargers for electric cars; electric scroll compressors; and precision sheet metal products, such as power battery boxes for electric vehicles, solar power inverters, high/low voltage power transmission and distribution equipment, etc. It also provides electromechanical management systems comprising load management, power distribution management, power management, power supply, and environment control products; and intelligent TV terminal equipment consisting of three-network fusion, intelligent system, intelligent home use, and multi-screen interactive type products. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Zhejiang RIFA Precision Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang RIFA Precision Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells CNC machine tools in China the United States, France, Poland, Japan, and internationally. The company offers CNC vertical and horizontal machining centers, CNC vertical and horizontal lathes, CNC gantry machining centers, floor type boring machines, and specialized grinding machines. It serves boiler, mining, and wind industries. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Xinchang, China. ZheJiang RIFA Precision Machinery Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Zhejiang Rifa Holding Group Co., Ltd.

name: Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells decorative base papers, overlay papers, non-woven wall base papers, and flicker overlay papers in China. It also exports its products to approximately 30 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Shandong Qifeng Special Paper Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd. in September 2013. Qifeng New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is based in Zibo, China.

name: Zhejiang Zhongcheng Packing Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Zhongcheng Packing Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research, design, production, sale, and after sale servicing of shrink films. It offers polyolefin, anti fog cross-linked, high performance, economical cross-linked, and low temperature cross-linked shrink films, as well as printed films. The company also provides special shrink films, such as macroperforated and regular perforated shrink films, single-wound high-speed packing films, cross-linked films, shrink bags, and antistatic shrink films. It sells its products under the name Zhongda in approximately 60 countries worldwide. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Jiashan, China.

name: Crane Co.
summary: Crane Co. manufactures and sells engineered industrial products in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Continental Europe, and internationally. The company's Fluid Handling segment offers on/off valves and related products for the chemical, oil and gas, power, and general industrial end markets; valves and related products for the non-residential construction, general industrial, and municipal markets; fluid control instrumentation and sampling solutions; and pumps and related products for water and wastewater applications in industrial, municipal, commercial, and military markets. This segment sells its products under the Crane, Saunders, Jenkins, Pacific, Xomox, Krombach, DEPA, ELRO, REVO, Flowseal, Centerline, Resistoflex, Duochek, Barksdale, Westlock, WTA, HOKE, DOPAK, Stockham, Wask, Viking Johnson, IAT, Hattersley, NABIC, Sperryn, Wade, Deming, Weinman, Burks, and Barnes brands. Its Payment & Merchandising Technologies segment provides technology payment acceptance and dispensing products to original equipment manufacturers and for vertical markets; currency handling and processing systems, cash and cashless payment and merchandising solutions, equipment service solutions, and connected managed service solutions. The company's Aerospace & Electronics segment offers original equipment and aftermarket parts under the Hydro-Aire, ELDEC, Lear Romec, P.L. Porter, Keltec, Interpoint, Signal Technology, Merrimac Industries, and Polyflon brands to commercial and military aerospace, and defense and space markets. Its Engineered Materials segment provides fiberglass-reinforced plastic panels and coils primarily for use in the manufacturing of recreational vehicles, truck bodies, and trailers, as well as used in commercial and industrial building construction. Crane Co. was founded in 1855 and is based in Stamford, Connecticut.

name: Guangzheng Eye Hospital Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzheng Eye Hospital Group Co., Ltd. engages in the steel construction business in China. The company is involved in the design, manufacture, installation, and after-sales service of light steel, heavy steel, multi-story steel, and space and long-span steel structures, as well as construction of steel bridges and systems. It constructs multi-story, and civil and commercial steel structures; power stations; petroleum, chemical, metallurgy, electronics, manufacturing, and other light and heavy industrial plants; convention and exhibition centers; and airport terminals. The company also sells natural gas, including pipeline natural gas and automotive natural gas; and LPG comprising pipeline LPG and bottled LPG. In addition, it invests in and manages eye hospitals. The company also exports its products to Almaty, Kyrgyzstan, Himkent, Bishkek, Astana, and Dushanbe. Guangzheng Eye Hospital Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Urumqi, China.

name: Shenzhen Infinova Limited
summary: Shenzhen Infinova Limited provides electronic security products and solutions worldwide. The company offers IP digital and analog monitoring systems, such as bolt machines, hemispheres, fast balls, integrated cameras, PTZs, video codecs, matrix and optical products, DVRs, keyboards, and auxiliary equipment, as well as CCTV management software; and HD-SDI digital monitoring systems, including gun cameras, high-speed domes, PTZ cameras, optical and matrix products, encoders, DVRs, and auxiliary products. It also provides intelligent traffic monitoring systems comprising electronic police machines, bayonet machines, and intelligent traffic monitoring system software; and access control and patrol systems consisting of network access control one machines, built-in Web server network access controllers, built-in Web server independent access control systems, remote input/output boards, card reader adapters, induction card readers, LCD screen readers, fingerprint readers, and multi-user access control software; and multi-service network switching platform. The company was formerly known as Kuantuo Technology (Shenzhen) Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Infinova Limited in December 2007. Shenzhen Infinova Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Infinova Limited is a subsidiary of Infinova Corporation.

name: Fujian Haiyuan Composites Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fujian Haiyuan Composites Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of hydraulic press equipment and related devices in China and internationally. It provides automatic hydraulic ceramic water-permeable plaza tile presses, autoclaved brick and AAC products, composite materials related equipment, ceramic tile related equipment, refractory materials related equipment, and automotive related equipment, as well as eante fiber reinforced thermoplastic composite formwork and automotive related products. The company was formerly known as Fujian Haiyuan Automatic Equipments Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fujian Haiyuan Composites Technology Co.,Ltd. in August 2018. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.

name: JC Finance&Tax Interconnect Holdings Ltd.
summary: JC Finance&Tax Interconnect Holdings Ltd. engages in Internet finance and taxation, and heat treatment businesses in China. It offers financial taxation cloud services, smart online taxation bureau, and other related services that helps companies in decision making, and control financial and taxation risk and inner finance resolutions, as well as provides risk scanning, financial warning, and other intelligent business services. The company also manufactures and sells atmosphere furnace, vacuum furnace, induction equipment, non-atmosphere heating equipment, plasma equipment, software, and auxiliary equipment; and accessories. Its products are used in aerospace, automotive, engineering machinery, rail transportation, ships, chemical machinery, machine parts, and other industries. JC Finance & Tax Interconnect Holdings Ltd. also exports its products to United States, Japan, France, Italy, Spain, Russia, Kazakhstan, South Korea, North Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, India, Thailand, Brazil, Turkey, Mexico, Indonesia, Vietnam, Pakistan, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Fengdong Thermal Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JC Finance&Tax Interconnect Holdings Ltd. in May 2017. JC Finance&Tax Interconnect Holdings Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Yancheng, China.

name: Tianshan Aluminum Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianshan Aluminum Group Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of aluminum deep-processed products and materials, prebaked anodes, high-purity aluminum, and alumina. It sells self-produced and purchased aluminum ingots that are used as raw materials for downstream aluminum processing; aluminum sheets and foils; and aluminum alloy materials for use in production and manufacturing applications. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Shihezi, China.

name: Gold cup Electric Apparatus Co.,Ltd.
summary: Gold cup Electric Apparatus Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells wires and cables in Central, Southern, and Western China. It offers electrical equipment wire, including non-sheathed and sheathed cable, flexible cable and wire, screened cable, low smoke halogen free flame retardant wire, exquisite flame retardant wire, high-end easy home wire, radiated European standard wire, computer cable, plastics insulated and sheathed control cable products. The company also provides cable and conductor products comprising plastics insulated power cable, XLPE insulated cable, XLPE insulated power cable, areial insulated cable, and overhead conductor; and aluminum alloy and flexible MI fireproof cable products. In addition, it offers rubber flexible, mining, elevator, motor winding lead, waterproof rubber sheathed, silicon rubber insulated and sheathed flexible, butyronitrile compound insulation and sheathed power, internal connecting, rail transit, ship power, and PV cables, as well as copper core. The company offers its products for use in power projects, railways, construction machinery, minerals, aviation, buildings, electrical appliance, transformer companies, etc. It also exports its products to Europe, Australia, Kenya, Angola, Vietnam, Maldives, Malaysia, and Singapore. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hangzhou Boiler Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Boiler Group Co., Ltd. and its subsidiaries consult, develop, produce, sell, and install boilers, pressure vessels, environment protection equipment, new energy equipment, and other products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. Its products include CCPP HRSG boilers; heat recovery boiler for metallurgic industry; and HRSG for chemical industry and constructional material. The company's products also comprise utility boilers, such as circulating fluidized bed boilers, pulverized coal utility boilers, BFG boilers, and water-coal slurry boilers; special and industrial boilers, which comprise biomass boilers, pure refuse incineration boilers and CFB refuses, hot water boilers, and chain stoker boilers; utility auxiliary products, such as HP heaters, LP feed water heaters, deaerators, and condensers; and flue-gas purifier, coal chemicals, and others. In addition, it is involved in the refuse incineration treatment projects; co-generation, CCPP, and waste heat recovery/MSW/biomass/BFG/coal combustion power generation; research and development, manufacture, marketing, construction, and EPC service of waste heat recovery boilers, power plant boilers, industrial boilers, pressure vessels, etc.; and design and manufacture of boiler auxiliaries, various special equipment, and heavy-duty equipment. Further, it provides industrial automatic technology consulting, design development, supply, commissioning, and technical services for equipment; and professional personnel for machinery manufacturing industry. The company was founded in 1955 and is based in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Linzhou Heavy Machinery Group Co., Ltd
summary: Linzhou Heavy Machinery Group Co., Ltd manufactures and sells coal mining machinery and equipment in China. The company offers roadheaders, shearers, belt conveyors, scraper conveyors, metal top beams, fluid couplings, rescue cabins, and hydraulic brackets. It also provides iron and steel casting and forging, energy equipment, high-tech equipment, mine construction and operation, and financial leasing services. In addition, the company engages in the explosion-proof electrical appliances; robotic product manufacturing, sales, maintenance, and leasing; iron pig foundry; and commercial factoring businesses. Linzhou Heavy Machinery Group Co., Ltd was founded in 1987 and is based in Linzhou, China.

name: Feilong Auto Components Co., Ltd.
summary: Feilong Auto Components Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, process, manufactures, and sells auto parts in China and internationally. It offers automotive water pumps, electronic water pumps, temperature control modules, turbocharger housing and volutes, engine intake and exhaust manifolds, oil pump, vacuum and electronic compressor, and flywheel housings. The company also offers electric pump series, thermostatic valve series, integrated thermal management modules; commercial (ict, idc, charging and storage) liquid-cooled pumps, robot liquid-cooled pumps and terminal liquid-cooled pumps; thermal management integration and electronic temperature control valves and electronic actuators; and special castings such as flywheel shells and brackets. The company was formerly known as Henan Province Xixia Automobile Water Pump Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Feilong Auto Components Co., Ltd. in May 2019. Feilong Auto Components Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Xixia, China.

name: HyUnion Holding Co.,Ltd
summary: HyUnion Holding Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile parts, special vehicles, electrical machines, and electromechanical components primarily in China. It also provides financial information, third-party payment, big data risk control, trans-border, and telephone operator charge settlement services. The company was formerly known as Qingdao Haili Metal One Co., Ltd. and changed its name to HyUnion Holding Co., Ltd. in August 2017. HyUnion Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Anhui Sierte Fertilizer industry LTD. ,company
summary: Anhui Sierte Fertilizer industry LTD. ,company produces and sells chemical fertilizers in China. It offers phosphate compound fertilizers, slow and controlled release fertilizers, soil testing formula fertilizers, ecological fertilizers, and inorganic fertilizers. The company is headquartered in Ningguo, China.

name: Chengdu Wintrue Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Wintrue Holding Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies chemicals in China and internationally. The company offers NPK fertilizers, soda ash, ammonium chloride, anhydrous sodium sulphate, and edible and industrial salts, as well as other products, including urea. The company was formerly known as Shindoo Chemi-Industry Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Chengdu Wintrue Holding Co., Ltd. in September 2016. Chengdu Wintrue Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Anhui Honglu Steel Construction(Group) CO., LTD
summary: Anhui Honglu Steel Construction(Group) CO., LTD manufactures and sells steel structures and related products in China and internationally. It offers steel structures for industrial buildings, steel structures for residences, and customized bungalows. The company also produces and sells building materials and three-dimensional garages. In addition, it engages in the industrial real estate investment and construction operations; and green steel structural property development activities. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: China Zhonghua Geotechnical Engineering Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Zhonghua Geotechnical Engineering Group Co., Ltd. engages in the engineering, general aviation, cultural tourism, and investment businesses in China. The company provides geotechnical engineering services, including engineering survey, design consultation, construction, monitoring and inspection, engineering supervision, and related services; and underground engineering services for foundation pit support, underground diaphragm walls, shield tunnels, and construction machinery manufacturing, as well as undertakes municipal engineering projects, such as roads, bridges, and underground pipe networks. It also offers engineering consulting, planning and design, project investment and management, construction, operation, maintenance, and other related services for airports and general aviation airports. In addition, the company engages in the planning, design, investment, development, and construction of cultural tourism towns, theme parks, general aviation towns, and related projects. Further, it invests in cultural media, electronic chip technology, Internet finance, big data, and other industries. China Zhonghua Geotechnical Engineering Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Guangdong Vanward New Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Vanward New Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells kitchen appliances and hot water systems in China and internationally. It offers gas water heaters, gas cookers and stoves, disinfection cabinets, range hoods, and electric water heaters, as well as outdoor appliances and energy systems. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.

name: Nanjing Xinlian Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Xinlian Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets electricity information collection systems for the power industry in China. The company provides intelligent power distribution equipment and systems, and distribution automation equipment. It also offers energy management systems, smart energy cloud platforms, power cabinet systems, low-voltage complete sets, and power communication detection systems. In addition, the company provides integrated energy services and solutions to grid enterprises and enterprise users. Nanjing Xinlian Electronics Co., Ltd. is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Suzhou Chunxing Precision Mechanical Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Chunxing Precision Mechanical Co., Ltd. produces and sells precise aluminum structure parts for telecom, automobile, industrial, medical, and consumer markets in China and internationally. It offers die casting products, such as filter bodies, robot housings, and heat sinks; sheet metal stampings, including adapting pieces, automobile seat frames, back DVD frames, automobile front seat frames, and automobile back seats; and automobile parts comprising handbrake connecting links, automobile cooling system bodies, seat belt reels, and wiper engine housings. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Kingsino Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Kingsino Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the production and sales of feed in China. It also offers technical services for pig breeding and sales; trades in raw material related to feed production; and produces and sells animal health products and veterinary drugs, functional feed additives, aquaculture environment water quality improvers, etc. for use in various diseases of pigs and aquatic products. In addition, the company provides billing services of telecom operators; and V-coins, V-pay, telephone wallets, digital goods, payment solutions and other products based on telecommunications value-added services. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hunan Kaimeite Gases Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Kaimeite Gases Co., Ltd. produces and sells industrial gases in China. It engages in the research, development, production, and sale of dry ice, liquid additive, liquid carbon dioxide, methane, oxygen, nitrogen, hydrogen, argon, helium, and other industrial gases that are widely used in beverage, metallurgy, food, tobacco, petroleum, agriculture, chemical, electronics, and other fields. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Yueyang, China.

name: Changzhou Qianhong Biopharma CO.,LTD
summary: Changzhou Qianhong Biopharma CO.,LTD engages in the research and development, production, and sale of bio-pharmaceutical products with the focus on polysaccharides and enzymes in China. The company provides various API products, including heparin sodium, heparin calcium, enoxaparin sodium, nadroparin calcium, and dalteparin sodium for use as anticoagulants; pancreatin for use as a digestive agent; asparaginase for use as an antineoplastic agent; kallidinogenase kallikrein for use in the treatment of microcirculation disorders; and heparinoid. It also offers a range of preparations, such as nadroparin calcium PFS, enoxaparin sodium PFS, dalteparin sodium PFS, and asparaginase and heparin sodium injections for use as anticoagulants. In addition, the company exports its products. Changzhou Qianhong Biopharma CO.,LTD was founded in 1971 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Glory Medical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Glory Medical Co., Ltd. provides hospital building integrated solutions in China. The company is involved in the hospital construction system analysis and planning, and medical engineering activities. It also sells medical equipment and medical consumables. In addition, the company provides hospital management professional medical logistic, smart medical, and park development services. Shenzhen Glory Medical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Baoding Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Baoding Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of various forgings and castings in China. It offers products for mining machinery, electric power engineering, technology, ocean engineering, and hoisting machinery. The company's products are primarily used in shipbuilding, ocean-engineering, power station, petrochemical, engineering machinery, pressure vessels, military, and other industries. It also exports its products to Germany, France, Finland, Canada, Singapore, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Baoding Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Baoding Technology Co., Ltd. in February 2016. Baoding Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Nanfang Bearing Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Nanfang Bearing Co.,Ltd. designs, develops, and sells needle roller bearings, clutches, and auto parts in China. It offers needle bearings, such as drawn cup needle bearings, thrust needle bearings, and one-way clutch needle bearings, as well as cages and needle assemblies. The company also develops and produces one-way clutch for engines of motorcycles; and sleeve and inner race for auto parts and overrunning alternator pulleys. In addition, the company's needle bearings are used in ABS, gearbox, throttle valve, and starter motor; and thrust bearings in automatic transmission and compressor. Jiangsu Nanfang Bearing Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: 37 Interactive Entertainment Network Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: 37 Interactive Entertainment Network Technology Group Co., Ltd., researches, develops, and publishes online games in China and internationally. It operates through Mobile Game Business, Web Game Business, and Others segments. The company offers its products under Sanqi Games, 37 Mobile Games, 37GAMES, and 37 Online Games brand. It is also involved in education business under the Miao Xiaocheng brand. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Wuhu, China.

name: Anhui Huilong Agricultural Means of Production Co.,Ltd.
summary: Anhui Huilong Agricultural Means of Production Co.,Ltd. provides fertilizers, pesticides, and seeds in China and internationally. It supplies its products through a network of distribution centers and 2,800 franchise stores. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Chacha Food Company, Limited
summary: Chacha Food Company, Limited produces and sells nuts, baked goods, and snacks in China. It offers sunflower seeds, crispy potato chips, appetizing melon seeds, multi flavor broad beans, bean curd, sauces, and daily nuts. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Jiangsu Yawei Machine Tool Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yawei Machine Tool Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells metal forming machine tools in China and internationally. Its products include smart and automatic products, such as CNC turret punching machines, CNC press brakes, CNC laser cutting machines, flexible cells and systems, automatic coil lines, and linear and horizontal multi-joint robots. The company also offers sheet metal processing machine-tools; laser processing equipment; and coil line equipment. It serves sheet metal, electric, elevator and escalator, and curtain wall industries. Jiangsu Yawei Machine Tool Co., Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is based in Yangzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Xujiahui Commercial Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Xujiahui Commercial Co., Ltd. operates retail department stores and supermarkets in China. It also operates commercial buildings. The company is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Zhejiang Semir Garment Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Semir Garment Co., Ltd. produces and sells casual wear and children's wear in China. The company offers infants and young children's apparel; and children's shoes, underwear, and accessories. It offers its products under the Senma, Balabala, TCP, MarColor, IT MICHAA, Sarabanda, Kidiliz, Brother to buy, Marc O'Polo, GSON, UTB, and COCOTREE brands. The company offers its products through stores and online. Zhejiang Semir Garment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: SuZhou THVOW Technology. Co. ,Ltd
summary: SuZhou THVOW Technology. Co. ,Ltd engages in the research and development and application of clean energy and environmental protection technologies in China and internationally. The company offers equipment, such as coal chemical, petrochemical, fine chemical, metallurgy, and nuclear power equipment; marine and military equipment; and renewable and clean energy equipment. It also provides thermal, solar, and biomass power generation services; and EPC engineering consulting services, as well as constructs power projects. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Tianwo Science and Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to SuZhou THVOW Technology. Co. ,Ltd in March 2015. SuZhou THVOW Technology. Co. ,Ltd is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Shanghai Shunho New Materials Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Shunho New Materials Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of environmental packaging materials in China. The company provides gold and silver paper boards for use in cigarette, gifts, cosmetics, liquor, food, medicine, toothpaste, sports products, electronic products packaging, etc.; and aluminum-coated and laminating papers, acrylic fibers, printed materials, optical anti-counterfeiting membranes, and printing equipment. It also offers cloud printing and vertical e-commerce institutions, etc. services; and electronic cigarettes. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Luxin Packing Materials Science & Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Shunho New Materials Technology Co.,Ltd. in December 2016. Shanghai Shunho New Materials Technology Co.,Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Jilin Jian Yisheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin Jian Yisheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells medicine, Chinese herbal medicine, cosmetics, and food and health products in China. It offers capsules, injections, tablets, granules, and other products; and Ginseng medicinal and bee products. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Ji'an, China.

name: Tangrenshen Group Co., Ltd
summary: Tangrenshen Group Co., Ltd produces, processes, and sells pig meat and feed products in China. The company sells its products under the TRS and Camel brand names. It operates approximately 40 branches. The company is headquartered in Zhuzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Bairun Investment Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Bairun Investment Holding Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of flavors and fragrances under the brand Bairun in China. Its products are used in beverage, dairy, confectionary, bakery, ice cream, savory, oral care, and tobacco products. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Bairun Flavor & Fragrance Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Bairun Investment Holding Group Co., Ltd. in December 2015. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Zhejiang Busen Garments Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Busen Garments Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and distributes men's wear, casual wear, and accessories in China and internationally. The company's products include suits, shirts, trousers, jackets and accessories, uniform, etc. It serves banks, telecoms, police, airlines, financial institutions, and government clients. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Zhuji, China.

name: Beingmate Co., Ltd.
summary: Beingmate Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells children's food and nutritious food products in China. It provides baby food, milk powder for children, and formulas for pregnant women, as well as provides related consulting services. The company was formerly known as Beingmate Baby & Child Food Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Beingmate Co., Ltd. in October 2019. Beingmate Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Suofeiya Home Collection Co., Ltd.
summary: Suofeiya Home Collection Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells customized wardrobes and other related furniture under the Suofeiya brand name in China. It offers wooden doors, curtains, sofas, coffee tables, bedding, mattresses, and other home style products; and engineering services for real estate, hotels, enterprises, long-term rental apartments, schools, hospitals, and other engineering clients. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Zhejiang Ming Jewelry Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Ming Jewelry Co., Ltd. researches, develops, designs, produces, and sells jewelry products in Mainland China. The company offers platinum, diamond, and gold jewelry. It offers its products through Ming brand, as well as online. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Shaoxing, China.

name: Guangdong Qunxing Toys Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Qunxing Toys Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. engages in the professional design, research and development, production, and sale of plastic electronic toys in China. It offers electric buggies, cartoon cars, and tricycles; computer learning machines; electric cars; infant child toys; toy phones; and other products. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangsu Tongda Power Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Tongda Power Technology Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells stators and rotors, and laminations for motors and generators primarily in China. The company offers stators and rotors for wind power generators; HV and LV, and other special-sized motors; generator products; laminations and cores; and electromotor lamination stator dies, precise compound dies, single punching dies, aluminum rotor die-casting molds, and machine parts and components of precision dies and automatic lines. Jiangsu Tongda Power Technology Co.,Ltd. is based in Tongzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Rapoo Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Rapoo Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells wired and wireless peripheral products worldwide. The company offers wired and wireless mouse and keyboards, wireless audio products, and wired and wireless combo sets. It also provides game peripherals, including game keyboards, mouse, headsets, combos, and mats, as well as gamepads. The company offers its products under the Rapoo brand. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Rapoo Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of MLK Electronics Limited.

name: Fujian Minfa Aluminium Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fujian Minfa Aluminium Co.,Ltd. processes and sells aluminum alloy extruded profiles for architecture and industry fields in the People's Republic of China. The company offers sliding, casement, and insulated windows and doors; railings and shutters; and curtain wall building profiles. It also provides industrial materials, including luggage, decorating, and stationery materials; opening, corner, and table top pipes; sliding pulleys, ladder materials, and fire hydrants; radiating fins; aluminum building formwork systems; aluminum panels; and color cards. The company also exports its products to approximately 40 countries. Fujian Minfa Aluminium Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanan City, the People's Republic of China.

name: Huizhou China Eagle Electronic Technology Inc.
summary: Huizhou China Eagle Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells printed circuit boards in China and internationally. The company's products include offers rigid and flexible circuit, multilayer, HDI, and aluminum substrate boards. Its products are used in consumer electronics, network communications, automotive electronics, security, LED displays, medical equipment, AI, IOT, AR/VR, and drones, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Huizhou, China.

name: Shandong Sacred Sun Power Sources Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sacred Sun Power Sources Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and distributes reserve power and motive power batteries worldwide. Its reserve power batteries are used in the telecom and utility industries, uninterruptible power supplies, and various applications requiring stored energy solutions, including solar and wind renewable energy; and motive power batteries are used in electric forklifts and other commercial electric powered vehicles. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Qufu, China.

name: Shandong Sinobioway Biomedicine Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sinobioway Biomedicine Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies trimethyl orthoformate, triethyl orthoformate, trimethyl orthoacetate, phosphorous acid, ethyl formate, nerve growth factor, and alfaron in China. The company also provides NOBEX, a murine nerve growth factor for injection; Anferon, a human recombinant interferon alpha 2b injection; and Jaferon, a human recombinant interferon alpha 2b spray. In addition, it offers Healive, an inactivated hepatitis A vaccine; Bilive, a combined hepatitis A and B Vaccine; Panflu, a pandemic influenza vaccine; Anflu, a preservative-free influenza virus vaccine; Panflu.1, a Type A H1N1 influenza vaccine; etc. Further, the company exports its products to approximately 20 counties and regions in Europe and the United States. Shandong Sinobioway Biomedicine Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Zibo, China.

name: Haoxiangni Health Food Co.,Ltd.
summary: Haoxiangni Health Food Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, procurement, production, and sale of health foods in China. It offers red dates, nuts, and dried fruits, as well as freeze-dried products. The company was formerly known as Haoxiangni Jujube Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haoxiangni Health Food Co., Ltd. in September 2017. Haoxiangni Health Food Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Xinzheng, China.

name: Hytera Communications Corporation Limited
summary: Hytera Communications Corporation Limited provides communications solutions in China and internationally. The company offers digital radio and trunking systems, LTE-broadband trunking and smart radio systems, command and dispatch systems, communication command vehicle systems, PMR-IoT and emergency response systems, satellite communications systems, sinclair antennas, and body worn cameras, as well as smart accessories, such as video and audio systems, batteries, chargers, carrying cases, car-kits, cables, antennas, and others. It serves government and public security, utility, and transportation sectors, as well as enterprises and businesses. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Haoyitong Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hytera Communications Corporation Limited in March 2010. Hytera Communications Corporation Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Xilong Scientific Co., Ltd.
summary: Xilong Scientific Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells chemical reagents in China. The company offers chemical reagents, PCB reagents, high purity reagents, food additives, active pharmaceutical and chemical materials, and lab glassware products. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Xilong Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xilong Scientific Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Xilong Scientific Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Jiangsu Shuangxing Color Plastic New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Shuangxing Color Plastic New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research, processing, production, import, export, and sale of packaging films, composite packaging materials, functional polymers, and new materials and other products in China. It offers metallized, polyester, hot stamping, transfer, card protection, yarn grade, reflective, decorative, laser, insulation, shrinkable, PVC heat shrink, high transparent, thermal sealable, and solar films brands. The company also exports its products to the Middle East, Europe, the United States, Southeast Asia, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and internationally. Jiangsu Shuangxing Color Plastic New Materials Co., Ltd. is based in Suqian, China.

name: Zhejiang Reclaim Construction Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Reclaim Construction Group Co., Ltd. engages in the seawall construction business in China. It undertakes water conservancy, hydro power project construction, port and waterway engineering, housing construction, municipal general construction, and blasting and dismantling professional contract services. The company is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Shenzhen AOTO Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen AOTO Electronics Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells LED display products and solutions in China and internationally. It offers commercial LED display solutions for high-end retail and transport applications, command centers, conference halls, and broadcast studios; out of home, indoor, and outdoor LED display products; LED video controllers; rental LED display products; and software systems. AOTO Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Realcan Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Realcan Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. supplies medicines and medical equipment in China. It sells drugs, vaccines, and medical devices. The company also provides direct selling services to medical institutions and pharmacies; medical logistics services; third-party logistics services; and mobile medical information services. In addition, it provides clothing washing, disinfection and sterilization, lease, and hospital logistics services for medical institutions. The company was formerly known as Realcan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Realcan Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in December 2018. Realcan Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Jiangxi Hengda Hi-Tech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Hengda Hi-Tech Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells anti-wear and anti-corrosion materials for industrial equipment in China. The company offers acoustic noise reduction and environmental protection, and garbage stove anti-corrosion equipment. It is also involved in software and game, PC-side applications, and mobile APP distribution business. In addition, the company provides technical engineering services to anti-wear and anti-corrosion materials. Its products are used in power, steel, cement, petrochemical, subway, airport, stadium, and other industries. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Nanchang, China.

name: Nanning Baling Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanning Baling Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of copper and aluminum tube-fin heat exchanger products in Mainland China. It offers aluminum and copper cooling tubes, zigzag fins, single and double corrugated fins, and out-road fins; and passenger car air heater blowers, passenger car and bus intercoolers, and heavy duty truck intercoolers. The company also provides bus radiators, computer CPU radiators, aluminum and copper passenger car radiators, engineering machine radiators, and aluminum and copper heavy duty truck radiators; and passenger car and bus cooling modules. Its products are used in automobile, engineering machinery, defense equipment, and computer fields. The company also exports its products primarily to the United States and Australia. Nanning Baling Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Nanning, China.

name: Himile Mechanical Science and Technology (Shandong) Co., Ltd
summary: Himile Mechanical Science and Technology (Shandong) Co., Ltd manufactures and sells tire molds in China and internationally. It also offers gas turbine casings, castings, and rubber machinery. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Gaomi, China. Himile Mechanical Science and Technology (Shandong) Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of Himile Group Co.,Ltd.

name: Hainan RuiZe New Building Material Co.,Ltd
summary: Hainan RuiZe New Building Material Co.,Ltd. produces and sells ready-mixed concrete and cement in China. It provides high performance concrete, dry-process cement, environmental-protection building materials, and landscape design and construction and sanitation services. The company was formerly known as Three Ya Ruize Concrete Distribution Company Limited and changed its name to Hainan RuiZe New Building Material Co.,Ltd. in August 2008. Hainan RuiZe New Building Material Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Sanya, China.

name: Anhui Jinhe Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Jinhe Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of fine and basic chemical products. Its products include acesulfame potassium, maltol, ethyl maltol, methyl cyclopentenolone, and sucralose; and basic chemical products, such as liquid ammonia, nitric acid, sulfuric acid, formaldehyde, melamine, pentaerythritol, diketene, neopentyl glycol, and pharmaceutical intermediates. The company's products are used in food, beverage, tobacco, brewery, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals industries. Anhui Jinhe Industrial Co., Ltd. is based in Chuzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shandong Zhangqiu Blower Co., Ltd
summary: Shandong Zhangqiu Blower Co., Ltd manufactures and sells various blowers. Its principal products include root and turbo blowers, centrifugal blowers and fans, slurry and industrial pumps, liquid ring vacuum pumps, mills, and pneumatic conveying equipment and systems. The company exports its products to approximately 70 countries, including the European Union and North America. It offers blowers to its distributors, OEMs, and end users. Shandong Zhangqiu Blower Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Shandong Zhangqiu Blower Factory Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Jinan, China.

name: Beijing Shengtong Printing Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Shengtong Printing Co., Ltd. provides integrated printing services for full-color publication activities in China. The company primarily prints color magazines, luxury metropolitan newspapers, commercial promotional materials, hardcover books, and other printing products. It also supplies printed materials, as well as offers packaging printing services. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Lingyi iTech (Guangdong) Company
summary: Lingyi Itech (Guangdong) Company develops, produces, and sells magnetic materials and products. The company offers permanent ferrite magnets, such as wet and dry anisotropic, isotropic, and rubber ferrite magnets; bonded NdFeB and sintered SmCo magnets; and Ni-Zn and Mn-Zn ferrite cores, and inductors with ferrite cores. It also offers precision components and modules, precision structural parts, liquid crystal display modules, capacitive touch screens, wires and cables, and motors. In addition, the company provides trade logistics and supply chain finance services. Its products are used in consumer electronics, automotive control, smart security, smart wear and home, new materials, new energy vehicles, and other fields. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Jiangmen, China.

name: Lomon Billions Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Lomon Billions Group Co., Ltd., an inorganic fine chemical company, manufactures and sells titanium dioxide pigments worldwide. The company offers titanium dioxide, zirconium, titanium sponge, sulfuric acid, and mineral products for use in indoor and outdoor paints, inks, plastics, paper, electronics, rubber, fibers, ceramics, enamels, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, and sunscreen product applications. It provides its products under the Xuelian and Mang, as well as LOMON and BILLIONS brand names. The company was formerly known as Henan Billions Chemicals Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lomon Billions Group Co., Ltd. in February 2017. Lomon Billions Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Jiaozuo, China.

name: Zhejiang Century Huatong Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Century Huatong Group Co.,Ltd engages in the auto parts and Internet games business in China and internationally. The company manufactures and sells plastic parts and associated molds for vehicles, such as heat exchange and air conditioning plastic parts; lamp plastic parts; interior and exterior parts; safety systems; metal and non-ferrous metal stamping parts; and water assisted plastic parts. It also offers various gaming platforms, as well as mobile gaming products. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Shaoxing, China.

name: Shijiazhuang Yiling Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shijiazhuang Yiling Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of pharmaceuticals primarily in China. It operates through three segments: Modern Chinese Medicine, Chemical Pharmaceutical, and Health Industry. The company offers drugs for cardiac and cerebral blood disease, influenza and respiratory disease, tumor, and diabetes mellitus. It sells its products through physical display, online product distribution, and join distribution parallels. Shijiazhuang Yiling Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Shanghai Yaoji Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Yaoji Technology Co., Ltd. produces and markets playing cards in China and internationally. It also produces and prints books. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Dalian Insulator Group Co., Ltd
summary: Dalian Insulator Group Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, production, and sale of electrical porcelain and composite insulators, station post insulators, and porcelain hardware fittings in China. The company offers long rod suspension composite, disc suspension porcelain, ground wire, composite post and hollow, and ceramic hollow and post insulators. It also exports its products to approximately 40 countries. The company was founded in 1915 and is based in Dalian, the People's Republic of China.

name: Offcn Education Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Offcn Education Technology Co., Ltd operates as a full-category vocational education institution in China. The company provides enrollment examination training, academic qualification preparation, and vocational ability training services. IT also offers educational technology consulting, technology development, technology promotion, technology transfer, and technical services; consulting; cultural and corporate management consulting services; corporate investment consulting services; computer technology training services; public relations services; conference services; human resources services; operating telecommunications services; and retail and wholesale publications. Additionally, the company hosts exhibitions, and organizes Cultural and artistic exchange activities. The company is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangsu Guoxin Corp. Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Guoxin Corp. Ltd. provides thermal power and fiduciary services in China. The company engages in the electricity and thermal production, and relevant electricity services. It also provides financial trust services. The company was formerly known as Sainty Marine Corporation Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Guoxin Corp. Ltd. in March 2017. Jiangsu Guoxin Corp. Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Nanjing, China.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: Shenzhen Jieshun Science and Technology Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Jieshun Science And Technology Industry Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells access control and management systems. The company offers car parking management systems and auto pay stations; ultrasonic parking guidance systems; access controllers, access control readers, and access control spare parts; pedestrian and barrier gate systems; and road blockers, as well as all-in-one card, turnstile with ESD testing, biological recognition, and card retriever solutions. It provides its products under the JSST brand. The company has operations in approximately 100 countries and areas worldwide. Shenzhen Jieshun Science And Technology Industry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Akcome Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Akcome Science and Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures photovoltaic (PV) accessories; and invests in and operates power stations primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company operates, inspects, maintains, and rates 1.1GW of grid-tied clean energy power stations; sells generated power to grid companies; develops carbon assets; and operates new energy vehicles and charging piles. It also offers aluminum frameworks of polar batteries; sectional materials; PV installation racks; and PV welding strips. Jiangsu Akcome Science and Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Zhangjiagang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Lancy Co., Ltd.
summary: Lancy Co., Ltd. provides women's wear in China and internationally. The company offers women's wear under the LANCY FROM25, MOJO.S.PHINE, LIME FLARE, marie n mary, JIGOTT, liaalancy, FABIANA FILIPPI, and DeWL brand names. It also provides clothes for the infants and kids under the Agabang brand; and cosmetics under the BRAVOU, FRESKIN, and Gonice brand names. The company markets its products through stores, as well as online. Lancy Co., Ltd. is based in Beijing, China.

name: Luoyang Northglass Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Luoyang Northglass Technology Co.,Ltd designs, develops, and manufactures glass deep processing equipment in China. The company's deep processing equipment comprise glass tempering furnaces, low-e coating machines, glass automation systems, glass cutting machines, glass storage systems, buffer systems, vertical glass seaming machines, and vertical washing machines. It also offers deep processed glass products, such as toughened, laminated, curved, insulating, printed, and coated glass products; and HVLS and general fans. The company also exports its products to approximately 80 countries, such as the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, France, Japan, Russia, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, etc. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Luoyang, China.

name: Ogawa Smart Healthcare Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Ogawa Smart Healthcare Technology Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells health massage appliances in China and internationally. It provides massage chairs and apparatuses, air purifiers, fresh air ventilators, blood pressure monitors, glucose meters, oximeters, etc. The company offers its products primarily under the OGAWA, FUJI, FUJIMEDIC, COZZIA, and MEDISANA brand names. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Comfort Science&Technology Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ogawa Smart Healthcare Technology Group Co., Ltd. in May 2017. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: ZheJiang Haers Vacuum Containers Co.,Ltd.
summary: ZheJiang Haers Vacuum Containers Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, production, and sale of stainless steel vacuum insulation vessels in China. The company offers vacuum flasks, insulation pots, insulated lunch boxes, stew pots, vacuum insulation electric kettles, aluminum bottles, glass cups, PP, Tritan, and other plastic cups under the Hals, SIGG, and NONOO brands. It also provides glass ceramic products, silicone products, corn fiber, grain fiber, and bamboo fiber products; and sells baby bottles, pacifiers, and grinders. In addition, the company researches, develops, and sells outdoor leisure sports products; and manufactures, sells, and repairs CNC machine tools and accessories. ZheJiang Haers Vacuum Containers Co.,Ltd. also exports its products to approximately 80 countries worldwide. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Hals Industry & Trade Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ZheJiang Haers Vacuum Containers Co.,Ltd in 2008. ZheJiang Haers Vacuum Containers Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Yongkang, China.

name: Guangdong Chant Group Inc.
summary: Guangdong Chant Group Inc. manufactures and sells thermal energy and gas appliances in China. The company offers outdoor ovens, gas valves, gas heaters, barbecue grills, gas cookers, and gas appliance parts, umbrella heaters, pressure reducing valves, plug valves, burners, and other accessories. It also produces renewable energy, such as thermoelectric and solid fuels. The company also exports its products to 36 countries. Guangdong Chant Group Inc. was founded in 1985 and is based in Zhongshan, China.

name: Roshow Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Roshow Technology Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the research, development, manufacture, sale of electromagnetic products in China. The company's principal products include composite enameled copper round wires, variable frequency enameled copper round wires, self-adhesive enameled copper round wires, corona enamelled copper round wires, enameled round aluminum wires, and various ultra-fine enameled wires. Its products are used in the home appliance, electric power, telecommunication, electronic, medical equipment, automobile, wind power generation, power supply equipment, and aerospace fields. The company also offers motors. In addition, it invests in, designs, constructs, operates, services, and distributes photovoltaic power plants. The company also exports its products to the United States, Brazil, Japan, Italy, Mexico, and Slovakia. Roshow Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is based in Zhuji, China.

name: Shenzhen Danbond Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Danbond Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of flexible circuits and its materials primarily in China. The company offers FCCL single and double side substrates used in LCD monitors, LCD TVs, cameras, mobile phones, netbooks, e-books, cars, etc.; COF flexible encapsulation substrates; COF products used in LCD TVs, smart 3G phones and laptop computers, and other products with LCD display drivers; and FPC flexible printed circuit boards. It also provides encapsulation-related heat curing adhesive and micro adhesive glue films. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Danbond Technology Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Danbond Investment Group Co., Ltd.

name: EGLS Co.,Ltd.
summary: EGLS Co.,Ltd. develops and operates wireless boutique online games. It is involved in the development, operation, and distribution of mobile games, including video games and game engines. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Dragon Pipe Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to EGLS Co.,Ltd. in August 2017. EGLS Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shenzhen Ruihe Construction Decoration Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Ruihe Construction Decoration Co., Ltd. operates as a construction and decoration company in China. The company is involved in the design and construction of architectural decorations and curtain walls, as well as solar photovoltaic power generation and construction installation activities; and provision of electromechanical engineering, fire protection, landscape, and intelligent technology services. It undertakes public infrastructure, hotel and club, finance and securities, business entertainment, transportation facilities, business office, and exhibit and theater projects. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Ruihe Decoration Engineering Co., Ltd. Shenzhen Ruihe Construction Decoration Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Dalian My Gym Education Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Dalian My Gym Education Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells corrugated pipe production equipment in Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and the United States. The company offers plastic machinery products, such as HDPE/PP double wall and high-speed corrugated, solid, PE, PVC, and HDPE corrugated pipe extrusion lines, as well as belling machines, perforators, and extruder series machinery. It also provides general machinery products. The company was formerly known as Dalian Sunlight Machinery Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Dalian My Gym Education Technology Co., Ltd. In April 2019. The company is based in Dalian, China.

name: Rongyu Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Rongyu Group Co., Ltd. engages in electrical equipment, credit information big data, commercial bank and factoring, financing leasing, and other businesses in China. The company offers electrical equipment products, such as electronic control complete sets, permanent magnet low and high voltage switch products, and electronic energy meters, as well as highway part facility, automatic control system integration, and protection services. It also provides credit services, including credit management and rating system services; and digital retail management solutions consisting of channel collaborative retail management and large data operations management services, as well as product development services for online and offline enterprises. In addition, the company offers banking services comprising corporate and personal finance, small microfinance, financial market, and international business services; business factoring services, which include advance payment under warranty, factoring under credit protection, leasing factoring, re-factoring, and other services; and financial leasing services, such as direct, after-sale, entrusted, leveraged, and joint leasing services. Further, it provides insurance brokerage services primarily student and family insurance. The company was formerly known as Jilin Yongda Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Rongyu Group Co., Ltd. in November 2016. Rongyu Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Jilin City, China.

name: Changzhou Almaden Co., Ltd.
summary: Changzhou Almaden Co., Ltd. produces and sells anti-reflective coated solar glass in China and internationally. The company offers solar, dual glass module, and photoelectric glass, as well as polyolefin encapsulant films. Changzhou Almaden Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Perfect World Co., Ltd.
summary: Perfect World Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development, publishing, and operation of online games in China.
