It is also involved in engages in the production, distribution, and marketing of film and television content. The company produces approximately 600-800 episodes of TV dramas every year, which are aired on satellite TV stations at prime time, as well as Chinese language and foreign films. It is also involved in the content related advertising and merchandising business, as well as talent management business. The company was formerly known as Perfect World Pictures Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Perfect World Co., Ltd. in July 2016. Perfect World Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Kuang-Chi Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuang-Chi Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells seat functional components for automobiles in the People's Republic of China. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Longsheng Auto Parts Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kuang-Chi Technologies Co., Ltd. in June 2017. Kuang-Chi Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Xiamen Kingdomway Group Company
summary: Xiamen Kingdomway Group Company engages in the manufacturing and sale of the nutrition and health resources in China and internationally. It offers a series of raw material products, including coenzyme Q10, VA, VD3, microalgae DHA, and plant ARA, as well as provides dietary supplements and sports nutrition products. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Jindawei Vitamin Co., Ltd. Xiamen Kingdomway Group Company was founded in 1997 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Hubei Yichang Transportation Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei Yichang Transportation Group Co., Ltd. provides road passenger transportation services in China. The company offers intercity bus passenger transportation, as well as tourism services. It is also involved in the vehicles and spare parts sale, and after-sales service business; and provision of logistics services, such as warehousing, loading and unloading, and freight transportation services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Yichang, China.

name: Zhejiang Renzhi Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Renzhi Co., Ltd. provides professional services in the oil and gas drilling and engineering fields primarily in China. It is involved in the development, production, and sale of oilfield chemicals; and development, production, sale, and import and export trade of new materials. The company also offers drilling fluid technical services; oilfield special equipment inspection and repair services; and anti-corrosion engineering services. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Renzhi Oilfield Technology Services Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhejiang Renzhi Co., Ltd. in October 2016. Zhejiang Renzhi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Wenzhou, China.

name: Daoming Optics&Chemical Co.,Ltd
summary: Daoming Optics&Chemical Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells reflective materials in China and internationally. The company offers reflective sheeting and fabrics, vehicle conspicuity tapes, vehicle number plates, and safety garments. It also provides personal and road safety products, finished products, safety vests, release papers, and glass beads. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Yongkang, China.

name: Shenke Slide Bearing Corporation
summary: Shenke Slide Bearing Corporation manufactures and sells bearings for use in AC and DC motors, generators, turbines, fans, pumps, compressors, and other rotating machines in China. The company offers hydro, thermal, nuclear, wind, and other mechanical products, as well as plain bearing. It serves machinery, chemical, power, steel, water conservancy, metallurgy, mining, cement, and other industries. The company also exports its products to Pakistan, Turkey, India, Japan, Australia, Bangladesh, Britain, and other countries. Shenke Slide Bearing Corporation was founded in 1996 and is based in Zhuji, China.

name: Zhejiang Bangjie Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Bangjie Holding Group Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, designs, weaves, markets, and sells garments in China and internationally. It offers sportswear, casual clothes, and underwear series of products. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Bangjie Digital Knitting Share Co., Ltd. Zhejiang Bangjie Holding Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Yiwu, China.

name: Suzhou Anjie Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Anjie Technology Co., Ltd. supplies internal and external functional components for the consumer electronics industry in China and internationally. Its principal products include tapes, insulation products, buffering products, EMI products, shading tapes, thermal products, conductive products, optical films, touch panels, cover glasses, precision metal parts, etc. The company also provides die-cut products, non-metal printing and CNC products, 3D processing products, optical glass products, precise metal stampings, and energy batteries. It offers its products for smartphones, tablets, laptops, AR/VR, smart home applications, etc. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Zanyu Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zanyu Technology Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of surfactants and oleo chemicals in China and internationally. The company offers stearic acid glycol ester, disodium laureth sulfosuccinate, fatty acid methyl ester sulfonic acid, alkylbenzene sulfonic acid, sodium linear alpha olefin sulfonate, sodium and ammonium lauryl sulfate, sodium and ammonium lauryl ether sulfate, and cocamidopropyl and dodecyl dimethyl betaine. It also provides coco fatty diethanol amide, cocofatty acid monoethanol amide, synthetic leather fatliquoring agents, sulphonated oil SHO and SS, condensed phospholipin, POE fatty acid monoethanol amide ether, leather degreasing agents, and guar hydroxy propyl dimethyl. In addition, it offers third-party testing services on food safety, environment, occupational health, and others. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Zanyu Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zanyu Technology Group Co., Ltd. in November 2016. Zanyu Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Dongguan Kingsun Optoelectronic Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dongguan Kingsun Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells LED lighting products worldwide. The company offers street lights, tunnel lights, wall packs, garden lights, bollards, parking lot lights, and solar lights for roads and areas; high bay and low bay lights, and canopy lights for industrial applications; and flood, projection, wallwash, in-ground, linear, and pixel lights for architectural applications. It also provides smart lights, bulbs, tubes, battens, downlights, panel lights, spotlights, ceiling lights, pendant lights, table lamps, floor lights, and wall lights for residential and commercial applications. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Fujian Snowman Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Snowman Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and distribution of ice machines in China. The company's principal products include industrial chillers and concrete cooling systems, as well as flake, tube, block, and plate ice machines. It also offers slurry ice and quick frozen machines, compressors, cold storage panels, evaporative condensers, and air coolers. The company provides its products for use in food processing and storage; man-made ski slopes; and cooling applications in construction, supermarkets, ocean fishing, nuclear projects, chemical and medical industries, etc. It offers its products under the SNOWKEY brand name. The company was formerly known as Change City Snowman Refrigeration Equipment Co., Ltd. Fujian Snowman Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Yonggao Co., Ltd.
summary: Yonggao Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells plastic valve and fitting in China. The company offers hot products, including PVC pressure pipes and fittings, couplings, true union ball valves, butterfly valves, compact ball valves, sockets, elbows, rain gutters, male thread TEE, two-faucet reducing joint 2, and glue for water supply products. It also provides CPVC valves, plastic valves and fittings, CPVC pressure pipes and fittings, PVC gutters and fittings, PP-R pipes and fittings for cold hot water, PP compression fittings, PVC pressure pipes and fittings, PVC pipes and fittings for drainage, PVC DWV fittings, PVC thread fittings, PVC-U insulating electrical pipes and fittings, saddles, pressure fittings with gasket, and glue. The company also exports its products to approximately 146 countries. Yonggao Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Taizhou, China.

name: Ronglian Group Ltd.
summary: Ronglian Group Ltd. provides IT solutions in China and internationally. It provides infrastructure and data center solutions, such as IT planning, application and system integration, professional operation and maintenance, and specialized services; virtualization, and private and hybrid cloud services; and B2B, smart city, and operation services. The company also offers enterprise cloud services, such as cloud planning and design, service migration, resource management, integration development, and operation monitoring services, as well as industry cloud solutions, such as insurance, exploration, and education. In addition, it provides Internet of Vehicles ecosystem through specialized hardware and software products, business platforms, and data services; Internet of Water solution to control leakage and venting, and ensure water quality safety; big data storage, data visualization, and data application solutions; and smart news solutions. Further, the company offers bio-data platform and biological cloud, and hospital and healthcare management solutions. It serves the energy, transportation, telecom, media, finance, insurance, government, education, manufacturing, biological, and healthcare industries. The company was formerly known as UEC Group Ltd. Ronglian Group Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Valiant Co., Ltd.
summary: Valiant Co., Ltd. produces and sells chemical materials in China and internationally. It offers liquid crystal singles, which include alkenes, biphenyl, cyclohexane benzene, esters, and other fluoro-containing compounds; and liquid crystal intermediates comprising phenol, cyclohexanone, benzoic acids, cyclohexane acids, and halogenated aromatics structures, as well as PI monomers, PR monomers, organic light-emitting diode materials, and other fine chemicals. The company also provides molecular sieve, a material for use in the petroleum industry; and health-care materials, such as APIs and intermediates; and customized products. In addition, it offers LCD intermediates, OPC materials, and polyimide intermediates; and life sciences, fine chemicals, and diagnostics products. The company was formerly known as Yantai Valiant Fine Chemicals Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Valiant Co., Ltd. in May 2015. Valiant Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Yantai, China.

name: LanZhou Foci Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: LanZhou Foci Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd., a pharmaceutical company, manufactures and sells traditional Chinese medicines in China. It provides its products in various dosage forms, including pills, tablets, granules, capsules, concentrated decoctions, mixtures, oral liquids, syrups, and medicinal wines under the Min Shan and Foci brands. The company also engages in researching activities for the development of new herbal drugs. It also exports its products to approximately 27 countries, which include the United States, Canada, Japan, Singapore, Indonesia, Thailand, Malaysia, New Zealand, Australia, Russia, Ukraine, Hong Kong, etc. The company was founded in 1929 and is based in Lanzhou, China. LanZhou Foci Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Lanzhou Foci Pharmaceutical Factory.

name: Jiangsu Huahong Technology Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Huahong Technology Stock Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells processing equipment for recycling resources in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company primarily offers scrap metal balers, shears, scrap metal shredders, waste automobile dismantling equipment, non-metal balers, and compressors, as well as household garbage products. Its products are applied to the national circular economy parks, national urban renewable resource bases, steel and nonferrous metal enterprises, waste steel processing centers, and household garbage processing centers. Jiangsu Huahong Technology Stock Co., Ltd. is based in Jiangyin, the People's Republic of China.

name: Qinghai Huzhu Barley Wine Co.,Ltd.
summary: Qinghai Huzhu Barley Wine Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells highland barley wine in China. It offers its products under the Tianyou De, Mutual help, and Shiyide brands. The company is based in Weiyuan, China. Qinghai Huzhu Barley Wine Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Qinghai Huashi Technology Investment Management Co., Ltd.

name: Rendong Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Rendong Holdings Co., Ltd. provides financial services. It offers third-party payment, credit information, big data, inclusive finance, supply chain, factoring, asset management, etc. The company is also involved in traditional financial services, such as banking, trust, securities, insurance, etc.; and supply chain finance, factoring, micro finance, and leasing businesses. The company was formerly known as Meson Fintech Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Rendong Holdings Co., Ltd. in August 2018. Rendong Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Beyondsoft Corporation
summary: Beyondsoft Corporation provides IT consulting, solutions, and services worldwide. The company offers analytics services, such as management consulting, big data and business intelligence, and service desk; DevOps automation tool; and digital architecture and development, Web and cloud operations, interactive portfolio management, and interactive strategy services. It also provides enterprise mobility, UX design, mobile app development, and mobile testing services; and enterprise strategy and transformation, business process, digitalization, technology strategy and architecture, enterprise application, and accessibility services. In addition, the company offers product engineering, product lifecycle management, product design, software development, globalization and localization, and verification and validation services; and application development and maintenance, testing, management, and enterprise integration services. Further, it provides testing consulting and TCOE, test development and engineering, security testing, and G11N/L10N testing services; and infrastructure management services, such as architecture and deployment, managed infrastructure, operation and support, and security services. The company serves various industries, such as BFSI, technology, Internet, retail, telecom, manufacturing, automobile, media, energy, healthcare, travel, and logistics. Beyondsoft Corporation was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Jiajia Food Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiajia Food Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of flavored food products in China. It offers soy sauces, tea oils, Chinese food, cooking oils, vinegar, compound seasonings, rice noodle products, and hot pot sauces. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Ningxiang, China.

name: Chengdu Leejun Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Leejun Industrial Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services material grinding and separation systems in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers roller presses and separators for use in the cement raw material, clinker grinding, metallurgical mining, and other fields. It also provides technical services; and spare parts for a range of products and auxiliary equipment. Chengdu Leejun Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.

name: Suzhou Yangtze New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Yangtze New Materials Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells functional organic coated boards and substrates in China. The company offers organic coated boards for use in IT industry, food processing industry, hospitals, photovoltaic manufacturing, and other high-clean workshops and car partitions. Its products are also used to produce exterior parts of white household appliances, such as refrigerators, washing machines, and microwave ovens. In addition, the company's products are used in the electronic industrial workshops, radio/sonar laboratories, and special medical examination rooms. The company is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, produces, and sells drugs in China. The company offers capsules, tablets, granules, and bulk drugs in the fields of cardiovascular, anti-infection, digestive system, nervous and mental system, hepatopathy, diabetes mellitus, etc., as well as liver disease, parenteral nutrition, first-aid, antibiotics, anesthesia, and tumor adjuvant. It is also developing nalmefene hydrochloride injection, dolasetron mesylate injection, cefodizime sodium for injection, hydroxyethyl starch and sodium chloride injection, medium and long chain fat emulsion injection, and compound amino acids injection. The company was formerly known as Xizang Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in March 2016. Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Gettop Acoustic Co., Ltd.
summary: Gettop Acoustic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electro-acoustic components and assemblies worldwide. It offers miniature microphones, micro speakers/receivers, and module products. The company's products are used in mobile communication devices, portable PC and flat panel TV products, personal digital devices, car kits, and other consumer electronics. It also provides electro-acoustic solutions. The company was formerly known as Shandong Gettop Acoustic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gettop Acoustic Co., Ltd. in October 2018. Gettop Acoustic Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Weifang, China.

name: Sinodata Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinodata Co., Ltd. operates in the software and information service sector in China. The company offers financial assets transaction, Internet bank, assets management, asset securitization, credit investigation, big data and supply chain finance services; and creates third party Internet bank platform and financial asset transaction platform; and constructs Internet bank ecosphere. It serves small and medium-sized commercial banks, enterprises government, and financial institutions. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Beijing SDL Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing SDL Technology Co.,Ltd. develops and sells environmental monitoring, environmental information system, and process analysis products in China. The company offers environmental monitoring system products, such as continuous emission, waste incineration, ambient air quality, and online monitoring systems; and process analytics system products, including gas analytics systems. It also provides infrared and explosion-proof gas, paramagnetic oxygen, and thermal conductivity analyzers; moisture and electrochemical oxygen analyzers; and particle concentration analyzers. In addition, the company offers software products. Its products are used in environmental, power, cement, iron and steel, air separation, and petrochemical industries. Beijing SDL Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Beijing Kaiwen Education Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Zhongtai Bridge Steel Structure Co., Ltd. engages in the steel structure fabrication business in China. It fabricates large-scale bridge steel structures, ship blocks, and crane steelworks, as well as heavy steel sections for power plants, etc. The company is based in Jiangyin, China.

name: Moso Power Supply Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: MOSO Power Supply Technology Co., Ltd. provides power supply solutions in China and internationally. The company offers LED drivers, such as road, industrial, and landscape lighting solutions; and switch power supply products comprising wall plugs, desktops, and bare boards. It also provides photovoltaic products, including single-phase, two-phase, and three-phase string inverters; and charging piles. MOSO Power Supply Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Kemen Noodle Manufacturing Co.,Ltd
summary: Kemen Noodle Manufacturing Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and sale of fine dried noodles. The company offers nutrition, power, wish, high-gluten, gift, and children series of noodles, as well as other series, including King Chef, Happy Kitchen, wavy noodle, fresh wet, Daoxiao noodle, and wheat flour series. Kemen Noodle Manufacturing Co.,Ltd was founded in 1984 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Beijing WKW Automotive Parts Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing WKW Automotive Parts Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive interior and exterior trim systems, functional components, and electronic systems in China. Its products include quarter light moldings, B-pillar covers, fenders, wheel brows, roof racks, window moldings, roof side moldings, door frame moldings, beltline moldings, sunroof frames, C-pillar covers, instrument panels, center console trims, interior trims, interior door frames, door handle trim frames, ashtray covers, stereo trim strips, and center console frames, as well as plating decorative rings for instrument panels. The company also provides skylight frames, luggage racks, roof drip rails, side beam moldings, car exterior moldings, pillar plaques, aluminum interior ornaments, air conditioning controllers, air conditioning console and outlets, and seat heating controllers. Beijing WKW Automotive Parts Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Pubang Landscape Architecture Co., Ltd
summary: Pubang Landscape Architecture Co., Ltd engages in the landscape planning and design, seedling plantation, landscape architectural, garden conservation, and environmental protection businesses primarily in China. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Changying Xinzhi Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Changying Xinzhi Technology Co.,Ltd. produces and sells stator cores and lamination cores for use in the motor field of automobiles, electric bikes, and air-conditioners in China and internationally. It offers stator cores of automobile alternators, armatures of micro-motors, stator assemblies of automobiles, armatures of e-bikes, fans of automobile alternators, stator frames of automobile starters, stator cores of elevator traction machines, and others. The company was formerly known as Xinzhi Motor Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Changying Xinzhi Technology Co.,Ltd. in December 2017. Changying Xinzhi Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is based in Jiaojiang, China.

name: Shouhang High-Tech Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Shouhang High-Tech Energy Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and erection of air cooling system of power plant in China. The company offers direct air cooling condensers, evaporators, waste water zero emission systems, solar power tower systems, parabolic trough systems, and dish solar thermal power system. It also engages in waste heat generation, and waste heat heating and hot water activities. The company was formerly known as Beijing Shouhang Resources Saving Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Shouhang High-Tech Energy Co., Ltd. in December 2019. Shouhang High-Tech Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Guangdong Delian Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Delian Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the automobile fine chemicals, automobile sales service, and automobile repair and maintenance businesses in China. It offers aftermarket products, such as motor oils, gearbox oils, power steering oils, coolant, and brake fluids, as well as car care products. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.

name: Anshan Heavy Duty Mining Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Anshan Heavy Duty Mining Machinery Co., Ltd. operates in the vibrating screen industry in China and internationally. The company manufactures and sells vibrating screens and feeders, crushers, asphalt and stabilized soil mixing plants, crushing and screening systems, garbage sorting and disposal systems, construction industrialization systems, and dry tailing systems, as well as equipment for manufacturing precast concrete components. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Anshan, China.

name: Guangdong Homa Appliances Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Homa Appliances Co., Ltd. manufactures, sells, and exports refrigerators in China and internationally. It is also involved in various activities, such as Internet lending platform, commercial factoring loans, Internet small loans, loan assistance, as well as bank Internet financial platform technology development services, etc. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Zhongshan, China.

name: Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of adhesives and sealants in the People's Republic of China. It offers approximately 200 types of products, including epoxy adhesives, polyurethane adhesives, acrylate AB adhesives, cyanoacrylate adhesives, UV curing adhesives, silicon rubbers, anaerobic adhesives, butyl hot melt adhesives, industrial repair putty products, spray polyurea, and others. The company's products are primarily used in the fields of automotive assembly, engineering, plastic, maintenance and repair, loudspeaker assembling, wind and solar energy power plants, environmental packing, transportation, anti-corrosion, ports and mines, rubber conveyer belt repairing, elevator manufacturing, military equipment, mechanical equipment, electronic appliances, construction reinforcement, and others. In addition, it provides technical support and after-sale services. The company was formerly known as Shanghai KangDa New Materials Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd. in September 2019. Shanghai Kangda New Materials Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Guosheng Financial Holding Inc.
summary: Guosheng Financial Holding Inc. together with its subsidiaries, provides diversified financial services in China. It engages in the securities business through 200 branches in 30 provinces and autonomous regions, as well as operates a financial platform; and investment business, including funds, management, and business cooperation services to various enterprises. The company is also involved in the financial technology business comprising big data, cloud computing, artificial intelligence, blockchain, and other technologies; and development of financial industry information collaboration solutions, regulatory technologies, intelligent data services, and digital currency platforms. Guosheng Financial Holding Inc. was founded in 1995 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shandong Longquan Pipeline Engineering Co.,LTD
summary: Shandong Longquan Pipeline Engineering Co.,LTD produces and sells prestressed concrete cylinder pipes in China. The company also offers reinforced concrete pipes, jacking construction method of steel tube concrete pipes, armored joint prestressed concrete cylinder pipes, ballastless track plates, precast concrete lining segments, ductile iron pipes, steel wire skeleton plastic composite pipes and fittings, drainage steel reinforced polyethylene spiral bellows, and high density polyethylene pipes. In addition, it provides fittings, such as elbow and stone accessories, steel conversion members, steel repair parts, and tee accessories. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Zibo, China.

name: Xingye Leather Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xingye Leather Technology Co., Ltd. provides shoe leather materials in China. The company offers napa, natural wrestling, and special effects series products. Its products are used in leather shoes, luggage, leather goods, leather furniture, and other manufacturing applications. Xingye Leather Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Jinjiang, China.

name: Yantai Dongcheng Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yantai Dongcheng Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of biochemical API products in China. It offers heparin, chondroitin sulphate, and glucosamine series products, as well as marine collagen, hyaluronic acid, heparinoid, and cytochrome C for use in the therapeutic areas of cardiovascular, oncology, orthopaedics, anti-infection, etc. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries and regions, including the United States, Germany, Austria, Japan, etc. Yantai Dongcheng Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Guangdong Sunwill Precising Plastic Co.,Ltd
summary: Guangdong Sunwill Precising Plastic Co.,Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells air conditioner fans and engineering plastics primarily in China. Its products include cross flow fans, axial fans, centrifugal fans, plastic housings, PVC tubes, plastic molds, and various kinds of modified engineering plastics. The company also offers plastic products comprising auto parts, pipe parts, electric appliances, mold displays, and other products; micro irrigation equipment, such as filters, micro and spray nozzles, drip stoppers, and emitters; and plastic injection and assembly, and after-sale services. In addition, it provides cross-flow, axial-flow, and centrifugal fan blades, as well as fan housings for household, business, and vehicle air conditioners and plastic car parts; and electric machines and materials, sanitary products, pipeline parts, metal products, electric products, and packaging materials. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: Zhejiang Meida Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Meida Industrial Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells kitchen electrical appliances in China. It offers a range of kitchen products, including hoods, stoves, cookers, disinfection cabinets, storage cabinets, electrical ovens, water purifiers, sinks, and electrical steamers. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Haining, China.

name: Guangzhou Pearl River Piano Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Guangzhou Pearl River Piano Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells pianos in China. The company also exports its products to approximately 100 countries and regions. It offers pianos under the Kayserburg, Ritmuller, Jingzhu, and Pearl River brand names. The company was founded in 1967 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Fujian Jinsen Forestry Co.,Ltd
summary: Fujian Jinsen Forestry Co.,Ltd engages in the afforestation activities in China. The company manages forests; and engages in the green seedlings, sale of wood, and Chinese herbal medicine fields. It also provides bamboo and primary agriculture products; and invests in forestry and agriculture projects. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Sanming, China. Fujian Jinsen Forestry Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Fujian Jiangle Forestry Corporation.

name: Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells hardware and integrated solutions in China. The company's principal products include electro-acoustic products, hair care products, smart wearables, wireless modules, and metal cosmetic parts for mobile devices. It also offers speakers, such as multimedia 2.1, wireless audio, TV, bookshelf, USB, and trolley speakers; in-ear and Bluetooth headphones; and audio accessories. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Baoan Fenda Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd. in 2010. Shenzhen Fenda Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Longzhou Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Longzhou Group Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the road transportation business in China. The company is also involved in the operation of passenger terminal; modern logistics activities; sale and maintenance of cars; and sale of oil and gas, as well as passenger transport. As of June 30, 2018, it had 36 passenger stations, 843 passenger lines, and 2928 passenger vehicles, including 1569 passenger buses, 135 coaches, 609 buses, and 615 taxis. The company was formerly known as Fujian Longzhou Transportation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Longzhou Group Co., Ltd. August 2018. Longzhou Group Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Longyan, China.

name: Guangdong Hongda Blasting Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Hongda Blasting Co., Ltd. provides mine explosion integration services in China. It offers open-pit mine mining and stripping services, as well as undertakes underground mine plate construction and mining works. The company also researches and develops, produces, and manages civilian blasting equipment and technology, including emulsion explosives, ammonium nitrate explosives, industrial electric detonators, tube detonators, plastic detonating tube, and relay detonators. In addition, it provides engineering blasting services, such as chimney folding blasting and other blasting demolition services. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Guangdong Dynavolt Renewable Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Dynavolt Renewable Energy Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells lead batteries and fittings, plastic products, and related products primarily in China. Its lead batteries comprise gel nanotechnology, sealed activated AGM, and factory activated maintenance free batteries; maintenance free batteries with acid packs; and high performance and conventional dry charge batteries. The company offers its products for motorcycles and vehicle starting, electric vehicles, back-up power, telecommunication and lightening, storage power, etc. It sells its products under the MENSHY, DYNAVOLT, etc. brands in approximately 90 countries. The company was formerly known as Dynavolt Renewable Power Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Dynavolt Renewable Energy Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Guangdong Dynavolt Renewable Energy Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: Wuxi Huadong Heavy Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Huadong Heavy Machinery Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and installs container handling equipment in the People's Republic of China. The company offers ship-to-shore container cranes, rail-mounted container gantry cranes, rubber-tired container gantry cranes, general gantry cranes, portal cranes, and other cranes for use in the port container handling operations, railway container handling operations, container yard storage, trailer handling operations, forklift handling operations, etc. It also researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and services automated and intelligent precision processing equipment; and processes and trades in stainless steel products. Wuxi Huadong Heavy Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Yilida Ventilator Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yilida Ventilator Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sales of central air conditioner and building fans in China and internationally. It offers industrial fans, energy-saving motorized fan systems, ventilations, and axial fans. The company also provides automobile charger, DC converter, and other products that are used in electric vehicles, forklifts, golf carts, solar power, wind and electric power communications, rail systems, and other industries, as well as lightweight components, such as automotive transmission housing, engine box, retarder housing, etc. In addition, it offers vessel and marine protective, function, and composite materials for military and civilian markets; testing and checking facilities; and support services. The company offers its products under the Yilida, Wolter, Fulihua, Maer, ESSENTEC, AMMT, TC Charger, and Sanjin brand names. Zhejiang Yilida Ventilator Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Taizhou, China.

name: Zhejiang Giuseppe Garment Co., Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Giuseppe Garment Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells apparel in China. The company offers men's suits, coats, and shirts under the G73, JZZ, and G52 brands. It also provides uniforms under the GIUSEPPE brand. The company serves finance, energy, communications, electricity, tobacco, and other industries. Zhejiang Giuseppe Garment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Pingyang, China.

name: Jinhe Biotechnology CO., LTD.
summary: Jinhe Biotechnology CO., LTD. produces and sells veterinary medicines in China. The company offers chlortetracycline feed grade, an antimicrobial drug for the inhibition and treatment of white dysentery, enteritis, pheumonia, typhoid, paratyphoid, cholera, etc. in poultry and livestock; and chlortetracycline hydrochloride for the inhibition and treatment of pullorum disease, typhoid, and swine enteritis, as well as bacterial diseases, including paratyphoid and cholera. It also exports its products to the United States, South-east Asia, Latin America, Europe, etc. The company is based in Dalian, China.

name: Shenyang Yuanda Intellectual Industry Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenyang Yuanda Intellectual Industry Group Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, installs, and services elevators, escalators, and passenger conveyors in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers passenger, panoramic, bed, and freight elevators; and home and dumbwaiter lifts. The company was formerly known as ShenYang Brilliant Elevator Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenyang Yuanda Intellectual Industry Group Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Shenyang Yuanda Intellectual Industry Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenyang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hefei Meyer Optoelectronic Technology Inc.
summary: Hefei Meyer Optoelectronic Technology Inc. researches, develops, and sells optical sorting and X-ray inspection technologies. The company offers belt-type multi-function, chute multi-function, grain, herbs, mineral stone, nut, peanut, plastic infrared, pulses, rice, salt, seeds, sesame, spices, tea, vegetable, and wheat sorters. It also provides X-ray inspection machines for canned food, dehydrated vegetable, frozen food, meat, mushroom, seafood, shoes/clothes/bags, snacks, and tire inspection, as well as security inspection. In addition, the company offers double layer, pre-sale, helpdesk, onsite, warranty, spare parts, and training services. It primarily serves agricultural products processing, industrial inspection, and healthcare industries in approximately 100 countries. Hefei Meyer Optoelectronic Technology Inc. was founded in 1993 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Jikai Equipment Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
summary: Jikai Equipment Manufacturing Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, distributes, and services underground mining machinery in China. The company provides specialized solutions in underground mining industry for tunneling, tunnel supporting, transportation, etc. Its products include transport machinery, such as heavy duty scraper conveyors, durable alloy whole founded AFC pans, man transporters, reducers for coal mine scraper conveyors, and diesel crawler carriers; and mining and tunneling machinery accessory tools, including road headers and shearers, as well as picks for use in coal shearers and road headers. The company also offers safety drill machines comprising deep hole hydraulic jumbos, hydraulic drilling rigs, hydraulic coal mine tunnel drilling machines, coal mine pneumatic deep hole drilling jumbos, pneumatic bracket drilling rigs and machines, and slurry pumps. In addition, it provides supporting equipment and tools consisting of pneumatic and hydraulic series products, hydraulic props, and tensioning and auxiliary equipment. Jikai Equipment Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Hainan Shuangcheng Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Shuangcheng Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and markets synthesized peptide drugs and active pharmaceutical ingredients worldwide. It offers somatostatin, thymosin, clindamycin hydrochloride, thymopentin, L-carnitine, uranin hydrobromide, inosine, cyclophosphine adenosine, motidine, scopolamine, and sodium ferulate for injections, as well as vitamin B6. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Haikou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangxi Huangshanghuang Group Food Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Huangshanghuang Group Food Co., Ltd., a food processing company, primarily engages in processing livestock and poultry meat products in China. The company offers fresh, packaging, and halogen products, as well as fermented vegetables. It also provides cold dishes and rice products, including duck, chicken, geese, pig, cattle, sheep, and vegetables, as well as zongzi and moon cakes. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanchang, China.

name: Baiyang Investment Group, Inc.
summary: Baiyang Investment Group, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates in the aquaculture industry in China. The company is involved in aquatic research and development, aquatic fry breeding, feedstuff production, fish farming, aquatic products processing, and gelatine and other biological products production activities. It offers tilapia, shrimp, and grass carp products; and collagen and gelatin biological products for use in the food, beauty, health care, and biomedicine fields. The company also supplies seeds for tilapia farmers; and specializes in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of fish, shrimp, and frog feeds. In addition, it exports its aquatic products to the United States, Russia, Mexico, Canada, the European Union, the Middle East, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Baiyang Aquatic Group, Inc. and changed its name to Baiyang Investment Group, Inc. in November 2015. Baiyang Investment Group, Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Nanning, China.

name: Chengdu Hongqi Chain Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Hongqi Chain Co.,Ltd. operates a chain of convenience stores in Sichuan Province, China. It operates approximately 2,900 stores. The company also operates a multi-functional convenience service platform. Chengdu Hongqi Chain Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Harbin Boshi Automation Co., Ltd.
summary: Harbin Boshi Automation Co., Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of automatic weighting, bagging, and palletizing equipment for powdery and granular materials industry in China. It also provides post-processing equipment for synthetic rubber and petrochemical industries; and operating robot equipment for submerged arc furnaces. The company also provides automatic truck-loading equipment and plant logistic solutions; and industrial waste acid regeneration process equipment. In addition, it sells spare parts; and offers equipment maintenance, repair, and overhaul services. The company was formerly known as Harbin BOSHI Automation Equipment Co., Ltd. Harbin Boshi Automation Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Harbin, China.

name: Meisheng Cultural & Creative Corp., Ltd.
summary: Meisheng Cultural & Creative Corp., Ltd. engages in the design and development of IP derivatives, animation, games, film, television, etc. in China. It also offers content production, distribution; and other cultural products and services, such as light gaming service platform services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Xinjiang Haoyuan Natural Gas Co. ,Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Haoyuan Natural Gas Co. ,Ltd. engages in the transmission, distribution, and sale of natural gas; and home installation business in China. It operates long-distance gas pipelines, high and medium voltage municipal pipelines, gas stations, and CNG refueling mother station, as well as CNG trucks and tractors. The company was formerly known as Aksu Haoyuan Natural Gas Co., Ltd. And changed its name to Xinjiang Haoyuan Natural Gas Co. ,Ltd. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Aksu, China.

name: Haixin Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Haixin Foods Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and manufacture of frozen minced-fish products in China. It sells its products under the Haixin and Yuji brands. The company was formerly known as Fujian Tengxin Foods Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haixin Foods Co., Ltd. in July 2013. Haixin Foods Co., Ltd. was founded in 1903 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited
summary: Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, researches, designs, develops, produces, and sells automotive steering system and components in the People's Republic of China. The company offers automotive steering gears, and other components and parts of steering system. It also provides power recirculating ball steering gears for use in light, medium, and heavy duty trucks and buses; power rack-and-pinion steering gears and steering knuckles for passenger cars; and EPS systems for use in energy-saving and new energy vehicles. Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited supplies steering products to automakers. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited is a subsidiary of Zhejiang Shibao Holding Group Co., Ltd.

name: Guangdong Xinbao Electrical Appliances Holdings Co., Ltd
summary: Guangdong Xinbao Electrical Appliances Holdings Co., Ltd manufactures, develops, and sells kitchen electrical appliances, home appliances, electronic components, and baby electrical appliances under the Donlim brand in China. Its products include personal care appliances, bread makers, kettles, coffee machines, toasters, stand blenders, hand mixers, hand blenders, juicers, food processor, toaster ovens, sandwich toasters, deep fryers, cooking appliances, irons, and vacuum and air purifiers. The company also exports its products to approximately 100 countries in Europe, America, Pacific Ocean, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, etc. Guangdong Xinbao Electrical Appliances Holdings Co., Ltd was founded in 1995 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: Shanghai Liangxin Electrical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Liangxin Electrical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and produces low-voltage electrical apparatus in China. The company offers frame breakers, molded case circuit breakers, dual power supply products, disconnectors, miniature circuit breakers, and electromagnetic circuit breakers. It also provides industrial products comprising contactors, contactor relays, switch capacitor contactors, starters, switches, thermal relays, and motor protection circuit breakers. It serves the energy, telecommunications, construction, electricity, industrial, and other industries. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: UTour Group Co., Ltd.
summary: UTour Group Co., Ltd. provides outbound travel agency services in China and internationally. Its outbound travel services include study tours, immigration and real estate, tourism finance, health care travel, etc. The company also provides integrated marketing services. It operates through a network of 120 company-operated retail stores and 2,000 agents. The company was formerly known as Beijing UTour International Travel Service Co., Ltd. and changed its name to UTour Group Co., Ltd. in July 2016. UTour Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Changzhou Nrb Corporation
summary: Changzhou Nrb Corporation engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of auto precision bearing products. The company's primary products include needle roller bearings, roller bearings, clutch release bearings, and hub bearings. It also provides hydraulic clutch release, robot, single and double row cylindrical roller, push and pull type clutch release, deep groove ball, joint, and four-point contact ball bearings, as well as synchronizer intermediate ring and large size industrial bearings. It provides its products primarily for application to assemblies, such as automotive transmissions, clutches, heavy truck axles, and hubs. The company was formerly known as Changzhou Guangyang Bearing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changzhou Nrb Corporation in May 2014. Changzhou Nrb Corporation was founded in 1994 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: Guangzhou Tinci Materials Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Tinci Materials Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets lithium-ion battery materials in China. It offers electrolytes of li-ion battery, solvents, and lithium salts. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Simei Media Co.,Ltd.
summary: Simei Media Co., Ltd. operates as an advertising company in China. It offers brand management, creative advertising, entertainment content, digital interaction, full-borne media planning and buying, public relations promotion, and effectiveness measurement services. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Dong Yi Ri Sheng Home Decoration Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dong Yi Ri Sheng Home Decoration Group Co.,Ltd. operates in the home decoration industry. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Muyuan Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Muyuan Foods Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates in the hog industry in China. It is also involved in feed processing, pig breeding, and commercial pig raising activities that include commercial pigs, piglets, and swine's; and slaughtering and processing, as well as pig husbandry activities. Muyuan Foods Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Nanyang, China.

name: Huaiji Dengyun Auto-parts (Holding) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huaiji Dengyun Auto-parts (Holding) Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of automobile engine exhaust door series products for domestic vehicle and engine manufacturers in the People's Republic of China. The company offers valves for passenger cars, marine diesel engines, diesel engines, racing cars, industrial diesel engines, motorcycles, heavy duty trucks, and military vehicles, as well as generator units, engineering machineries, light trucks, buses, mini cars, hybrid cars, etc. It also provides threaded, special shaped, and shape specific valves. In addition, the company exports its products to the United States, Italy, Britain, Japan, Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in Huaiji, the People's Republic of China.

name: Chenzhou City Jingui Silver Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Chenzhou City Jingui Silver Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, smelting, processing, and export of silver in China. It primarily offers high-purity silver and silver products, high-purity silver nitrates, electrolytic leads, crude leads, etc. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Chenzhou, China.

name: LingNan Eco&Culture-Tourism Co.,Ltd.
summary: LingNan Eco&Culture-Tourism Co.,Ltd. engages in the ecological environment and garden construction, culture and tourism, and investment and operation activities in China. The company is involved in the landscape planning and design, ecological environment and garden construction, seedling cultivation and conservation, and research activities. It also engages in the cultural tourism and financial investment businesses. The company was formerly known as LingNan Landscape Co., Ltd. and changed its name to LingNan Eco&Culture-Tourism Co.,Ltd. in February 2018. LingNan Eco&Culture-Tourism Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.

name: Zhejiang Youpon Integrated Ceiling Co. Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Youpon Integrated Ceiling Co. Ltd. manufactures and sells integrated ceilings in China. It offers bathroom, living room, kitchen, bedroom, restaurant, and other ceilings. The company is based in Haiyan, China.

name: Maiquer Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Maiquer Group Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of dairy products, beverages, frozen drinks, mineral water, and quick-frozen foods in China. The company's principal products include sterilized milk, yogurt, protein drinks, ice cream, and popsicles. It also provides agricultural products; livestock breeding and agricultural cultivation services; and bakery and festival products. The company is based in Changji, China.

name: Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd. engages in the design, production, and sale of gold, jewelry, and other precious metal crafts in China. The company was formerly known as Beijing Kingee Culture Development Ltd. and changed its name Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd. in July 2010. Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Geron Co.,Ltd
summary: Geron Co.,Ltd researches, develops, manufactures, and sells textile carding equipment in China. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Nantong, China.

name: Kennede Electronics MFG. CO., LTD.
summary: KENNEDE Electronics MFG. Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of rechargeable standby lanterns and DC-AC rechargeable fans in China. Its rechargeable standby lanterns include three series, indoor and outdoor rechargeable standby lanterns, rechargeable flashlights, and fire emergency lights; and DC-AC rechargeable fans comprise two series, DC-AC rechargeable table fans, and floor fans, as well as lamps. The company offers its products for applications in fields, such as standby lights for civilian use, industrial standby lights, outdoor sports, outdoor life, military remote control lights, etc. It also exports its products to approximately 90 countries and regions. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Jiangmen, China.

name: Zhejiang Yueling Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yueling Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells aluminum alloy wheels in China. The company offers classic, flow forming, low pressure, motorcycle, and ATV/kart wheels under the YUELING, ARTKA, FORZUTO, and DAUNTLESS brands. It also exports its products. Zhejiang Yueling Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Zhejiang Yueling Wheel Hub Making Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Wenling, China.

name: Shandong Longda Meat Foodstuff Co.,Ltd
summary: Shandong Longda Meat Foodstuff Co., Ltd. operates as a meat processing company in China. The company primarily engages in the pig breeding, slaughtering, and slicing activities. It also provides sauce and braised, low-temperature, smoked barbecue, and cured meat products; and cooked food products, smoked ham sausages, and quick-frozen foods. In addition, the company offers food safety testing services. It operates through approximately 3,000 meat chain stores. The company also exports its products to approximately 20 countries and regions, including Australia, New Zealand, Argentina, and Brazil. Shandong Longda Meat Foodstuff Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Laiyang City, China.

name: Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiary, operates a chain of drugstores in China. It processes and sells medicinal materials; and engages in the wholesale of Chinese and western medicines. As of January 31, 2019, owned 5,872 direct chain stores in Yunnan, Guizhou, Guangxi, Sichuan, Shanxi, Chongqing, Tianjin, Shanghai, Hainan, and Henan provinces. It also sells products online. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Hongxiang Yixintang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in June 2019. Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Kunming, China.

name: Teyi Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Teyi Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of proprietary Chinese medicines, and chemical preparations, raw materials, and products in China. The company offers cough and phlegm, kidney, anti- infection, cardiovascular, and digestive system drugs. Its chemical raw materials and products include aluminum magnesium carbonate, phenytoin, ferrous sulfate, glacial acetic acid, calcium chloride, sodium chloride, strontium and tannic acid, and zinc sulfate. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Taicheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Teyi Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in November 2016. Teyi Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. is based in Taishan, China.

name: Hollyland (China) Electronics Technology Corporation Limited
summary: Hollyland (China) Electronics Technology Corporation Limited engages in the development, production, and marketing of circuit protection products worldwide. The company offers various products, including axial leaded fuse; low voltage fuse; radial lead fuse; SMD fuse; miniature fuse, micro fuse; new energy application fuse, such as photovoltaic fuse and electric vehicle and charger; thermal fuse; PPTC; and fuse accessories, as well as other circuit protection devices. Its products are used in communication, computer, transportation, toy, household appliance, battery, new energy resource, and other electronic power system protection applications. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Ningly Electronics Company Limited and changed its name to Hollyland (China) Electronics Technology Corporation Limited in July 2010. Hollyland (China) Electronics Technology Corporation Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Dianguang Explosion-Proof Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Dianguang Explosion-proof Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of explosion protection electrical appliances in China. It offers H.V. vacuum breakers and LED laneway lamps; mining explosion-proof cap lamps, vacuum feeder switches, vacuum electromagnetic starters, dry type transformers, and movable substations; and explosion protection power distribution boxes, maintenance power socket boxes, manipulators, and connection chambers. The company also provides explosion protection luminescent lighting, floodlight, metal halide lamp, and exit signal lighting products, as well as LED explosion-proof lighting products; and weatherproof distribution boxes and manipulators. It has applications in various sectors, including coal and non-coal mining, electric power, oil refineries, chemical and petrochemical plants, onshore and offshore plants, low temperatures, fuel depots, and fuel tanker loading/unloading areas. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Wenzhou, China. Dianguang Explosion-Proof Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Dianguang Technology Co.,Ltd.

name: Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, wholesale, retail, and franchise of jewelry in China. Its products include gold, platinum, diamonds, jade, etc. The company was formerly known as Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Products Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd. in July 2008. Shenyang Cuihua Gold and Silver Jewelry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenyang, China.

name: Guangdong Yantang Dairy Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Yantang Dairy Co., Ltd. researches, develops, processes, markets, and sells dairy products in China. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Limin Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Limin Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and markets fungicides and other pesticides in China. The company offers various pesticide technical materials and preparations, such as mancozeb, cymoxanil, fosetyl-aluminum, propineb, pyrimethanil, propiconazole, difenoconazole, chlorothalonil, thiacloprid, metham sodium, Zineb, etc. It sells its products in approximately 70 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Limin Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Limin Group Co., Ltd. in January 2020. Limin Group Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Xinyi, China.

name: Guosen Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Guosen Securities Co., Ltd. provides securities brokerage services in China. It offers investment banking, fixed income, asset management, research and institutional business, margin financing, off-market, self-investment, counter market, asset custody, and Internet banking services; and operates Guoxin TradeStation, a trading platform. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Guotou Securities Co., Ltd. Guosen Securities Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Sunflower Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Sunflower Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells Chinese pharmaceuticals in China. The company produces Chinese patent medicines, chemicals, biological medicines, and health care medicines. Its products include children's medicines, digestive medicines, flu medicines, gynecologic medicines, liver and gallbladder gastrointestinal medicines, cold medicines, rheumatic medicines, heart and brain vascular medicines, geriatrics and chronic disease medicines, cardiovascular medicines, etc. under the Sun Flower and Little Sun Flower brands. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Harbin, China.

name: Sinomine Resource Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinomine Resource Group Co., Ltd. operates as a geological exploration technology services company in nonferrous metals industry. The company offers solid mineral exploration technical services for copper, lead, zinc, nickel, cobalt, gold, silver, platinum, and other non-ferrous metals. It also holds interests in the Shivuma copper project in Zambia, Perlat copper project in Albania, and Chromite project in Zimbabwe, as well as explores for gold, silver, cobalt, lead, zinc, iron, nickel, and uranium deposits. In addition, the company undertakes engineering projects; and provides related and extending services for oversea resources exploration, including exploration material production, storage, and freight. It has operations in China, Zambia, Zimbabwe, Malaysia, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Canada, Albania, Indonesia, Uganda, Papua New Guinea, Laos, the Philippines, Afghanistan, Pakistan, and Turkey. The company was formerly known as Sinomine Resource Exploration Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sinomine Resource Group Co., Ltd. in August 2018. Sinomine Resource Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Wanda Film Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Wanda Film Holding Co., Ltd. engages in the investment, construction, and operation of movie theaters in China, Australia, and New Zealand. It is also involved in the movie distribution, movie screening, and related derivatives business. In addition, the company offers theme merchandising products related to movie characters, plots, and props; and food and beverage products. Further, its advertising business includes pre-roll ads and on-site ads. Wanda Film Holding Co., Ltd. operates 490 theaters with a total of 4340 screens, which include 437 theaters and 3930 screens in China; and 53 theaters and 437 screens internationally. The company was formerly known as Wanda Cinema Line Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wanda Film Holding Co., Ltd. in May 2017. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. Wanda Film Holding Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Beijing Wanda Investment Co., Ltd.

name: Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd. produces and sells electronic chemicals, chemical reagents, and other specialty chemicals in China. The company offers copper nitrate, copper carbonate basic, cupric pyrophosphate, copper oxide, copper chloride, copper sulfate pentahydrate, nickel carbonate basic, nickel acetate, nickel chloride hexahydrat, nickel sulfamate solution, nickel sulfate hexahydrate, tin sulfate, sodium stannate trihydrate, potassium stannate trihydrate, tin chloride dihydrate, tin methanesulfonate solution, cobalt sulfamate solution, cobalt sulfate, cobalt acetate, cobalt nitrate, cobalt chloride, and potassium pyrophosphate. It also provides nickel sulfate, manganese sulfate monohydrate, cobalt sulfate, ternary precursor, lithium iron phosphate, lithium manganese iron phosphate, and ironic phosphate; plating additives; pcb solutions; oxide/peroxidate, inorganic acid, etc.; salts of organic acids, hydrocarbon/ substituted hydrocarbons, alcohol/ phenol/ether/ketone, nitrile/amine/urea, etc.; and biochemical reagent, chromatographic reagent, pH and redox indicator, photochemistry and electrochemical analysis reagent, etc. The company serves printed circuit board, energy materials, auto parts, electronic components, medicine, chemical, bathroom hardware, research and development, and e-commerce industries. It exports its products to Southeast Asia, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Shantou Guanghua Chemical Factory Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd. in 2010. Guangdong Guanghua Sci-Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: Chongqing Sansheng Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Sansheng Industrial Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of building materials and chemicals in China. The company offers commercial concrete, water reducing agents, and expansion agents for industrial and civil buildings, highways, railways, bridges, tunnels, airports, water conservancy and hydropower, etc.; and sulfuric acid for the production of chemical fertilizers, chemical, light industry, textile, steel, water reducer, and other non-fertilizer acid enterprises. It also provides pharmaceutical products comprising intermediates, such as procaine hydrochloride, cefoxitin intermediate, chloramphenicol intermediate, aztreonam intermediate, orlistat intermediate, etc., which are used in antibiotic drugs, anti-hepatitis C drugs, diabetes medicines, benzathine penicillin and cefoxitin, procaine penicillin, and cosmetics; API products, including acetaminophen, cloperidine hydrochloride, levofloxacin mesylate, benoate, procaine hydrochloride, diphenhydramine hydrochloride, etc.; and preparation products, such as compound paracetamol diphenhydramine, cloperidine hydrochloride, clarithromycin sustained-release, diclofenac sodium enteric-coated, acetaminophen, famotidine tablets, etc., which are used in antipyretic and analgesic, antiviral, antibacterial, cough, allergy, local anesthesia, etc., as well as famotidine, diclofenac sodium, nifedipine, acetaminophen, furosemide, and norfloxacin drugs for clinical needs. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Sansheng Special Building Materials Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chongqing Sansheng Industrial Co.,Ltd. in October 2016. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Chongqing, China.

name: Anhui Fuhuang Steel Structure Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Fuhuang Steel Structure Co., Ltd. engages in the design, production, installation, and general contracting of steel structures, and doors and windows. The company is headquartered in Chaohu, China.

name: Shandong Xiantan Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Xiantan Co., Ltd. engages in poultry breeding, feed processing, broiler framing and processing, chick hatching, and deep processing businesses in China. Shandong Xiantan Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Yantai, China.

name: Estun Automation Co., Ltd
summary: Estun Automation Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells controlling parts for intelligent equipment in China. The company offers CNC systems for shearing machines, press brakes, hydraulic presses, and cut-to-length lines; electro-hydraulic servo systems; and solutions for security press brakes. It also provides AC servo and motion control systems, including AC servo drives and motors, electro hydraulic servo pump systems, motion control products, and digital field buses; industrial robots comprising six axis articulated, four axis palletizing, mini, SCARA and DELTA, and linear axes robots; and smart manufacturing systems for automobile, household appliance, elevator, energy, and construction machinery industries. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Jiangxi Selon Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Selon Industrial Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, markets, and sells fine chemicals in China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan. It offers AC foaming agents, thionyl chloride, chlor-alkali, and other chemical products, as well as industrial sodium hydroxide, liquid chlorine, synthetic hydrochloric acid, and aqueous ammonia. The company also exports its products to approximately 10 countries, including Southeast Asia, South Korea, Turkey, Italy, the United States, etc. Jiangxi Selon Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Leping, China.

name: Sichuan Guoguang Agrochemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Guoguang Agrochemical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and distribution of agrochemical products and materials in China. Its products include plant growth regulators, fertilizers, fungicides, insecticides, bio-pesticide, and herbicides. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Kunming Longjin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Kunming Longjin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells natural botanicals and chemical freeze-dried powder injections in China. It offers Chinese, biochemical, chemical, cardio-cerebral vascular, and digestive system medicines; immune system and first aid medications; and vitamins, minerals, and enteral and parenteral nutrition products. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Kunming, China.

name: Shenzhen ESUN Display Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen ESUN Display Co.,Ltd engages in the brand terminal exhibition, low carbon cycle exhibition, 3D printing, and virtual reality businesses in China. The company offers brand strategic planning, brand prototype design, brand profile promotion, and business chain terminal research and development services. It also provides 3D printing fundamental research services in 3D maker education, antique 3D digital protection, and Internet e-commerce 3D display fields; and human body, fluid antique 3D, 3D desktop, and face recognition 3D scanners. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shanxi Yongdong Chemistry Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanxi Yongdong Chemistry Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells carbon black and fine chemical products in China. The company is based in Yuncheng, China.

name: Beijing Aosaikang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Aosaikang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and sells pharmaceuticals, fine chemicals, and health-care products in China. It offers proton pump inhibitor injections and oncology medicines, as well as APIs. The company provides its products in digestive, oncology, antibiotic, cardiovascular, and other areas. Beijing Aosaikang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Yongxing Special Materials Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yongxing Special Materials Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells nickel alloys and stainless steel products in China and internationally. The company offers austenitic and duplex stainless steel round bars; stainless steel wire rods; and special alloys, including iron ultratek, ultratek, precision, and stainless steel alloys. Its products are primarily used in petrochemical, high-pressure boiler, nuclear power energy, equipment manufacturing, aerospace, and other industrial fields. The company was formerly known as Yongxing Special Stainless Steel Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yongxing Special Materials Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2019. Yongxing Special Materials Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Huzhou, China.

name: Nanxing Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanxing Machinery Co., Ltd. produces and sells furniture machinery and equipment in China and internationally. The company offers CNC machining centers and boring machines, computer panel saws and sliding table saws, single and double sided edge banding machines, multi boring machines, projects and production lines, package lines, automatic loading and unloading machines, changer machines, roller conveyors, and other related equipment. It also provides hydraulic cold press machines, shapers and routers, and lifting tables. In addition, it offers after-sale services. The company's products are used in the panel furniture industry, as well as in the fields of wooden chips boards, including doors, customer-made furniture, kitchen cabinets, exhibition display units, boat decoration, and others. The company was formerly known as Nanxing Furniture Machinery & Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nanxing Machinery Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Nanxing Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: ZJAMP Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zjamp Group Co., Ltd. engages in the production of pesticides and fertilizers. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Guangdong Tonze Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Tonze Electric Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells household and medical appliances in China. Its products include electric kettles, stew pots, rice cookers, electric cookers, steam cuisines, health pots, and yoghourt makers, as well as NTC thermistor temperature sensors. The company also offers medical instruments, such as digital thermometers and blood pressure monitors. Guangdong Tonze Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Anhui Fengxing Wear Resistant Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Fengxing Wear Resistant Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and technical services of metal casting wear-resistant materials primarily in the People's Republic of China. It offers grinding mediums, resistant steel products, mill liners, resist materials, hammer crushers, counterattack crushers, jaw crushers, and cooling machines. The company provides its products under the phoenix brand. Its products are used in metallurgical mining, building materials, cement, thermal power, and magnetic materials industries, as well as grinding materials production. The company also exports its products to Australia, the Philippines, Japan, Indonesia, South Korea, the United States, and other countries and regions. Anhui Fengxing Wear Resistant Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Ningguo, the People's Republic of China.

name: Dohia Group Co., Ltd
summary: Dohia Group Co., Ltd engages in the construction of municipal infrastructures. It also offers construction engineering, machinery equipment leasing, highway engineering, water conservancy, architectural decoration, and urban rail transit development services. The company was founded in 1949 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Jinfa Labi Maternity & Baby Articles Co., Ltd
summary: Jinfa Labi Maternity & Baby Articles Co., Ltd. engages in the design, research and development, production, and sale of infant and toddler cotton clothing and consumer products in China. It offers LABI BABY, a brand that targets mid-to-high-end infant and toddler consumer goods market with product categories ranging from apparel cotton to maternal and infant daily necessities; I LOVE BABY, a mid-range infant consumer brand for apparel cotton; and BABY LABI brand that offers baby care products made from plant-derived raw materials. The company markets and sells its products through a network of approximately 1,400 brand stores. Jinfa Labi Maternity & Baby Articles Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd. produces and sells underwear in China. The company also provides swimwear and accessories. It offers underwear products for men, women, and chidren under the Mannifen, Ives, Lan Zhuoli, Plus One Shangpin, Qiao Baishi, Body Beauty, Secret Weapon, and Mr. Potato brands. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Manni Fen Knitwear Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd. in July 2011. Shenzhen Huijie Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd.
summary: Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. primarily engages in the research, design, development, manufacture, and sale of power transmission assemblies, transmission parts, and die-casting products for the automotive, textile machinery, and general machinery markets in China. It offers manual, automatic, and new energy transmission assemblies; automotive transmission gears, engine gears, engine blocks, and steering gear housings; balance boxes and shafts; synchronizers, transmission housings, mechanical die-cast parts, transmission cases/cylinders, tooth products, and other components; and textile machinery components. The company also develops, produces, and sells touch screens, touch display integrated modules, capacitive touch screens, and touch display modules and cover glasses. Its touch sensors are primarily used in information terminals, such as tablet and notebook computers, industrial control terminals, automotive electronics, and IoT smart devices, as well as touch input interfaces. The company also exports its products to the Middle East. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Landai Powertrain Corp., Ltd. and changed its name to Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. in October 2020. Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Chongqing, China.

name: Shenzhen Soling Industrial Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Soling Industrial Co.,Ltd provides car networking hardware and software services. Its products include MWR, HUD, rear-view mirror, ADAS, DVR, back seat infotainment device, TPMS, 360 monitor, telematics, bcaking camera, full LCD cluster, MIFI, t-box, OBD, IVI, and anti-fatigue system.
