The company offers IVI systems for passenger car infotainment systems and commercial vehicle products; and tire pressure monitoring systems. It also provides IOV management platform for vehicle data monitoring, fault reminder, location tracking, in-car entertainment, maintenance reminder, location sharing, electric vehicle management, vehicle remote control, collision reminder, real-time detection, car friends group, address book interaction, electric vehicle international and landmark docking, and overall security management. The company offers its products to approximately 30 provinces and cities in China; and approximately 60 countries and regions in Europe, the United States, and Southeast Asia. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hangzhou Innover Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Innover Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of intelligent metering systems for the gas, water, and heat supply industries in China. The company offers multi-layer Internet of Things interactive metering platforms, Internet of Things interactive metering platforms, peer-to-peer interactive metering platforms, and IC card prepaid metering platforms, as well as city gas intelligent metering network charging system solutions. Hangzhou Innover Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Prolto Supply Chain Management Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Prolto Supply Chain Management Co.,Ltd. provides supply chain management solutions in China and internationally. The company offers supply chain design and optimization, procurement and distribution, inventory management, fund settlement, customs clearance and logistics, and information system and other support services. It is also involved in the provision of payment services; and medical equipment and financial leasing activities. In addition, the company operates B2B service platform in line with customer needs in ICT field; offers import supply chain management, export logistics, and import and export trade services, as well as supply chain financial products; and supplies cosmetics and beauty make-up products. It sells its products through e-commerce platforms, as well as through its own stores on the platform. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Henan Kedi Dairy Co.,Ltd.
summary: Henan Kedi Dairy Co.,Ltd. produces and sells dairy products in China. It primarily offers Lee Le brick, Gabriel package, love Kelin, roof package, ultra-high temperature sterilization, and pasteurized milk products. The company also provides yogurt and bottled water. Henan Kedi Dairy Co.,Ltd. is based in Shangqiu, China.

name: Beijing Transtrue Technology Inc.
summary: Beijing Transtrue Technology Inc. provides information technology and integrated multimedia video solutions in the areas of energy, government, finance, transportation, education, and others in China. The company's multimedia information systems include integrated communication systems, VR simulation systems, multi-functional conference systems, remote cooperation systems, conference management systems, and dynamic environment monitoring systems; and production monitoring and emergency command systems comprise emergency plan Pcals, surveillance and warning systems, exercise systems, security systems, and command systems. It also provides consultation, design, research and development, integration, and other services; one-stop cloud data center services; and data visualization services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Tianshui Zhongxing Bio-technology Co.,Ltd.

It offers mushrooms under the Xi Huang, N√É¬ºwa, and Zhongxing and other brands. The company was formerly known as Tianshui Zhongxing Bio-technology Ltd. and changed its name to Tianshui Zhongxing Bio-technology Co.,Ltd. in March 2012. Tianshui Zhongxing Bio-technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tianshui, the People's Republic of China.

name: Chengdu Kanghong Pharmaceuticals Group Co., Ltd
summary: Chengdu Kanghong Pharmaceuticals Group Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and sale of biological products, Chinese medicines, and chemical drugs in China. It offers ophthalmic system, central nervous system, digestive system, and other system drugs. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: IFE Elevators Co., Ltd.
summary: IFE Elevators Co.,LTD. engages in the research and development, design, production, installation, and after-sales service of elevators and escalators for residential, commercial, and public applications worldwide. It offers passenger, home, high-speed, panoramic, hospital, freight, and car elevators; and escalators/moving walks. The company was formerly known as Dongguan IFE Elevators Co., Ltd. and changed its name to IFE Elevators Co.,LTD. in 2011. IFE Elevators Co.,LTD. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.

name: Shenzhen Wenke Landscape Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Wenke Landscape Co., Ltd. engages in planning and designing landscape architectures in China. It operates through Design and R&D, Landscape and Engineering, Eco-Environment, PPP Investment, and Cultural Tourism divisions. The company is involved in the research and development of ecological technology and sponge city; and tourism planning and design. It also engages in the garden landscape projects, municipal public works, and landscape architecture projects; and water environment management, human settlements remediation, and soil pollution remediation activities. In addition, the company invests and finances PPP projects; and invests, constructs, and operates Flower Expo parks. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangdong Bobaolon Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Bobaolon Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the apparel design, fabric research and development, and organization production activities in China and internationally. It also provides industrial chain, capital, and training and education support services to designers; and integrates buyers, materials suppliers, ready-to-wear production enterprises, and consumers. The company was formerly known as Puning Bobaolon Clothing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Bobaolon Co.,Ltd. in April 2009. Guangdong Bobaolon Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Puning, China.

name: Sichuan Jiuyuan Yinhai Software Co.,Ltd
summary: Sichuan Jiuyuan Yinhai Software Co., Ltd provides livelihood and military-civilian integration services for livelihood and military-civilian industries. The company is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Jiangsu Gaoke Petrochemical Co., Ltd

The company offers gasoline engine, diesel engine, construction machinery, industrial, transformer, vehicle gear, motorcycle, antifreeze, and auxiliary oils, as well as other lubricant products. Jiangsu Gaoke Petrochemical Co., Ltd is based in Yixing, China.

name: Zhejiang Zhongjian Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Zhongjian Technology Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells outdoor power garden machinery primarily in China. Its products include petrol chain saws, grass trimmers and brush cutters, lawn tractors, petrol hedge trimmers, blowers, generators, and Li-ion series products. The company was formerly known as Yongkang Zhongjian Tools Manufacture Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhejiang Zhongjian Technology Co., Ltd in December 2010. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Yongkang, China. Zhejiang Zhongjian Technology Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Zhongjian Electromechanical Group Co., Ltd.

Beijing Sanfo Outdoor Products Co., Ltd was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shenzhen Qixin Group Co., Ltd.

The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Qixin Construction Group Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Shenzhen Qixin Group Co., Ltd. in July 2019. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Click Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Click Technology Co., Ltd. designs, produces, sells, and services LED lighting power supplies, power battery chargers, communication power supplies, adapters, magnetic components, electric car chargers, charging piles, inverters, and others in the People's Republic of China. The company also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Australia, South America, and other Asian countries and regions. Shenzhen Click Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

Hubei Kailong Chemical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is based in Jingmen, China.

name: Xiamen Wanli Stone Stock Co.,Ltd

It also designs, processes, sells, and installs architectural decorative stone and landscape stone. The company's products are used in airports, railways, hotels and other large public buildings, commercial office buildings, and residences; interior and exterior decoration of buildings; and gardens, cemeteries, engineering stones, and other public places, as well as tombstone gardens, monuments, and other fields. It serves customers in China, Japan, South Korea, the United States, Southeast Asia, South Africa, Algeria, Singapore, rest of Africa, the European Union, and internationally. name: Shenzhen Jianyi Decoration Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Jianyi Decoration Group Co., Ltd., a professional design agency, engages in the architectural design planning, interior design, and decorative engineering design activities. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

Xiamen R&T Plumbing Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Xiamen, China.

Additionally, the company offers consulting services to the architectural industry. It also exports its products to approximately 100 countries. Its primary products include various kinds of base station antennas; microwave antennas; small/low profile antennas; RF components; and indoor and outdoor antennas, as well as small cells. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Zhongshan, China.

Luoxin Pharmaceuticals Group Stock Co., Ltd. is based in Linyi, China.

name: RH
summary: RH, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a retailer in the home furnishings. name: Suzhou Shijia Science & Technology Inc.
summary: Suzhou Shijia Science & Technology Inc. offers elevator system products, metal plate systems, and electrical assembly products. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Yantai China Pet Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Yantai China Pet Foods Co., Ltd. produces and sells pet food products in China. It offers treats, wet foods, dry foods, biscuits, dental chews, cat litter, etc. primarily under the Wanpy, Natural farm, Dr.Hao, Jerky Time, Ai chong si chu, and cui cui xiang brands for dogs and cats. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries worldwide. Yantai China Pet Foods Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Keli Motor Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Keli Motor Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells micro motors in China. The company offers single-phase shaded pole motors, single-phase universal motors, step motors, cross flow blowers, DC brushless motors, servo systems, reduction gear motors, and pumps. These motors are used in microwave oven, exhaust fan, oven, fan heater, electric fireplace, air conditioner, food processor, hair dryer, air pump, vacuum cleaner, paper shredder, air pump, water pump (dishwasher washer pump and draining pump), garden tools, electric tools, household appliances, printer, scanner, lighting, camera-control monitor, other IT lines, and industrial control equipment. Keli Motor Group Co., Ltd. also exports its products to the United States, Germany, Italy, Spain, Poland, Australia, Turkey, Syria, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Hunan Keli Motor Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Keli Motor Group Co., Ltd. in May 2019. Keli Motor Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Beijing Huayuanyitong Thermal Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Huayuanyitong Thermal Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the heating business in China. It is involved in heating project investment, heating contracting operation, contract energy management, heating and energy-saving technology research and development activities, as well as provides heating management consulting services. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Guizhou Chanhen Chemical Corporation
summary: Guizhou Chanhen Chemical Corporation produces and markets phosphate products in China. The company offers industrial grade and food grade phosphoric acids, monocalcium phosphate feed additives, phosphorus gypsum building materials, and fire protective ammonium phosphate and polyphosphate products. It also provides fertilizers, such as ammonium polyphosphate, customized specification, ammonium phosphate, monoammonium phosphate, and monopotassium phosphate products. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Fuquan, China.

name: Ningbo ZhongDa Leader Intelligent Transmission Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo ZhongDa Leader Intelligent Transmission Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells motor transmission, micro motor, and high precision gearbox products in China and internationally. It offers RV planetary gear boxes, high precision planetary gearboxes, transmission planetary gearboxes, DC brushless gear motors, hypoid gear motors, roller motors, AC and DC gear motors, small AC gear motors, electric forklift gear motors, power assisted steering and driving wheel gear motors, automatic door motors and sweeping gear motors, and controllers. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Cixi, China.

name: Wenzhou Yihua Connector Co., Ltd.
summary: Wenzhou Yihua Connector Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electronic connectors in China. It offers network connectors, consumer electronic connectors and wire harness products, optical transceivers, and power and automotive connectors, as well as wired jacks and transformer series connectors. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Yueqing, China.

name: Zhuhai Sailong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Sailong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. principally engages in the fields of neuroprotective agents and treatment of diseases of the aged. The company is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Impulse (Qingdao) Health Tech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Impulse (Qingdao) Health Tech Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells fitness equipment worldwide. It offers treadmills, upright and recumbent bikes, and indoor cycles; and elliptical, strength, group training, and outdoor fitness equipment. The company also provides after-sales services. It serves fitness clubs, hotels, military and police units, enterprises, institutions, and families. The company is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Harbin Medisan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Harbin Medisan Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells chemical formulations in China. It offers Araxetan, alanyl glutamine, brain protein hydrolyzate, ligustrazine hydrochloride, bone peptide, Yanhuning, glucose, and sodium chloride injections, as well as rice nitrogen tablets, valsartan dispersible tablets, and other drugs for use in the various indications comprising nervous system, cardiovascular and cerebrovascular, musculoskeletal, systemic anti-infective, regulating water, electrolyte and acid-base balance, nutritional supplements, and other medical fields. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Harbin, China.

name: Dongguan Mentech Optical & Magnetic Co., Ltd.
summary: Dongguan Mentech Optical & Magnetic Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells magnetic and optical components/modules for data communication industries in China and internationally. The company offers optical transceivers and components; energy equipment, including telecommunication power supply systems, PV power supply systems, power distribution equipment, and telecommunication power modules; and high speed IO and RJ connectors. It also provides magnetic components, such as telecom and power magnetic components and multilayer inductance; and consumer power supply products comprising adapters and chargers. The company's products are used in the access network, backbone, metro, fiber optic switch, fiber optic transceiver, digital television, optical communication, motherboard, network switch, router, set-top box, and network data communication industries. Dongguan Mentech Optical & Magnetic Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.

name: Yuhuan CNC Machine Tool Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yuhuan CNC Machine Tool Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, and services CNC machine tools for grinding and polishing in China, Taiwan, Vietnam, Portugal, Russia, Kenya, Brazil, and internationally. The company offers double surface, camshaft, and valve grinders; single, double, and complex surface lapping/polishing machines; intelligent equipment, including MT line, packing, and microelectronics automation equipment; and piston rings equipment, as well as magnetic polishing and disc grinding machines. Its products have applications in the areas of automotive, IT electronics, bearings, seals, household appliances, and others. The company was formerly known as Hunan Yuhuan Tongxin Numerical Control Machine Tool Co., Ltd. Yuhuan CNC Machine Tool Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Guangzhou Jinyi Media Corporation
summary: Guangzhou Jinyi Media Corporation engages in the theater operation and film related businesses in China. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Jin Yi Movie Investment Group Company Limited and changed its name to Guangzhou Jinyi Media Corporation in December 2010. Guangzhou Jinyi Media Corporation was founded in 2004 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Foryou Corporation
summary: Foryou Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the automotive electronics, precision electronic components, precision die casting, and LED lighting businesses in China and internationally. The company offers car electronics, which include car audio, video, interconnection, and navigation products, as well as driving assistance systems, digital clusters, streaming-media rearview mirrors, 360√Ç¬∞around views, head-up display products, car climate controllers, car air purifiers, vehicle cameras, and wireless charging and tire pressure monitoring systems. It also provides precision electronic components, such as mechanisms, smart projectors, and optical pick up heads and components; and precision die casting products, including automotive parts and components, precision 3C components, etc. In addition, the company offers LED lighting products comprising LED packages, power, lamps, etc. Foryou Corporation was founded in 1993 and is based in Huizhou, China.

name: Chongqing Pharscin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Pharscin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of drugs in China. The company offers tablets, powders, granules, hard capsules, soft capsules, powder injections, freeze-dried powder injections, small volume injections, API synthesis, and botanical drug extractions. It provides its products in the areas of CNS, digestion, otolaryngology, oncology, cardiovascular, and cerebrovascular related diseases. The company is headquartered in Chongqing, China.

name: Guangdong Tecsun Science & Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Tecsun Science & Technology Co.,Ltd. provides information system construction and related operational services for human society, employment, finance, medical care, big data, etc. It offers social security card production and issuance, application environment construction, and operation services, as well as social security card solutions and card making services. The company also provides personal services, such as employment, subsidy issuance, and cards replacement services. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Guangzhou Jointas Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Jointas Chemical Co., Ltd. produces and sells sealants and coatings in China. The company offers acetic silicone, door and window, structural, insulating glass, two-component, polyurethane, test, weather-proof, glass, and automobile/ship sealants, as well as sealants for construction and freight container applications. It also provides water-based latex and anti-corrosion paints, as well as asphalt undercoating products. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Lanzhou Zhuangyuan Pasture Co., Ltd.
summary: Lanzhou Zhuangyuan Pasture Co., Ltd. manufactures, markets, and sells dairy products in China. The company operates through two segments, Dairy Farming and Dairy Products Production. It offers liquid milk products comprising pasteurized milk, UHT temperature milk, modified milk, yogurt, and other dairy products; and milk beverage products. The company markets its products to retail chains, supermarkets, and local schools through distributors, sales agents, and direct sale. Lanzhou Zhuangyuan Pasture Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Lanzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Foran Energy Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Foran Energy Group Co.,Ltd. transports and sells natural gas in China. The company designs and constructs gas pipeline projects; and offers gas engineering services. It holds franchised gas pipeline rights in 4 districts. The company was formerly known as Foshan Gas Group Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Foran Energy Group Co.,Ltd. in March 2020. Foran Energy Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.

name: Shenzhen Sinovatio Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sinovatio Technology Co., Ltd. provides intelligent management and security protection solutions for communication and information networks worldwide. The company offers network and machine data visualization products, such as data aggregation and distribution management products for broadband Internet; data collection and data analysis products for mobile access networks; machine data collection products; network content security products for international markets; big data operation platform, etc., as well as DPI products and business intelligence enterprise solutions. It also provides technical solution consulting services; project implementation supporting services; remote technical support services; onsite fault handling technical services; technical material services; software upgrade services; network regular inspection services; onsite duty support services; and technical training services. The company serves government, operators, and industry customers. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Sinovatio Technology Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Sinovatio Technology Co., Ltd. in March 2015. Shenzhen Sinovatio Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: AoshikangTechnologyCo. ,Ltd
summary: Aoshikang Technology Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and sale of printed circuit boards in Asia, Europe, and the Americas. The company offers double-sided and multi-layer printed circuit boards. Its products are used in computer, consumer electronics, communications equipment, automotive electronics, industrial control and medical electronics, and other fields. The company was formerly known as Aoshikang Technology (Yiyang) Co., Ltd. Aoshikang Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 2005 and is based in Yiyang, China.

name: Zhejiang Zhongxin Fluoride Materials Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Zhongxin Fluoride Materials Co., Ltd engages in the research, manufacture, and sale of fluorine fine chemicals in China. The company offers fluorine-containing cyanobenzene, benzoic acid, phenol, phenylcarbinol, phenylamine, nitrobenzene, and fluorine-containing arene series products, as well as acetophenone, heterocyclic ring, and other series products. Its fluorine chemicals cover medical intermediates, pesticide intermediates, new materials, and electronic chemicals. The company also exports its products to Germany, Japan, and India. Zhejiang Zhongxin Fluoride Materials Co., Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Shaoxing, China.

name: Shennan Circuit Company Limited
summary: Shennan Circuit Company Limited designs, manufactures, and sells printed circuit boards, packaging substrates, and electronic assemblies in China and internationally. The company was formerly known as CATIC Shenzhen Shennan Circuit Company and changed its name to Shennan Circuit Company Limited in January 2000. Shennan Circuit Company Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Monalisa Group CO.,Ltd
summary: Monalisa Group CO.,Ltd develops, produces, and markets various wall and floor tiles, porcelain panels, and ceramic art products. It offers eco stones and glazed tiles. The company sells its products under the MONALISA and QD brand through approximately 3,000 shops in China and approximately 400 marketing networks covering approximately 100 countries and regions. Monalisa Group CO.,Ltd was founded in 1992 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: Mingchen Health Co.,Ltd.
summary: Mingchen Health Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of personal health care supplies in China. It offers anti-dandruff shampoos and conditioners, and lotions. It offers its products under the Tihuaxiu, MeiWang, YiCai, High-tech Health, Green effect, and Likoujian brand names. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Ming Chen Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Mingchen Health Co., Ltd. Mingchen Health Co., Ltd was founded in 1994 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Huizhou Desay SV Automotive Co., Ltd.
summary: Huizhou Desay SV Automotive Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of automotive electronic products in China and internationally. It offers in-vehicle infotainment systems, climate control systems, driver information display systems, automotive display modules/systems, and driver assistance systems. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Huizhou, the People's Republic of China. Huizhou Desay SV Automotive Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Continental Automotive UK Ltd.

name: Shandong Liancheng Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd
summary: Shandong Liancheng Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of iron casts and aluminum alloys in China and internationally. Its products are used in passenger cars, commercial vehicles, engineering/agricultural machinery, hydraulic machinery, commercial air conditioning, medical equipment, environmental equipment, high-speed rail, and solar energy industries and fields. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jining, China.

name: Eaglerise Electric & Electronic (China) Co., Ltd
summary: Eaglerise Electric & Electronic (China) Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells products and solutions of power supply and components in China and internationally. The company offers LED drivers, LED application products, switching power supply products, power supply transformers, inductors, special type transformers, reactors, and distribution transformers. Its products are used in applications, such as lighting, new energy, electricity utility, industrial control, etc. The company was formerly known as Eaglerise Electric & Electronic (Foshan) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Eaglerise Electric & Electronic (China) Co., Ltd. in 2011. Eaglerise Electric & Electronic (China) Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.

name: Zhuhai Rundu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Rundu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of pharmaceutical ingredients for cardiovascular, gastrointestinal, CNS, and anesthesia. It offers APIs, intermediates, and pellets, as well as formulations in the forms of capsules, tablets, and injections. The company serves in the United States, Germany, Spain, Holland, Slovenia, Argentina, Brazil, Honduras, Japan, Korea, India, Jordan, Syria, Saudi Arabia, Algeria, Tunisia, Egypt, etc. Zhuhai Rundu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Xiamen Intretech Inc.
summary: Xiamen Intretech Inc. designs, produces, and sells intelligent control components, consumer electronic products, and intelligent manufacturing solutions in China and internationally. It offers smart factory solutions; smart home solutions, such as smart security, lighting, player, energy saving, and environment solutions; and smart vehicle products. The company also provides smart solutions consisting of test systems; industrial robots; and automation and informatization solutions for the electronics, food and beverage, petro-chemistry, mechanical, iron and steel, automobile, communications equipment, semiconductor, medical, furniture industries, etc. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Guizhou Taiyong-Changzheng Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guizhou Taiyong-Changzheng Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells low-voltage circuit breakers in China. The company offers universal, plastic case, molded case leakage protection, and miniature circuit breakers; and medium and low voltage dual power conversion switch electrical appliances, industrial and fire pump controllers, electrical fire monitoring products, etc. It offers its products in railway, airport, hospital, highway, finance, petrochemical, power grid, telecommunication, energy, real estate construction, and other fields. The company was formerly known as Guizhou Changzheng Switch Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guizhou Taiyong-Changzheng Technology Co., Ltd. in October 2015. Guizhou Taiyong-Changzheng Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Zunyi, China. The company is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Yongtai Technology Co., Ltd.

name: Runjian Co., Ltd.
summary: Runjian Co., Ltd. engages in the communication network construction business in China. The company offers communication network engineering, design, construction, and operation and management services; and information technology and communication integration, and cloud and data center services. It also provides communication technology application research and development, and big data application services, as well as industry information platform, communication equipment hardware, and other smart city solutions. The company was formerly known as Runjian Communication Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Runjian Co., Ltd. in April 2019. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Guangdong Great River Smarter Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Great River Smarter Logistics Co., Ltd., a logistics company, provides warehousing and other related services for petrochemical product manufacturers, traders, and end users in China and internationally. Its services include loading and unloading, warehousing, transfer, and logistics chain management. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Dongguan City, China.

name: Zhejiang Fenglong Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Fenglong Electric Co., Ltd. develops, designs, manufactures, and sells components and parts for garden equipment and automotive industries in China. It offers ignition coils, flywheels, and cylinders for use in various garden power tools, such as trimmers, chainsaws, and hedge trimmers; ABS valves, thermostat covers, and tensioners that are used in automotive systems comprising transmission, brake, and thermostat systems; and other components. The company also exports its products. It primarily operates under the Fenglong brand name. The company serves garden power manufacturers and automotive enterprises. Zhejiang Fenglong Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Shangyu, China.

name: Wuhan Easy Diagnosis Biomedicine Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wuhan EasyDiagnosis Biomedicine Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of in vitro and POCT rapid diagnostic reagents and related equipment in China and internationally. It offers products in the areas of cardiovascular, kidney, infectious, diabetes, endocrine and metabolic, obstetrics and gynecology, and eugenics diseases, as well as health inspection and other products; and chemiluminescence detection kit and analyzers, blood gas analyzers, mobile electrocardiography, and molecular diagnosis products. The company is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Chengdu Spaceon Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Spaceon Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, production, and marketing of time frequency solutions and satellite applications in China and internationally. The company offers atomic clocks, crystal components, RF/MW modules, frequency assemblies and modules, time synchronization systems, etc., as well as Bei Dou satellite applications. It provides its products for use in space, satellite navigation, military and defence, and telecommunication fields. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Bank of Zhengzhou Co., Ltd.
summary: Bank of Zhengzhou Co., Ltd. provides commercial banking services in China. These services include deposit taking, lending, and other financial services. The bank is headquartered in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Avary Holding (Shenzhen) Co., Limited
summary: Avary Holding (Shenzhen) Co., Limited engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of printed circuit boards primarily in China. Its products are used in communication, consumer electronic and computer, and automotive electronics and industrial control industries. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang AngLiKang Pharmaceutical CO.,LTD.
summary: Zhejiang Anglikang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. produces and sells bulk pharmaceutical materials, pharmaceutic preparations, and medical empty capsules. The company offers pharmaceutical preparations, such as Levamlodipine Besylate, Levofloxacin Hydrochloride, Nifedipine sustain-released, Cefaclor sustained-release, Cefpodoxime Proxetil tablets, as well as Cefaclor capsules and granules. It also provides APLs, including Cefradine, Cefalexin, Cefradine sterile with L-arginine, Cefadroxil, Cefaclor, Cefixime, Doxofylline, Oryzanol, Telmisartan, and 7-Amino-3-methyl-3-cephem-4-carboxylic acid, as well as Ketoleucine, Ketovaine, D, L-Ketoisoleucine, D, L-a-Hydroxymethionine, and Ketone phenylalanine calcium. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shengzhou, China.

name: Zhejiang XinNong Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang XinNong Chemical Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells pesticides and pharmaceutical intermediates in China. It also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Europe, the United States, Australia, and Africa. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Hunan Yujing Machinery Co.,Ltd
summary: Hunan Yujing Machinery Co., Ltd designs, develops, manufactures, and sells lapping/polishing machines, multi-wire saws, and relevant spare parts. The company offers multi wire saw machines, double-side lapping/polishing machines, single-side lapping/polishing machines, and consumable parts. It serves mobile touch screen, solar photovoltaic, magnetic materials, and sapphire industries. Hunan Yujing Machinery Co., Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Yiyang, China.

name: ChinaLin Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: ChinaLin Securities Co., Ltd. engages in the securities business in China. It is involved in securities brokerage, investment banking, asset management, investment management, and credit business activities. The company offers accounts; trading intermediary services; financial management products and services; capital market solutions, including restricted stock management and corporate refinancing; margin financing and securities lending, equity pledge, and contracted securities trading; and hedging solutions. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Suzhou Hengmingda Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Hengmingda Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the design, research and development, production, and sale of consumer electronic functional devices. The company's principal products are precision functional devices for consumer electronics products. Its products are used in mobile phones, tablet and notebook computers, smart wearable devices, and other consumer electronic products and components. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Kunshan, China.

name: Shenzhen Capol International & Associates Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Capol International & Associates Co., Ltd provides architectural design services. It also offers urban planning, engineering cost consulting, industrialization research and design, BIM design and consulting, EPC project general contracting and whole process engineering consulting, agency construction management, construction services, and prefabricated component development and manufacturing services. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Allmed Medical Products Co., Ltd
summary: Allmed Medical Products Co., Ltd engages in the research and development, manufacture, and distribution of medical dressings and other disposable medical supplies in the People's Republic of China. The company offers general wound care products, such as elastic and adhesive bandage, oil emulsion, xeroform gauze, woven gauze swabs, fluffy bandages/sponges, abdominal pads, gauze/non-woven drain sponges, post-op sponges, eye pads, cotton filled exodontia sponges, non-stick pads, and petrolatum gauze dressing. It also provides OR/surgery products, including X-ray non-woven swabs, OR towels, laparotomy and neuro sponges, and X-ray detectable gauze balls and nonwoven balls; various kits; and patient care products comprising disposable nursing pads and disposable drapes. In addition, the company exports its products to the United States, Canada, Germany, Japan, the Middle East, and internationally. Allmed Medical Products Co., Ltd was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Sichuan Jinshi Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Sichuan Jinshi Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of cigarette labels for cigarette manufacturers in China. The company is based in Chengdu, China.

name: GuangDong Rifeng Electric Cable Co., Ltd.
summary: GuangDong Rifeng Electric Cable Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of cables in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company provides rubber cables, housing wires, PVC/LSOH cables, power cables, instrumentation cables, shipboard and marine cables, plugs and connectors, control cables, heavy machinery cables, communication cables, connector cables, and power cords. Its products are used in household appliances, electrical engineering, petroleum chemical industry, metallurgy, construction machinery, communications engineering, wind power, environmental protection engineering, dam embankment engineering, instrumentation, computer communications, control, and other fields. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Zhongshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hitevision Co., Ltd.
summary: Hitevision Co., Ltd. develops and manufactures multi-media audio visual solutions worldwide. The company offers unified collaboration solutions, such as InGlassTM, PCAP, and infrared touch technology solutions, as well as integration of audio and video, and stylish design fits; interactive education solutions; and OC module and optical bonding technology solutions. It serves customers in education and audio visual industry. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Guilin Seamild Foods Co., Ltd
summary: Guilin Seamild Foods Co., Ltd, a health food company, engages in the research, development, production, and management of oat products. It offers Australian green oatmeal. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Guilin, China.

name: Shenzhen Colibri Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Colibri Technologies Co., Ltd. engages in the production, sale, and technical service of automation equipment and precision parts in China. It offers automated testing and assembly equipment; and automated equipment accessories, such as regular testing machine pallets, smart phone testing platform fixtures, antenna wavelength testing fixtures, and ABT press switch fixtures. The company also provides precision machining, tools, and dies, including high-speed grinders high-speed turning, milling, boring machines, electrical discharge machines, low-speed cutters, coordinate measuring machines, alimeters, CNC turning centers, and CNC machining centers. Its products are used in communication, clean energy, e-cigarette, automotive, HDD, medical and health, and logistic applications. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Qingdao Rural Commercial Bank Corporation
summary: Qingdao Rural Commercial Bank Corporation provides various banking products and services in China. The company accepts various deposits, such as call deposits and settlement accounts, current and fixed deposits, corporate agreement accounts, margin deposits, non-resident accounts, and foreign exchange accounts. Its loan products include housing decoration and home appliance consumer loans; and bank acceptances, small business credit union revolving credit loans, and commercial acceptance bill discounts. The company also offers various cards; middle services comprising phone bill, finance and tax, and insurance services; and foreign exchange, international settlement, trade finance, forex, cross-border RMB trade, and domestic L/C services, as well as phone, SMS, mobile, and self-banking services. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Qingdao, China.

name: Jade Bird Fire Co., Ltd.
summary: Jade Bird Fire Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells professional fire-safe electronic products and fire safety systems in China and internationally. The company offers household fire alarm systems, automatic fire alarm and linkage control systems, gas fire extinguishing systems, electrical fire monitoring systems, fire door monitoring systems, fire equipment power monitoring systems, wireless wide area intelligent fire protection systems, fire cloud data centres, flammable gas alarm systems, gas fire extinguishing systems, fire emergency lighting and evacuation indication systems, bus type toxic and harmful gas detection and alarm systems, and fire alarm systems. Its products are used in Zhongnanhai, Beijing Olympic Games, Shanghai World Expo, and Guangzhou Asian Games. The company was formerly known as Beida Jade Bird Universal Fire Alarm Device Co., Ltd and changed its name to Jade Bird Fire Co., Ltd. in November 2019. Jade Bird Fire Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Ruida Futures Co., Ltd.
summary: Ruida Futures Co., Ltd. operates as a futures company in China. The company offers stock index and commodity futures, options, crude oil futures, and brokerage services; and investment advisory, risk management, and asset management services. It also operates a futures college; and provides real estate development services. The company was formerly known as Futures Brokerage Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ruida Futures Co., Ltd. in November 2012. Ruida Futures Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Hubei W-olf Photoelectric Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei W-olf Photoelectric Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of precision photoelectric film components in China. The company's principal products include infrared cut-off filters and biometric filters. Its products are primarily used in digital imaging fields, such as phone cameras, computer built-in cameras, car cameras, and security cameras. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Jingzhou City, China.

name: Haoersai Technology Group Corp., Ltd.
summary: Haoersai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. specializes in architectural and landscape lighting design and engineering services. The company undertakes architectural lighting design and construction projects for Fortune 500 enterprises, and Chinese ministries and commissions. The company was formerly known as HES Technology Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haoersai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. in May 2020. Haoersai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Lucky Harvest Co.,Ltd.
summary: Lucky Harvest Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of precision stamping dies and structural metal parts in China. Its products include home appliance accessories, auto accessories, mold parts, power cabinet accessories, aluminum parts, communication device accessories, chassis cabinets, kitchen utensils, and energy conservation and emission reduction parts. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Dongguan City, China.

name: Guang Zhou GRG Metrology & Test Co., Ltd.
summary: Guang Zhou GRG Metrology & Test Co., Ltd. operates as a third-party metrology and testing company. Its services include metrology and calibration; electromagnetic compatibility testing; chemical analysis; reliability and environmental testing; environmental monitoring; and food detection. The company serves petrochemical, communication, aviation, automotive, electric power, medicine, electrical and electronic devices, shipping, and rail transit industries. It was formerly known as Guangzhou Guangdian Metrology Testing Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guang Zhou GRG Metrology & Test Co., Ltd. in November 2011. The company was founded in 1964 and is based in Guangzhou City, China. Guang Zhou GRG Metrology & Test Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Guangzhou Radio Group Co., Ltd.

name: Chongqing New Dazheng Property Group Co.,Ltd.

name: Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley, a financial holding company, provides various financial products and services to corporations, governments, financial institutions, and individuals in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. The company operates through Institutional Securities, Wealth Management, and Investment Management segments. The Institutional Securities segment offers capital raising and financial advisory services, including services related to the underwriting of debt, equity, and other securities, as well as advice on mergers and acquisitions, restructurings, real estate, and project finance. This segment also provides sales and trading services, such as sales, financing, prime brokerage, and market-making services in equity and fixed income products consisting of foreign exchange and commodities; corporate and commercial real estate loans, which provides secured lending facilities and financing for sales and trading customers, as well as asset-backed and mortgage lending; and wealth management services, investment, and research services. The Wealth Management segment offers various financial services and solutions covering brokerage and investment advisory services; financial and wealth planning services; stock plan administration services; annuity and insurance products; securities-based lending, residential real estate loans, and other lending products; and banking and retirement plan services to individual investors and small to medium-sized businesses and institutions. The Investment Management segment provides various investment strategies and products comprising equity, fixed income, liquidity, and alternative/other products to benefit/defined contribution plans, foundations, endowments, government entities, sovereign wealth funds, insurance companies, and third-party fund sponsors and corporations through institutional and intermediary channels. The company was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

name: E.ON SE
summary: E.ON SE operates as an energy company in Germany, the United Kingdom, Sweden, Turkey, the Netherlands, Belgium, rest of Europe, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Energy Networks and Customer Solutions. The Energy Networks segment operates power and gas distribution networks, as well as provides maintenance, repairs, and related services. The Customer Solutions segment supplies power, gas, and heat, as well as with products and services that enhance energy efficiency to residential, small and medium-sized enterprises, large commercial and industrial, sales partners, and public entities. In addition, the company operates, generates, and dismantles nuclear power stations in Germany and Turkey. Further, it provides SmartSim, a software solution that allows renewable gases to be fed into gas grids; gas quality tracking solutions; GasPro, a mobile gas sample collector; and GasCalc, a software that calculates natural gases, LNG, and biogases properties. E.ON SE has a strategic partnership with Kraken Technologies to use Kraken Technologies' technology platform to transform the United Kingdom's business with residential and small and medium enterprise customers. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Essen, Germany.

name: Konka Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Konka Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, produces, and sells electronic products in China and internationally. It offers televisions, refrigerators, washing machines, personal electronic appliances, and kitchen and bathroom appliances; and home AV, IPTV set-top boxes, OTT terminals, digital TV receivers, digital products, wearable and health products, electric products and switch plugs, power banks, mobile communication equipment and terminal products, daily-use and automotive electronic products, satellite navigation and transportation systems, fire-fighting and security systems, office equipment, computers, displays, and large screen display systems. The company also provides LED back light, illumination, and light-emitting devices; packaging products; Touch TV AIO wireless broadcasting television transiting equipment; and emergency broadcast system equipment, electronic parts and components, molds, plastic and rubber products, packing materials, security and monitoring products, wireless and cable digital television systems and system integration services, and technical consultancy and after-sale paid services. In addition, it engages in the provision of wholesale, retail, import and export, and relevant support services of the aforesaid products; maintenance and technical consultant services for electronic products; ordinary cargo transportation, domestic and international freight forwarding, and warehousing services; management of supply chain; consultancy on enterprise management; self-owned property leasing and management services; and outsourcing services of information technology and business procedures, as well as recovers waste electrical appliances and electronic products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Konka Electronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Konka Group Co., Ltd. in August 1995. Konka Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

summary: Shenzhen China Bicycle Company (Holdings) Limited engages in the production, assembly, purchase, and sale of bicycles and electric bicycles. It offers bicycles under the EMMELLE brand. Shenzhen China Bicycle Company (Holdings) Limited is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the wholesale and retail, food processing and manufacturing, and leasing and commerce service businesses in the People's Republic of China. The company wholesales and retails rice, wheat, rice in the husk, corn, sorghum, and cooking oil and other grains and oil, as well as sells fine tea, beverage, and condiment; processes flour, rice, cooking oil, tea and natural plants, beverage and condiments etc.; and provides import and export trade, warehousing and storage, logistics and distribution, and quality inspection and information technology services; and property leasing and management, and commerce operation management services. It offers bread flour under Jinchangman, Yingshanhong, and Hongli brands; cake and steamed bun flour under Clivia and Canna brand names; high-gluten and biscuit flour under the Sunflower brand; caramel treats flour under Feiyu brand; moon cake flour and other various flour under Yuejixiang brand; rice products under Shenliang Duoxi, Guzhixiang, Jinjiaxi, Runxiangliangpin, Hexiang, Shenliang Yushuiqing, etc. brands; and cooking oil Shenliang Duoxi, Shenliang Fuxi, Hongli, and Shenliang Yushuiqing, etc. brand names. The company also provides rice, flour, oil, and coarse cereals under Shenliang Yushuiqing brand name; instant tea powder, tea concentrate, and other tea products under Golden Eagle brands; tea under the Jufangyong, Gutan, and Fuhaitang brands; oyster sauce, chicken essence, and seafood sauce under Tri-Well brand name; and chrysanthemum tea, lemon tea, herbal tea, and other drinks under Shenbao brands. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Shenbao Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. in February 2019. Shenzhen Cereals Holdings Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1975 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China. name: China National Accord Medicines Corporation Ltd.
summary: China National Accord Medicines Corporation Ltd. engages in the distribution of medicine and pharmaceutical products. The company offers Chinese traditional patent, bio-chemical, biological, and diagnosis medicines, as well as antibiotics; chemical preparations; shaped packing food products; chemical products; and various commodities and techniques. It also engages in the sale of drugs, medical apparatus, and instruments; offers freight transportation, storage, loading and unloading, other business, and professional consultation services; provides glass wares, cosmetics, and daily merchandise, as well as goods agency services; import and export of technology; leasing of house properties; and wholesaling and retailing of health products. The company is based in Shenzhen, China. China National Accord Medicines Corporation Ltd. is a subsidiary of Sinopharm Group Co., Ltd.

summary: FAWER Automotive Parts Limited Company manufactures and sells automotive parts and components of environment control systems, chassis systems, steering and transmission systems, safety systems, engine accessory systems, etc. in China. The company offers climate control systems; steering and driving systems; engine accessory systems, such as differential locks, electric fuel pumps, oil pumps, clutch master cylinders, water pumps, and throttle bodies; chassis accessory systems, including engine beam, sub-bracket, rear axis welding, control arm, front frame, and oil pan assembly systems; and suspension and running systems comprising subframe-passenger, leaf spring commercial trucks, rear suspension passenger, passenger strut assemblies, shock absorbers for commercial vehicles, coil springs, torque rods, and control arm assemblies; braking systems; and other products consisting of fasteners, airbags, body control modules, grip brakes, torsion bars, brake camshafts, wiring harnesses, sun visors, gear controls, and automotive instrument clusters. It also exports its products to the United States, France, Italy, South Korea, Japan, and countries in the Middle East. The company was formerly known as Fawer Automotive Parts Company Ltd. and changed its name to FAWER Automotive Parts Limited Company in December 2007. name: Shenzhen Nanshan Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Nanshan Power Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells power and heat. The company generates power using gas turbine and waste heat, as well as operates natural gas and cogeneration power plants. It is also involved in the sludge drying activities; the design and operations management of sludge treatment and disposal facilities and engineering; and the provision of environmental pollution control and utilization domain technology development, transfer, and advisory services. In addition, the company offers technical advisory service for the construction projects of gas-steam combined cycle power plant; undertakes the maintenance and overhaul of the operating equipment of gas-steam combined cycle power plant; and imports and exports goods and technologies. Further, it engages in the fuel oil self-supporting or import agent business; trading diesel, lubricating oil, liquefied petroleum gas, natural gas, compressed gas and liquefied gas, and chemical products; the provision of investment, construction, and technical services for liquefied petroleum gas, natural gas, and related facilities; and leasing wharfs and oil depots. summary: Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, distribution, and sale of motorcycles, auto parts, accessories, and machinery products in China and internationally. The company is also involved in the research, development, wholesale, retail, and processing of mechanical and electrical products, home appliances, bicycles, and environmental protection products. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Jianshe Motorcycle Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd. in December 2017. The company was founded in 1889 and is headquartered in Chongqing, China. Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Chongqing Jianshe mechanical and electrical co., LTD.

name: China Fangda Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Fangda Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells curtain wall systems and materials in China and internationally. It operates in five segments: Curtain Wall, Rail Transport, Real Estate, New Energy, and Others. The company's primary products include energy-saving curtain walls, photo-electricity curtain walls, LED colour-display curtain walls, PVDF aluminium plate and graphene aluminium plate materials. Its construction curtain walls are used on high-level buildings; and large-area public venues, such as airports, stations, cultural centres and exhibition centres, day lighting roof, shaped construction with external retaining, and decoration functions. The company is also involved in the assembly and processing of metro screen doors; development and operation of real estate properties; property management; research and development, installation, and sale of photovoltaic equipment; and design and construction of photovoltaic power plants. China Fangda Group Co. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangdong Jadiete Holdings Group Company Limited
summary: Guangdong Jadiete Holdings Group Company Limited sells gold and other jewelry in China. The company operates through a chain of jewelry stores, as well as through the Internet under the Chinese Gold Nobility brand. It also trades in nickel metals. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Rieys Group Company Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Jadiete Holdings Group Company Limited in May 2016. The company is based in Shenzhen, China. Guangdong Jadiete Holdings Group Company Limited is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Shenghengchang Huifu Industrial Co., Ltd.

name: Tunghsu Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tunghsu Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the development and sale of liquid crystal glass substrates and equipment in China. It also offers energy buses, and single-layer graphene and graphene-based lithium-ion battery related products; and purchases and sells memory chip products, peripherals and e-sports main computers, LCD screen modules, and whole machine products. In addition, the company is involved in the development and sale of real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Shijiazhuang Baoshi Electronic Glass Co., Ltd. Tunghsu Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, develops, constructs, and operates expressways and bridges in the People's Republic of China. The company is also involved in the toll collection, management, and maintenance of the Guangfo Expressway, the Fokai Expressway, and the Jingzhu Expressway Guangzhu section; motor transportation and warehousing operations; and the provision of car rescue, maintenance, and cleaning, as well as spare parts supply services. In addition, it invests in technical industries; and offers related consulting services. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Fokai Expressway Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd. in June 1993. Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China. Guangdong Provincial Expressway Development Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Guangdong Communication Group Co., Ltd.

name: Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, and sells telecommunication equipment in China. The company's main products include video conference products, integrated wiring products, low voltage distribution products, private network communication products, wiring products, and other products. It also offers multimedia communication and application solutions; general cabling; and out-door patch, sub-line equipment, network box (cube) of out-door, and machinery office, as well as exports and imports telecommunication equipment. The company is also involved in the development, production, and sales of the building intelligent products; manufacture and sales of software of telecommunications, network, and electronic equipment; manufacture and sales of communication electrical products, card-terminal communication equipment, industrial intelligent distribution products, and solar controllers; production, sales, and processing of electrical products; electronic components assembly; trading of technology; and research, development, transfer, and sales of hi-tech. The company offers its products to customers in domestic telecom operators, tower companies and industry customers in the government, finance, electric power, medical, rail transit and other fields. It also exports its products. Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China. Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of China Potevio Company Limited.

name: Shandong Chenming Paper Holdings Limited
summary: Shandong Chenming Paper Holdings Limited engages in the pulp production and paper making in Mainland China and internationally. It operates through Machine Paper, Financial Services, and Investment Real Estate segments. The company offers offset paper, white paper board, coated paper, lightweight coated paper, household paper, electrostatic copy paper and thermal paper, and glassine paper; and paper making raw materials and machinery. It also generates and sells electric and thermal power; manufactures, processes, and sells wood products, laminated boards, and fortified wooden floorboards; provides cement, wall materials, panel, and coal; and purchases and sells waste, as well as offers financial leasing services. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of catering services; hotel services; forestry, saplings growing, and processing and sale of timber and paper products; and mining, transportation, logistics, arboriculture, customs declaration, property management, trading, machinery manufacturing, printing and packaging, and investment management businesses. Shandong Chenming Paper Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Shouguang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hainan Jingliang Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Jingliang Holdings Co., Ltd. processes, produces, and sells foodstuffs, agricultural and sideline products, oils and fats, and snack foods in China. The company offers soybean oils, rapeseed oils, sunflower seed oils, sesame oils and pastes, and others under the Gu Chuan, Lv Bao, Gu Bi, Huo Niao, and Tian Yi brands. It also develops, produces, and markets snack foods and breads, such as potato chips, and cakes and pastries under the brands of Little Prince, MS Dong, Jianqiang De Tudou, and Gu Chuan. The company was formerly known as Hainan Pearl River Holding Company Limited. Hainan Jingliang Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Haikou, China.

name: TsannKuen (China) Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: TsannKuen (China) Enterprise Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells household appliances, electronics, light industrial products, and office supplies in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company also engages in the design and manufacture of molds for products; and provision of related after-sales services. In addition, it is involved in the import and export of household appliances, electronic products, electrical equipment, office supplies, kitchen utensils, and pre-packaged foods. The company was formerly known as TsannKuen China (Xiamen) Ltd. and changed its name to TsannKuen (China) Enterprise Co., Ltd. in June 1993. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Zhangzhou, the People's Republic of China. TsannKuen (China) Enterprise Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Star Comgistic Capital Co.,Ltd.

name: Changhong Meiling Co., Ltd.
summary: Changhong Meiling Company Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical appliances in China. It also researches, develops, manufactures, and sells low temperature freezerand refrigeration, air-conditioners, kitchen and toilet products, home appliances, water purifier, and washing machines, as well as sells white goods. In addition, the company engages in the sale of prepackaged food, dairy products, general merchandise, alcohol, beverage, agricultural and crop planting products; imports and exports technology and self-support goods; develops and maintains e-commerce software; and offers technology development, information, technical transfer, Internet, domestic ad designing, production, and agency services. Further, it is involved in e-business of agricultural products; after sale services of washing machines; and produces and sells of Internet of Things equipment's, and computer hardware and software. The company offers its products through various channels, such as chains, wholesale, e-commerce, and others, as well as exports its products to approximately 130 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Hefei Meiling Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changhong Meiling Company Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Changhong Meiling Company Co., Ltd. is based in Hefei, China.

name: Bingshan Refrigeration & Heat Transfer Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Bingshan Refrigeration & Heat Transfer Technologies Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, sale, installation, and maintenance of industrial and commercial refrigeration and air-conditioning equipment in China. It also engages in refrigerated and frozen food storage business; and the provision of after-sales, maintenance, warranty, and other services. The company was formerly known as Dalian Refrigeration Company Limited and changed its name to Bingshan Refrigeration & Heat Transfer Technologies Co., Ltd. in December 2019. The company was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Dalian, China.

name: Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co.,Ltd
summary: Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co., Ltd., designs, manufactures, and markets lighting products and electrical equipment in the People's Republic of China and internationally. Its products primarily include LED light sources and luminaries, automotive LED luminaries, traditional lighting products, and switches and sockets, as well as LED indoor and outdoor lighting products, electrical tapes, and switch panels. Foshan Electrical and Lighting Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangling Motors Corporation, Ltd.
summary: Jiangling Motors Corporation, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, assembles, manufactures, and sells automobiles, engines and automobile related parts, and dies and tools in China and internationally. Its products include commercial vehicles, light trucks, heavy trucks, pickup and light buses, SUVs, and MPVs, as well as light EVI trucks and buses, and other products. The company also produces and sells engines, castings, and other components. Jiangling Motors Corporation, Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Nanchang, China.

name: ADAMA Ltd.
summary: ADAMA Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a crop protection company. The company operates through Crop Protection (Agro), and Intermediates and Ingredients segments. It develops, produces, and commercializes herbicides, insecticides, and fungicides for farmers to protect from weeds, insects, and diseases. The company also offers intermediate materials and ingredients, such as food additives, Lycopan, synthetic aromatic products, dietary supplements, food colors, texture and flavor enhancers, food fortification ingredients, and other chemicals. In addition, it provides fragrance products for perfume, cosmetics, body care, and detergents industries; industrial products; and consumer and professional solutions. Further, the company engages in the other non-material activities. It primarily operates in Europe, North America, Latin America, the Asia Pacific, India, the Middle East, and Africa. The company was formerly known as Hubei Sanonda Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ADAMA Ltd. in December 2018. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. ADAMA Ltd. is a subsidiary of Syngenta Group Co., Ltd.

name: Changchai Company, Limited
summary: Changchai Company, Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells small and medium-sized single cylinder and multi-cylinder diesel engines under the Changchai brand in the People's Republic of China. Its diesel engines are used in tractors, combine harvesters, light commercial vehicles, agriculture equipment, small-sized construction machinery, generating sets, ship machines, etc. The company also provides diesel engine fittings and castings, gasoline engines, gasoline engine fittings, rotovators, walking tractors, molds, and jigs. In addition, it engages in the assembly and sale of diesel engine and gasoline engine supporting sets. Further, the company provides external investment and consulting services; and Real estate management services. The company exports its products. Changchai Company, Limited was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Changzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Weifu High-Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Weifu High-Technology Group Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells diesel fuel injection, exhaust after-treatment, and air management system products primarily in the People's Republic of China. It operates through three segments: Auto Fuel Injection System, Air Management System, and Automotive Post Processing System. The company's fuel injection system products include inline pumps, injectors, distribution pumps, spare parts, and filter products, as well as delivery valves, nozzles, and plungers. Its air management system products comprise gasoline and diesel turbo chargers; and exhaust after-treatment system products consist of catalysts, catalytics, and mufflers. The company also produces and sells engine accessories and purifiers. It offers diesel fuel injection systems that are used in diesel engines for trucks, passenger cars, buses, construction machinery, marine products, and generator sets; exhaust after-treatment system products for the manufacturers of automobile, motorcycle, and general machinery; and air management system products for small-bore diesel engine plants, six-cylinder diesel engine manufacturers, light and heavy commercial vehicles, and passenger cars. The company also exports its products to the Americas, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. Weifu High-Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China.

name: Anhui Gujing Distillery Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Gujing Distillery Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells liquor and spirits in China and internationally. It is also involved in commercial trade, motor transport, waste recycle, advertisement marketing, technical research, hotel management and operation, sewage treatment, electronic commerce, construction, food testing, and technology development activities. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Bozhou, China. Anhui Gujing Distillery Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Anhui Gujing Group Co., Ltd.

name: Hainan Dadonghai Tourism Centre (Holdings) Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Dadonghai Tourism Centre (Holdings) Co., Ltd. provides hotel accommodation and catering services in the People's Republic of China. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Sanya, the People's Republic of China.

name: Chongqing Changan Automobile Company Limited
summary: Chongqing Changan Automobile Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells automobiles, automobile engines, and supporting parts primarily in the People's Republic of China. Its products include passenger, sedan, MPV, SUV, cross-passenger, and EV cars. The company was founded in 1862 and is based in Chongqing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Wafangdian Bearing Company Limited
summary: Wafangdian Bearing Company Limited manufactures and sells bearing, bearing spare parts, engineering equipment, automobile spare parts and relating products in the People's Republic of China. The company also provides bearing repair, maintenance, and technology services; rents mechanical equipment and estate; and inspects bearings, mechanical equipment, measuring instruments and meters. In addition, it produces and sells machine electrical equipment and spherical roller bearing. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Wafangdian, the People's Republic of China. Wafangdian Bearing Company Limited is a subsidiary of Wafangdian Bearing Group Company Limited.

name: Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd.
summary: Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd. engages in steel smelting, rolling, producing, trading, and selling ferrous metal products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers hot-rolled plates, cold-rolled sheets, special steel profiles, pig iron, and crude steel; and automotive surface panels, oil pipeline steel, container board shipboard, and other products for use in automobiles, home appliances, petrochemicals, aerospace, machinery manufacturing, energy transportation, construction and decoration, and metal products. It also involved in the electricity generation, coal chemical, railway, and import and export trade businesses. Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd. also exports its products to approximately 60 countries and regions. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Benxi, the People's Republic of China. Bengang Steel Plates Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Benxi Steel & Iron (Group) Co. Ltd.

name: Hangzhou Steam Turbine Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Steam Turbine Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, sells, and services steam turbines, gas turbines, and auxiliary turbines in China. The company also offers marine steam turbines and nuclear power emergency pump steam turbines; other rotating and to-and-fro machinery; and spare parts and components, and related after-sales services. It engages in the sale, import, and export of power plant, industrial driving, turbine equipment, and energy conservation and environmental protection projects. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Hangzhou Steam Turbine Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Hangzhou Steam Turbine & Power Group Co., Ltd.

name: Yantai Changyu Pioneer Wine Company Limited
summary: Yantai Changyu Pioneer Wine Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells wine, brandy, and sparkling wine in China, France, Spain, Chile, and Australia. The company operates under the Changyu, Noble Dragon, AFIP, Longyu, Long Tailed Cat, Golden Icewine Valley, Zenithwirl, Vermouth, Rena, Baron Balboa, Donelly, Atrio, Kilikanoon, IWCC, Koya, Liquan, Mminni, Pagese, Roullet Fransac, and other names. It is also involved in grape growing and acquisition, and travel resource development activities. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Yantai, China. Yantai Changyu Pioneer Wine Company Limited operates as a subsidiary of Yantai Changyu Group Company Limited.

name: Foshan Huaxin Packaging Co., Ltd.
summary: Foshan Huaxin Packaging Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells coated ivory boards, chemicals for paper making, and color printing products in the People's Republic of China. It offers ivory board, which is used in various fields, such as cigarette packaging, food packaging, medicine packaging, cosmetic packaging, and living supplies packaging; carboxylic butadiene-styrene latex, styrene-acrylic latex, and calcium carbonate products for the paper making industry; and color printing products, including color boxes, various labels, barcode printing, brochures, books, and periodicals for use in terminal consumption industry. The company is based in Foshan, the People's Republic of China. Foshan Huaxin Packaging Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Foshan Huaxin Development Co., Ltd.

name: Shandong Zhonglu Oceanic Fisheries Company Limited
summary: Shandong Zhonglu Oceanic Fisheries Company Limited engages in oceanic fishing business in Japan, the United States, Russia, the European Union, South Korea, Israel, and other countries. The company primarily offers tuna and its products. It is also involved in the refrigeration, processing, and trading of aquatic products; and vessels leasing, refrigeration transportation, food processing, and other businesses. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Qingdao, China. Shandong Zhonglu Oceanic Fisheries Company Limited is a subsidiary of Shandong Fisheries Enterprise Group General Corporation.

name: Qingdao TGOOD Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao TGOOD Electric Co., Ltd. researches, designs, develops, and manufactures primary and secondary electric transformers and distribution substations in China. It is also involved in leasing power equipment; constructing and operating energy vehicle charging and discharging stations or points; the provision of financing leasing services; and solid thermal storage business. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Beijing Ultrapower Software Co., Ltd.
