summary: Beijing Ultrapower Software Co., Ltd. engages in the Internet of Things (IOT)/communication technology, artificial intelligence and big data, ICT operation management, and mobile gaming businesses in China and internationally. It offers nuclear communication, perimeter security, and underground space IOT and communication access products that are used in nuclear island and power, smart city, airport, high-speed rail, military, petroleum refining, and other industries. The company also provides Chinese natural language analysis technology products, such as Logic Intelligence 2.0 series products; Radar Risk Management SaaS platform; intelligent semantic industry platform; and Ultrapower Semantic Processing Plant based NPL technology and application. In addition, it offers ICT operation management products for finance, insurance, and government sectors, as well as develops and publishes mobile games. The company has a strategic cooperation agreement with Glory Star New Media Group Holdings Limited to explore the development of various 5G business applications. Beijing Ultrapower Software Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Lepu Medical Technology (Beijing) Co., Ltd.
summary: Lepu Medical Technology (Beijing) Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells medical devices and equipment. The company offers cardiovascular interventional products, such as coronary stents and balloons, catheters, guide wires, introducer sheaths, tourniquets, inflation devices, and PCI accessories; structural heart diseases products, including occluders, vascular plugs, delivery systems, and mechanical heart valves; cardiac rhythm management products, which include pacemakers, equipment, leads, and electrophysiology; off-pump coronary artery bypass grafting surgical cardiology products; and PTA balloons and guide wires peripheral interventional products. It also provides critical care products, such as vascular access products, needle free connectors, blood samplers, and pressure transducers; floor and suspended type digital subtraction angiography systems; in vitro diagnostic equipment and biomarkers; hemodialysis catheters and hollow fiber dialyzers; and general surgery products, including surgical staplers and endo surgery accessories. In addition, the company offers cardiovascular system drugs, such as antithrombotic, hypolipidemic, antihypertensive, antianginal, and heart failure treatment; √É¬ü-lactamase antibiotics and antifungal antimicrobial drugs; central nervous system drugs comprises painkillers and antidepressants; gastric/duodenal ulcer and chronic liver disease treatment drugs; respiratory system drugs; hypoproteinemia drugs; and activating blood circulation drugs. Further, it provides precision medicine, ECG telemonitoring, and cardiovascular disease consulting and management center services; medical S&T incubation and equity investment, and medical financial services; consultation, online pharmacy, and household medical equipment services; smart devices; and specialized hospital services for cardiovascular diseases, as well as involved in the co-construction of Cath lab. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Nanfang Ventilator Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanfang Ventilator Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures HVAC products in China. The company offers axial flow fan, and centrifugal blower fans; seamless and stainless steel pipes, forge pieces, carbon steel products, and alloy steel pipes; and nuclear fans and dampers. Its products are used in nuclear power, petrochemical, coal chemical, metro, tunnel and civil architecture, and other industries. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd. provides outdoor products in China. It offers children's outdoor equipment, waterproof walking shoes, jackets, ski caps, windproof and splash proof down jackets, polar camp down jackets, outdoor running T-shirts, running and trekking pants, hiking shoes, windproof ski gloves, snowboard suits, trousers, backpacks, moisture pads, tents, folding table and chair sets, and canvas hammock and outdoor sports shoes. The company was formerly known as Beijing Toread Outdoor Products Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd. in July 2015. Toread Holdings Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Chongqing Lummy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Lummy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company provides tumor, antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal, as well as liver disease auxiliary, endocrinology system, and Chinese patent drugs; digestive system, immune system, blood system, cardiovascular system, and nervous system drugs; acid-base balance and nutritional products; and base large infusion products, American ginseng systems, and active pharmaceutical ingredients. Chongqing Lummy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Chongqing, China.

name: Hanwei Electronics Group Corporation
summary: Hanwei Electronics Group Corporation manufactures and markets gas sensors and instruments in China. It offers carbon monoxide (CO) alarms; gas alarms for CNG, LPG, and CO gas detection; gas shut off valves; vehicle gas alarm systems; and portable gas detectors, including pen type flammable gas detectors, gas leak detectors with feeler poles, single gas detectors, multi-gas detectors, gas sampling pumps, and H2S detectors. The company also provides fixed gas detectors, such as control panels and fixed gas monitors; various alcohol testers and printers; smoke alarms; air purifiers; and water and air quality monitoring equipment. Its products are used in various fields, such as petroleum, chemical, metallurgy, environmental protection, mining, electronics, electricity, pharmaceutical, food, medical health, agriculture, gas, water supply and discharge, heating, municipal engineering, home security and health, public areas, waste gas treatment, sewage treatment, biological sciences, aerospace, military, anti-terrorism, and traffic safety management. The company markets its products in Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, the United States, and South Africa. The company was formerly known as Henan Hanwei Electronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hanwei Electronics Group Corporation in July 2017. Hanwei Electronics Group Corporation was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Bestway Marine & Energy Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Bestway Marine & Energy Technology Co.,Ltd provides marine and offshore engineering research and design services in China. It offers marine and offshore engineering research and design services for merchants, passengers, public, and marine engineering ships, as well as marine engineering structures; marine and offshore engineering supervision and technical consultancy services; yacht design; and ship building engineering package contracting services, ship decoration, marine equipment import and export, logistics, etc. The company also manufactures and sells various ships, such as bulkers, boxships, tankers, gas carriers, RoRo ships, public use boats, steel yachts, offshore ships, platforms and platform modules, jack-up legs, jackets, and other steel constructions; offshore and petroleum-related equipment and pipeline robots; and furniture. In addition, it engages in the development of petroleum related inspection and anti-corrosion technology; design of municipal pipeline; provision of various services, such as general freight transportation, warehousing, logistics distribution, goods clearance, ship management, ship maintenance, crew training for LNG power ships, berth rental, yacht repairing and maintenance, yacht register, ship chartering, shipping consultancy, freight forwarding and shipment, seaman recruiting and management, and marine EMC services; interior decoration of yacht and luxury passenger ship, as well as other ship types; and decoration of high-end hotels and clubs. Further, the company is involved in the natural gas business; provision of optimized energy solutions and domestic shipping service; and operation of ecological farms, leisure tourism, yachts, clubs, and resort communities. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Bestway Marine Engineering Design Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Bestway Marine & Energy Technology Co.,Ltd in May 2016. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Anhui Anke Biotechnology (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Anke Biotechnology (Group) Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and markets pharmaceutical products in China and internationally. The company offers recombinant human growth hormone for injection under the Ansomone name; and recombinant human interferon alpha 2b lyophilized powder, liquid, and prefilled syringe for injection, as well as recombinant human interferon alpha 2b cream, eye drop, and suppository under the Anterferon name. It also provides anti-sperm antibody, semen leukocyte peroxidase staining, one-time semen processing, sperm hypo-osmotic staining, sperm life detection, sperm staining detection, sperm acrosin detection, sperm DNA fragmentation staining, and leptin and immunohistochemical diagnostic kits. In addition, the company offers adhesive plasters, oral solutions, topical preparations, and ointments; peptide APIs; beauty care and anti-aging products; and synthetic drugs in the form of oral powders, dripping pills, and tablets and capsules. Further, it provides autosomal, sex chromosome, autosomal and sex chromosome combination, and other kits, as well as paternity testing set packages; tumor biological immunotherapy products; and DNA testing professional services. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC.
summary: Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC. provides education and information security services in China. It offers education cloud platforms, smart campus solutions and disciplinary application products in the field of K12 that target B-end users; and college entrance exam consulting services, overseas education consulting services, and online tutoring that target C-end users. The company's information security business include data security solutions, such as full data lifecycle, and industrial control security products and solutions, as well as autonomous and controllable products and solutions targeting various industries. It also provides education services for schools and educational institutions at various levels, including top-level design, consulting planning, curriculum construction, big data analysis, software development, educational resources and model research, and education; and space development, hardware support, system integration, and operation and maintenance outsourcing services. In addition, the company offers artificial intelligence technology solutions consisting of emotion calculation, identity recognition, natural language understanding, and other intelligent classroom teaching analysis; various solutions and technical services for offline classroom teaching, online one-to-one teaching, and professional scenes. The company was formerly known as Beijing Lanxum Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC. in August 2020. Doushen (Beijing) Education & Technology INC. was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Beijing Dinghan Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Dinghan Technology Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of power supply systems of rail transit equipment in China. Its ground electrical equipment includes ground power supply solution, platform door system solution, and braking energy management solution; intelligent station solutions; and rolling stock electrical equipment, such as rolling stock special cable solution, rolling stock air conditioner system solution, CRH3 auxiliary power supply system for EMU, and DC600V power supply system solution for passenger train. The company also offers HD video detection system for freight train loading state and rolling stock detection system solution; and after-sales and operation maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Beijing Dinghan Technology Co., Ltd. Beijing Dinghan Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Centre Testing International Group Co. Ltd.
summary: Centre Testing International Group Co. Ltd. provides testing, calibration, inspection, certification, and technical services in China and internationally. It operates through four segments: Life Science, Trade Guarantee, Consumer Goods, and Industrial Test. The company's services include hazardous substances testing, safety detection, EMC testing, environment safety testing, electronics reliability and failure analysis, material reliability and failure analysis, and metal and nonmetallic materials analysis; textile, footwear, and leather testing; toy testing; and automobile materials and component testing services. It also provides food, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, feed, and food contact materials testing, inspection, and compliance; audit, measurement calibration, and dimension inspection; semiconductor testing; maritime hazardous materials management; freight assessment; certification and training; and application software development and testing services. The company serves various industries, including electrical and electronic products, building materials and engineering, maritime, metrology and calibration and geometry measurement, food and drug, vehicle, inspection and analysis for metal materials and parts, and CTI hardline and toy products, as well as textile, footwear, and leather products. Centre Testing International Group Co. Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Xinning Modern Logistics Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Xinning Modern Logistics Co.,Ltd provides supply chain management services in China. The company offers warehousing services, including bonded warehousing and general storage; and freight services, such as air, maritime, land, and multimodal, as well as customs services. It also provides base wine packaging, warehousing, logistics, distribution, and other services; cross-border e-commerce services; and new energy car rental services. In addition, the company offers national satellite positioning, software development, and specialized hardware customization services; and car networking solutions comprising transportation industry supervision platform, general fleet management system, and comprehensive traffic information service system. Jiangsu Xinning Modern Logistics Co.,Ltd was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kunshan, China.

name: Aier Eye Hospital Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Aier Eye Hospital Group Co., Ltd. operates eye care hospitals and institutions. The company offers medical services in the areas of fundus diseases, optometry, refractive correction, glaucoma, corneal diseases, and cataract. It also provides training course for cataract prevention and treatment. It operates approximately 200 ophthalmic hospitals in mainland China, 76 ophthalmic hospitals in Europe, 1 ophthalmic hospital in the United States, and 7 ophthalmic hospitals in Hong Kong. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.

name: Beijing Beilu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Beilu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells pharmaceutical products. The company's products include contrast agents, central nervous system products, and oral anti-diabetic drugs. Beijing Beilu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. also produces precision medicine. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Wangsu Science & Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wangsu Science & Technology Co.,Ltd. provides data and cloud computing infrastructures, content delivery network (CDN), and computing network services worldwide. It offers Webpage Accelerator solution to enhance the delivery of static contents of Website; Download Acceleration solution for slow speed, content hijacking, bandwidth burst, etc.; Streaming Media Acceleration solution to distribute streaming media contents; Whole Site Acceleration solution to accelerate static and dynamic Web content; Application Accelerator solution for various enterprise business information systems; and Mobile Application Accelerator, a security and monitoring platform. The company also provides Dynamic Site Accelerator solution for dynamic interactive Websites; Accessing Accelerator solution; HTTPS Security Accelerator for various security protection, and dynamic and static resource planning; and Overseas Accelerator solution for multi-device and acceleration solutions. In addition, it offers Wangsu Shield cloud security solutions for Websites, which include DDoS Mitigation service for various types of DDoS attacks, such as SYN Flood, ACK Flood, UDP Flood, HTTP Flood, etc.; Web Application Firewall; and Bot Guard, as well as security management and security services. Further, the company operates Website security monitoring platform; and cloud video platform for live streaming, VOD, video AI, media processing, video uploading, and cloud video services. Additionally, it offers Website Defacement system; data center solutions; and cloud computing solutions, which include computing, storage, networks, security, data base, CDN, management and development, domains and analytics, middleware, and instant messaging. The company serves online interactive quiz, government, automotive, gaming, video, finance, appliance manufacturing, e-commerce, mobile live streaming, media, FMCG, education, and consumer electronics sectors. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Wuhan Zhongyuan Huadian Science & Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Zhongyuan Huadian Science & Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the smart grid, medical health, and industrial investment businesses in China. The company is involved in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of power system dynamic recording systems, power system time synchronization and measurement systems, intelligent power grid instrumentation systems, 110kV and below voltage level substation integrated automation systems, intelligent distribution network scheduling systems, and energy Internet system integration and intelligent equipment, as well as medical information and clinical in vitro diagnostic related products. It also provides energy Internet planning, design, operation and maintenance, and consulting services. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Chengdu Guibao Science & Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Guibao Science & Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of organic silicone sealants and silicone rubber strips in the People's Republic of China. It offers curtain wall, insulating glass, window and door, interior decoration, concrete joint, car light, solar module, and anti-corrosion sealants, as well as silicone gaskets; and silicone sealants for roads and bridges and other applications. The company is also involved in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of silane coupling agents. In addition, it provides investment management and related consultation services, as well as solutions for home furnishings, ornaments, and decorations; wholesales and retails silicone rubber products; and engages in the design, construction, and contracting of anti-corrosion system solutions. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.

name: Enjoyor Co.,Ltd
summary: Enjoyor Co.,Ltd provides Internet of Things, cloud computing, big data, artificial intelligence, and blockchain technologies in China. It serves transportation, medical, and other industries. The company is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Dayu Water-saving Group Co., Ltd
summary: Dayu Water-saving Group Co., Ltd engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of water-saving irrigation materials in China and internationally. The company offers internal inlay drip tapes, pressure compensated drip tapes, filter systems, irrigation automatic control systems, PE and PVC pipes, drip irrigation fittings, spray irrigation products, PE and PVC pipe fittings, PP connection fittings, sprinklers, and integrated water-fertilizer irrigation systems. It also provides project design, construction, and servicing of water-saving irrigation projects. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Gifore Agricultural Science & Technology Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Gifore Agricultural Science & Technology Service Co., Ltd. offers agricultural machines in Asia. It also operates a professional market platform for the promotion of agriculture, rural areas, and farmers, as well as a service platform for agricultural and agricultural resources. The company was formerly known as Gifore Agricultural Machinery Chain Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gifore Agricultural Science & Technology Service Co., Ltd. in September 2018. Gifore Agricultural Science & Technology Service Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Bode Energy Equipment Co., Ltd
summary: Bode Energy Equipment Co., Ltd engages in the research, design, manufacture, and control system integration of industrial automation products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers drilling rig AC variable frequency drive, drilling rig DC drive, compound drive drilling rig electrical, top drive, auto-drilling, and specific drilling rig electrical control systems, as well as TV monitor systems and flush type integrated oil production management systems for use in the petroleum industry. It also provides galvanizing line and draw bending flattener control systems for use in the metallurgy industry, as well as special equipment and hydrodynamic force test control systems. The company is based in Xi'an, the People's Republic of China.

name: Siasun Robot&Automation Co.,Ltd.
summary: Siasun Robot&Automation Co.,Ltd. operates in robotic industry in China. It offers collaborative, mobile, intelligent, industrial, and service robots; chassis marriage and assembly AGV, spot welding, and intelligent logistic systems; AS/RS systems; electronics assembly systems; automated vertical warehouse systems; and automated charging and swapping systems. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shenyang, China.

name: Hangzhou Huaxing Chuangye Communication Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Huaxing Chuangye Communication Technology Co., Ltd. provides mobile communication technology and Internet data services in China. It provides capacity planning, network coverage and site planning, wireless parameter planning, and survey design services; and communication pipeline engineering, power supply engineering, communication equipment engineering, and mobile equipment installation engineering services, as well as room engineering services, such as planning, designing, construction, and maintenance of signal cover systems. The company also offers base station inspection, power supply, transmission, iron tower, and fault commission maintenance services; 2G/3G/4G network measurement and evaluation, network performance monitoring and maintenance, and 2G/3G/4G cooperative network performance analysis and optimization services, as well as power generation protection services. In addition, it provides server trusteeship, server leasing, and cloud services, including data backup, Website migration and protection, network and system architecture planning, and security architecture planning services, as well as project integration implementation, site flow analysis and equalization, emergency response services, etc. Further, the company offers wireless test systems, a test product for collecting, analyzing, and optimizing analysis reports for wireless network data; wireless test terminal for mobile communication; and signaling collection platform, and network analysis and optimization software products. Additionally, it provides after-sales services. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Tianjin Chase Sun Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd
summary: Tianjin Chase Sun Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of various pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers Chinese herb preparation products, medicinal granules, synthetic drugs, biotech drugs, medical apparatus, and Internet based therapy. It is also involved in the research and development of various drugs in the areas of sepsis, pulmonary hypertension, leukemia, cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases, arthritis, ischemic stroke, HCV, vascular disease, psychosis, and chemotherapy, as well as anesthesia drugs and immunomodulators. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Huayi Brothers Media Corporation
summary: Huayi Brothers Media Corporation operates as an entertainment media company in China. It is involved in film and television entertainment, Internet entertainment, brand licensing, real-estate entertainment, and industrial investment activities. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangsu Huasheng Tianlong Photoelectric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Huasheng Tianlong Photoelectric Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells photovoltaic and optoelectronic equipment in china. The company offers products, such as single crystal silicon growth furnaces, polycrystalline silicon ingot furnaces, LED epitaxial MOCVD equipment, graphite thermal fields, thermal insulation materials and quartz crucibles, silicon rods, multi-line slicers, and single crystal silicon cutting machines, as well as sapphire furnace, and monocrystalline silicon sawing machine and cube roll mills. It also provides single crystal photovoltaic production equipment that includes silicon squaring mills, gem furnaces and chamfering machines, and others. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Guangzhou Improve Medical Instruments Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Improve Medical Instruments Co., Ltd. provides technologies, products, and services for clinical laboratory and clinical nursing in China and internationally. Its principal products include IMPROVACUTER evacuated blood collection systems, IMPROMINI capillary blood collection systems, IMPROSWAB microbiological transportation systems, IMPRONURSE infusion pumps and syringe pumps, LONGX urine analysis systems, in-vitro diagnostic reagents, etc. The company also provides blood collection needles, pulsewave blood pressure monitors, thrombosis viscoelastic analysis systems, feces analysis systems, blood collection tube preparation systems, graphic user interface devices, intelligent sorters, multi-function blood collection tables, intelligent queue systems, urine collection tube preparation systems, automatic tube packer systems, and consumable labels. Guangzhou Improve Medical Instruments Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Wuxi Boton Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Boton Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the industrial bulk material handling and mobile Internet businesses. It offers heat resistance, steel cord, flame retardant, conveyer, and fabric belts. The company provides its solutions for mining, steel, cement, port and dock, and coal industries. It also offers mobile Internet services for the distribution and operation of mobile games. The company was formerly known as Wuxi Boton Belt Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wuxi Boton Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2015. Wuxi Boton Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Wuxi, China.

name: Jinlong Machinery & Electronic Co.,Ltd
summary: Jinlong Machinery & Electronic Co.,Ltd engages in the research, production, and sale of mini motors in China and internationally. It offers micro motors, including solid motors, coin type vibrators, and driving motors; and optoelectronics, such as mobile phone and notebook camera modules. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Yueqing, China.

name: Hithink RoyalFlush Information Network Co., Ltd.
summary: Hithink RoyalFlush Information Network Co., Ltd. provides internet financial information services in China and internationally. It operates through Value-Added Telecommunications Services, Software Sales and Maintenance, Advertising and Internet Business Promotion Services, and Fund Agent Sale and Other Trading Service segments. The company offers AI-powered financial information services; online trading software; system construction and maintenance; financial data; intelligent promotion services; financial news services; investment and wealth management analysis tools; wealth management product trading services; investment community exchange services; AI application products; investment research support and decision support systems; data terminals and interface services; and intelligent marketing solutions, as well as supplies online securities trading systems. It also provides computer application, fund consignment, private equity fund management, investment and consulting, insurance brokerage, technical, and medical device operations services. In addition, the company is involved in the corporate credit reporting business. It serves securities companies, fund companies, banks, insurance institutions, government departments, research institutions, listed companies, and individual investors. Hithink RoyalFlush Information Network Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Gaona Aero Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Gaona Aero Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of high-temperature materials for use in the aerospace industry in China. The company offers cast, deformed, powder, and special alloy products, as well as high-purity high-strength special alloy products. Its products are also used in electric power, automotive, metallurgy, glass manufacturing, nuclear power, and other industrial fields. The company was formerly known as Beijing Cisri-Gaona Materials & Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gaona Aero Material Co., Ltd. in January 2020. Gaona Aero Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Hunan Zhongke Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Zhongke Electric Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells electromagnetic metallurgy products in China. It offers continuous casting electromagnetic stirring sets, induction heating packages, high-voltage inverters, lifting magnets, rectification control equipment, cable reels, and separators. The company also provides technical services. It primarily serves iron and steel, transport, shipbuilding, machinery, mining, and other industries. The company also exports its products. Hunan Zhongke Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Yueyang, China.

name: SuperMap Software Co., Ltd.
summary: SuperMap Software Co., Ltd. develops and provides geographic information system (GIS) software products and services in China and internationally. The company offers Desktop GIS, a desktop computer GIS; Component GIS, a standard communication interface with GIS functionalities and other functionalities used to construct complicated programs; Service GIS, a component GIS operating on the Internet; Cloud GIS, a cloud GIS platform; and Mobile GIS, a positioning GIS system under the support of mobile network. Its solutions include SuperMap Land Information System, a land resource and e-business information platform; SuperMap Public Service System, a Web digital map public service solution; SuperMap Social Economy Statistics System, a GIS solution in statistics industry; and SuperMap Real Estate Information System. The company's solutions also comprise SuperMap Facility Management System, an application platform for facility resource management, as well as facility resource information publication based on Internet; SuperMap Digital Urban Management System for grid management, urban facility management, and event management; SuperMap Municipality GIS, a municipality GIS solution; and SuperMap Integrated Emergency Response Management System. SuperMap Software Co., Ltd. has strategic partnerships with Microsoft, Oracle, Red Hat, HP, EPSON, and Trimble. The company was formerly known as SuperMap Technologies, Inc. and changed its name to SuperMap Software Co., Ltd. in 2008. SuperMap Software Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Capchem Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Capchem Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, sells, and services electronic and functional materials in China. It offers chemicals for lithium-ion batteries, super capacitors, high pure chemical reagents, cover discs, and semiconductors, as well as aluminum electrolytic, nuclear power, and photoelectric polymer materials. The company also exports its products to Japan, South Korea, the United States, Brazil, Europe, and other countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Capchem Chemicals Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Capchem Technology Co., Ltd. in 2008. Shenzhen Capchem Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Beijing Shuzhi Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Shuzhi Technology Co., Ltd. provides communication products in China and internationally. The company primarily offers communication towers, infrastructure construction, and maintenance and operation of site management to operators and social customers, such as government, municipal, public security, etc. It also provides personal, financial, and property stewardship services, as well as smart city services based on the site platform. The company was formerly known as Beijing Miteno Communication Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Shuzhi Technology Co., Ltd. in October 2018. Beijing Shuzhi Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Shanghai Kaibao Pharmaceutical CO.,Ltd
summary: Shanghai Kaibao Pharmaceutical CO.,Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells modern Chinese medicines primarily in China. The company's primary product is Tanreqing injection that clears heat and detoxifies; relieves cough and removes phlegm; and for treatment of pneumonia, acute and chronic bronchitis, and upper respiratory tract infection. It also provides Kaibao Chuanxiong capsules; Kaibao Weiyuan tablets; And Kaibao pressure-release sustained release tablets. In addition, the company offers western medicines in various dosage forms, such as lyophilized powder injection, small volume injection, tablet, capsule, granule, pill, cream, and other dosage forms. Its western medicines comprise Kaixilai freeze-dried powder, tiopronin sodium, ginseng capsule, and Shanhaidan, alopecia areata, as well as Yuanman brand health win. The company is also developing Youxinding Capsule for treatment of depressions, which is in phase II clinical study; classic Fangding Guiyou soft capsule that is in phase III clinical study; Shufeng analgesic capsule for the treatment of migraine, which is in phase III clinical study; Huadan Anshen mixture for anti-insomnia that is in phase III clinical study; and Tanzheqing series of products, which is in phase III clinical study. Shanghai Kaibao Pharmaceutical CO.,Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Harbin Jiuzhou Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Harbin Jiuzhou Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and supplies electrical equipment and energy efficiency management solutions in China and internationally. The company offers power products, including batteries; and power quality management products, which comprise high and low voltage reactive power compensation products. It also provides transformers and reactors, prefabricated box types, busbars and bridges, terminals, and distribution automation products; low voltage switch complete set equipment; medium voltage switchgears comprising gas insulated medium voltage and air insulation medium voltage switchgears; and electrical components that include medium voltage switching components and low voltage dual power transfer switches. In addition, the company offers high-voltage motor drive products, including high voltage and low voltage soft starters, and high and low voltage inverters; new energy grid-connected converters and supporting products, such as megawatt level wind power converters; and power engineering installation and construction products. Further, it offers energy saving and energy efficiency management, city and infrastructure, rail transportation, distribution automation, building technology, industry, mine, new energy, data center, and reactive power compensation and harmonic control solutions. The company was formerly known as Harbin Jiuzhou Electrical Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Harbin Jiuzhou Group Co.,Ltd. in July 2020. Harbin Jiuzhou Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Harbin, China.

name: Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells adhesives and sealants in China and internationally. It offers auto lamp silicone sealants, PU sealants, epoxy adhesives, polyurethane products, MS sealants, anaerobic thread locker products, RTV silicones, glue holding parts, and structure bonding products; RTV gasket maker products, economic glues, and acrylic structural adhesives; polyurethane sealants, silicone joint sealants, polyurethane waterproof coatings, and convex block platform filled polyurethane resins; civil, curtain wall, and hollow glass adhesives; and single unit and double unit PU products. The company also provides power supplier potting products, UV-curing adhesives for vacuum cleaners, single RTV silicones, heat resistant silicones, bonding sealants, PCB cover adhesives, high performance silicones, UV adhesives, HTV single silicones, PUR adhesives, low temperature epoxy products, SMT adhesives, COB encapsulation products, LED crystal-fixing products, adhesives for said electronic panels, adhesives for naked-eye 3D displays, LED lighting products, silicone greases, LED screen potting products, LED encapsulation products, medical metal and plastic bonding products, LCD tube feet seal products, LCD sealing products, FPC IC UV protection products, glass thinning and cutting adhesives, glass panel pattern products, PET transfer print products, and double unit acrylic products. Its products are used in the industrial, automobile, electronic, high-speed rail, architecture, flexible package, water treatment, and photovoltaic sectors. The company was formerly known as Hubei Huitian Adhesive Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd. in April 2014. Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Netac Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Netac Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells flash memory products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers USB flash drives, portable HDD and solid state disks, memory cards, and encryption products. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Rastar Group
summary: Rastar Group manufactures and sells licensed model cars in China. It provides RC and die cast cars, ride-on bikes, and baby safety car seats under the RASTAR and Rastar Baby brands. The company exports its products to approximately 47 countries, primarily Europe, Japan, the United States, Australia, Singapore, South Korea, and Hong Kong. Rastar Group was founded in 2000 and is based in Shantou, China.

name: Shenzhen Sunwin Intelligent Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sunwin Intelligent Co., Ltd. operates as a smart city and artificial intelligent company in the People's Republic of China. The company primarily offers smart city, big data, artificial intelligence, and cultural and education services. Its smart city services include smart city investment, construction, and operation of integrated service providers; and artificial intelligence services comprise service robots, unmanned aerial vehicle platforms, face recognition, smart video analysis systems, and others. The company also engages in the research, development, distribution, and operation of online mobile games; Internet social platform operation; and creating artificial intelligence and cloud computing solutions through offline and online for entrepreneurship and professional education, as well as offers Internet finance services. Shenzhen Sunwin Intelligent Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Tianyuan DIC Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Tianyuan DIC Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides products and solutions to the telecommunications, government, financial, and other industries. The company offers cloud-based billing, user abnormal behaviour analysis, application and data security gateway, integrated resource management, cloud network integration design orchestration, wireless network optimization, wireless network big data analysis, sales assistant, subcontracting, data gateway, internet distribution, marketing consultant, sales management, and channel and online operation platform products; and electronic channel operation, precision marketing, and security services to telecommunications industry. It also provides small 6 robot and D pay slip, wind control cloud, digital bank-smart customer, digital bank-business middle office and integrated payment, digital bank-supply chain finance and smart marketing, digital bank-digital retail credit and deposit factory, and digital bank-account system solutions to financial industry. In addition, the company offers smart people's livelihood and housing, smart city management and government, integrated online government, immigration management, customs monitoring and command, personnel information service management, detection and control, intelligent transportation network, traffic guidance release, intelligent traffic control platform, public security traffic integrated command, energy monitoring and management, road construction safety management, and internet information public opinion monitoring system products and solutions to government. Further, it provides business operation guarantee, code marketing and e-commerce platform, power communication GIS management information, construction engineering integrated management, informatization integrated management, property accounting, and enterprise IT directory solutions to other industry, as well as platform products. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hiconics Eco-energy Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hiconics Eco-energy Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells industrial automation control and energy equipment in China and internationally. The company offers medium voltage VFD products, low voltage VFD products, and servo motor drives; powertrain systems, motors, EV chargers, energy automobile products, and components; and energy conservation and environment protection products. The company was formerly known as Hiconics Drive Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hiconics Eco-energy Technology Co., Ltd. in December 2016. Hiconics Eco-energy Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Inner Mongolia Furui Medical Science Co., Ltd.
summary: Inner Mongolia Furui Medical Science Co., Ltd. operates as a professional medical service platform company worldwide. The company provides disease diagnosis, drug treatment, and chronic disease management products in the liver disease field. It also offers health management center and medical care services. The company was formerly known as Inner Mongolia FuRui Pharmaceutical Limited Liability Company. Inner Mongolia Furui Medical Science Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Dingli Corp., Ltd.
summary: Dingli Corp., Ltd. provides mobile network test and measurement solutions. It offers network performance benchmarking, autonomous network testing and monitoring, indoor network testing and verification, post processing and analytics, network tuning and optimization, and technology and testing evolution solutions. The company also provides handheld test solutions, such as Pilot Walktour, Pilot Walktour Pack, and Liteprobe; autonomous platform solutions comprising Pilot Fleet Unify, Pilot Scout 3.0, and Pilot RCU; and drive test solutions consisting of Pilot Pioneer and Pilot Pioneer Expert. It serves customers in 63 countries and regions worldwide. The company was formerly known as DingLi Communications Corp., Ltd. and changed its name to Dingli Corp., Ltd. in October 2015. Dingli Corp., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China.

name: SHENZHEN ZQGAME CO., LTD
summary: SHENZHEN ZQGAME CO., LTD engages in the development and operation of large-scale end-games, online games, mobile games, and social games in China. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells aerospace electronic chips and electronic chip systems in China. The company's products include SOC, SIP, and EMBC chips; micro nano satellite constellation systems; satellite big data collecting and analyzing products; facial recognition and image processing products; artificial intelligence systems; avionics systems; and intelligent weapon systems. Its products are used in aerospace, aviation, industry control, territorial resources, municipal engineering, intelligent security, artificial intelligence, public consumption, and various other fields. The company was formerly known as Zhuhai Orbita Control Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd. in September 2017. Zhuhai Orbita Aerospace Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Hubei Dinglong CO.,Ltd.
summary: Hubei Dinglong Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells imaging materials for toner and ink products worldwide. It offers color chemical polymerized toners; solvent colorants for inkjets; and plastic colorants, including perinone and anthraquinones dyes. The company also provides charge control agents to control the tribo-charge of toner used in photocopier and laser printers; and charge control agent, pigment, wax, and resin dispersions, as well as latex materials. In addition, it offers organic pigments of carbazole dioxathion for use in coatings, plastic products, organic glasses, rubber products, textile printing, solvent inks, etc.; and color laser toner cartridges. The company was formerly known as Hubei Dinglong Chemical Co., Ltd and changed its name to Hubei Dinglong Co., Ltd. in September 2016. Hubei Dinglong Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Wuhan, China.

name: Beijing Water Business Doctor Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Water Business Doctor Co., Ltd. engages in the industrial and municipal water supply business in China. It is also involved in the provision of sewage treatment, industrial production, sludge treatment, and garbage disposal facilities; sewage solutions for hazardous waste treatment plant; coking wastewater solution; petrochemical wastewater solutions; and provision of energy-saving equipment, as well as environmental protection equipment manufacturing activities. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Xiamen Zhongchuang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Zhongchuang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, and services high temperature dust and bag filters in China and internationally. The company offers flue gas island control products; and bulk material storage systems, as well as invests in and operates energy conservation and environmental protection, and clean energy power plants. It also provides third party environmental services, import and export services, and investment services. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Savings Environmental Co., Ltd and changed its name to Xiamen Zhongchuang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. in February 2020. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Shantou Wanshun New Material Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shantou Wanshun New Material Group Co., Ltd. engages in the packaging material, aluminum foil, and functional film businesses in China. Its products include smart optical-controlled window films, ITO conductive films, barrier films, self-adhesive switchable transparent films, packaging cardboards, aluminum foils, and aluminized products. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: BlueFocus Intelligent Communications Group Co., Ltd.
summary: BlueFocus Intelligent Communications Group Co., Ltd. provides marketing and brand management services in China and internationally. It offers marketing and brand management services across various disciplines, including strategy, digital, advertising, media, social, PR, design, branding, CRM, data, e-commerce, and mobile solutions to various multinational companies and Chinese enterprises, such as IT, automobile, consumer goods, real estate, finance, and entertainment industries. The company was formerly known as BlueFocus Communication Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to BlueFocus Intelligent Communications Group Co., Ltd. in June 2018. BlueFocus Intelligent Communications Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: QITIAN Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: QITIAN Technology Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies optical lenses in China. Its products include hard resin, stock, Rx free form, UV++, single vision, bi-focal, trifocal, high index, polarized, photochromic, sunfilter, infra-red, and custom hybrid monomer lenses. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Ceepower Co., Ltd.
summary: Ceepower Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of pre-molded cable connectors, and primary and secondary equipment for power grids in China. The company offers pre-molded cable connectors, cable branch boxes, indoor or outdoor main ring units, high and low voltage switchgear kits, box-type substations, power quality management devices, and primary and secondary equipment for power transmission and distribution system, such as FTU, DTU, etc; and green energy products, charging equipment for electric vehicle, equipment for photovoltaic power generation system, etc. It also provides cable accessories and solar products. The company's services include electric equipment manufacture, total package of EPC project for power system, contribution and operation of BOT and PPP projects, etc. Its products are used in power distribution, petrochemical power, urban rail transit, and electrified railway systems, as well as metallurgical enterprises and other industries. The company was formerly known as Fujian CEE Installations Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ceepower Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Ceepower Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Fuzhou, China.

name: Guangdong Tloong Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Tloong Technology Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and sells various printing ink products in China and internationally. The company offers water-based printing inks for use in corrugated paper printing; HD printing for corrugated paper; pre-printing; and printing on SPE, DPE, PP, OPP, and aluminum foils. It also provides gravure printing inks for plastic surface printing on PE, BOPP, PET, NY, and CPP; and paper surface printing for coated and craft papers. In addition, the company offers offset printing inks and acrylic resins, as well as water-based, waterproof, pre-printing, and UV resigns. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Sky Dragon Printing Ink Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Tloong Technology Group Co., Ltd. in November 2020. Guangdong Tloong Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Zhaoqing, China.

name: Zhengzhou Sino-Crystal Diamond Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhengzhou Sino-Crystal Diamond Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of synthetic diamonds and related products. The company offers raw and auxiliary materials, diamond fine grit, single crystal diamonds, diamond micro powder, diamond wire saws, diamond wheels, single crystal cutters, and diamond synthetic press. The company offers its products in China, the United States, Canada, Germany, France, Italy, Poland, Austria, the Czech Republic, the United Kingdom, Brazil, South Africa, India, South Korea, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and internationally. Zhengzhou Sino-Crystal Diamond Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Beijing Highlander Digital Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Highlander Digital Technology Co., Ltd. primarily provides electronic navigation and communications equipment and automation systems for the marine industry. It also offers multi-sensor systems for monitoring maritime and airport activity; and high-end instrumentation and services for the oceanographic and hydrographic sectors. The company's products include ship navigation products, such as radars, electronic chart display information systems, steering and track control systems, voyage data recorders, integrated navigation systems, bridge navigational watch alarm systems, and rudder angle indicators; and sensor systems, including surveillance radar systems, wave measurement radar systems, and oil spill detection systems. In addition, its products comprise vessel monitoring systems and Hi-Cloud connectivity products, as well as ship automation, and oceanology and hydrography products. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Sanchuan Wisdom Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanchuan Wisdom Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells water meters under the San Chuan brand. The company offers intelligent card type, stainless steel, water saving type, network remote transmission, direct reading electronic remote transmission, compound, and mechanical water meters. It also provides multi-family condominium water supply systems; and water company management and application software, as well as water supply products, drainage pipes, pipe fittings, etc. Sanchuan Wisdom Technology Co., Ltd. markets its products in Southeast Asia, the United States, Africa, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Jiangxi Sanchuan Water Meter Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sanchuan Wisdom Technology Co., Ltd. in January 2016. Sanchuan Wisdom Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Yingtan, China.

name: Shanghai Anoky Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Anoky Group Co., Ltd. provides dyeing and finishing solutions for textile fabrics and special needs in China and internationally. It produces and sells disperse dyes under the ANOCRON brand, reactive dyes under the ANOZOL brand, wool reactive dyes under the ANOFIX brand, acid dyes under the ANOSET brand, finishing auxiliaries under the ANOKE brand, and polyamide dyes under the ANOMEN brand. The company was formerly known as Shanghai ANOKY Textile Chem Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Anoky Group Co., Ltd. in October 2014. Shanghai Anoky Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Zhejiang Narada Power Source Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Narada Power Source Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, sells, and services communication backup, motive power, and renewable energy storage batteries and accessories. The company offers VRLA type lead acid batteries, lithium-ion cells and batteries, and related components and subsystems, as well as energy hybrid, DG/battery hybrid, battery cabinet, battery racks and accessories, and home and commercial energy storage solutions. Its products are used in telecom, electric power, railway, and other infrastructure industries, as well as used to store renewable energy from photovoltaic energy and wind farms. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Zhejiang Narada Power Source Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Narada Holdings Co., Ltd.

name: Zhejiang Jinlihua Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jinlihua Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and supply of functional glass and insulation products for use in HV, UHV, and EHV transmission lines in China and internationally. It offers standard and pollution-resistant suspension insulators; aerodynamic glass insulators; and ground wire type suspension glass insulators. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Jinlihua Electric Limited and changed its name to Zhejiang Jinlihua Electric Co., Ltd. Zhejiang Jinlihua Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Jinhua, China.

name: Beijing Originwater Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Originwater Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the water and wastewater treatment industry in China and internationally. Its products and technologies include microfiltration membrane, ultrafiltration membrane, ultra-low pressure and highly selective membrane, and reverse osmosis. The company engages in water and wastewater treatment industrial chain, including municipal and industrial wastewater treatment, drinking water treatment, desalination, civil water treatment, wetland protection and reconstruction, sponge cities, river management, black and odorous water treatment, urban landscape construction, light environment construction, solid waste and hazardous waste treatment and disposal, and others. Beijing Originwater Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: RH
summary: RH, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a retailer in the home furnishings. It offers products in various categories, including furniture, lighting, textiles, bathware, d√É¬©cor, outdoor and garden, and child and teen furnishings. The company provides its products through its retail galleries; and Source Books, a series of catalogs, as well as online through rh.com, rhbabyandchild.com, rhteen.com, and rhmodern.com, as well as waterworks.com. As of January 30, 2021, it operated a total of 68 RH Galleries and 38 RH outlet stores in 31 states in the District of Columbia and Canada, as well as 14 Waterworks showrooms throughout the United States and the United Kingdom. The company was formerly known as Restoration Hardware Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to RH in January 2017. RH was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Corte Madera, California.

name: Beijing Sanju Environmental Protection & New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Sanju Environmental Protection & New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of sulfur removal agents and catalysts, other scavengers, and specialty catalysts in the People's Republic of China. Its products are used in petroleum refining and petrochemical, natural gas chemical, and coal chemical industries, as well as in oil field, biogas, iron and steel, and other fields. The company also provides technical consultation, and engineering and design services; and sulfur removal services. In addition, it produces desulfurizers and modular desulfurization packages. The company exports its products to the United States, India, the Middle East, North Africa, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. Beijing Sanju Environmental Protection & New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Beijing Easpring Material Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Beijing Easpring Material Technology CO.,LTD. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of energy materials in China and internationally. The company offers cathode materials for lithium ion batteries; and NCM532, NCM622, and lithium cobalt oxide materials. It also provides NCA, LCO, LMO, and precursor materials, which are used in electric vehicle, consumer electronics, energy storage terminals, and other fields. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: AVCON Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: AVCON Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides video products and application solutions in China and internationally. The company offers online education products, such as online classroom server and terminal, and classroom camera; digital operating room center servers, integrated operating room terminals, and digital medical teaching terminals; video banking products; emergency command products; and recording servers, audio processors, microphones, and keyboards. It also provides network video service systems using Internet cloud and networking technology; and develops and markets of multimedia communications, intelligent video analysis, electronic whiteboards, and cloud computing. In addition, the company is involved in the design and sale of computer hardware and software, and electronic products; provision of computer systems integration services; development, transfer, consultation, and technical service of computer, network video, communications, and systems integration technology; and design and construction of public security and intelligent engineering projects. Further, it engages in the planning and designing, constructing, operating, technology developing, and technical servicing of smart city projects; development of IoT technology; and designing, installing, constructing, and maintaining of safety-related engineering; and leases equipment and related technical services. The company also provides smart city-related software, hardware services, and peripherals; communications equipment procurement and after-sales services; security engineering installation services; and video monitoring systems. It serves government, military, armed police, fire, banking, insurance, education, medical, telecommunications, energy, manufacturing, and other industries. AVCON Information Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Beijing eGOVA Co,. Ltd
summary: Beijing eGOVA Co,. Ltd provides solutions in the digital city management, innovation and social management, intelligent transportation, and safe city fields in China. The company offers products, such as digital core management core business software, digital law enforcement management software, digital 3D real image, urban management information collection and processing, land and resources comprehensive information management software, urban planning management software, and parking software solutions, as well as HD cameras. It also provides consulting and design, IT application and integration, collection and update, operation outsourcing, system operation and maintenance, and management training services. Beijing eGOVA Co,. Ltd was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Ningbo GQY Video & Telecom Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo GQY Video & Telecom Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. provides visual information system solutions in China. The company offers projection display screen, display unit cabinet, image processing system, interactive electronic blackboard LPD, application management software system, AR-VIS system platform, and cross platform applications, as well as DLP, LED, and LCD splicing display unit. It also provides various solutions, such as visual comprehensive display, public security system, traffic police system, fire system, rail transit, petroleum and petrochemical, power system, information and communication, financial system, water system, utility, 3d stereo mosaic display system, IP streaming media splicing display system, PGIS information system, and project performance, as well as solutions for the mining industry. Its products are used in various fields comprising national defense, government, public security, transport, water conservancy, education, public health, energy, etc. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Nations Technologies Inc.
summary: Nations Technologies Inc. provides integrated circuit (IC) products and services in China. It offers cyber security authentication, smart card, trusted computing, low-power consumption Bluetooth, and contactless IC. The company also provides MCU, RCC, and mobile security innovation products, as well as corresponding solutions. In addition, it offers ID2, IoT authentication, OBU, and LoRa IoT solutions. The company was formerly known as Nationz Technologies Inc. and changed its name to Nations Technologies Inc. in May 2019. Nations Technologies Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Sumavision Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sumavision Technologies Co.,Ltd. provides video and broadband solutions to various markets worldwide. Its DTV head-end hardware products include enhanced multimedia router, a video processing platform that provides solution for encoding, decoding, multiplexing, modulating, demodulating, scrambling, descrambling, and statistical multiplexing of SD and HD MPEG video; high density edge QAM modulator for cable digital television broadcasting and VOD systems; D8120 integrated receiver decoder; E8310 and HEVC 4K/HD multi-channel encoders; multiplexer and scramblers; modulators; The company also offers encoding and transcoding products, such as real-time transcoding, offline transcoding, and media gateway systems; stream guard security systems; IPTV/OTT head-end products, including CDN and streaming systems and back-office systems; access network products, such as CMTS, OLTs, network management systems, cable modems, and ONU products; and IPTV/OTT terminals. Sumavision Technologies Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Henan Yicheng New Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Yicheng New Energy Co., Ltd. manufactures graphite electrodes. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Kaifeng City, China. Henan Yicheng New Energy Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of China Pingmei Shenma Energy & Chemical Group Co., Ltd.

name: Hengxin Shambala Culture Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hengxin Shambala Culture Co.,Ltd. engages in CG and CV technology business. It is involved in the CG/VR content production; children's whole industry chain development and operation; and LBE city new entertainment products. The company was formerly known as Hengxin Mobile Business Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hengxin Shambala Culture Co., Ltd. in June 2017. Hengxin Shambala Culture Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Liaoning Oxiranchem,Inc.
summary: Liaoning Oxiranchem,Inc. researches, produces, and sells ethylene oxide derivative fine chemicals in China. It offers crystalline silicon cutting liquids for the photovoltaic industry; water reducing agents for cement; and polyethylene glycol for use in various applications in plastics, papermaking, paints, electroplating, pesticide, melt, and food processing industries. The company is based in Liaoyang, China. Liaoning Oxiranchem,Inc. is a subsidiary of Oxiranchem Holding Group Co., Ltd.

name: Guangdong Create Century Intelligent Equipment Group Corporation Limited
summary: Guangdong Create Century Intelligent Equipment Group Corporation Limited researches and develops, designs, manufactures, and sells consumer electronics precision structural products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers precision molds, optical glasses, magnesium alloys, antennas, and powder metallurgy products, as well as CNC products. It offers its products for mobile phones, tablets, smart wear equipment, and virtual reality VR. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Create Century Intelligent Equipment Corporation Limited and changed its name to Guangdong Create Century Intelligent Equipment Group Corporation Limited in December 2020. Guangdong Create Century Intelligent Equipment Group Corporation Limited was founded in 2003 and is based in Dongguan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Haimo Technologies Group Corp.
summary: Haimo Technologies Group Corp. manufactures and sells oilfield equipment and instruments for oilfield service companies in China, the Middle East, North Africa, Central, South and Southeast Asia, and North and South America. It offers multiphase flow meters (MPFM), wet gas meters, bulk multiphase meters, high performance and low production testers, shale oil/gas meters, and mobile well testing and production measurement services. The company also provides fluid end assemblies for fracking; accessories, including joints, valves, and valve seating products; ball injectors; and high pressure fluid components and manifolds. In addition, it offers environmental protection equipment and services, such as wastewater treatment and reuse, solid waste disposal, and contaminated soil remediation from industries of oil and gas production and refinery, municipal, mining and chemical processing, etc. Further, the company provides integrated production optimization services, as well as value added services, including data validation and cleansing, well testing verification and optimization, intelligent allocation, water injection optimization, real-time well monitoring and alarm systems, and production analysis and enhancement consultation services. Additionally, it is involved in the oil and gas exploration, development, and production activities. The company was formerly known as Lanzhou Haimo Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Haimo Technologies Group Corp. in November 2016. Haimo Technologies Group Corp. was founded in 1994 and is based in Lanzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen InfoGem Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen InfoGem Technologies Co., Ltd. develops and sells software products and services for the financial information industry primarily in China. The company provides financial equipment related to payment and settlement, risk prevention and control, business process reengineering, Internet financial core system, and self-service system. It also offers personal mobile information services; and home security products and other consumer electronic products. In addition, it invests in innovative financial technologies, such as big-data based personal credit rating technology, artificial intelligent, and natural language processing; and offers innovative services for financial institutions, Internet financial companies, and individual consumers. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Infotech Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen InfoGem Technologies Co., Ltd. in May 2015. Shenzhen InfoGem Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Honz Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Honz Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of pediatric medicines in China. It offers medicines for children and adults in the areas of anti-anaphylaxis, antidiarrheal and digestive, cough, anti-flu, antipyretic, anti-infection, anti-fungal, antipyretic-analgesic, and endocrine. The company markets its products through a network of agents and sales terminals. The company was formerly known as HaiNan Honz Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Honz Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in November 2016. Honz Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Winall Hi-tech Seed Co., Ltd.
summary: Winall Hi-tech Seed Co., Ltd. engages in the breeding of various crop seeds in China. It offers two-line hybrid rice varieties; and canola, cotton, corn, wheat, pumpkin, melon, and vegetable crop seeds. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Wuhu Token Sciences Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhu Token Sciences Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, sale, and service of vacuum deposited thin film materials. It offers touch integrated flat displays, including transparent ITO conductive glass, touch sensor, TFT-LCD cell slimming, touch modules, TFT-LCD LCM, and touch integrated TFT-LCD display modules. Its products include coating, touch glass, glass processing, and glass thinning. Wuhu Token Sciences Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Wuhu, China.

name: Sichuan Kexin Mechanical and Electrical Equipment Co.,Ltd
summary: Sichuan Kexin Mechanical and Electrical Equipment Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, installs, and sells various pressure vessels and civil nuclear safety machinery in China. The company offers petrochemical, nuclear power and military, conventional power plant, and clean and new energy, as well as oilfield environmental protection equipment; and welding and lifting, cutting and forming, NDT, test and inspection, and heat treatment equipment. It also engages in import and export activities. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shifang, China.

name: Zhanjiang Guolian Aquatic Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhanjiang Guolian Aquatic Products Co., Ltd. operates in the aquaculture industry in China and internationally. The company offers fresh prawns/shrimps and fresh fish; and prepacked, fresh, and crumbed seafood products. It is also involved in the hatchery, factory farming, feed, and marine food processing activities. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhanjiang, China.

name: Jiangxi Huawu Brake Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Huawu Brake Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial brakes, wind proof devices, and electro-hydraulic driving equipment in China. The company's products are used in metallurgy, hydraulic structure, railway, vessel, hoisting transportation, and other industries, as well as in ports. It also exports its products to approximately 100 ports and wharfs in 5 continents. Jiangxi Huawu Brake Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Fengcheng, China.

name: YLZ Information Technology Co., Ltd
summary: YLZ Information Technology Co., Ltd provides information services for livelihood industries in China. It provides its solutions in the areas of human resources, social security, health, financial, housing, education, and energy saving and environmental protection industries. The company also offers software and systems products, including enterprise service bus, data integration tools, integrated development tools, embedded architecture, portal integration software, workflow software, smart reporting components, enterprise application architecture, business intelligence systems, and rule engines; and hardware products, such as medical and health service, human resources social security services, financial services, and agricultural service self-service terminals, as well as card readers. In addition, it provides social security and residents health cards, as well as various cloud services; and engineering solution. YLZ Information Technology Co., Ltd is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Dalian Zhiyun Automation Co., Ltd.
summary: Dalian Zhiyun Automation Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, and system integration of automation machines in China. It offers auto test, convey, assembly, and debur machines, as well as wash and filter machines; and assembly line products. The company was formerly known as Dalian Zhiyun Machine Tool Auxiliary Machine Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Dalian Zhiyun Automation Co., Ltd. in May 2008. Dalian Zhiyun Automation Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Dalian, China.

name: Gosuncn Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Gosuncn Technology Group Co., Ltd. provides IoT products and services for public security and smart city industries primarily in China. The company offers products in the areas of smart cities, safe cities, intelligent transportation, law enforcement supervision, wireless communications, communications security, financial security, and railway security. It also provides services for departments of public security, and traffic police and railway; and banks, operators, and other industries. In addition, the company offers public information security, information technology software management, video image analysis, public security information and communication network information security, police cloud platform storage, and automotive electronics logo services, as well as augmented reality systems. Gosuncn Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co.,Ltd
summary: Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells critical equipment for mine safety monitoring and production in China and internationally. Its products include ceremony roof monitors, mechatronic products, polymer grouting materials, and geophysical drilling technology output products. The company was formerly known as Uroica Mining Safety Engineering Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co., Ltd. in March 2017. Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co., Ltd. is based in Tai'an, China.

name: Ningbo Shuanglin Auto Parts Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Shuanglin Auto Parts Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells auto parts in China. It offers powertrain solutions, which include automatic transmission systems; permanent magnet synchronous DC motors; and motor, vehicle, and battery control systems. The company also provides hub bearings; automobile accessories, such as interiors and exteriors comprises instrument and door panel, bumper, center control, and vertical column assemblies; and precision injection molding products, including SRS injection molding parts, precision plastic gears, air conditioner parts, fuel system precision injection molding parts, ignition coils, and speakers. In addition, it offers mechanic and electronic devices consist of seat motors, door and window motors, seat drivers, flexible shafts, electronic control modules, and automobile stamping parts, as well as aftersales services. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Shanghai, China. Ningbo Shuanglin Auto Parts Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shuanglin Group Co., Ltd.

name: Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd. provides satellite navigation components and terminals. It offers Beidou satellite navigation application key components, integrated circuits, Beidou satellite navigation terminals, and Beidou satellite navigation and positioning application systems, as well as network security monitoring solutions. The company also provides solutions for photography, security, satellite communications, and other fields; indoor positioning systems; and location-based precision digital service platform. Its products are used in national defense, geology, electric power, transportation, public safety, communications, water conservancy, forestry, and other professional applications.
