The company was formerly known as Chengdu Gotecom Electronical Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd. in September 2014. Chengdu CORPRO Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Xiamen Changelight Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Changelight Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells compound semiconductor devices in China. It provides LED epitaxial wafers and chips, GaAs solar cells, mini-LEDs/micro-LEDs, and VCSEL products for the use in digital, matrix, display, traffic and black lights, lamps, indicators, and other fields. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Dagang Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Dagang Holding Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and servicing of road construction and maintenance machineries and equipment in China. The company offers pavement maintenance machines, including asphalt pavement maintenance trucks, pavement maintenance vehicles, binding agent spreaders, self-propelled road widening machines, ultrathin asphalt pavers, crack sealing machines, asphalt crack sealing and spraying machines, and asphalt pavement cold in-place recyclers. It also provides asphalt distributors; synchronous chip sealers; and self-propelled, lift-type, and pull-type chip spreaders. In addition, the company offers micro-surfacing/slurry seal trucks and fiber micro-surfacing/slurry seal trucks; and semi-trailer and truck mounted liquid asphalt tankers. Further, it provides asphalt material production equipment, such as asphalt emulsion, continuous rubber modified asphalt, emulsified asphalt, rubber modified asphalt, and multifunction asphalt modified equipment, as well as drummed asphalt melters. Additionally, the company undertakes general contracting of domestic and overseas projects. It also sells its products to approximately 50 countries comprising South Africa, Angola, Nigeria, Zambia, Russia, India, Brazil, and Portugal. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Xi'an, China.

name: YanTai LongYuan Power Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: YanTai LongYuan Power Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, installation, and commissioning and consulting in energy saving and environment protection in thermal power generating area. It offers various products and technologies, including plasma ignition and combustion stabilizing systems for pulverized coal-fired boiler; dual-scale low NOx combustion technology; wall-fired low NOx combustion technology; flame video monitor, a visual image flame detection technology; boiler waster heat comprehensive utilization technology; and other technologies, including few fuel-oil ignition and pulverized coal combustion software. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Yantai, China.

name: Xinjiang Western Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd
summary: Xinjiang Western Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd provides milk products primarily in China. The company engages in the purchase and production of milk; breeding of cattle; and feedstuff business. It is also involved in harvesting grass; the provision of machine harvesting services; and other activities. The company is based in Shihezi, China.

name: Hebei Jianxin Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Hebei Jianxin Chemical Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells dyes intermediates in China. It offers metanilic acid, aniline-2, 5-disulfonic acid monosodium salt, 3- diethylaminophenol, m-aminophenol, sulfanilic acid, ODB-1, ODB-2, R-04, EBA, BBA, MMD, DPA, DBSP, BON, and n-butyl bromide. The company also provides 3,3'-dinitrodiphenyl sulfone; 3,3'-diamino diphenyl sulphone; 4,4'-dichloro diphenyl sulphone; 4,4'-diamino diphenyl sulfone; and m-trihydroxybenzene. Its products are used as intermediates for dyes, medicine, fiber, pesticide, dyestuffs, and synthesizing health care products; OBA for paper; color formers for thermal and carbonless paper; and developer and sensitizer for thermal paper. The company's products are also used as alkylating agent, solvent, and extracting agent for rare elements and organic synthesis; materials for curing agents, epoxy resins, engineering plastics, dyestuffs, polysulfone amides, and other polymers; monomer for polysulfonamide fiber; and pharmaceutical and auxiliary intermediates. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, and Hong Kong. The company is headquartered in Cangzhou, China.

name: Ji Yao Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Ji Yao Holding Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, production, and wholesale of pharmaceutical products. It offers Chinese and western medicines in the areas of pediatrics, phlegm and cough, gynecology, cardiovascular and cerebrovascular, antiviral, urinary, anti-inflammatory, gastrointestinal, tonic class, and rheumatoid immunity. The company also engages in the marketing of pharmaceutical products; investment and management of hospital projects; housing leasing activities; development and sale of computer software systems and auxiliary equipment; provision of business management and investment consulting; and design, production, agency, and release of various domestic and international advertising. Ji Yao Holding Group Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Meihekou, China.

name: Boai NKY Medical Holdings Ltd.
summary: Boai NKY Medical Holdings Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP) series products worldwide. The company offers KoVidone and PolyKoVidone line of products representing Povidone, Crospovidone, and Copovidone pharmaceutical excipients; OraRez line of PVM/MA copolymer and derivatives representing functional polymers for bioadhesive/mucoadhesive applications; KoVidone-1 broad spectrum biocidal, antifungal, and antiviral agents; and pharmaceutical solvents and intermediates. It also offers polymers, vinyl and vinyl ether compounds, PolyViscol, KoVidone I, WhiVidone, and PVPP. Its products are used in pharma, industrial, oral care, cosmetics, and food and beverage. The company was formerly known as Boai NKY Pharmaceuticals Ltd. and changed its name to NKY medical holding Ltd. in March 2016. Boai NKY Medical Holdings Ltd. is based in Heping, the People's Republic of China.

name: Huaren Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Huaren Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. produces and sells non-PVC soft bag infusions in China. The company offers non-PVC double tube double valves, single tube single valves, and single tube double valve soft bags, as well as plastic and glass bottles. It also provides sodium lactate ringer injection, compound sodium chloride injection, glucose injection, sodium chloride injection, sterilized injection water, physiological sodium chloride solution, and mannitol injection products. In addition, the company offers various medical devices, such as incision pull-open fixators, disposable casing puncture device, disposable specimen pickup device, and devices for endoscopy; disposable slip pads, disposable backflow drainage bags, and sterile drainage bags; and abdominal dialysis external short tubes, iodine liquid protection cap, disposable abdominal drainage bags, and various types of rubber plugs, as well as pre-sealing pistons, conveyor plugs for infusion bags, dosing plugs for infusion bags, and polycarbonate for injections to fold plugs. Further, it provides injections for various diseases categories, which include the circulatory system, nervous system, blood volume extender, blood purification, anti-hepatitis and hepatitis assisted drugs, and hemostatic and anti-infective class; and retention needle and accessory products. Huaren Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Zhejiang Sunflower Great Health Limited Liability Company
summary: Zhejiang Sunflower Great Health Limited Liability Company engages in the research, development, production, and sale of solar energy batteries and components worldwide. It offers polycrystalline silicon wafers; and photovoltaic cells and modules. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Sunflower Light Energy Science & Technology Limited Liability Company and changed its name to Zhejiang Sunflower Great Health Limited Liability Company in March 2020. Zhejiang Sunflower Great Health Limited Liability Company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shaoxing, China.

name: Shenzhen Maxonic Automation Control Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Maxonic Automation Control Co., Ltd. engages in contracting and distribution of automation process control products worldwide. Its products include electric and pneumatic actuators, flow and level measuring instruments, positioners, signal conditioners, temperature controllers, and valves. The company also provides technical solutions. It serves power, chemical and petrochemical, iron and steel, paper making, and water treatment industries. Shenzhen Maxonic Automation Control Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hangzhou Shunwang Technology Co,Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Shunwang Technology Co,Ltd provides Internet bar platform services in China. It develops gaming tournament platform for game players and Internet bar, as well as offers marketing services to Internet-based game companies. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Zhonghang Electronic Measuring Instruments Co., Ltd
summary: Zhonghang Electronic Measuring Instruments Co., Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells electronic measuring instruments worldwide. It offers strain gages, strain gage based sensors, weighing indicators and software, testing and measuring systems for the aviation industry, automobile performance and environmental detection systems, automobile driver intelligent training systems, remote networking regulatory network platform, on- board weighing control systems, automatic systems, and precision mechanical and electrical control parts, as well as Internet of Things application, and military and civilian use measurement and control products and system solutions. The company's products also include pressure and torque transducers, digital and customized load cells, miniature sensors, accessories, and weighting pads; transmitters and junction boxes; hair spring; welding robot station miniature; hard and brittle material process; assist manipulator; automatic optic; auto-coating machine for two-component glue; and auto load /unload machine for metal sheet in CNC. The company was formerly known as Zhongyuan Electrical Measuring Instruments Factory and changed its name to Zhonghang Electronic Measuring Instruments Co., Ltd in 2002. Zhonghang Electronic Measuring Instruments Co., Ltd was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Xi'an, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Everwin Precision Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Everwin Precision Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells mobile communication terminal, digital, and optoelectronic products in China and internationally. The company offers terminal components, such as metal bands, ceramic parts, components, stamping parts, connectors, and precision LED stents; energy components, including hydrogen fuel cells, power battery cover plates, busbars, precision automobile electronics, charging equipment, and HDC products; and industrial robot and system integration products. Shenzhen Everwin Precision Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Blivex Energy Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Baoli New Energy Technology Co., Ltd engages in the development and sale of lithium battery products in China. The company was formerly known as Shaanxi J&R Optimum Energy Co., Ltd and changed its name to Baoli New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. in September 2020. Baoli New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Xi'an, China.

name: Beijing JIAYU Door, Window and Curtain Wall Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing JIAYU Door, Window and Curtain Wall Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. focuses on providing energy-saving door and window curtain walls in China. The company offers door and window, and curtain wall products. It is also involved in the photovoltaic light and heat, intelligent equipment, industrial park investment management, and retail business. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Risen Energy Co.,Ltd.
summary: Risen Energy Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, and services solar cells and modules in China and internationally. The company offers high performance PV modules, half-cut PV modules, perc PV modules, and double glass PV modules. It also provides energy storage products for utility, commercial, and industrial sectors, as well as for residential power back-up use. The company was formerly known as Ninghai Risen Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Risen Energy Co.,Ltd. in 2009. Risen Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.

name: Tianjin Ringpu Bio-Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Ringpu Bio-Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells animal health products in China. It provides approximately 280 varieties of animal health products, including chemical drugs, biological products, feed additives, and plant extracts for poultry, livestock, pets, and aquatic animals. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Tianjin Jingwei Huikai Optoelectronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Jingwei Huikai Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells magnet wires under the JWHK brand primarily in China. The company provides aluminum magnet, enameled round copper, enameled rectangular copper/aluminum, film wrapped, glass-fiber wrapped, paper covered, twist aluminum, combined, and continuous transposed conductor wires. Its products are used in electric power, electrical and mechanical facility, electrical equipment, home appliances, electronics, communication and transportation, and other fields. The company also exports its products to Taiwan, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and the United States. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Jing Wei Electric Wire Co., Ltd. Tianjin Jingwei Huikai Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Shandong Yanggu Huatai Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Yanggu Huatai Chemical Co., Ltd. operates in the rubber chemicals industry in China. Its products include standard rubber chemicals, including retarders, accelerators, anti-reversion curing accelerators, insoluble sulfurs, and sulfur donors; and pre-dispersed rubber chemicals, such as retarders, curatives, accelerators, blowing agents, metal oxides, curing activators, antioxidants, and bonding systems for rubber to cord adhesion. The company also provides processing promoters comprising chemical peptizers, zinc soap processing aids, homogenizing and dispersing resins, smell free reclaim agents, zinc free processing aids, and resorcinol-formaldehyde resins; rubber protection waxes and anti-ozonants, including micro-waxes; and release agents for the rubber industry, such as batch off release agents for sheets, and water based inside and outside paints. In addition, it produces and sells rubber anti-scorcher CTP, rubber accelerator NS, rubber accelerator CBS, rubber accelerator M, and other rubber chemicals; and imports and exports rubber chemicals. Shandong Yanggu Huatai Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Liaocheng, China.

name: Chongqing Zhifei Biological Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Zhifei Biological Products Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of vaccines in China. It offers Meningococcal Group A&C Conjugate Vaccine and Meningococcal Polysaccharide Vaccine for the prevention of infectious and invasive meningococcal disease, including meningitis and pneumonia caused by Neisseria meningitidis serogroups A, C; Mycobacterium Vaccae for Injection, a bidirectional immune-modulator for disease like tuberculosis; Haemophilus Influenzae Type b Conjugate Vaccine for the prevention of invasive disease caused by Haemophilus influenzae type b, such as meningitis, pneumonia, sepsis, etc.; and Meningococcal Groups A and C and Haemophilus b Conjugate Vaccine for the prevention of invasive disease caused by meningococcal groups A,C, as well as Haemophilus influenza type b comprising cerebrospinal meningitis, pneumonia, septicemia, epiglottitis, etc. The company also acts as agent for Hepatitis A vaccine; Pneumococcal vaccine; Human Papillomavirus Quadrivalent vaccine and Human Papillomavirus 9-valent vaccine for the prevention of cervical cancer, grade 1/2/3 cervical intraepithelial neoplasia, and cervical adenocarcinoma in situ caused by human papillomavirus; and Pentavalent Rotavirus vaccine for the prevention of rotavirus gastroenteritis in infants caused by the serotypes. In addition, it offers biologics for the prevention and treatment of TB and viral vaccines for the prevention of rabies, influenza, etc.; and sells generic drugs. Further, the company is involved in the marketing, import, export, and sale of biotechnologies; and provision of foreign investment and financing activities. Chongqing Zhifei Biological Products Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Chongqing, China.

name: YaGuang Technology Group Company Limited
summary: YaGuang Technology Group Company Limited engages in the design, research, development, manufacture, sale, and service of composite and steel-FRP boats and yachts primarily in china. The company provides business yachts, special boats, commercial vessels, government boats, and super yachts. It also offers plan design, manufacture, and maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Sunbird Yacht Co., Ltd. and changed its name to YaGuang Technology Group Company Limited in January 2018. YaGuang Technology Group Company Limited was founded in 2003 and is based in Yuanjiang, China.

name: Shenzhen Inovance Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Inovance Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of industrial automation control products for equipment manufacturers in China. The company offers standard industrial automation products, including standard drives, such as inverters and optional parts; motion controls comprising servo drives, servo motors, and optional parts; and automatic controls, such as digital instruments, PLC, HMI, and optional parts. It also provides control and drive systems, which comprise integrated drives for elevators and cranes; specialized inverters for cranes and elevators; and specialized servo drives and motors for injection molding machines. In addition, the company offers OEM industry solutions for the elevator, wire and cable, crane, digital control machine-tool, textile and printing, printing and package, and other industries; and reconstruction industry solutions. Shenzhen Inovance Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Lingda Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Lingda Group Co., Ltd. engages in the energy industry development, ecological environment improvement, and energy conservation activities in China. It provides new energy technology consulting, technology, technology transfer and engineering, design, equipment package, construction, and engineering services; energy conservation and other renewable energy technology research and development services; un-stated technology promotion and application services; and other technology promotion services. The company is also involved in the general contracting of practically applied projects; research, development, manufacture, assembly, and sale of mechanical, electric, and automation control equipment and spare parts; investment, operation, and management of various projects and related energy contracts; and natural science research and experimental development activities. In addition, it engages in solar photovoltaic system construction; vegetable cultivation; planting Chinese herbal medicine; other machinery and electronic products wholesale; business information consultation; investment management consulting; other engineering preparation; and other construction and installation activities. The company serves various industries, including cement, iron and steel, metallurgy, coking, etc. Lingda Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Dalian, China.

name: Chengdu Galaxy Magnets Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Galaxy Magnets Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of magnets primarily in the People's Republic of China, Japan, Europe, the United States, South Korea, Taiwan, and other countries. The company offers bonded NdFeB magnets used in automotive motors, hard disk drives, stepper motors, water pumps, oil pumps, DC motors, brushless motors, starter motors, and sensors; and hot-pressed NdFeB magnets used in automotive motors, power tools, servo motors, and small precision brushless motors. It also provides samarium-cobalt magnets used in aviation, aerospace, military electronics, automobiles, sensors, petrochemicals, magnetic transmission, and other fields; injection molded magnets used in household appliances, automobiles, office equipment, 3C products, and other fields; and magnet assemblies used in adhesive components and injection molding components. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.

name: Suzhou Jinfu Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Jinfu Technology Co., Ltd. provides electronic manufacturing, Internet of Things cloud storage, and cloud computing services in China. It offers optoelectronic display thin film devices, LCD modules/machines, and automation equipment and fixtures. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Jinfu New Material Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Suzhou Jinfu Technology Co., Ltd. in February 2017. Suzhou Jinfu Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Taisheng Wind Power Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Taisheng Wind Power Equipment Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells wind towers in China. Its wind towers support various kinds of turbines from 100KW to 3MW. The company was formerly known as Ruian Pressure Vessel Factory and changed its name to Shanghai Taisheng Wind Power Equipment Co., Ltd. in 2009. Shanghai Taisheng Wind Power Equipment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: XGD Inc.
summary: XGD Inc., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, sells, and leases POS terminals and provides in China and internationally. The company designs and develops financial POS terminal hardware and software; and provides e-commerce, Internet payment software development, and technical services for UnionPay business, commercial banks, and third-party service organizations. In addition, the company offers financial services; and is involved in Internet of Things business, which provides services to terminal merchants and other customers. The company was formerly known as Nexgo Inc. and changed its name to XGD Inc. in October 2018. XGD Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Yitoa Intelligent Control Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Yitoa Intelligent Control Co., Ltd. provides intelligent control products for appliances in China and internationally. It offers air cylinder, electric toothbrush, hair clamp, and foot tub controllers; lighting, fireplace, electric iron, aromatherapy machine, water dispenser, and purifier controllers; and micro refrigerator, steamer, oven, scones machine, mixer, and coffee maker controllers. The company also offers control products for smart home products, automotive electronics, consumer electronics, and home electronics. In addition, it provides management software and cloud services; and Android platform solution. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang Huace Film & TV Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Huace Film & TV Co., Ltd. engages in the production and distribution of television(TV) dramas and films in China and internationally. The company offers its services through YouTube, JungoTV, Now TV, DailyMotion, Dramafever, Huawei, Aiqiyi, and other broadcast platforms. Zhejiang Huace Film & TV Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Anhui Tatfook Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Anhui Tatfook Technology Co.,Ltd provides mobile communication equipment, intelligent terminals, and automobiles in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers as 5G and Internet of Things products, including smart terminals, such as electronics, automobiles, and graphite products; and base station supporting devices, network optimization system devices, and radio frequency products and antennas. It also provides machining, 3D printing, NPL language and design platform, and NPL CAD design services; and education services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Tatfook Technology Co., Ltd and changed its name to Anhui Tatfook Technology Co.,Ltd in April 2020. Anhui Tatfook Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Baoli International Investment Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Baoli International Investment Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and markets asphalt and asphalt additives, and other road materials in China. The company offers general type modified asphalt, emulsified asphalt, modified asphalt emulsion, liquid asphalt, ordinary road asphalt, corrosion paint asphalt, warm mix asphalt, high speed rail emulsified asphalt, railway track ye bonding glue, special modified asphalt, high viscosity modified asphalt, polymer modified bitumen asphalt, paving asphalt, etc. It also imports, warehouses, and sells heavy oil asphalt and the domestic heavy traffic asphalt. In addition, the company is involved in the construction and maintenance of railway, highway, tunnel, and bridge projects; provision of financial leasing and leasing services; and purchase of leased properties. Further, it offers residual value and maintenance services for leased properties; and lease transaction advisory and guarantees services. The company also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Baoli Asphalt Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Baoli International Investment Co., Ltd. in June 2015. Jiangsu Baoli International Investment Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Jiangyin, China.

name: Shenzhen Sunway Communication Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sunway Communication Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and sale of mobile terminal antennas and related modules, acoustic modules, and connectors. The company offers NFC, AP, BOX, GPS, insert molding, LDS, MIA, stamping, and FPC antennas; and precision metal products, including stamping and MIM products. It also provides connectors, connecting cables and components, and high frequency cables; acoustic products comprising speakers and receivers; soft magnetic materials, including ferrite, metal polymer, amorphous, and nanocrystalline materials; and cables, such as automotive, interconnection, USB type C, RF, and MFI cables, as well as cables for industrial equipment. In addition, the company offers spring contact clips in various shapes. Its products are used in consumer electronics, such as smartphones/tablet PCs, smart wearable devices, smart home/IoT products, and smart automobiles; and military fields. Shenzhen Sunway Communication Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hebei Sailhero Environmental Protection High-tech Co.,Ltd
summary: Hebei Sailhero Environmental Protection High-tech Co.,Ltd researches, develops, manufactures, and sells online and automatic environmental monitoring instruments in China. It offers ambient air monitoring and early warning systems, surface and underground water monitoring systems, drinking water monitoring and early warning systems, acid rain online monitoring systems, and pollution source online monitoring systems, as well as emergency monitoring, decision-making, and command systems. The company also provides operation services for environmental monitoring instruments. Hebei Sailhero Environmental Protection High-tech Co.,Ltd was founded in 1996 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: ChenGuang Biotech Group Co., Ltd.
summary: ChenGuang Biotech Group Co., Ltd. engages in the processing of agricultural products and herb extracts primarily in China. The company's products include natural colors, including paprika oleoresin, marigold oleoresin, curcumin, red rice red, red cabbage, and red beet; and natural spice extracts and essential oils, such as capsicum oleoresin, zanthoxylum oil and oleoresin, black pepper oil and oleoresin, ginger oil and oleoresin, turmeric oil, star anise oil and oleoresin, cumin oil and oleoresin, garlic oil and oleoresin, and common fennel oil. It also provides nutritional products, such as lycopene, lutein, green coffee bean extract, grape seed extract, red yeast rice powder, capsaicin, ginkgo biloba extract, stevia, and astaxanthin; and oils and plant protein products, including refined cottonseed oil, cotton linter, cottonseed hull, cottonseed protein removed gossypol, and refined cottonseed protein powder. The company also exports its products to Europe, North and South America, Australia, Russia, Japan, Korea, India, and Southeast Asia. ChenGuang Biotech Group Co., Ltd. is based in Quzhou, China.

name: Beijing XIAOCHENG Technology Stock Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Xiaocheng Technology Stock Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs integrated circuits in China. It offers SOC, micropower wireless, interface, metering, and control chips. The company also provides power line carrier meter reading systems and power management systems. In addition, it engages in the construction, operation, and management of power grid projects; and construction of distribution network and solar power projects, as well as supply, installation, testing, commissioning, and management of power gateway projects. The company was formerly known as Beijing Fuxing Xiaocheng Electronic Technology Stock Co., Ltd and changed its name to Beijing Xiaocheng Technology Stock Co., Ltd. in November 2015. Beijing Xiaocheng Technology Stock Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: CECEP Environmental Protection Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: CECEP Environmental Protection Equipment Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells energy-saving and environmental protection equipment worldwide. Its products comprise air pollution control equipment, environmental monitoring equipment, oil and petrochemical industry environmental treatment equipment, industrial waste heat utilization equipment, sewage treatment equipment, motor energy-saving high-end environmental protection equipment, automation systems, and indoor air equipment; transformer chip radiators for UHV and high-speed rail projects; flue gas purification equipment; environmental monitoring solutions, including water, gas, heavy metals, and other monitoring systems, as well as environmental monitoring platforms, emergency monitoring and early warning systems, and pollution source process monitoring systems; and big data services. The company was formerly known as Xi'an Qiyuan Mechanical and Electrical Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to CECEP Environmental Protection Equipment Co., Ltd. in February 2017. CECEP Environmental Protection Equipment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Xi'an, China.

name: Suzhou Industrial Park Heshun Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Industrial Park Heshun Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, sale, and service of electric power and power quality equipment in China. The company offers high and low voltage power equipment, and power transformers; high and low voltage power quality equipment; energy metering devices, including centralized measuring boxes and monomer metering boxes; and electric car charging/changing station equipment, such as DC chargers and AC charging piles. It also provides power capacitors comprising high voltage shunt, collective, dry high voltage shunt, coupling, pulse, circuit breaker, and mica capacitors, as well as TYD capacitive voltage transformers and automatic switching controllers. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Walvax Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Walvax Biotechnology Co., Ltd., a biological pharmaceutical company, researches and develops, produces, and sells bio-medicine products in China. The company offers biomedicines, such as vaccines, blood products, and others. It provides Group A, C meningococcal polysaccharide conjugate vaccine for infants below or equal to 2 years preventing diseases, such as cerebrospinal meningitis and septicemia; Group A and C meningococcal polysaccharide vaccine for in adults and children over the age of 2 years and adults to prevent disease caused by the bacterium Neisseria meningitidis group A or group C; and Group ACYW135 meningococcal polysaccharide vaccine for children above 2 years old to prevent epidemic cerebrospinal meningitis caused by Neisseria meningitidis group A, C, Y, and W135. The company also offers haemophilus influenzae type b conjugate vaccine for children from the age of 2 months to 5 years for the prevention of infectious diseases, including meningitis, pneumonia, septicemia, cellulitis, arthritis, epiglottitis, etc. In addition, it provides diphtheria, tetanus, and acellular pertussis combined vaccine for the prevention of diphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis for individuals from the age of 3 months to 6 years; and 23-valent pneumococcal polysaccharide vaccine for children above 2 years old to prevent pneumococcal disease caused by 23 serotypes. Walvax Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kunming, China.

name: INKON Life Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: INKON Life Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells edible mushrooms in China and internationally. The company's products include fresh brown shimeji, white shimeji, needle, and king oyster mushrooms. It also engages in the development, production, sale, and maintenance of gamma ray stereotactic radiotherapy treatment system; construction and operation of radiation oncology treatment centers; and investments business. The company was formerly known as Starmap Medicine and Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to INKON Life Technology Co., Ltd. in July 2019. INKON Life Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.

name: Songcheng Performance Development Co.,Ltd
summary: Songcheng Performance Development Co.,Ltd operates in the performing arts industry in China. The company operates tourism resorts and theme parks; and performs art shows under Songcheng and the Romance Show Series brand names. It also provides leisure tourism, live entertainment, and online entertainment services. Songcheng Performance Development Co.,Ltd operates 10 tourism resorts and 30 theme parks in Hangzhou, Sanya, Lijiang, Jiuzhai, Shanghai, Guilin, Zhangjiajie, Xian, Shanghai, Foshan, Australia, etc. The company was formerly known as Hangzhou Songcheng Tourism Development Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Songcheng Performance Development Co.,Ltd in April 2014. Songcheng Performance Development Co.,Ltd is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Nanfang Zhongjin Environment Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanfang Zhongjin Environment Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, operates in the environmental protection industry. It provides ecological improvement and environmental protection services. The company offers environmental consulting and design services, such as consulting, design, supervision and inspection, and construction; and general equipment manufacturing services consisting of vertical and horizontal multistage centrifugal pumps, water supply equipment, sewage pumps, inline pumps, split casing pumps, fire pumps, metering pumps, lubrication pumps, deep well pumps, and other products for use in water purification, building water supply, HVAC system, pharmaceutical, and electronic cleaning and other industries. It also provides hazardous waste treatment services; and sewage and sludge treatment services comprising water treatment equipment manufacturing and environmental engineering contracting, as well as sewage, sludge, and cyanobacteria reutilization treatment. The company was formerly known as Nanfang Pump Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nanfang Zhongjin Environment Co., Ltd. in March 2016. Nanfang Zhongjin Environment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Xiangxue Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xiangxue Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, procurement, manufacture, delivery, and distribution of pharmaceutical products in China. It offers antivirotic oral liquids under the Xiangxue brand name; and healthcare supplements, as well as health solutions, such as food and beverage. Xiangxue Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. has strategic partnership agreement with 111, Inc. to develop the Internet + Medicine model for China's traditional Chinese medicine industry. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Tangel Publishing Co., Ltd.
summary: Tangel Publishing Co., Ltd. engages in the publishing of books in China. It is also involved in mass reading and entertainment gaming businesses. The company was formerly known as Hunan Tangel Culture and Education Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tangel Publishing Co., Ltd. in November 2011. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Chempartner Pharmatech Co., Ltd.
summary: Chempartner Pharmatech Co., Ltd. engages in the microecological nutrition and healthcare businesses worldwide. The company provides medical contract research organization, and contract development and manufacturing organization services for pre-clinical stages. It is also involved in the research, production, and sales of prebiotic fibers as a microecological fortification ingredient, ODM product, and food for special medical purposes product. The company was formerly known as Quantum Hi-Tech (China) Biological Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Quantum Hi-Tech (China) Biological Co., Ltd. in September 2020. Quantum Hi-Tech (China) Biological Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Changhong Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Changhong Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells plastic molds and precision injection molded parts worldwide. The company offers high-precision molds, plastic parts, medical parts and consumables, and stamping dies. It also provides design for manufacture, mold-flow analysis, assembly pad printing, spray painting, hot stamping, ultra-sonic welding, warehousing, and customs and logistics services. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Xiongan Kerong Environment Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiongan Kerong Environment Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells boiler ignition and combustion sets of equipment and control systems. It operates water conservancy and water environment governance, ecological environment governance, energy-saving combustion, thermal power cogeneration and engineering, distributed energy management, solid waste treatment, soil governance, environmental monitoring, clean combustion, and integrated environmental governance businesses. The company was formerly known as Xuzhou Kerong Environmental Resources Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xiongan Kerong Environment Technology Co., Ltd. in July 2019. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Baoding, China.

name: Shanghai Cooltech Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Cooltech Power Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells intelligent power generation equipment. The company offers nuclear safety class; telecommunication base; and vehicle-mounted power station, as well as power integration solutions. Its products are used in IDC, telecommunications, nuclear power station, aviation, petroleum, petrochemical, defense, and various other industries. The company was formerly known as Cooltech Power (Shanghai) Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Cooltech Power Co., Ltd. in 2008. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Shenzhen Riland Industry Group Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Riland Industry Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services inverter welding and cutting equipment, welding automated devices, welding accessories, and labor protection appliances worldwide. The company offers inverter welding and cutting equipment, including inverter MMA/TIG/MIG/air plasma cutting machines; and welding automated devices, such as integrated system of welding robots, automatic welding carriages, digitalized intelligent welding equipment, welding systems, etc. It also provides welding accessories and labor protection appliances comprising welding and cutting accessories, and auto darkening welding helmets; and consumables. The company offers its products primarily under the Riland, Rilon, HiTronic, T&R, and Good brands through dealers, sub-dealers, and 300 exclusive shops. Its products are primarily used in military, aerospace, construction, machinery manufacturing, shipbuilding, steel structures, marine engineering, vehicle manufacturing, electricity, pipeline, chemical construction, boilers, bridge building, and manufacturing industries. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Guangdong Anjubao Digital Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Anjubao Digital Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of community security and protection at home solutions in China. The company offers DF2013 SYSTEM, an IP based building intercom system designed for residential apartment and high rise complex; and analogue building intercom, smart home, car park management, and security and protection systems, as well as cables. It also provides smart community, floating population management, and home and shop security solutions. Guangdong Anjubao Digital Technology Co., Ltd. is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: LandOcean Energy Services Co.,Ltd.
summary: LandOcean Energy Services Co.,Ltd. research, develops, commercializes, and sells petroleum exploration and development software, oil and gas equipment, downhole equipment, and instrument technology in China and internationally. It engages in the geological and geophysical, engineering technology, high-end equipment manufacturing, and cloud computing big data businesses. The company also provides business development and technical services. It serves oil and gas industry. LandOcean Energy Services Co.,Ltd. is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Shanxi Zhendong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanxi Zhendong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products and Chinese medicines in China. It offers cancer drugs, cardiovascular drugs, infectious disease drugs, and respiratory drugs; antibiotics, antitumor drugs, vitamins, etc.; Chinese medicines; calcium preparations; and active pharmaceutical ingredients, as well as sells gastrointestinal drugs. The company offers its products in various dosage forms, such as large volume injections, small volume injections, powder injections, lyophilized powders, tablets, hard capsules, granules, dry suspensions, ointments, psychotropic substances, and other formulations Shanxi Zhendong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd is based in Changzhi, China.

name: Jiangsu Xiuqiang Glasswork Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Xiuqiang Glasswork Co., Ltd. operates as a glass processing company in China. It primarily produces touch screen cover glasses, thin film battery glasses, photovoltaic coated glasses, ITO glasses, home appliance crystal glasses, and home glass products. The company also exports its products to approximately 30 countries. Jiangsu Xiuqiang Glasswork Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Suqian, China.

name: Stem, Inc.
summary: Stem, Inc. provides artificial intelligence (AI)-driven clean energy storage services. It delivers and operates smart battery storage solutions that maximize renewable energy generation and help build a resilient grid. The company's Athena, a AI-powered analytics platform software that uses artificial intelligence and machine learning to automatically switch between battery power, onsite generation, and grid power. Athena stabilizes the grid, reduces carbon emissions, and solves renewable intermittency across the network of distributed energy storage systems. The company serves customers, including Fortune 500 corporate energy users, project developers and installers, and utilities and independent power producers. Stem, Inc. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Millbrae, California.

name: Ledman Optoelectronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Ledman Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and markets LED components, LED lighting products, and indoor and outdoor LED displays primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company offers rental, advertising, ED poster, perimeter, and small pixel LED displays. It also provides creative LED displays, such as sphere and cubic, ultra HD, logo, indoor and outdoor, spiral and can, stair, flexible, triangle, Christmas tree, circular, heave drum, platform, energy-saving, die-casting aluminum cabinet, CNC aluminum cabinet, light sculpture, linear light, and solar-powered LED displays, as well as funnel-shaped LED displays for basketball stadiums, advertising LED sidelights and backlights, and curtain-indoor and outdoor LED displays. In addition, the company offers LED components, including LED lamps, and color and white SMD products. Further, its products are used for security, monitoring, education, command centers, business centers, and conference centers. The company also exports its products in approximately 80 countries, such as the United States, Spain, Croatia, Bulgaria, Romania, Poland, Russia, Australia, Chile, Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, Mexico, Singapore, Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Saudi Arabia, Iran, South Korea, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and other countries. Ledman Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Ningbo Xianfeng New Material Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Xianfeng New Material Co.,Ltd develops and manufactures screen fabrics in China and internationally. The company offers environmental-friendly, energy saving, anti UV, anti-bacterial, flame retardant, and recyclable shading materials under the APLUS brand for use in indoor and outdoor products, as well as blackouts and other technical sun-shading materials. Its products include polyester PVC and fiberglass PVC sunscreen fabrics. The company sells its products through a distribution network comprising textile distributors, fabricators of window-covering shading products, and designers and architects. Ningbo Xianfeng New Material Co.,Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Tong Petrotech Corp.
summary: Tong Petrotech Corp., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, sells, and services perforation technology services to oilfield customers. The company offers horizontal perforation completion technology, fracturing completion perforation technology, vertical well fracturing perforation completion technology, horizontal well perforation fracturing technology, and old well plugging removal technology services. It also provides directional drilling and drilling technology services; and fracturing design, horizontal well staged fracturing, fast drilling bridge plug technology, and evaluation services, as well as oil recovery and oil block development services. In addition, the company produces and sells approximately 100,000 meters of various types of guns; and exports 100,000 composite perforating and pumping guns to the United States. It operates in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Indonesia, Kazakhstan, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Tong Oil Tools Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tong Petrotech Corp. in June 2019. Tong Petrotech Corp. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Xi'an, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangsu Skyray Instrument Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Skyray Instrument Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells analytical and measuring instruments worldwide. The company primarily offers instruments in spectroscopy and chromatography fields. Its products are used in various applications, including jewelry, electronics, mineral metallurgy, coating thickness, toy safety, petroleum environment, building, food safety, archaeology, medicine, glass, alloy, and refractory. The company is headquartered in Kunshan, China.

name: Shenzhen Dvision Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Dvision Co.,Ltd. provides smart video and IoT core technology products and solutions in China. The company offers video conferencing and recording, laser display, and face recognition products; private network communication products; and various IoT products. It serves the government, public security, traffic, industrial park, education, and medical sectors. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Dvision Video Communications Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen Dvision Co.,Ltd. in December 2017. Shenzhen Dvision Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Changzhou Tiansheng New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Changzhou Tiansheng New Materials Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, produces, and sells polymer foam materials in China. It offers structural foam materials primarily for use in wind power generation, railway transportation, yacht, aerospace, energy-efficient buildings, and other industries; and soft foam materials, such as plastic and rubber material for use in various industries, including electronics, home appliances, automobiles, sports and leisure, and other industries. The company also provides products by post-processing of soft foam materials for use in mobile phones, air-conditioners, televisions, automobile parts, and plastic floors, as well as fan blades, cabin covers, train carriages, hull materials, aircraft materials, insulating curtain walls, and other areas. In addition, the company offers sound barrier materials; supporting tapes and protective films; PVC structural foam material for recreational vehicles; and porcelain coatings for use in building curtain walls and rail transit fields. Changzhou Tiansheng New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Tofflon Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Tofflon Science and Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a pharmaceutical equipment supplier for the pharma and biotech industries worldwide. It offers injectables, such as auto solution preparation systems, aseptic filling lines for ampoule, vials, syringes and powders, freeze dryer and auto loading systems, barrier systems, and plastic packaging machines. The company also provides active pharmaceutical ingredients; and visual inspection, leak detection, and combination systems, as well as focuses on providing bio-process equipment and integrated systems, including medium preparation, cell/microbial cultivation, harvesting, DF/UF, purification, buffer preparation, and finished filling systems. In addition, it offers lyophilization injectable lab services. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Funeng Oriental Equipment Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Funeng Oriental Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various machines used in printing, packaging, and equipment industries in China. It offers rotogravure printing machines for packaging and decorating paper, woodgrain paper, printing machine, and poly paper, as well as solvent-free gravure printing machines. The company also provides maintenance, professional, and technical solutions. The company was formerly known as Sotech Smarter Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Funeng Oriental Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. in August 2020. Funeng Oriental Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. is based in Zhongshan, China.

name: Lontrue Co., Ltd.
summary: Lontrue Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates in agricultural industry in China and internationally. The company offers fresh fruits, nuts, seeds, dried fruits, packaged fruits, and OEM products. It serves food, IDC and logistics field industry. The company was formerly known as Yantai Guangyuan Fruit Vegetable Co., Ltd and changed its name to Lontrue Co., Ltd. in May 2009. Lontrue Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Longkou, China.

name: GuangDong PaiSheng Intelligent Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Guangdong Paisheng Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells precision aluminum alloy castings for automobile engines in China. Its products include cylinder blocks, differential housings, gearbox housings, oil filters, thermostat seats, oil sumps, gear housings, lower cylinders, cam brackets, front covers, intake pipes, flywheel shells, oil filter cooler chambers, drain pipe cover assemblies, and ignition coil housings. The company also exports its products to Europe and the United States. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Hongteo Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangdong Paisheng Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. in February 2019. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Zhaoqing, China.

name: Tempus Global Business Service Group Holding Ltd.
summary: Tempus Global Business Service Group Holding Ltd. provides tourism and vacation, aviation operations, business travel management, and financial services in the People's Republic of China. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Huafon Microfibre (Shanghai) Co., Ltd.
summary: Huafon Microfibre (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, markets, and sells microfiber leather in China. It offers microfiber base, a non-woven microfiber fabric; microfiber leather; and microfiber suede. The company's products are used in leather sports shoes, casual shoes, labor protective gloves, motor function of the protective gears, balls, high-end cleaning products, sofas, furniture, and wall decors, as well as cars, trains, aircraft seats, and other fields. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Shanghai, China. Huafon Microfibre (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Huafon Group Co., Ltd.

name: Zhejiang Jolly Pharmaceutical Co.,LTD
summary: Zhejiang Jolly Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and marketing of Chinese medicinal products in China and internationally. The company offers Wuling capsule that is used to treat insomnia, amnesia, heart palpitations, lack of energy, lassitude in loin and legs, and giddy tinnitus, as well as deficiency of energy and weak pulse caused by the disharmony of heart and kidney, or neurasthenia. It also provides Lingze tablet, which is used to treat frequent urination, dysuria, weak steam of urine, endless urine, and soreness and weakness of waist and knees caused by benign prostatic hyperplasia, kidney deficiency, and blood stasis; and Bailing tablet that is used as the adjuvant therapy to treat cough, asthma, back pain, and chronic bronchitis, which are caused by the deficiency of lungs and kidney. In addition, the company offers Linglianhua particles for the treatment of symptoms, including sweating, insomnia, dysphoria, heart palpitations, dreaminess, giddy tinnitus, lassitude in loin and legs, dry stool, and abnormal furred tongue, as well as weak pulse caused by perimenopausal syndrome, or disharmony of heart and kidney. Further, it provides azithromycin, clindamycin phosphate, doxapram, pefloxacin mesylate, adenosine cyclophosphate, and sodium nitroprusside injections. Additionally, the company offers materials, such as cordyceps cephalosporin, fermented cordyceps, and Wuling powders. It also invests and participates in the medical services of Deqing No.3 People's Hospital. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Jolly Pharmaceutical Health Products Co., LTD. and changed its name to Zhejiang Jolly Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in 1998. Zhejiang Jolly Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Huzhou, China.

name: Beijing Jetsen Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Jetsen Technology Co., Ltd. provides audio and video technology, and film and TV content production and copyright operation services. It offers copyright operation, as well as digital culture, education, and technology products. The company provides audio and video technology solutions in the domestic radio and television, press and publication, new media, and relevant industry applications; and technology, media asset management, information security, intelligent monitoring, and media central kitchen systems. It serves TV stations, cable operators, video Websites, teleco companies, and other institutions. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Qingdao Eastsoft Communication Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Qingdao Eastsoft Communication Technology Co.,Ltd develops and sells power line carrier communication products in China. It provides power line carrier products, such as narrowband high and low, broadband low, and micropower wireless and Bluetooth chips; various series modules and carrier wireless dual modules series; terminal products comprising intelligent centralized controllers, carrier type I and II collectors, and dual mode II type collectors; and carrier radiator, wireless copy controller, handheld debug tablet, and dual mode repeater debugging tools. The company also offers intelligent products that include access control, attendance, consumption, ladder, water, parking, video surveillance, perimeter protection, electronic patrol, background music, information release, linkage, visual intercom, property, intelligent lighting, and remote meter reading management subsystems. In addition, it intelligent products comprises smart curtain system, air conditioning management system, building automation system, street lighting system, visitor management system, book lending system, merchant management system, hotel management system, personnel positioning system, SF6 micro water density monitoring system, transformer temperature online monitoring system, switch cabinet contact and cable temperature measurement system, arrester online monitoring system, and power supply and distribution online monitoring system. Further, it provides court software products, which comprise trial execution, judicial management, and convenience services; and court hardware products, such as trial hosts, dedicated media servers, and scanners. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Tongyu Heavy Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Tongyu Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of forgings and castings. It offers wind power generator main shafts, ductile iron casting pipe moulds, cold work rolls, support rolls, steam turbine and generator rotor shafts, crank shafts, marine shafts, pressure pipeline products, supercritical boiler pipes, pressure vessel forgings, machine tool bed products, wind power diesel engine body hubs, forging blanks, ESR ingots, etc. The company also designs and manufactures various general and non-standard equipment and parts. It serves metallurgy, mining, hydroelectric and thermal power, nuclear and wind power, shipbuilding, petroleum chemical, heavy machinery, marine engineering, aerospace, mould, and other industries. The company is based in Yucheng, China.

name: Yonker Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yonker Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd. operates in the environmental protection industry in China. The company engages in the contaminated sites repair activities; provision of technical advisory services; supply of soil heavy metal repair materials; heavy metal contaminated site soil remediation; and soil remediation works for organic contaminated sites. It is also involved in the organic compounds contaminated soil repair engineering, and groundwater remediation engineering design and engineering contracting activities. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Xiamen Meiya Pico Information Co.,LTD.
summary: Xiamen Meiya Pico Information Co.,LTD. provides digital forensics and information security products and services in China and internationally. The company offers computer forensic products, including Recovery Master, a professional digital forensic equipment, which supports the recovery of various data formats; Forensic MagiCube, a portable computer forensics equipment that is used in the laboratory or field investigation; Forensic Tower, a forensic workstation; and Forensics Master, a forensic analysis software. Its computer forensic products also comprise OCTOPUS, a multi-protocol acquisition device for online/offline data acquisition; Aurora, an integrated password recovery solution; Data Wiping Workstation, a data destroying device for various storage media; Write-blocker Kit that secures digital investigation on various storage media; and HDD Duplication System, a multi-tasks clone device for disk-to-disk and disk-to-image duplication. In addition, the company provides mobile forensics systems for data acquisition, data recovery, data analysis, and report making on cell phones; Forensics Commander, a smart investigation table for pre-examining, storage fixing, analyzing, system emulation, and real-time reporting; Forensic Grampus, a forensic automobile for instant forensic response; and Digital Forensic Lab, a solution that provides support on the digital forensic investigation. Further, it offers anti-drone gear for drone flights; and iNF-9560 vehicle-based LTE locator systems, as well as provides computer forensics, mobile forensics, data recovery, information security, and online training courses. It serves forensic, law enforcement, and government customers. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Hainan Shennong Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Shennong Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the breeding, production, and sale of hybrid rice seeds in China. It also technical services for hybrid rice seeds. The company was formerly Hainan Shennong Technology Co., Ltd. Hainan Shennong Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Haikou, China.

name: WELLE Environmental Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Welle Environmental Group Co., Ltd. provides urban environmental governance, agricultural and rural environmental management, and industrial energy conservation and environmental protection plants in China. It offers urban environmental governance solutions, including landfill leachate treatment, kitchen waste disposal, river repair, and waste incineration services; agricultural and rural environmental solutions, such as agricultural organic waste treatment and rural sewage treatment services; and industrial energy saving and environmental protection solutions comprising industrial flue gas treatment, VOC oil and gas recovery, and industrial treatment services. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu WELLE Environmental Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Welle Environmental Group Co., Ltd. in March 2019. Welle Environmental Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: Sino Geophysical Co., Ltd
summary: Sino Geophysical Co., Ltd. provides integrated oil and gas exploration and development technology services in China and internationally. It offers technical services, such as acquisition and processing integration, and unconventional oil and gas, and geothermal services, as well as earthquake, geological, and engineering integration services. The company also engages in oil and gas investment; and asset management activities. Sino Geophysical Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Suzhou Kingswood Education Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Kingswood Education Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells printing inks in China. It offers LED UV Ink, Universal offset UV ink, and Web offset inks, as well as Speedy-ISO, Globy-ISO, Greentec, Pantone colors, U-POWER(GREENKING), Greenmax-BIO, and Shine sheetfed offset inks. The company also exports its products to approximately 80 countries. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Kingswood Printing Ink Co., Ltd. Suzhou Kingswood Education Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Jasic Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Jasic Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of inverter welding machines, engine driven welders, and welder equipment in China and internationally. It provides MMA, TIG, MIG, CUT, and SAW inverter welders. The company offers its products under the JASIC brand. Its products are used in various industries, including shipbuilding, boiler, petroleum, chemical railway, construction, electricity, steel structure, metallurgy, vehicles manufacturing, etc. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Fuan Pharmaceutical (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Fuan Pharmaceutical (Group) Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches and develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceutical intermediates, bulk drugs, and formulations in the People's Republic of China. It offers APIs and intermediates, as well as formulations, such as anti-infective, cardiovascular, digestive, leaflet, and other products. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Fuan Pharmaceutical (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fuan Pharmaceutical (Group) Co., Ltd. in August 2013. Fuan Pharmaceutical (Group) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Chongqing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Masterwork Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Masterwork Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells printing and packaging equipment in China and internationally. It offers cold foil stamping, die cutting, foil stamping, folder gluer, inkjet, inspection, and packer machines. The company was formerly known as Masterwork Machinery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Masterwork Group Co., Ltd. in July 2017. Masterwork Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Jiangsu Changhai Composite Materials Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Changhai Composite Materials Co., Ltd engages in the scientific research, development, production, sale, and service of fiberglass-based composite materials. It offers reinforcements, including printed circuit board tissues; assembled, panel, SMC, and woven rovings; rovings for chopped strand mats and pultrusion; fiberglass wet chopped strands; coated tissue for polyurethane foams; woven meshes; chopping rovings for headliners; light weight chopped strand mats; and chopped strand mats. The company also provides non-woven technologies, such as coated tissues for gypsum sheathing; battery separator, wall covering, carpet tiles, pipe, and roofing tissues; and surfacing veils, as well as batter separators. In addition, it offers chemical products comprising hydroxyproyl methacrylate, hydroxyethyl methacrylate, hydroxypropyl acrylate, and hydroxyethyl acrylate. The company provides its products for various applications in automobile manufacturing, yachts, private facilities, storage tanks, pipeline coatings, cooling towers, architectural decoration, and others. It sells its products in approximately 30 countries and regions, including China, North America, South America, Europe, the Middle East, the Southeast Asia, the Oceania, Africa, and others. Jiangsu Changhai Composite Materials Co., Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Changzhou, China.

name: CECEP Techand Ecology and Environment Co., Ltd.
summary: CECEP Techand Ecology and Environment Co., Ltd. engages in the eco-environment protection, ecological landscaping, and ecological ecotourism businesses in China. The company offers water ecological restoration, contaminated soil remediation, mining restoration, slope restoration, environmental protection, and energy conservation, as well as resource recycling services; and municipal landscape, commercial landscape, and stereoscopic greening landscape. It is also involved in the integration, reconstruction, development, and operation of ecological tourism resources. CECEP Techand Ecology and Environment Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Shenzhen TechandEcology&Environment Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to CECEP Techand Ecology and Environment Co., Ltd. in April 2021. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Fujian Superpipe Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Superpipe Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of water supply and drainage system solutions in China and internationally. The company offers high density polyethylene (PE) winding structure wall tubes, steel skeleton PE plastic composite pipes, PE solid wall tubes, and continuous winding fiberglass reinforced tubes. It also provides power assembly systems for automobiles; DAT automatic transmission products; electric car batteries; and AEBS control systems. In addition, the company operates DD Bus APP, a customized bus platform. Fujian Superpipe Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Quanzhou, China.

name: Hybio Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Hybio Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., a peptide pharmaceutical company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of polypeptide drugs in the People's Republic of China and internationally. Its peptide finished dosage products include digestive system agents, immune modulators, PTH and Ca metabolic modulators, hormone and endocrine modulators, FD for circulatory and blood systems, antiviral agents, and hemostatic products. The company also provides custom and GMP peptides; and a range of peptide APIs. Hybio Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Beijing Comens New Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Comens New Materials Co.,Ltd. produces and sells polyurethane adhesives in the People's Republic of China. The company offers polyurethane adhesives for flexible packaging, transportation, building and energy saving, new energy, safety protection, waterborne industrial coating, laminating iron, and electronic and electrical applications. It also provides coatings, solar batteries, and other products. Beijing Comens New Materials Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Xuzhou Handler Special Vehicle Co., Ltd.
summary: Xuzhou Handler Special Vehicle Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells aerial work platforms in China. It offers vehicle-mounted mobile elevating work platform; electric power supporting vehicles; fire trucks; fire robots; LED intelligent power products; robot integrated applications; and robot education, as well as customization products. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Xuzhou, China.

name: Julong Co., Ltd.
summary: Julong Co., Ltd. offers currency security operating and digital management solutions. It provides banknote sorting machines; multifunctional cash processing systems; self-service devices, such as automatic teller, cash recycling, and teller cash recycling machines; and automated strapping and bundling machines, and banknote shrink wrapping machines. The company also provides banking business training services, and maintenance and technical services. It serves commercial banks and other financial institutions worldwide. The company was formerly known as Liaoning Julong Financial Equipment Corp. and changed its name to Julong Co., Ltd. in October 2014. Julong Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Anshan, China.

name: Staidson (Beijing) BioPharmaceuticals Co., Ltd.
summary: Staidson (Beijing) BioPharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of therapeutic drugs in China. The company offers protein drugs, including therapeutic monoclonal antibody drugs; gene therapy/cell therapy drugs; and chemical drugs. It principally offers its products under the fields of nervous system related, infectious, gastrointestinal, urinary system, and autoimmune diseases. The company has a strategic collaboration with Pivotal S.L. to assess BDB-001, a monoclonal anti-C5a antibody, in a clinical trial in Europe in progressive severe COVID-19 patients caused by SARS-CoV-2. Staidson (Beijing) BioPharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Wuhan Tianyu Information Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Tianyu Information Industry Co., Ltd. provides data security products and smart cards worldwide. The company provides card products, including financial IC cards, financial social security cards, resident health cards, intelligent communication cards, intelligent traffic cards, eSE mode cards, networking cards, etc. It also offers terminal products, such as mPOS and smart POS products, mobile credit card equipment, tax control disks, smart wearable devices, etc. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Edan Instruments, Inc.
summary: Edan Instruments, Inc. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of medical equipment worldwide. The company offers diagnostic electrocardiograph (ECG) products, including resting ECG, stress test, holter, wireless solution, and ECG workstation products; patient monitoring systems, such as vital signs, transport, and central monitoring systems, as well as high acuity cares, acute and sub-acute cares, telemetry, and pulse oximetry products; and obstetrics and gynecology products comprising fetal and maternal monitoring systems, fetal telemetry systems, ultrasonic doppler systems, and video colposcopes. It also provides ultrasound imaging systems that include color doppler ultrasound and B/W digital ultrasound systems; and in-vitro diagnostics, which comprise hematology analyzers. In addition, the company offers point-of-care testing systems, including blood gas and chemistry, magnetic immunoassay, and colloidal gold-labeled immunoassay analyzers; and veterinary ultrasound, ECG, ABG, and monitoring products. Edan Instruments, Inc. is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Sunwoda Electronic Co.,Ltd
summary: Sunwoda Electronic Co.,Ltd engages in the research, design, manufacture, and sale of lithium-ion battery modules worldwide. The company offers portable power batteries, automobile battery and powertrain products, and mobile phone and tablet PC cases, as well as lithium-ion cells, power management systems, and precision components; and systems and integrated energy, automation and intelligent manufacturing, and laboratory testing services. Its products are used in mobile phones, notebooks computers, electric vehicle powertrains, VR products, wearable devices, drones, smart hardware, energy storage and Internet products, power tools, electric bicycles, and other fields. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Qingdao Zhongzi Zhongcheng Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Zhongzi Zhongcheng Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of power equipment in China and internationally. It offers green power grid products, such as high voltage parallel connecting and filter capacitors, and magnetically-controlled static var compensation devices. The company also invests in the construction of power plants, and grid transmission and distribution facilities; acquires mining properties; and invests in, develops, and operates industrial parks. In addition, it develops and operates in various industries, such as tap water, natural gas, highways, ports, terminals, and fisheries through BOT, IBO, and PPP. Further, the company is involved in financial investment activities. The company was formerly known as Qingdao Hengshun Zhongsheng Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Qingdao Zhongzi Zhongcheng Group Co., Ltd. in February 2019. Qingdao Zhongzi Zhongcheng Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Qingdao, China.

name: TIZA Information Industry Corporation INC.
summary: TIZA Information Industry Corporation INC. provides industrial Internet IT services in China. The company offers information management, precision agriculture, and cloud products and solutions, as well as related software and hardware products and services. Its solutions include new energy vehicle management, product lifecycle management, enterprise Internet of Things big data platform, commercial vehicle car networking, agricultural machine Internet of Things, machine learning platform, smart environment, engine plant iCAN, integrated iMOC equipment manufacturer, data acquisition manufacturing and management, telemedicine consultation system, and industrial spare parts supply chain management solutions. The company serves high-end equipment manufacturing enterprises, and upstream and downstream manufacturers, as well as new energy and environmental protection, transportation, logistics, and other related industries and government departments. TIZA Information Industry Corporation INC. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.

name: Anshan Senyuan Road and Bridge Co., Ltd
summary: Anshan Senyuan Road and Bridge Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells road maintenance equipment China. The company provides snow removal and cleaning equipment, asphalt pavement in place regeneration equipment, and preventive maintenance equipment. It also offers asphalt and cement mixing, asphalt old material recycling, stabilized soil mixing, filling, rush repair detection, municipal sanitation, and other maintenance equipment. The company provides its products for use in the fields of energy conservation, environment protection, and resource recycling. It also exports its products to approximately 20 countries and regions in Europe, Asia, and Africa. Anshan Senyuan Road and Bridge Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Anshan, China.

name: Jiangsu Yitong High-Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yitong High-Tech Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of broadcast cable TV network equipment in China and internationally. The company provides front-end optical transmission equipment, optical workstations, optical transmission platforms, RF-PON products, optical transmitters, optical receivers, optical amplifiers, and other cable TV optical transmission equipment; and digital optical workstations, GEPON, ONU, MoCA, HomePlug and C-DOCSIS, and home gateway series products, as well as CATV coaxial cable transmission equipment, such as trunk amplifiers, passive components, and user terminals.
