It also offers intelligent monitoring engineering services for social security monitoring and weak electricity intelligent projects. Jiangsu Yitong High-Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Changshu, China.

name: Beijing Jiaxun Feihong Electrical Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Jiaxun Feihong Electrical Co., Ltd. provides dispatching and control systems in China. It offers MDS3400, a dispatch commanding and communication system platform, which integrates voice and data application services; and MDS6800, a visual dispatch and command system. The company also provides IMS8000, a video surveillance system; IMS6000, a railway disaster prevention and safety monitoring solution that includes wind, rain, snow depth, obstacle intrusion, and earthquake monitoring sub-systems; and unmanned planes and robots, as well as emergency communication system. Its products are used in various industries, such as railway, national defense, urban rail transit, petroleum, petrochemical, coal, metallurgy, electric power, finance, and other industries. The company also has operations in Africa, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and internationally. Beijing Jiaxun Feihong Electrical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shandong Rike Chemical Co.,LTD.
summary: Shandong Rike Chemical Co.,LTD. engages in the research and development, production, marketing, and servicing of PVC processing aids in China. The company offers acrylic and PVC impact modifiers, ACM resins, PVC foaming regulators, AMB and MBS impact modifiers, PMMA/ASA capstocks, and chlorinated polyethylene impact modifiers. Its processing aids include general, lubricating, SAN, HDT, and transparent processing aids. The company also provides lubricants, CPVC compounds, and processing aids for fittings, as well as ACM, a toughness modifier for profiles. It also exports its products to the United States, the European Union, Korea, Israel, Turkey, India, Ukraine, and Southeast Asia countries and regions. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Weifang, the People's Republic of China.

name: Suzhou Electrical Apparatus Science Academy Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Electrical Apparatus Science Academy Co., Ltd. provides high and low voltage electrical apparatus testing services. The company offers testing services for high-voltage switchgear equipment, transformer instruments and reactors, capacitors, arresters, insulators, low voltage electrical apparatus, machine tool electric apparatus, wind power generation equipment, electric power fitting, EMC, seismic, chemical substances, and environmental material. It also provides testing services for electrical lighting equipment and electronic information products, solar photovoltaic power generation equipment, non-destructive, automotive electric and electronic products, accumulator and charging equipment, electromotor, explosion-proof products, nuclear power and marine electrical products, and mines and locomotive electrical apparatus. In addition, the company offers industry and calibration services. Suzhou Electrical Apparatus Science Academy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Zhenjiang Dongfang Electric Heating Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhenjiang Dongfang Electric Heating Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells various electric heaters in China. Its product portfolio comprises electric heaters and assembly elements for household cabinet types; auxiliary heaters in central air-conditioners; defrosting heaters; fin type stainless steel electric heaters; ceramic PTC and metallic PTC heaters; electric heaters for water heating; open coil electric heaters; crankcase heating bands for compressors; heaters with single-end wiring; roasting heaters; electric heater elements for household electric appliances; electric wiring products; and heating bands. The company also provides wind channel heating element; defrosting heaters for cars; aluminum fin heaters; storage tank insertion type electric heaters; and casting aluminum type electric heaters. Zhenjiang Dongfang Electric Heating Technology Co., Ltd. offers its products for use in the air conditioning and refrigeration equipment, household appliances, electric vehicle, polycrystalline silicon manufacturing, petroleum, natural gas, chemical, nuclear power, military, power, railways, ships, machinery, and medical and health industries. The company also exports its products to the United States, Canada, Russia, France, Italy, Japan, South Korea, Saudi Arabia, Israel, and internationally. Zhenjiang Dongfang Electric Heating Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Zhenjiang, China.

name: Anhui Anli Material Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Anli Material Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of polyurethane synthetic leather and polyurethane resins in China. The company's products are used in men's and women's, sports leisure, children's, safety, work, and fashion shoes, as well as sofa furniture, chairs, massage chairs, household and engineering decorations, handbags, suitcases, credentials, stationery, packaging and electronic packaging, ball and sport goods, belts, ticket folders, automotive interiors, etc. It also exports its products to 70 countries and regions internationally. The company was formerly known as Anhui ANLI Artificial Leather Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Anhui Anli Material Technology Co., Ltd. in May 2015. Anhui Anli Material Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Hongli Zhihui Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hongli Zhihui Group Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells LED products in China and internationally. It offers lighting components and modules, including anti-vulcanizing EMC/PCT LEDs, COB LEDs, low/mid power LEDs, high power LEDs, LED filaments, and LED modules; and automotive LED solutions, head lamps, turn signals, stop lamps, DRL products, dashboard lamps, working lights, and atmosphere lamps. The company also provides backlight LED products comprising LED components and light bars; plant growth lighting LEDs; UVC and UVA LEDs; and lamp/infrared LEDs. Its products are used in the general lighting, TV backlight, 3C, automotive lighting, display, and other fields. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Hongli Opto-Electronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hongli Zhihui Group Co., Ltd. in July 2016. Hongli Zhihui Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Wuhan Golden Laser Co., Ltd
summary: Wuhan Golden Laser Co., Ltd manufactures and sells laser systems used in various applications in China. The company offers CO2, vision, flatbed, fiber, and tube laser cutters; label laser die cutters; and galvo laser and bridge laser machines. It serves the cloth filtration, dye sublimation, digital printed label, leather and shoe, garment tailoring, airbag, home textile, material testing, and materials processing industries. Wuhan Golden Laser Co., Ltd also exports its laser products to approximately 100 countries. The company was formerly known as Wuhan Goldenlaser Equipments Manufacturing Co Ltd and changed its name to Wuhan Golden Laser Co., Ltd in June 2009. Wuhan Golden Laser Co., Ltd was founded in 2005 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Ingenic Semiconductor Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ingenic Semiconductor Co.,Ltd., a fabless technology company, designs embedded CPU products for mobile and consumer system-on-chip applications in China. The company offers solutions for wearables and consumer devices markets, which cover smart Internet of things, smart videos, smart wearables, and CPU technology products. Its products are used in biometrics, e-education, portable media player, e-reader, and mobile Internet devices. Ingenic Semiconductor Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Yantai Zhenghai Magnetic Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Yantai Zhenghai Magnetic Material Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets neodymium-iron-boron permanent magnets and other magnetic assemblies in the People's Republic of China. Its products have applications in the fields of IT, automobile, petrochemical, mechanics, aerospace, mechanoelectronic, medical, etc. The company is based in Yantai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shanghai Kinlita Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Kinlita Chemical Co., Ltd. researches, produces, sells, and services industrial coatings. The company offers automobile coatings, such as vehicle body and primer-topcoat in one electrophoretic coatings, automobile parts electrophoretic coatings, solvent type and water-based vehicle body finishing paints, automobile internal and external ornaments paints, and wheel hub coatings. It also provides agricultural machine coatings, including grey machine body and primer-topcoat in one electrophoretic coatings; and light industry coatings comprising common light industry, colorful light industry, and plumbing equipment white electrophoretic coatings. In addition, the company offers motorcycle coatings, which include common vehicle frame and high weather resistance vehicle frame electrophoretic coatings; and ceramics coatings, such as cooker, home appliance, and curtain wall ceramics coatings. Further, it provides construction machinery, railway locomotive, industrial corrosion resistance, and bus and mini bus coatings; and color plate coatings, including polyester, acrylic, epoxy, and water-based systems, as well as PVDF fluorocarbon coatings. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Shanghai Ganglian E-Commerce Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Ganglian E-Commerce Holdings Co., Ltd. provides market intelligence services related to the metals and mining industry in the People's Republic of China. The company offers bulk commodities information, consulting, upstream and downstream industry research, cloud warehousing, informational logistics, supply chain, and payment services, as well as steel product processing and distribution services. It also operates banksteel.com, an e-commerce platform for spot steel bidding, and offer and deal conclusion. In addition, the company provides various products and services for international finance, metals, commodities, telecoms, and other markets, including magazines, newsletters, electronic information, and data, as well as organizes seminars, conferences, training courses, and exhibitions for the financial markets industry. Its services covers various commodities, such as ferrous and nonferrous metals, energy, petrochemical, agricultural products, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Sunshine Laser & Electronics Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sunshine Laser & Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. provides laser technology related products and application services for the manufacturing and processing industries worldwide. The company offers 3D printing products; precision laser stencils; and electronic manufacturing industry related products, including mobile sealing test, FCT test, laptop motherboard reflow, wave solder, automatic dispensing, and FPC magnetic fixtures, as well as anti-static inspection templates. It is also involved in the personalized design and manufacturing of precise metal and non-metal components. In addition, the company engages in the provision of laser structuring of flexible circuit boards, precision laser drilling, and 3D laser direct structuring activities. Shenzhen Sunshine Laser & Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhangjiagang Furui Special Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhangjiagang Furui Special Equipment Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures integrated solutions for the LNG industry in China and internationally. It engages in the natural gas liquefaction, storage, transportation, and loading and unloading, as well as terminal applications; and heavy-duty pressure vessels, vehicle motors remanufacturing, hydrogen energy equipment, and Internet of Things. It also provides cryogenic liquid transportation and storage equipment, LNG marine tanks, Cleansky, and Speed tank gas supply systems; LNG/L-CNG vehicle refueling devices; LNG vehicle gas supply systems; cryogenic valves; engine remanufacturing and oil-to-gas products; heavy duty equipment; hydrogen energy; and Changlong petrolchemical equipment. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Shanghai YongLi Belting Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai YongLi Belting Co., Ltd manufactures and sells conveyor belts in South Africa, China, Europe, Asia, the United States, and internationally. The company provides polyvinyl chloride, polyurethane, polyethylene, polyester plastic, silicon, flame retardant, high temperature, anti-abrasive, anti-static, knife edge, and turning belts. It also offers patterns; and fabrication tools, including spice machines, tooth punches, separators, and air heaters. The company's products are used in material handling, tobacco, textile, food, building material, automobile, fitness, agriculture, and other industries. Shanghai YongLi Belting Co., Ltd was founded in 1989 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Unilumin Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Unilumin Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, sells, and services LED display and lighting solutions in China and internationally. The company offers various industry solutions, including security monitoring, broadcasting room, video conference, control room, etc. It also provides LED display units, and plug and play LED TVs; rental LED displays; fixed LED display products, including LED signage solutions, outdoor SMD LED displays/products for DOOH market, and other LED display products; and surge arrestors. In addition, the company offers LED outdoor lighting solutions comprising street lighting, tunnel lighting, and canopy lighting, as well as energy management control solutions. Further, it produces and processes SMD patch, high-power lamp, and other LED products; and provides online and warranty services. Additionally, it provides creative displays for stage, architecture, TV studio, etc.; and LED displays for professional markets. The company operates electrical flagship stores under the Unilumin-HIWIN brand, as well as other online stores under the Tmall, JD, No.1 shop, and Suning brands. Unilumin Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shandong Jincheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd
summary: Shandong Jincheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, production, and sale of III, IV Cephalosporin intermediates in the People's Republic of China. It offers characteristic bulk drugs, pharmaceutical intermediates, and fine chemicals. The company was formerly known as Shandong Jincheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Jincheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd in May 2017. Shandong Jincheng Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd was founded in 2004 and is based in Zibo, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Kaier New Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Kaier New Materials Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of vitreous enamel panels in China and internationally. The company offers wall cladding systems for metro stations, tunnels, external facade walls, underground walkways, and gas heaters. Zhejiang Kaier New Materials Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Jinhua, China.

name: Shenzhen Kingsun Science & Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Kingsun Science & Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of multimedia and network education software for supporting teachers and students in China. The company's products include English, language, mathematical, early childhood education, and teaching software products, as well as Bruce Wizard products. It also provides professional services. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shanghai Sinyang Semiconductor Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Sinyang Semiconductor Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, sale, and service of electronic materials and relevant surface treatment equipment in China. The company offers electroplating and deflashing chemical products; and high speed plating line, energy saving automatic plating line, automatic rack plating line, high pressure water jet, and automatic chemical immersion line equipment. It also provides ultra-pure wafer processing chemicals and wafer level wet process benches; and aerospace aircraft electronic chemical materials, such as electroless nickel chemical materials. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Shandong Meichen Ecology & Environment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shandong Meichen Ecology & Environment Co.,Ltd. engages in garden greening and rubber non-tire business. It is involved in the garden ancient architecture and municipal utilities engineering, ecological restoration, soil and water conservation, technology development of ecological and environmental protection products, technical services, technical advice, achievement transfer, etc. The company also provides ecological gardening, soil repair, minerals, ecological water management, and air detection management services. In addition, it researches, develops, manufactures, and sells suspension, engineering plastic, and fluid pipe products; and elastic products damping noise reduction, as well as provision of system integration services. The company was formerly known as Shandong Meichen Science & Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Meichen Ecology & Environment Co.,Ltd. in December 2017. Shandong Meichen Ecology & Environment Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Weifang, China.

name: Guanhao Biotech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guanhao Biotech Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and markets regenerative medicine in China. It offers NormalGEN, a type of biological dura repair patch manufactured from animal tissue; GrandNeuro, an artificial dura patch for dura repairing; ThormalGEN, a biological surgical patch manufactured from animal tissue for surgical repairs; DermalGEN, a wound dressing product manufactured from animal tissue for use on burns, scalds, and wounds due to skin loss or trauma; and IREAL breast patch. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Baotou Dongbao Bio-Tech Co.,Ltd
summary: Baotou Dongbao Bio-Tech Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of gelatin and collagen products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers food additive and pharmaceutical gelatin, as well as collagen peptide. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Baotou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangsu Feiliks International Logistics Inc.
summary: Jiangsu Feiliks International Logistics Inc. provides logistics services in China and internationally. The company offers integrated supply chain services; freight forwarding logistics services, including air freight, ocean freight, land transport, and customs and clearance services; and supply chain logistics services, such as vendor management inventory, distribution center, production line distribution, assembly and shipment, circulating process, warehouse outsourcing, and spare parts logistics services. It also provides customs outsourcing, trade implementation, exhibition logistics, milk run logistics, and technical repair and maintenance services. Jiangsu Feiliks International Logistics Inc. was founded in 1993 and is based in Kunshan, China.

name: Shenzhen Refond Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Refond Optoelectronics Co.,Ltd. manufactures and supplies LED products worldwide. The company offers lighting products, including decorating, indoor module, small and middle power LED, and COB lighting products; decorating lights; filament lighting products; flood light and street light outdoor module lighting products; indoor module lighting products, such as bulbs, panel modules, and celling light modules; and small and middle power LEDs. It also provides auto-motive lighting, TV lighting, chip LED lighting, RGB LED lighting, IR lighting, UV lighting, and horticulture lighting products. In addition, the company offers LED components and kit solutions comprising linear modules, matrix modules, DLED modules, modules with lenses, and AC COBs; and technical support services, as well as high power ceramic, silicon encapsulation, TV backlight, and automotive LED modules. It provides its products for use in lighting, backlight, home appliances, automotive, and security applications. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: KAISA Jiayun Technology Inc.
summary: KAISA Jiayun Technology Inc. engages in the mobile Internet marketing business in China. The company's integrated marketing services, include SEM, application distribution, information flow advertising, and super APP brand marketing. It serves network service, e-commerce, finance, and other industries. The company was formerly known as MIG Unmobi Technology Inc. and changed its name to KAISA Jiayun Technology Inc. in May 2018. KAISA Jiayun Technology Inc. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shandong Ruifeng Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Ruifeng Chemical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells PVC additives in China. The company's principal products include acrylic impact modifiers, acrylic processing aids, impact modifiers MBS resins and medium, and ultra-high MW acrylic processing aids, impact modifier CPE, methyl tin mercaptides, PVC lubricants, epoxidized soybean oil products, PVC lubricating processing aids, PVC processing aids, pvc processing aid LS resin, CPE 135A and methyl tin stabilizers. Its products are used in rigid products, such as PVC window and door profiles, pipes, pipe fittings, sheets, foam pipes, foam sheets, wood-plastic composite films, etc. The company also exports its products to the rest of Asia, Europe, the United States, and other regions. Shandong Ruifeng Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Zibo, China.

name: Shanghai DragonNet Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai DragonNet Technology Co.,Ltd. provides IT services and solutions in China and internationally. The company offers IT maintenance services; IT outsourcing services; IT professional services; and preventive inspection, technical support, fault resolution, component replacement, and other support services. It also provides range of products, such as PhegData data storage cloud platform, Phydata all-flash array, Phegda server, Phegda SSD, big data marketing service, big data application platform construction, zhuozhilian solution, PBData database machine, remanufacturing equipment, Pridata Private Cloud Platform, PCloud-DCOS, PCloud-open stack, cloud data center construction consulting, and next generation flexible data center services. Shanghai DragonNet Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Guangdong Biolight Meditech Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Biolight Meditech Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, marketing, sale, and service of medical devices, medical consumables, and healthcare solutions. It offers patient monitors, ECG machines, fetal monitors, hemodialysis products, homecare medical products, medical pumps, veterinary monitors, and accessories. The company operates in Asia, Africa, Europe, North America, and Latin America. Guangdong Biolight Meditech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China.

name: LeKing Wellness Co., Ltd.
summary: LeKing Wellness Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells sauna equipment in China. Its products include infrared sauna, traditional sauna, and foot sauna products; and portable steam and infrared sauna products, as well as air purifiers. The company also offers carbon heating painting products, functional sofas and chairs, and SUP and boat products. It exports its sauna products to approximately 70 countries. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hefei, China.

name: Newcapec Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Newcapec Electronics Co., Ltd. provides smart card applications and solutions in the People's Republic of China. It offers citizen card solutions, public transport solutions, campus one card systems, enterprises one card systems, financial payment solutions, RFID Internet of Things applications, utilities payment systems, and gas management systems. The company also provides electronic payment products, including retail POS terminals, ticket validators, taxi POS, countertop terminals, and kiosks; intelligent recognition products, such as punch clocks, access control readers, access controllers, and electronic door locks; and smart meters comprising prepaid watt-hour meters, prepaid water meters, residential and industrial gas meters, AMR devices, and PLC devices. In addition, it offers RFID devices consisting of E-tags, active RFID readers, UHF desktop card dispensers, UHF remote 4-channel readers, UHF remote integrated readers, Zigbee wireless base stations, and Zigbee modules and routers. The company provides its solutions for smart card applications in cities, schools, colleges, and communities; and other sectors of businesses, including public transportation, sanitation, enterprises, banks, and mobile payment. Newcapec Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Zhengzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Yimikang Tech.Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Yimikang Tech.Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells precision air conditioning solutions in China. It provides precision air conditioner, micro-module and smart cabinet, magnetic suspension integrated cold station, intelligent control, and diversified products; SHD modular operating room products for prefabricated modular inter-operators, ICUs, CSSDs, and laboratories; and square tower shadow less lamps. The company also offers dust removal, desulfurization, and denitration equipment for environment protection; and hardware, software, outdoor magnetic suspension mainframe, cold station, and data centre solutions, as well as designing, integrated packaging, and operation and maintenance services. It serves the government, military, communications, data centre, energy, power, transportation, medical, scientific research, school, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Yimikang Environmental Tech. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yimikang Tech.Group Co., Ltd. in February 2018. Yimikang Tech.Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Hangzhou CNCR-IT Co.,Ltd
summary: Hangzhou CNCR-IT Co.,Ltd researches, develops, designs, produces, and sells information access equipment in China and internationally. The company provides IPRAN access equipment, including IPRAN terminal devices; RF passive components, such as power splitters, directional and hybrid couplers, coaxial terminations, attenuators, filters, combiners, diplexers, and POI products; and triple play products, such as EOC master and slave products. It also offers enterprise gateway solutions comprising PON and LAN access gateway, and IPPBX; FTTH series products, such as GPON and EPON; and Internet of machine systems. The company serves mobile, unicom, telecom, radio and television, bank and power industries, etc. Hangzhou CNCR-IT Co.,Ltd was founded in 1999 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Beijing Enlight Media Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Enlight Media Co., Ltd. operates as an integrated media entertainment company in China. The company produces movies and TV series; animated films and live-action movies; and videos, music, dramas, and live entertainment, as well as operates a talent agency. It is also involved in industrial investment activities. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China. Beijing Enlight Media Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Enlight Holdings Co., Ltd.

name: Kingsignal Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingsignal Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and markets standard voice signal cables, connectors, components and accessories in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers RF cables, including semi-rigid and flexible, military standard RG series, corrugated coaxial, KSR and FLL low loss, micro coaxial, MS2 low loss, tri-coaxial, CATV coaxial, test, multiple core coaxial, and stable cables, as well as commercial wires; and RF connectors, such as DIN, N, TNC, BMA, SMA, SMK, APC3.5, SMC, SAA, SSMA, etc. The company also provides circular electrical connectors, micro rectangular electrical connectors, and power cables; optical transceivers, assemblies, cables, and passive connectors; LAN cables and jumpers, and multipairs cables; circuit boards; and chip modules. Its products are used in the rail transit, new energy, industrial automation, and medical wiring harness industries. Kingsignal Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Winning Health Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Winning Health Technology Group Co., Ltd. provides IT solutions for hospitals and medical service organizations in China. The company offers IT solution designing, planning and consulting, development, system building, maintenance, and operation services. Its solutions are used in building smart hospitals, regional healthcare regulation platforms, community healthcare regulation platforms, public health-care regulation platforms, medical insurance, and other health services. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Kingstar Winning Software Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Winning Health Technology Group Co., Ltd. in January 2016. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Hebei Changshan Biochemical Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Hebei Changshan Biochemical Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of heparin and related products in China. Its API products include heparin sodium injections, heparin calcium and lithium injections, heparinoid, LMW heparins, and sodium hyaluronate. The company also provides dalteparin and enoxaparin sodium injections, and nadroparin calcium injections, as well as sildenafil citrate tablets. It markets and sells its products to approximately 30 countries worldwide. Hebei Changshan Biochemical Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Zhejiang Firstar Panel Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Firstar Panel Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells various sight glass protective screens, touch screens, touch display modules, display devices, and relevant materials and modules in China and internationally. It also offers covers, touch panels, fingerprint identification modules, and precision components. Zhejiang Firstar Panel Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taizhou, China.

name: Kaishan Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Kaishan Compressor Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells air compressors. The company offers stationary and portable air compressors, blowers, screw and reciprocating gas compressors, and screw compressor systems. It also provides refrigeration systems, screw vapor compressors, centrifugal compressors, pressure vessels, and foundry parts. In addition, the company offers industry waste pressure power generation, industry waste heat power generation, geothermal power generation, and biomass power generation equipment. It sells its products through approximately 2,000 sales outlets in China, as well as exports its products to approximately 60 countries, including Australia, Germany, Japan, South Korea, and Russia. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Quzhou, China. Zhejiang Kaishan Compressor Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Kaishan Holding Group Co., Ltd.

name: Suntront Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suntront Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells smart meters in China and internationally. The company offers smart water, gas, heat, and energy meters; and remote devices and other products. It also provides prepayment, automatic meter reading, and technique related solutions, as well as smart management software with various functions, such as file creation, account opening, daily business dealing, sale and multi inquiry, report summary, read/write card, input/collect data, bill printing, blacklist checking, etc. Suntront Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Kunshan Kinglai Hygienic Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kunshan Kinglai Hygienic Materials Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells components for hygienic fluid pipeline system and ultrahigh vacuum (UHV) system in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers sterile diaphragm valves, hygienic valves, hygienic pumps, pipes and fittings, tank equipment, filters, vacuum chambers, sanitary pumps, valves, flanges, heat exchangers, and bioprocess products, as well as AdvanTorr vacuum products and NanoClean ultra clean products; fine chemical engineering; and vacuum semiconductors. KINGLAI Group provides professional accessories and pipelines for processing and application fields of food, dairy products, beverage, personal care, biotechnology and pharmaceuticals. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Kunshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: SafBon Water Service (Holding) Inc.,Shanghai
summary: SafBon Water Service (Holding) Inc.,Shanghai provides water treatment services in China. The company offers industrial waste water treatment solutions, including lime technology for reclaimed water treatment, membrane bio-reactor technology for reclaimed water treatment, flue gas desulfurization wastewater treatment, zero liquid discharge, and oily water separation technology; municipal water treatment solutions comprising drinking water purification systems and processes, BIOBON process with biological suspending chain aeration system, precoat filtration technology, low impact development system, and sewage treatment for municipal waste water; and membrane and ion exchange solutions, including hi-tower regeneration, power coated, and demineralized water treatment technology. It also provides solid waste treatment solutions, such as hazardous incineration, and the thin film sludge dryer technology; seawater desalination solutions comprising membrane and containerized desalination technology; compressed natural gas (CNG)/liquefied natural gas (LNG) filling stations, LNG gasification stations, natural gas regulation stations, and long distance gas pipelines, as well as combined cooling, heating, and power systems; and sea water flue gas desulfurization technology. In addition, the company offers ceramic flat membrane systems, which removes pollutants like particles and microorganisms and produces clear water free from biological and toxic hazards; and dissolved air flotation systems that treats water and waste water. SafBon Water Service (Holding) Inc.,Shanghai is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Longhua Technology Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Longhua Technology Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells heat transfer and energy-saving equipment. It offers air cooled condensers, composite cooling products, and smart compound closed cooling towers for the petrochemical industry; direct air cooling condensation systems, compound-type air cooling condensation systems, evaporative condensers, and bundles for the power industry; and evaporative coolers for the metallurgical industry. The company was formerly known as Luoyang Longhua Heat Transfer and Energy Conservation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Longhua Technology Group Co.,Ltd. in September 2018. Longhua Technology Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Luoyang, China.

name: AVIT Ltd.
summary: AVIT Ltd. manufactures and sells DVB products and solutions to network operators. It offers DVB solutions, including digital broadcasting, interactive TV, and triple-play solutions; DVB application systems, such as business management and VAS applications; digital head-end products and equipment; digital receivers and embedded software; and value-added software system and terminal products. The company also provides system design, system integration, technical training, and operation consulting services. It serves approximately 70 million subscribers in China and internationally. AVIT Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Tongguang Electronic Wire & Cable Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Tongguang Electronic Wire & Cable Co., Ltd. produces and sells wires and cables in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers fiber optic cables, transmission cables, and equipment cables that can be used in telecommunication, mobile, radio and television, power, railway, other communication, and overhead transmission lines, as well as power cables for architecture, urban lighting, wind power projects, transportation projects, etc. It also provides overhead conductors, including ordinary conductors and energy-saving conductors. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Haimen, China.

name: Xingyuan Environment Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xingyuan Environment Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the environmental protection industry in China. It offers water treatment technologies for the urban water supply industry; develops municipal sewage treatment solutions; develops industrial wastewater treatment processes for the projects covering pulping and papermaking, food and yeast, textile printing and dyeing, pharmacy, chemical, metallurgy, and other fields; and provides sewage treatment technology systems. The company also offers products for the reuse of reclaimed water; filter products for use in chemical, metallurgy, petroleum, printing and dyeing, ceramics, food, pharmacy, building material, coal washing, mine, sewage treatment, and other industries; and integrated solutions to users on energy utilization analysis, metallurgy, chemical, light industry, food, textile printing and dyeing, etc., as well as generates electricity from waste incineration. In addition, it provides landscape architecture services in the fields of river system, lake and reservoir, garden, road, square, green belt, etc.; mining land rehabilitation services; valley harnessing services; and reservoir environment governance services. The company was formerly known as Hangzhou Xingyuan Filter Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xingyuan Environment Technology Co., Ltd. in February 2015. Xingyuan Environment Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Hunan Er-Kang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd
summary: Hunan Er-Kang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd manufactures and sells APIs, finished drug products, and pharmaceutical excipients in China and internationally. Its APIs include glycerin, dilute hydrochloric acid, dihydroxypropyl theophylline, sulbenicillin sodium, calamine powder, sulfadiazine, sulphaguanidine, TMP, and resorcinol. The company's finished drugs primarily include sulbenicillin sodium for injection and compound liquorice tablets. Its conventional pharmaceutical excipients include pharmaceutical glycerin, medicinal ethanol, medicinal propylene glycol, medicinal sodium hydroxide, and sucrose; and new pharmaceutical excipients comprise hydroxypropyl starch empty capsules, hydroxypropyl starch soft capsules, and citrate and its series products. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Liuyang, China.

name: Joyvio Agriculture Development Co., Ltd
summary: Joyvio Agriculture Development Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells rice deep processing products. The company provides rice starch sugar products, including maltose syrup, maltodextrin, and glucose powder; rice albumen powder products comprising feed level albumen powder; rice bran and oil products, such as rice bran, rice bran oil, and feed level rice dregs; and edible rice products consisting of general rice and polished rice, and others. Its products are used in food, beverage, feed, medicine, chemical, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Wanfu Biotechnology (Hunan) Agricultural Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Joyvio Agriculture Development Co., Ltd. in June 2017. Joyvio Agriculture Development Co., Ltd. is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shenzhen Liantronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Liantronics Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, sells, and services LED application products in China. The company offers indoor and outdoor rental LED displays, indoor and outdoor fixed LED displays, and fine pitch LED displays. It also provides stadium, stage, advertising, mobile, and curtain LED displays, as well as front accessible LED sign products, and broadcasting studio and video conference solutions. The company also exports its products to approximately 90 countries and regions, including Germany, Japan, the United States, Russia, India, Egypt, Canada, Singapore, Brazil, Sweden, Mexico, Turkey, the Netherlands, France, Hong Kong, Taiwan, etc. Shenzhen Liantronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Joyware Electronics Co.,Ltd
summary: Joyware Electronics Co.,Ltd provides video surveillance solutions worldwide. Its products include dome, bullet, fisheye, PTZ, starlight, and licensed cameras; industrial Ethernet switches, optical transceivers, and wireless products; and storage products, such as NVR and DVR products. The company offers high definition digital video network monitoring solutions for highway, safe city, intelligent transportation, financial supervision, and control rail transportation, as well as provides OEM and ODM services to various security product companies. Joyware Electronics Co.,Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Beijing Thunisoft Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Thunisoft Co., Ltd. provides software and information services to the government and enterprise customers in China. It provides consulting services for clients in various industries, such as courts, procuratorates, the judiciary, government, political and legal committees, taxation, etc. The company also offers products for courts, procuratorates, prisons, fiscal tax, market supervision, financial and health, general office, foundation support, and business intelligence. In addition, it provides consulting planning, project management, system integration, software development, professional training, application promotion, project quality assurance, and operation and maintenance services. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Canature Health Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Canature Health Technology Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells residential and commercial water treatment systems and components worldwide. It provides control valves, pressure tanks, water softeners, water filters, reverse osmosis products, brine tanks, and commercial and industrial water systems. The company sells its products under the Canature brand name. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Canature Environmental Products Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Canature Health Technology Group Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Canature Health Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhuhai Hokai Medical Instruments Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Hokai Medical Instruments Co., Ltd. provides medical equipment in China. The company offers minimally invasive tumor, medical imaging, and rehabilitation and conventional equipment; tumor and interventional discipline, and rehabilitation discipline construction services; artificial intelligence system solutions; and medical gas, clean, and auxiliary engineering services. It also provides in-hospital and regional medical information, and telemedicine services, as well as hospital construction; medical supply chain and logistics management; and financial leasing services. Zhuhai Hokai Medical Instruments Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China.

name: Sungrow Power Supply Co., Ltd.
summary: Sungrow Power Supply Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, and services solar, wind, and other energy storage equipment in China. The company offers photovoltaic inverters, such as concentrated, string, and household inverters for ground-mounted, distributed, and rooftop PV power plants; driving systems for new energy vehicles; and floating systems. It also provides iSolarCloud, a remote monitoring and O &M platform for the operation and management of multiple energies. Sungrow Power Supply Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hefei, China.

name: SanFeng Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd.
summary: SanFeng Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, production, installation, commissioning, and service of conveying equipment in China. The company offers logistics conveying systems, including electric monorail and dualrail systems, P&F chains, friction drivers, skid conveying systems, AGV products, warehousing and logistic systems, AD pan material conveying systems, tumover machines, roller conveyor systems, lifters, off-gas discharging systems, and other products, as well as floor chain conveying systems comprising slate chains and towline products. It also provides environmental protecting and energy products, which include coating transmission line products; pre-treatment, electrophoresis, and spray and dusting equipment; oven and cooling products; auxiliary equipment, such as light inspection booth, shower test and blowing, and water treatment equipment; and electric control equipment. In addition, the company offers intelligent and precise weld, including welding jigs and reciprocating rod conveyors; and after-sale services. Its products are used in various industries, such as automotive, construction machinery, agricultural machinery, storage and logistics, light, food, metallurgy, building material, etc. SanFeng Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Huangshi, China.

name: Shenzhen Hirisun Technology Incorporated
summary: Shenzhen Hirisun Technology Incorporated engages in power information system integration business in China. It offers electric power production information systems for production, dispatching, design, planning, and infrastructure applications; drawing management systems; production conference systems; power communication production management systems; content management platforms; network political systems; and administrative logistics systems. The company also offers communication products, including integrate voice, video, and data communications; and communication solutions, such as optical transmission network, power distribution communication network, local access network, IP routing switching network, local area network, and other networks; application integration solutions. Its products and services are used in the power industry, chain power generation, transmission, transformation, distribution, power consumption and dispatching, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Huachangda Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Huachangda Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd. designs, develops, produces, and sells intelligent automation equipment for automakers and engineering machinery manufacturers in China and internationally. Its products include friction, plot overhead, skid, product release chain, and reciprocating rod conveyor systems, as well as distributed control vehicle systems. The company also provides on-site installation and debugging, after-sales, and other services. Its products have applications in automobile manufacturing, engineering machinery, logistics and storage, and electronic appliances industries. The company was formerly known as Hubei Huachangda Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Huachangda Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd. in August 2017. Huachangda Intelligent Equipment Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Shiyan, China.

name: WUXI HODGEN TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD.
summary: Wuxi Hodgen Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells intelligent controllers for white goods. It offers refrigeration, heating, washing, and small appliances controllers. The company is based in Wuxi, China.

name: Jiangsu Zitian Media Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Zitian Media Technology Co., Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells hydraulic press equipment in China. The company offers forging hydraulic press, mechanical press, and professional press; and individualized metal forming and systematic solutions. It offers its products for use in various fields, such as automobiles, shipping, traffic, energy, and others. The company sells its products in approximately 30 provinces and cities of China, as well as exports its products to the United States, Europe, Japan, and other countries in south-eastern Asia. It sells its products under the Qin Hua brand name. The company was formerly known as Nantong Metalforming Equipment Co., Ltd and changed its name to Jiangsu Zitian Media Technology Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Jiangsu Zitian Media Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Rugao, China.

name: Guangdong Jinming Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Jinming Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells blown film, cast film, and stretch film lines in China and internationally. It provides PE, PP, EVOH, TIE, and EVA resin mono-/multi-layer films, packaging films, agricultural films, shrink films, barrier films, etc.; and mono-/multi-layer films, infusion bags, barrier films, thermal forming films, etc. The company also offers mono-/multi-layer cast films, mulch films, CPP, CPE, barrier films, breathable films, etc.; and BOPP films, BOPET films, machine direction orientated films, etc. In addition, it offers coating and laminators; and extrusion coating and lamination lines. Its products are used in food and commodity packing, agriculture, medical, automotive, electronic, construction, consumer goods packaging, industrial heavy duty packaging, printing and lamination, geomembrane film, breathable film, and infusion bag, solar PV, and other applications. Guangdong Jinming Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: Sansheng Intellectual Education Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Sansheng Intellectual Education Technology CO.,LTD. engages in the intellectual education, intelligent education equipment, and education service businesses in China and internationally. It offers a cloud-based intellectual education services and personalized training services; and infrared touch interaction products for various industries, such as education, finance, transportation, retail, entertainment, telecommunications, medicine, industrial control, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Wenzhou Hongfeng Electrical Alloy Co., Ltd.
summary: Wenzhou Hongfeng Electrical Alloy Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, and supplies electrical contact materials in the People's Republic of China. It offers structured composite electrical contact materials and components; composite clad electrical contact materials and components, including composite button contact materials, profiled contact materials, composite rivet contact materials, clad strips and stamped parts, Cu/Fe/Cu and Cu/Al/Cu clad materials, and novel Cu/Ag/Cu clad materials; electrical contact assemblies comprising staked and welded contact assemblies; and welding and other accessories, such as solder pastes and brazing material systems. The company also provides thermostat bimetal products consisting of stamping parts and strips; and cemented carbide products, including coaling and geological mining products, road repair tools, carbide burrs and rods, tire studs, CNC cutting inserts, non-standard products, wear resistant parts, wood working knives and glass cutters, and tools of processing building materials. Its products are used in industrial electrical equipment, such as AC contactors, miniature circuit breakers, molded-case circuit breakers, intelligent air circuit breakers, relays, and fuses; construction apparatus, including wall mounted switches and socket outlets; automotive equipment, such as thermostats; and communications electronics, which include micro motors and touch switches. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Yueqing, the People's Republic of China.

name: JSTI Group
summary: JSTI Group provides engineering consultancy services in China and internationally. The company's services include project investment analysis, planning and design, environmental consulting, testing, project management, socio-economic development consulting, and other services. It serves highways, municipal utilities, water transport, railways, urban rail transport, environment, aviation, water conservancy, construction, electricity, etc. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Transportation Research Institute Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JSTI Group in March 2015. JSTI Group was founded in 1978 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Shandong Sinocera Functional Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sinocera Functional Material Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of ceramic products in the People's Republic of China. The company's products include electronic and structural ceramic materials, cerium zirconium mixed oxide, bioceramics, architectural ceramic materials, electronic metal pastes, ceramic inks, catalytic materials, etc. Its products are used in high-end industries, such as electronic information and telecommunication, biomedicine, architecture, automobile, industrial catalysis, solar photovoltaic, aeronautics and astronautics technologies, and new energy vehicles. The company was formerly known as Dongying Sinocera Functional Material Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Sinocera Functional Material Co., Ltd. in 2008. Shandong Sinocera Functional Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Dongying, the People's Republic of China.

name: Acrel Co.,Ltd.
summary: Acrel Co.,Ltd. provides power monitoring and management, electrical safety, and other system solutions for grid customers in China. The company produces and sells medium voltage measurement and control devices, power monitoring and protection systems, energy metering devices, building electrical and mechanical energy saving controllers, power quality monitoring and governance systems, and power sensors. It also provides installation services. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shanghai, China.

summary: Beijing Philisense Technology Co., Ltd. provides solutions for digital cities in China. Its products include digital cable conference and wireless digital conference products; matrix switching and processing equipment; multimedia information display devices; interpretation systems; meeting check-in equipment; electronic ticket box equipment; digital sound reinforcement equipment; system host products; and software, security, LED, and Internet of Things products. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.

summary: Longmaster Information & Technology Co., Ltd. operates as an Internet medical company in China. The company offers telemedicine, medical information, video consultation, physical hospital, smart hardware, and medical e-commerce services. It also provides telephony voice community phone services; health equipment; online consultancy services, such as medication instructions, referral, free consultation, and other services; and drug search services. In addition, the company maintains health records that enable doctors to monitor the background, early warning, prompting of diseases, and eliminate health risks; provides health care, diet, exercise guidance, health knowledge, and early prevention of health risk services. Longmaster Information & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Guiyang, China.

name: Beijing Leadman Biochemistry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Leadman Biochemistry Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of in vitro diagnostic products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers biochemical raw materials, such as enzymes, coenzymes, antibodies, buffers, enzyme substrates, culture media, stain reagents, amino acids, and other products primarily for biotechnology, clinical diagnosis, drug development, chemical production, and other related applications. It also provides biochemistry diagnostic and companion reagents. In addition, the company offers medical instruments, such as EnigmaML, an automated molecular test platform for use in clinical laboratory and at the point-of-care, including clinics, doctor's surgeries, and pharmacies; DiaSys InnovaStar, an automatic compact POCT analyzer to deliver result quality comparable to measurements on laboratory analyzers; DiaSys Respons, a random access bench top analyzer; CI1000 automatic chemiluminescence immunoassay analyzers; and IDS-isys, an instrument to enhance performance and productivity. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Bringspring Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Bringspring Science and Technology Co., Ltd. focuses on health data and cloud services in China. It provides cloud computing, big data, Internet of Things, and artificial intelligence services. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenyang, China.

name: Beijing HualuBaina Film&Tv Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing HualuBaina Film&Tv Co., Ltd. operates as a media and entertainment company in China. The company produces television dramas, films, and reality TV shows. It also engages in the content and sport marketing, and talent management businesses. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Beijing, China.

summary: Wutong Holding Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of wireless communication RF connection systems and fiber connection products. Wutong Holding Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Boya Bio-pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd

The company also provides orthopedic medications, obstetrics and gynecology, gastrointestinal medication, enhanced immunological preparations, hepatic medication, cardiovascular and cerebral medicine, diabetes medication, anticoagulation hemostatic, API, and others products. In addition, it offers chemical raw materials, such as calcium hydroxybenzenesulfonate, glimepiride, azinamide, simvastatin, and repaglinide; biochemical drugs and chemical medicines; and other products in various categories, such as orthopedics, diabetes, hepatitis, gynecology, and gut and immunomodulatory agents. Further, the company focuses on the development of release preparations and compound preparations; and offers anti-diabetic products, such as metformin hydrochloride enteric-coated tablets, pioglitazone hydrochloride dispersible tablets, glimepiride tablets, and glipizide tablets, as well as provides tablets and capsules for the treatment of diabetic retinopathy and glomerular lesions. The company was formerly known as Jiangxi Boya Bio-Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Boya Bio-pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in August 2017. Boya Bio-pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.

Sinocare Inc. was founded in 2002 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Fuchun Technology Co., Ltd.

name: Shenzhen Changfang Group Co., Ltd.

name: HangZhou Everfine Photo-e-info Co., Ltd.
summary: HangZhou Everfine Photo-e-info Co., Ltd. provides LED and lighting measurement instruments to institutes, laboratories, and corporations in China. It offers spectroradiometers, goniophotometers, LED aging-life test system, LED thermal analysis system, optical radiation safety system, start-time and flicker test, illuminance and UV irradiance meter, automotive and traffic light, test accessories, and automated online testing equipment. The company also provides smartphone and tablet, liquid crystal display, TV, OLED, LED display, vehicle and airborne display, backlight and LCM module, and projector measurement systems; optical instruments for luminance and color measurement; and standard luminance and chromaticity sources. In addition, it offers spectrophotometers, glossmeters, haze meters, test systems for transmittance and reflectance, and standard light source boxes. Further, the company provides ultraviolet irradiance meters, ultraviolet spectrometers, ultraviolet inspection devices, UV standard light sources, and ultraviolet radiant intensity distribution test systems. Additionally, it offers EMS and EMI test systems; shielded room and anechoic chambers; digital power meters; accurate power supply products; electronic ballast and components analyzers; and test and calibration services. The company also exports its products to the United States, Europe, Japan, and other countries and regions. HangZhou Everfine Photo-e-info Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Ningbo Cixing Co.,Ltd.

The company also provides after-sales and technical support services. Ningbo Cixing Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Zhongji Innolight Co., Ltd.

name: Eastone Century Technology Co.,Ltd.

name: Surfilter Network Technology Co., Ltd.

In addition, the company offers network security level, network security attack ad defense drills, cloud security, video network security, and security operation management solutions. It serves enterprises, institutions, medical care, education, finance, operators, and other customers. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Boomsense Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Boomsense Technology Co.,Ltd. provides wireless broadband access solutions in China. The company provides distributed, dual carrier, enterprise, outdoor, and small cell systems; multiservice distributed access system solutions, repeater series products, micro power distribution systems, and base station amplifiers; and passive devices and point of interfaces. It also offers wireless access point controllers, access points, wireless bridges, and wireless base stations; indoor antennas, base station antennas, camouflage antennas, and camouflage shells; electricity security products; and gateway terminals. It is also involved in breeding, fattening, slaughtering, processing, and selling beef cattle; and slaughtering beef and mutton products. The company offers its products under David brand name. Ningbo David Medical Device Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.

name: Ourpalm Co., Ltd.

name: Zhejiang Jingsheng Mechanical & Electrical Co., Ltd.
