In addition, it provides solar landscape, low voltage landscape, and portable solar lights; retrofit, puff, and track lights; and smart security and camera floodlights. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Jiawei Photovoltaic Lighting Co., Ltd. Jiawei Renewable Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Beijing Bohui Innovation Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Bohui Innovation Biotechnology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and after-sale service of diagnostic products in China. It offers GenPlex, a microfluidic automated nucleic acid detection system, fluorescence immunochromatography analyzer, and human body element detection system; and chemical analysis products, such as atomic fluorescence spectrometer, mass spectrometers, chip ion sources, microfluidic flow chemical analysis systems, life sciences related consumables, and ICP spectrum. The company was formerly known as Beijing Bohui Innovation Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Bohui Innovation Biotechnology Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Beijing Bohui Innovation Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Shenzhen Microgate Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Microgate Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the multilayer passive component industry worldwide. The company engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of LTCC RF components, chip inductors, EMI/EMC components, power inductors, and NFC antennas, as well as chip circuit protect and coil components, molding products, wirewound power inductors, SAW filters and duplexers, and chip EMC components. Its products are used in DVD players, mobile phones, personal computers, flat panel displays, car carriers, MP3s and MP4s, GPS systems, and other consumptive manufactures, as well as wireless, digital product, LCD/LED TV and monitor, and other applications. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangyin Haida Rubber And Plastic Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangyin Haida Rubber and Plastic Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of rubber and plastic materials in China and internationally. It offers solutions for sealing and vibration damping systems for use in rail transit, construction, automobile, and shipping applications. The company offers its products under the Haida brand. Jiangyin Haida Rubber and Plastic Co., Ltd. is based in Jiangyin, China.

name: Shandong Tongda Island New Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shandong Tongda Island New Materials Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells microfiber leather products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers sport shoe, labor shoe, and furnishings material, as well as auto, speed tail, airplane seat, and inner decoration. It also provides bags and case, belt, shoe lining, and microfiber for gloves. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Changyi, the People's Republic of China.

name: Huizhou Speed Wireless Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huizhou Speed Wireless Technology Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, sells, and services wireless communication terminal antennas for mobile phone, tablet, wearable device, notebook computer, automobile, drone, security monitoring, and other applications. It offers mobile smart terminal antennas, vehicle-mounted electronic products, wireless charging products, fingerprint and sensor modules, advanced semiconductor-packaging products, precision structural parts, and testing and intelligent detection equipment. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Huizhou, China.

name: HC SemiTek Corporation
summary: HC SemiTek Corporation researches, develops, produces, and sells light emitting diode (LED) epitaxial wafers and chips in China. It offers full color series of LED wafer and chips used in full-color LED display screens, back light, illumination, etc. The company also provides monocrystalline sapphire, sapphire substrate, and other sapphire window materials; and integrated magnetic sensor and magnetic module solutions. The company was formerly known as Wuhan HC SemiTek Co., Ltd and changed its name to HC SemiTek Corporation. HC SemiTek Corporation was founded in 2005 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Beijing Watertek Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Watertek Information Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the software and information technology service industry in China. The company offers embedded system testing products, as well as technical support and consulting services; equipment integrated support products; communication and command systems; electronic component testing services; navigation systems; self-controlled embedded operating systems; integration systems; and radio frequency hybrid-signal chip design services. It also provides tax information products and services; smart-city intelligent equipment and information service platforms; IWhereLink, a multi-source data integration software; IWhereServer, a big data service software; IWhereVideo, a video-related big data grid management software; and IWhereGlobal, a 3D data ball software. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of macromolecular compounds in China. The company offers XLPE insulation compounds, such as chemical and silane cross linkable PE compounds, PE compounds for power cables, and low-smoke halogen-free PE compounds; conductor shielding compounds; and PVC and PE insulation compounds. It also provides PVC, low-smoke halogen-free, and thermoplastic elastomeric compounds; UL series compounds; and PVC insulation, jacketing, and special compounds. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Dewei Industrial Co., Ltd and changed its name to Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. in 2001. Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Taicang, China.

name: Dongguan Eontec Co., Ltd.
summary: DongGuan EONTEC Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of light alloy materials in China and internationally. It offers amorphous alloy products, CE parts, notebook parts, and structural auto parts for use in the consumer electronics, medical equipment, communications equipment, and automotive equipment, as well as in the aerospace, biomedicine, precision machinery, and other applications. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Hailun Piano Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hailun Piano Co., Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of pianos in China and internationally. It offers upright, grand, and intelligent digital electric pianos, as well as guitars and electric jazz drums. The company is based in Ningbo, China.

name: ShangHai Huahong Jitong Smart System Co., Ltd.
summary: ShangHai Huahong Jitong Smart System Co., Ltd. designs, develops, integrates, produces, sells, and services non-contact IC card machine products in China. The company offers rail transit systems, such as central and station computer systems. It also provides community card systems; bus card systems; and electronic ticketing solutions. In addition, the company offers intelligent supply chain management solutions. ShangHai Huahong Jitong Smart System Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp.
summary: Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp. engages in the gas, water, and energy conservation and environmental protection businesses. The company is in involved in natural gas supply and pipeline operations; the provision of water treatment engineering services; and the research and development, production, and sale membrane products. It also engages in waste heat power generation energy conservation, flue gas treatment investment, and engineering activities. The company was formerly known as Top Resource Conservation Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp. Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp. was founded in 2007 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: SinoSun Technology Co. Ltd.
summary: SinoSun Technology Co. Ltd. provides paper based technology security product. It offers Paper grain, an impregnable security technology that has applications in the field of security instruments, commodities, and others; and Paper texture products to protect bank notes and re-control voucher from forgery, alteration, and cloning. The company is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Tianjin MOTIMO Membrane Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Tianjin MOTIMO Membrane Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of membrane materials, processes, modules, and equipment. Its products include hollow fiber UF and MF membrane element and equipment; FP membrane modules; submerged membrane filtration membrane modules; and drinking water devices. The company's membranes, equipment, and systems are used in the treatment of municipal wastewater and industrial water, such as power plant, steel, textile, domestic, petrochemical, food, drinking water, sea water pre-treatment, and other industries. It also provides technical guidance and after-sales services. The company exports its products to approximately 20 countries. Tianjin MOTIMO Membrane Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Tianjin, the People's Republic of China.

name: Guangzhou Devotion Thermal Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Devotion Thermal Technology Co., Ltd. provides clean energy integrated services in China. The company offers clean energy products and services, such as heat, cold, and electricity to industrial and commercial users. It also manufactures industrial and commercial, and home wall-hung boilers. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Yinbang Clad Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Yinbang Clad Material Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells aluminum clad and multi-metal clad materials in China and internationally. Its aluminum clad materials are used in heat exchangers for automotive and off-highway-vehicles; air conditioning; and energy industry. The company also provides multi-layer clad products, including aluminum steel, aluminum stainless steel, aluminum copper, aluminum titanium, copper steel, and steel stainless steel products for use in heat exchangers, air-cooled power stations, car components, domestic appliances, cookware, telecommunication equipment, marine engineering, aerospace and aviation, and machinery and metallurgy. In addition, it offers aluminum clad plates for use in defense and military projects; develops and manufactures special equipment for the military; and develops military special vehicles and equipment products. Further, the company provides 3D printing services; produces titanium alloy powder and parts for aerospace purposes; and manufactures turbine blades molds. Yinbang Clad Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Wuxi, China.

name: Kaiyuan Education Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Kaiyuan Education Technology Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells mechanical samplers, sample preparation equipment, and analytical instruments for coal and coke, alternative fuel, food and feed, and environmental applications in the People's Republic of China. It offers calorimeters; and C/H/N elemental, nitrogen/protein, fluorine/chlorine, mercury, sulfur carbon, infrared sulfur, proximate, volatile matter, moisture, and online analyzers, as well as muffle furnaces, and moisture and drying ovens. The company also provides ash fusion determinators, coking coal indices determinators, and hardgrove grindability index testers, as well as spare parts. In addition, offers sample preparation equipment comprising sample preparation systems, pulverizers, sample dividers, sieving shakers, and assisting tools, as well as hammer, jaw, and double roller crushers; and mechanical samplers include cross-belt, and railway and road wagon samplers, and online sample preparation systems. Further, the company provides management and robotic intelligent laboratory systems. The company also exports its products to approximately 60 countries, such as Indonesia, Vietnam, South Africa, Mexico, the Philippines, Thailand, South Korea, Malaysia, Burma, Laos, Australia, India, Ukraine, and the European Union. The company was formerly known as Changsha Kaiyuan Instruments Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kaiyuan Education Technology Group Co., Ltd. in December 2020. Kaiyuan Education Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Jiangsu Hoperun Software Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Hoperun Software Co., Ltd. provides software and IT services in China, Japan, Southeast Asia, North America, and internationally. It offers software solutions in the areas of software lifecycle management, bank resource management, and big data application services. The company's financial IT system products include business hub platform, a platform that provides enterprise level operational capabilities for the banking industry; ICredit Alert Wisdom, an alert system that predicts risk; big data ODS platform; precision marketing recommendation system, a customer centric marketing model; business integration platform; channel integration platform; project asset management and control platform; and events cloud platform. It also provides intelligent trading command system; Internet distributed core; performance monitoring and analysis platform; financial organization based on big data analysis platform; retail marketing management platform; and financial IT core system solution. Jiangsu Hoperun Software Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.

name: Jiangmen Kanhoo Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangmen Kanhoo Industry Co., Ltd manufactures and sells rare earth luminescent materials primarily in China. It offers lithium ion battery cathode materials, lithium-ion battery intelligent equipment, LED luminescent materials, catalytic materials, and agricultural light-converting materials. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Jiangmen, China.

name: Motic (Xiamen) Electric Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Motic (Xiamen) Electric Group Co.,Ltd designs, develops, manufactures, and supplies insulation components for electrical transmission and distribution networks, and the electrical power industry. The company offers standard insulators, such as IEC pole insulators, capacitive insulators, and wall and pin bushings; embedded poles; and medium voltage OEM products, such as spouts and embedded poles for insulated switchgear. It also provides high voltage products, including GIS insulators, cable terminations, and hybrid fiber reinforced epoxy composite products. Motic (Xiamen) Electric Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Changshu Tianyin Electromechanical Co.,Ltd
summary: Changshu Tianyin Electromechanical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of refrigerator compressor parts in China. It offers mold design centers; overheat and overload protectors; current start relays; PTC starter relays; no power electronic starters; plastic suction mufflers for various refrigerator compressors; plastic spring supports/spring stands; junction boxes for various refrigeration appliances/terminal boxes of appliances; and integrated low power PTC starters. The company offers its products under the TY brand name. Changshu Tianyin Electromechanical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Changshu, China.

name: Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical products. The company's products include monomer polyether polyol, system polyol for polyurethane foam, polyurethane prepolymer for elastomer, polyurea waterproof and anti-corrosion materials, medical intermediate, the third generation polycarboxylic acid water reducer monomer, surfactant, high boiling point solvent, polyurethane fireproof insulation panel, etc. Its products are used in various applications, including construction thermal insulation, pre-insulated pipes, sandwich panels, solar water heaters, household appliances, and automobiles. The company was formerly known as Lecron Internet Media Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd. in July 2019. Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Zibo, China.

name: Cubic Digital Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Cubic Digital Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells steel frame foamed cement composite boards in China. Its products include shaped plates, grid plates, light boards, slabs, industry wall boards, slabs, and composite core roof panel. Cubic Digital Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in research, development, production, and sale of wear-resistant castings in China. The company provides integrated ball mill technology products, including Cr-Mn-W wear resistant cast iron grinding balls, integral step type lining plates, wear-resistant plastic and cast steel combined lining plates, split step type lining plates, and discharge grate rings; and programmable ion permeate technology products, such as piston rods, molds, pin and shaft sleeves, high strength bolts, wheel gears, clutch plates and brake pads, core shafts, piston rings, and valve rods. It also offers high-energy ion beam 3D spray welding technology products comprising rollers, wind turbine impellers, bucket tooth, glass plates, valve cones and valve seats, and ball mill liners. In addition, the company provides vanadium-titanium slag slurry pumps; multilayer roasting furnaces; hammers; clean coal powder upgrading furnaces; high-manganese steel ring gears; metal ceramic tubes for abrasion resistant faucets; metal ceramic erosion resistance arrow-type back-pressure valves; metal ceramic couplings for abrasion resistant oil well tubings; metal ceramic valve balls and valve seats of oil well pumps; anti-abrasion metal ceramic plungers; new generation slurry pump metal ceramic cylinder sleeves; abrasion/erosion resistant polycrystalline tungsten titanium ball valves; and crosslinked polystyrenes. The company was formerly known as Honyu Wear-Resistant New Materials Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd. in July 2020. Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Jiangsu Nata Opto-electronic Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Nata Opto-electronic Material Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development, production, and sale of electronic materials in China. Its products include MO source series products, ALD/CVD precursor product, electronic special gas series products, and photoresist and supporting material series products. Jiangsu Nata Opto-electronic Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Hangzhou Tigermed Consulting Co., Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Tigermed Consulting Co., Ltd. provides contract research organization services in China and internationally. It operates through Clinical Trial Solutions; and Clinical-Related and Laboratory Services. The company offers regulatory submission and approval, medical translation, and good manufacturing practice (GMP) consulting; clinical services in the areas of medical science, early clinical and late phase development, medical monitoring, project management, patient recruitment, and quality management system; and biometrics services covering data management, biostatistics, and statistical programming. It also provides integrated technology services, such as site management, pharmacovigilance, third party audit and training, medical imaging, clinical trial system solution, central laboratory, pre-clinical, and research hospital; medical device/ in vitro diagnostics (IVD) services comprising medical device testing, regulatory submission, clinical evaluation and trials, GMP certificate, EU MDR and IVDR preparation, and value added services; and post-marketing study, real world evidence, and vaccine clinical trial services. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Sunline Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sunline Tech Co., Ltd. operates as a banking software and technology services company worldwide. It offers core banking, digital banking, credit risk management, and bank card business solutions, as well as financial big data analytics and total value management systems. The company also provides a range of services, such as IT planning and consultation, IT operations and maintenance, banking system tests, hardware installation and migration, and training services. It offers its solutions to banks, insurance companies, and unit trusts. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: HPF Co.,Ltd
summary: HPF Co.,Ltd provides integrated logistics services primarily in China. The company's integrated logistics services include lean land transportation, warehousing, and international freight forwarding services; and operates as an airline agent for Shenzhen Airlines and Air China. It also provides financial and value-added services, including money collection, advance payment, warehouse receipts pledging, and supply chain commodity sales services, as well as product packaging and barcode, insurance agency, sorting and combination, and product inspection services for shippers. In addition, the company offers ordinary freight, logistics center, domestic trade, logistics information consultation, domestic freight forwarding, and supply chain management and related ancillary services; and engages in the self-operated, and agent import and export business of various commodities and technologies, as well as undertakes international shipping agency business for sea, air and, land transportation. Further, it provides information loading, general freight, equipment leasing, business process reengineering, and business innovation services. Additionally, the company researches, develops, produces, and sells tablet computers, network players, and other network peripheral electronic products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Huapengfei Modern Logistics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to HPF Co.,Ltd in July 2017. HPF Co.,Ltd was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang Yonggui Electric Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yonggui Electric Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of connectors in China and internationally. The company offers rail transit connectors, such as EMU, city rail vehicle, traction, railway passenger, and special connectors, as well as axle equipment, accessories, and tools for railway vehicle systems; and new energy products, including high voltage high current, high voltage low current, signal, power, mating, photovoltaic system connectors, as well as charging interfaces, standard battery quick couplers, manual maintenance switches, wind power slip rings, accessories, and tools. It also provides communications connectors comprising D series high density type, D Series mixed type rectangular, D series power supply type rectangular, printed circuit, D series standard, RF coaxial, PWRBLADE power, M8 sensor, M12, YGC562 Goldfinger, LED round plastic waterproof, YGC565 series, PCB micro coaxial connectors, as well as AISG male plug terminals, accessories, and tools; and military anti-explosion connectors. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Tiantai, China.

name: Beijing VRV Software Corporation Limited
summary: Beijing VRV Software Corporation Limited develops and sells information security products and solutions in China. The company provides data applications, mobile management systems, domestic and virtual terminal security systems, boundary security products, Intranet security products, anti-virus products, Internet security aggregation channels, and data security products. It serves the government, military, public security, finance, energy, and other industries. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Kyland Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Kyland Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells industrial Ethernet products in China and internationally. The company offers industrial Ethernet solutions, including layer 3 backbone, rackmount, DIN in rail, un-managed, EN50155, ITS, PoE, video surveillance, and intrinsic safety Ethernet switches; industrial Ethernet modules; network management software; serial device servers; optical fiber converters; SFP modules; accessories; multi-function switching platforms; and Profinet switches. It also provides industrial communication chips/bus chips; industrial Internet OS/cloud platforms; and edge computing servers, such as industrial, traffic, and power servers. In addition, the company offers intelligent terminals comprising intelligent gateways and switch all-in-one devices; redundant network solutions; timing solutions that include time servers, time distributors, time convertors, and time test analyzers; and smart city and energy Internet products. Its products are used in the power, rail, oil and gas, and automation markets. The company is based in Beijing, China.

name: Jiangsu DongHua Testing Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu DongHua Testing Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells structural mechanics performance test systems in China. The company also provides structural mechanics performance tests, such as multi-channel dynamic signal test and analysis systems, stress strain test analysis systems, portable test analysis systems, signal analysis systems, rugged dynamic signal test and analysis systems, wireless signal test and analysis systems, isolated signal test and analysis systems, bridge modal test systems, online monitoring and analysis systems, experimental teaching systems, modal excitation systems, and accessory products. It also offers software products, which include basic analysis, engineering application, order analysis, acoustic analysis, modal analysis, bridge analysis, and secondary development modules, as well as online monitoring software platform. In addition, the company provides sensor products, such as speed, strain, and pressure sensors; accelerometers; motion detectors; and force hammers. Its products are used in scientific research, testing, teaching, equipment manufacturing, and other fields. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jingjiang, China.

name: EleFirst Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: EleFirst Science & Technology Co., Ltd. provides information collection systems in China and internationally. It offers smart grid products, such as electricity information collection system solutions, energy management systems, micro grid systems, distribution network automation system solutions, substation automation system solutions, tools, and other solutions. The company also provides health management solutions, including mobile services for medical authorities, hospitals, government communities, communication operators, radio and television networks, enterprises and institutions, and general public. In addition, it offers copyright cloud platforms, such as national digital audiovisual broadcasting service supervision platform and China international digital intellectual property monitoring and protection platform. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Zhejiang Wolwo Bio-Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Wolwo Bio-Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., a biopharmaceutical company, researches and develops, produces, and sells pharmaceutical products for the diagnosis and treatment of allergic diseases in China and internationally. The company is based in Huzhou, China.

name: Truking Technology Limited
summary: Truking Technology Limited researches and develops pharmaceutical and medical equipment in China. The company offers solutions for sterile products lyophilization, ampoule injectable products, vial injectable products, vial(powder) products, pre-filling and sealing products, plastic bottle blow-fill-seal, cartridge, non-PVC soft bag, and glass infusion bottle production, as well as fluid processing systems. It also offers isolating systems and lyophilization laboratory. In addition, the company exports its products to approximately 30 countries and areas in Asia, Europe, South America, the former Soviet Union, and internationally. Truking Technology Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.

name: Qtone Education Group (Guangdong) Co.,Ltd
summary: Qtone Education Group (Guangdong) Co.,Ltd provides online education services in China. The company offers education integration solutions, including planning and implementation of basic campus networks and data centers, IoT and security monitoring systems, and cloud platforms for school teaching and management; scheme design, equipment configuration, installation and delivery, maintenance plans and implementation; and value-added operation services. It also provides educational management applications comprising campus communication, campus security, teaching management, and academic affairs management; teaching applications; and after-school co-management service platform. In addition, the company offers continuing education services, such as continuing education training for K-12 teachers and technical services. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Qtone Education Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Qtone Education Group (Guangdong) Co.,Ltd in July 2016. Qtone Education Group (Guangdong) Co.,Ltd was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Zhongshan, China.

name: Porton Pharma Solutions Ltd.
summary: Porton Pharma Solutions Ltd. manufactures and supplies drug intermediates and active pharmaceutical ingredients to the pharmaceutical companies. It also provides process development, as well as pilot and commercial scale manufacturing services. The company was formerly known as Porton Fine Chemicals Ltd. and changed its name to Porton Pharma Solutions Ltd. in January 2018. Porton Pharma Solutions Ltd. has a strategic collaboration with XtalPi Inc. to offer prediction-guided crystallization and drug solid-state research services; and a strategic cooperation agreement with Jilin Huisheng Biopharmaceutical Co. Ltd. for the development and supply of active pharmaceutical ingredients and related preparations in the therapeutic areas of diabetes and related complications. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Chongqing, China.

name: Beijing Forever Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Forever Technology Co., Ltd. provides smart grid solutions and services in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers full life cycle informatization solutions, such as research and development of resource platform, geographic resources platform, and enterprise integrated service platform; electric planning and consultation, and power investigation and surveying solutions; and engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) solutions for power transmission and transformation. It also provides new energy power generation solutions, including pre-planning, survey, and design, as well as EPC solutions; smart transportation solutions comprising off-site overweight and oversize enforcement, and cloud based overweight and oversized vehicle detecting systems, as well as bridge health monitoring vehicle axle load monitoring subsystem; and traffic survey system. In addition, the company offers electricity sale solutions, including investment and financing, consulting, network construction, professional operation, information technology, and value-added services; water resources and hydropower ICT solutions; mountain flood disaster monitoring and early warning system; unmanned aerial vehicle emergency command and control system; and energy saving and environmental protection solutions. Further, it provides smart conference rooms, online education and training systems, and engineering 3D visualization application solutions; and operates Forever, a cloud service platform that provides informatization products and SaaS services for various industries. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: NetPosa Technologies, Ltd.
summary: NetPosa Technologies, Ltd. engages in the research and development of video management system platforms in China and internationally. It offers video networking systems, such as power video networking platforms, power social video resource pooling platforms, social resource access systems, mobile video surveillance platforms, comprehensive maintenance management platforms, servers, storage-type network hard disk recorders, network video coders and decoders, and matrix network control keyboards; and video cloud storage and video structured server products. The company also provides video image analysis systems, smart community security and protection systems, hyper-convergence live-action command systems, vehicle big data platforms, police big-data platforms, Internet human intelligence management platforms, and physical security information management platforms; video investigation applications; and dynamic face recognition systems. Its products are used in the urban public security, intelligent transportation and city, rail transit, intelligent building, and home security sectors. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Hebei Huijin Electromechanical Co., Ltd.
summary: Hebei Huijin Electromechanical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and service of banking and financial equipment in China and internationally. The company offers banknote processing systems, banding machines, banknote strapping machines, tube binding machines, cash transit boxes, banknote shrink and packing machines, automatic debit card issuing machines, automatic check machines, stamp management systems, banknote sorters and counters, office equipment, etc., as well as consumables, such as strapping belts, security seals, banding tapes, and binding tubes. Its products are used in banks, government departments, insurance companies, securities firms, organizations, communities, schools, enterprises, and institutions. The company is also involved in sheet-metal processing, banking business process outsourcing, software development, etc. Hebei Huijin Electromechanical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Nsfocus Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Nsfocus Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides Internet and application security services worldwide. It offers holistic, carrier-grade, hybrid distributed denial of service (DDoS), and Web security solutions. The company's products include anti-DDoS system, an appliance for the real-time mitigation of DDoS attacks; Cloud DDoS Protection Service, a service for service providers that defeats DDoS attacks, which impact infrastructure; Threat Intelligence Subscription Service, a service that minimizes risk and enhances overall security postures; and Attack Threat Monitoring for DDoS threat analyses and assessments, as well as Exposed Internet Surface Analysis and Cloud Web Vulnerability Scanning Service. It also provides Web Application Firewall, which protects Web servers and applications in defending against the attacks and data breaches, as well as helps in eliminating downtime; and Web Vulnerability Scanning System that helps in securing Website and identifying real vulnerabilities. In addition, the company offers Threat Analysis and Next Generation Intrusion Prevention Systems to detect and mitigate advanced persistent threats. Its solutions include cloud-in-a-box for local and regional service providers; on-premises defenses for managing DDoS services; and Hybrid DDoS Defenses for eliminating various DDoS attacks targeting customers and infrastructure. It serves telecom carriers, data centers, financial services companies, cloud service providers, managed security services providers, and enterprises. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Sichuan Etrol Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Etrol Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures smart industry, automation, and oil and gas products and solutions in China. The company offers distributed control systems, remote terminal units, expansion I/O products, and instruments, as well as specialized industrial products for the intelligent production and development in the oilfield, granary, environment protection, and chemical industries. It also delivers supervisory control and data acquisition, safety instrumented, fire and gas, emergency shutdown, security monitoring, and dispatching systems. In addition, the company offers oil and gas ground devices; products for measurement while drilling; and natural gas processing, and environmental protection in oil and gas, as well as integrated drilling and completion, and fracturing services. Further, it provides three-dimensional ecological monitoring network and application platform for dynamic data; integrated solutions to customers in informationalized and intelligent, and grain storage and transportation industries; and multi-purpose monitoring and control systems. Additionally, it provides technologies of Internet of Things, cloud computing and related equipment, communication technology and relevant products, intelligent manufacturing, etc., as well as smart campus and intelligent water products. The company also offers oil and gas field, water and waste water, city gas, coal bed methane, oil production technology, EPC, and smart park and city solutions. In addition, it provides operation and maintenance, technical consultation, investment, engineering design and system integration, solution and implementation, construction, equipment installation and commissioning, spare parts management, and performance and upgradation services. The company was formerly known as Beijing ECHO Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Etrol Technologies Co., Ltd. in February 2015. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Huizhong Instrumentation Co., Ltd.
summary: Huizhong Instrumentation Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of ultrasonic heat meters, water meters, flow meters, and metering systems in China. It offers water meters for residential water supply, water supply management, modeling, and billing applications; and heat meters for residential, public buildings, temperature control, and billing applications. The company was formerly known as Tangshan Huizhong Instrumentation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huizhong Instrumentation Co., Ltd. in September 2015. Huizhong Instrumentation Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Tangshan, China.

name: Yangzhou Yangjie Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yangzhou Yangjie Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. designs and produces semiconductor products worldwide. It offers semiconductor chips, diodes, bridge rectifiers, and power modules used in lighting, power supply, customer electronics, computer and peripheral equipment, electronic instruments and meters, communication, industrial and automatic control, automotive electronics, and other fields. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Yangzhou, China.

name: China Railway Prefabricated Construction Co., Ltd.
summary: China Railway Prefabricated Construction Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, markets, and assembles recyclable construction materials in China. It offers housing construction, interior decoration, and outdoor landscape materials, as well as other construction accessories. The company's products include square hole, hollow, and solid decks; gardening materials comprising fencing products and claddings; wall materials; and molded sheets and sleepers. It also exports its products to Africa, Central Asia, and other markets worldwide. The company was formerly known as Beijing Hengtong Innovation Luxwood Technology Co.,Ltd and changed its name to China Railway Prefabricated Construction Co., Ltd. in August 2020. China Railway Prefabricated Construction Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Tianjin Pengling Group Co., Ltd
summary: Tianjin Pengling Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, designs, produces, and sells automotive fluid pipelines in China and internationally. It provides automotive coolant, fuel, air-condition, power steering, and turbo charger hose assemblies; automotive sunroof drain hoses; and automotive molding press hose assemblies. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Pengling Rubber Hose Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tianjin Pengling Group Co., Ltd. in June 2018. Tianjin Pengling Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tianjin, China.

name: Shenzhen Ysstech Info-Tech Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Ysstech Info-Tech Co.,Ltd provides system solutions for the financial industry in the China. The company offers investment trading products, including investment trading management platforms; and risk management and performance products comprising combination management, investment decision analysis, investment risk management integration, financial asset risk management and performance evaluation, investment performance attribution analysis system, financial model management system, and financial data warehouse system solutions. It also provides liquidation, accounting, and valuation products, such as assets financial valuation system, asset management system, assets integrated information management system, clearing system, XBRL information disclosure system, and interbank data interface system solutions. In addition, the company offers bank and financial asset custody products, including financial asset management system, custodian bank clearing system, and bank monitoring system solutions, as well as hosting service platform. It serves banks, fund companies, securities companies, insurance companies, trust companies, financial management companies, national social security, and others. Shenzhen Ysstech Info-Tech Co.,Ltd is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Digiwin Software Co.,Ltd.
summary: Digiwin Software Co.,Ltd. provides industry-specific software solutions in the Greater China and South East Asia. It offers ERP/ERPII solutions, including T-series products for large size companies; E-series products for medium size companies; C-series products for small companies; and A-series cloud services for small to micro businesses. The company serves manufacturing, distribution and retail, and micro and small enterprises. Digiwin Software Co.,Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Beijing Tongtech Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Tongtech Co., Ltd. provides security solutions in China. It offers communications security, 5G innovation applications, and industrial Internet security products and solutions to help users achieve business innovation, security management, and data sharing and value mining. The company provides middleware products and solutions; and information security, network security, data security, business security, and other products; and support services. Its products and solutions are used in various industries, such as telecommunications, finance, government, energy, transportation and other industries. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Shanghai Amarsoft Information & Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanghai Amarsoft Information & Technology Co.,Ltd provides IT solutions to financial and non-financial customers in China. It offers software products, such as credit management, risk management, trust management, P2P online loan, and supply chain financing systems, as well as business consulting, system development and implementation, data services, and other services. In addition, the company provides cloud platform. Shanghai Amarsoft Information & Technology Co.,Ltd is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Beijing Sinnet Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Sinnet Technology Co., Ltd provides Internet data center (IDC), Internet access (ISP), and cloud computing services worldwide. The company offers IDC services, including network security, server hosting and VIP room rental services; load balancing, disaster recovery, reverse DNS, VPN, and traffic monitoring; air conditioning firewall protection, DDOS protection, and intrusion detection service; and customized operation and maintenance services. It also provides public cloud, private cloud, hybrid cloud, cloud management platform, and cloud infrastructure platforms; and ISP services, such as optical fiber access, PCM access, EDSL access, microwave access, and point to point leased services to customers. In addition, the company offers network system integration services that include Internet integration for small and medium enterprises, ERP solutions for large enterprises, and network services for telecom industry. Beijing Sinnet Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Beijing Sanlian Hope Shin-Gosen Technical Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Sanlian Hope Shin-Gosen Technical Service Co., Ltd. provides technical and engineering contracting services in the polyamide industry in China. It offers EPC services of polyamide technologies, including polycondensation and filament crafts. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Wuxi Xuelang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Xuelang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells industrial hazardous waste and sludge incineration disposal, flue gas purification treatment, and ash conveying processing systems in China and internationally. It supplies flue gas purification treatment systems primarily for use in waste incineration power plants; and ash conveying processing systems to steel enterprises. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Wuxi, China.

name: Feitian Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Feitian Technologies Co., Ltd. provides authentication and transaction security solutions for secure online banking and transaction security worldwide. It offers OTP display, chip embedded, and fingerprint cards; FIDO2 security key to encrypt, store, and protect fingerprint data; FIDO U2F, a security key for supporting USB, NFC, and BLE communications; mobile payment terminals; PKI identification products; OTP authentication products; smart card readers; smart card OS, a java card operating system; software protection products; cloud based service platform; and BlockChain, a cryptocurrency wallet. The company also provides turnkey solution, which includes secure hardware, operating systems, middleware, software application, and services, such as personalization and remote lifecycle management. The company's customers include financial institutions, as well as telecom, government, and business enterprises. Feitian Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Hubei Forbon Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hubei Forbon Technology Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells fertilizer additives worldwide. The company offers fertilizer auxiliary products, including anti-caking agents, parcels, phosphate ore flotation and energy saving products, granulation improvers, sustained release materials, calcium activated loosening agents, and corrosion inhibitors, as well as slow release materials for fertilizers. It has operations in China, Malaysia, the Philippines, Indonesia, Vietnam, Taiwan, etc. The company is based in Yingcheng, China.

name: Cecep Guozhen Environmental Protection Technology Co.,ltd.
summary: Cecep Guozhen Environmental Protection Technology Co.,ltd. primarily engages in the municipal and industrial wastewater treatment business in China. The company is also involved in the design of wastewater treatment, industrial wastewater, on-site wastewater treatment system, sludge dewatering, and incineration projects, as well as integration and installation of equipment. In addition, it engages in the manufacture and sale of membrane manufacturing equipment; investment and financing services; and pipe network businesses. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: Shenzhen Absen Optoelectronic Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Absen Optoelectronic Co.,Ltd. provides integrated services and turnkey solutions in the LED display industry in China. It offers indoor and outdoor fixed LED displays, outdoor and indoor rental LED displays, and UHD LED displays. The company's products are used in outdoor advertising billboards, business centers, shopping malls, sport stadiums, indoor and outdoor stages, exhibitions, TV stations, traffic signs, and others. It also exports its products to approximately 120 countries and regions. Shenzhen Absen Optoelectronic Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Kangyue Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Kangyue Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of turbochargers for OE engine manufacturers and aftermarket customers primarily in China. It offers turbos for automotive, truck and bus, construction and agricultural machinery, and marine applications, as well as for stationary power in diesel, gas, and natural gas engines; and spare kits for turbochargers, such as compressor wheels, turbine wheels and shafts, bearings, housings, rings, actuators, etc. Kangyue Technology Co., Ltd. also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Shouguang Kangyue Turbocharger Co., Ltd. Kangyue Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1963 and is based in Shouguang, China.

name: Beijing Tensyn Digital Marketing Technology Joint Stock Company
summary: Beijing Tensyn Digital Marketing Technology Joint Stock Company operates as an integrated marketing services company in China. The company integrated data marketing services, including big data marketing, brand strategy and creativity, media strategy and purchasing, social and mobile marketing, content and search marketing, interactive experience optimization, and public opinion. It serves customers in various fields, such as games, Web services, home appliances, IT, finance, and automobiles. Beijing Tensyn Digital Marketing Technology Joint Stock Company was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd.
summary: Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells integrated photovoltaic (PV) products worldwide. It offers solar module backsheets, P-type and N-type mono-crystalline silicon solar cells, and N-type bifacial solar cells; and invests in, installs, and operates distributed PV systems. The company was formerly known as Jolywood (Suzhou) Solar Material Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd. in 2011. Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Hubei Feilihua Quartz Glass Co.,Ltd
summary: Hubei Feilihua Quartz Glass Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells quartz material and quartz fiber products worldwide. Its products are used in fields, such as aerospace, semiconductor, solar energy, optical fiber communication, optics, etc. The company was founded in 1966 and is based in Jingzhou, China.

name: Dirui Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dirui Industrial Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of medical inspection products in the People's Republic of China. The company provides medical instruments, diagnostic reagents, test strips, etc. It offers biochemical blood cell, urine, coagulation, chemiluminescence immunoassay, and gynecological secretion analyzers. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Changchun, the People's Republic of China.

name: Xi'an Tianhe Defense Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xi'an Tianhe Defense Technology Co., Ltd. engages in military equipment, smart security, integrated electronics, communication electronics, and smart coastal defense businesses in China and internationally. It offers short-range low-altitude three-dimensional defense equipment and digital system solutions, battlefield environment perception and big data application systems, training storage equipment, marine digital defense equipment and systems, underwater unmanned detection systems, digital oceans three-dimensional defense system, etc. The company also researches and develops reconnaissance and surveillance radars, photoelectric linkage detection equipment, terahertz security inspection equipment, intelligent sentries for border and coastal defense, and anti-UAV systems and other products. In addition, it provides digital and information solutions for three-dimensional security, such as border and coastal defense, and other areas. Further, the company offers communication electronics, such as chips for 5G applications comprising switches, LNAs, small signal amplifiers, and passive circulators, as well as integrates various sensors; and smart coastal defense products, including unmanned autonomous vehicle series products, multi-parameter detection systems, active and passive sonar, etc. Xi'an Tianhe Defense Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Xi'an, China.

name: Shanghai Phichem Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Phichem Material Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells specialty chemicals and materials for various industries worldwide. The company offers primary and secondary coating materials for optical fibers; coating materials for buffered optical fibers; coloring inks for optical fibers and cables; matrix materials for optical fiber ribbons; and high- and low-refractive index coating materials for optical fibers. It also provides electronic materials, including conformal coating, etching chemicals, and PCB solder masks for printed wiring board fabrication, IC packaging, and integrated circuit manufacturing. In addition, the company offers raw materials, intermediate materials, single-component liquid crystals, and liquid-crystal mixtures, as well as release coating materials. Further, it provides specialty resins, intermediates, and additives. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Beijing Tianli Mobile Service Integration, Inc.
summary: Beijing Tianli Mobile Service Integration, Inc. provides integrated solutions for mobile information systems in China. The company offers mobile information application solutions, including customized development, business integration, operational support, and customer relationship management services, as well as SMS, MMS application, and cloud platform-based mobile information services to large and medium-sized group customers. It also provides Internet finance and insurance services; and software custom development, terminal equipment, operation support, and comprehensive consulting services. Beijing Tianli Mobile Service Integration, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Nanjing Baose Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Baose Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and installation of special material pressure vessels and pipe fittings of titanium, zirconium, nickel, and stainless steel. Its principal products include refined terephthalic acid, methyl methacrylate, coal chemical, acetic acid, coal power, and other sets of equipment; and large hull parts, marine pressure vessels, deep submersibles, and attachment, as well as pipes and fittings for various special purposes. The company's products are used in petroleum, chemical, metallurgy, environmental protection, nuclear power, military industry, and marine engineering and other fields. It exports its products to the United States, Canada, Brazil, Germany, France, Britain, Egypt, South Africa, Singapore, Australia, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Nanjing Baose Titanium Industry Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies washing machine and dishwasher core components, and drainage pumps for household appliances in China. It offers spa toilet, permanent magnet ferrite radial anisotropy rotor, and special engineering plastic products, as well as automotive core components and micro-charged products. The company was formerly known as Jiangmen iDear-Hanyu Electrical Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. in December 2019. Hanyu Group Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Jiangmen, China.

name: Guangzhou Boji Medical & Biotechnological Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Boji Medical & Biotechnological Co., Ltd. provides professional services in various medical study phases in China. It offers services on regulatory affairs, pre-clinical research, clinical trial phases, post marketing study, clinical trial for medical devices, data management and biostatistics, and SMO. Guangzhou Boji Medical & Biotechnological Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 is based in Beijing, China.

name: Liaoning Kelong Fine Chemical,Inc.
summary: Liaoning Kelong Fine Chemical, Inc. manufactures and sells fine chemicals worldwide. The company offers polycarboxylate concrete admixture products, including polycarboxylate-based superplasticizers, slump retaining agents, and slump and water retaining admixtures, as well as polycarboxylate-based superplasticizers in powder forms; and polycarboxylate macro monomer products comprising polyether monomers, polyoxyethylene monoallyl ethers, and methoxy polyethylene glycol methacrylate. It also provides glycol ether products consisting of 2-phenoxyethanol and 1-phenoxy-2-propanol; and auxiliaries of textiles, such as hydrogen peroxide stabilizers, hydrophilic modifiers for amino silicon oils, and synthetic fiber hydrophilic finishing agents. In addition, the company offers polyethylene glycol monomethyl ether, hydrophilic polyester copolymer, castor oil ethoxylate, phosphate ester, polyoxyalkylene glycol/polyether, hydrophilic amino silicone oil, polyethylene glycol, sorbitan oleate and laurate, sorbitan stearate and trioleate, fatty alcohol and nonyl phenol ethoxylate, isotridecanol ethoxylate, and polyglycol glycidic ether condensation products; polyoxyethylene sorbitan monooleate, monolaurate, monostearate, and trioleate; and polyethylene glycol monooleate, monolaurate, and monostearate. Its polycarboxylate superplasticizers, cutting fluids, paint additives, and concrete admixtures are used in various areas, such as daily chemicals, pharmacy, textile printing, etc. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Liaoyang, China.

name: Tianjin Keyvia Electric Co.,Ltd
summary: Tianjin Keyvia Electric Co.,Ltd provides electrified railway and urban rail transit equipment in China. The company offers traction power supply and distribution automation systems, dispatching and integrated monitoring systems, industrial automation systems, auxiliary control systems for rolling stocks, monitoring and diagnostic systems, video security monitoring systems, disaster prevention alarm systems, wireless communication systems, access control systems, automatic ticket checking systems, electromechanical equipment monitoring systems, and passenger information system systems, as well as disaster prevention systems, and others. It is also involved in the development, manufacture, sale, engineering, and installation and service of software products; computer and mechatronics systems integration; and import and export business, as well as provision of technical consulting services. The company is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Chaozhou Three-Circle (Group) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chaozhou Three-Circle (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of electronic basic materials, electronic components, and communication devices in China and internationally. The company offers ceramic exterior parts for mobiles, ceramic covers for fingerprint modules, and ceramic parts for smart wearable devices; piezo micro dispensing systems; ceramic components for fiber optic communication products; ceramic metallizations; anode supported solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) cells and SOFC electrolyte membranes; fixed resistors and multilayer ceramic chip capacitors; ceramic substrates; ceramic capillary products, fashion ceramics, ceramic knife sets, mechanical ceramics, and ceramic bearings; and lithium battery cover assembly products and hermetic terminals for compressors. Its products are used in optical communications, electronics, electrical, machinery, energy conservation and environmental protection, new energy, biological, and fashion applications. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Chaozhou, China.

name: Guangdong Dowstone Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Dowstone Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of lithium batteries, carbon, and ceramic materials in China and internationally. It offers solid state battery materials, such as silicon-carbon anode, single walled carbon nanotube powder/slurry, and solid-state electrolyte; AI intelligent computing products; carbon materials, including single walled carbon, Oligowalled carbon, and multi-walled nanotube powder and conductive pastes, as well as silicon carbon negative electrode; lithium battery materials, such as triple precursor body and cobalt salts; and ceramic materials. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Enping, China.

name: Guangdong Zhengye Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Zhengye Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and after-sale servicing of precision inspection equipment and electronic materials in China. The company develops and produces X-ray machines, UV laser cutting machines, automatic reinforcement machines, UV laser drilling machines, PCB cutting machines, hole checkers, TDR impedance testers, ionic contamination testers, thermal resistance testers, and other precision equipment for use in PCBs and lithium batteries. It also offers lab testing machines, laser marking machines, and PCB manufacturing machines. In addition, the company provides consumable materials, such as filtration purification, precision photosensitive, dedicated plastics, and precision positioning products, as well as other electronic materials for use in PCB, SMT, lithium battery, environmental protection, and food industries. Guangdong Zhengye Technology Co., Ltd. also exports its products to Russia, the United States, England, Japan, Korea, Brazil, Singapore, Thailand, Malaysia, Vietnam, etc. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.

name: Zhejiang Jindun Fans Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Jindun Fans Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, production, and sale of ventilation system equipment in China. It offers reversible axial and jet, axial and jet, mixed flow, centrifugal, ventilating cube, roof, and marine or navy axial and centrifugal fans, as well as mufflers, and air valves and inlets for use in metros, tunnels, nuclear power plants, naval ships, industrial and civil ventilation systems, etc. The company is based in Shangyu, China.

name: Zhejiang Canaan Technology Limited
summary: Zhejiang Canaan Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and marketing of pharmaceutical equipment. It supplies solid preparation and solutions. The company offers granulating, OEB high containment, tablet press, blending, capsule filling, coating, washing, dispensing, packing, water, and charging series products, as well as pharma bins and parts. It primarily serves pharmaceutical industry. Zhejiang Canaan Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Wenzhou, China.

name: Mango Excellent Media Co., Ltd.
summary: Mango Excellent Media Co., Ltd. provides planning, production, and operation of radio and television programs. The company operates through New Media Platform Operation, New Media Interactive Entertainment Content Production, Media Retail, and Other segments. It operates Mango TV, an internet video platform, which provides content-on-demand, advertising, and membership services. The company also engages in content production and operation; music copyright; development of customized games; and media retail activities. In addition, it offers technology and operation support; integrated marketing; and internet consumer and supply chain finance services. The company is headquartered in Changsha, China. Mango Excellent Media Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Mango Media Co., Ltd.

name: Sichuan Zhongguang Lightning Protection Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Zhongguang Lightning Protection Technologies Co., Ltd. provides various professional lightning protection solutions in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers lighting road, earthing products; and box type, power, signal, antenna feeder, combined, and smart SDP products, as well as provides lightning warning and monitoring systems. Its products are used in communication, buildings, wind power, photovoltaic, and LED luminaries sectors. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.

name: Guangdong Yizumi Precision Machinery Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Yizumi Precision Machinery Co.,Ltd. designs, researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services various molding machines in China and internationally. It offers injection molding machines, die-casting machines, rubber injection molding machines, and robotic automation systems, as well as high-speed packaging machines for use in various industries, including food packaging, beverage packaging, medical and healthcare, etc. Guangdong Yizumi Precision Machinery Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.

name: Suzhou Sushi Testing Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Sushi Testing Group Co., Ltd. provides mechanics environmental test equipment and solutions. The company's products include electro-dynamic shakers, electro-dynamic test systems, electro-dynamic vibration test systems, multi-point test systems, life test and accelerated stress screens, multi-loading composite systems, hydraulic vibration systems, shock testers, drop test systems, vibration test systems and sensors, digital vibration controllers, auxiliary devices, slip and other tables, and automobile simulation transport and transportation vibration testers. Its products are used to simulate the vibration, shock, collision, and falling environmental conditions to assess the reliability of the quality of industrial products. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Sushi Testing Instrument Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Suzhou Sushi Testing Group Co., Ltd. in August 2017. Suzhou Sushi Testing Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.

name: Nanhua Instruments Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanhua Instruments Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells vehicle test equipment in China. The company offers vehicle inspection line products, such as suspension, wheel steering angle, plate brake, speed meter, wheel load, side slip, break, multi-axle wheel load, vehicle dimension, and loaded brake testers, as well as free roller and play detector. It also offers exhaust gas analyzers, BASM detection products, VMAS/ASM/lugdown testing systems, and headlight testers. In addition, the company provides motor vehicle emission detection instruments, environmental protection detection systems, and safety detection instruments, as well as safety detection systems, including computer detection/management network control system software. It also exports its products to Asia, the United States, Europe, and other countries. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: Beijing Kunlun Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Kunlun Tech Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and distribution of mobile game platform in China and internationally. It also operates software store. The company was formerly known as Kunlun Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Kunlun Tech Co., Ltd. in March 2011. Beijing Kunlun Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Beijing, China. Beijing Kunlun Tech Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Beijing Kunlun World Wide Technology Share Co., Ltd.

name: Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of automation equipment in China and internationally. It offers intelligent parking investment, construction, operation, and integration services. The company provides intelligent parking solutions for government organizations, hospitals, schools, etc. It also offers automated production lines, logistics and intelligent warehousing systems, belt conveyor core devices, dry mortar mixing stations, concrete mixing plants, tubular busbars, mine safety equipment, solid state electronic hard disk products, and unmanned boats, as well as financial services. The company was formerly known as Xuzhou Wuyang Technology Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co., Ltd. in January 2018. Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Xuzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu LiXing General Steel Ball Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu LiXing General Steel Ball Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells mechanical parts and auto components. It produces a series of high precision bearing, noiseless, special automobile, special hub, and windmill steel balls, as well as other products. The company provides its products for use in electronic appliance bearings, roller bars, delicate mechanism bearings, automobile, and windmills. It markets its products approximately in 20 countries in Europe, Asia, and the United States. The company is based in Rugao, China.

name: Guangxi Bossco Environmental Protection Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangxi Bossco Environmental Protection Technology Co.,Ltd. provides environmental services primarily in China. The company offers industrial environmental services, such as waste gas treatment; and water pollution management solutions and services, as well as supplies clean production technology and equipment. It also provides urban and rural environmental services, including urban black odor water treatment services; water supply and drainage integration projects; and sewage treatment system equipment. In addition, the company offers ecological restoration services comprising water and farmland restoration, oily sludge treatment, and mine and industrial site repairing services; and solid waste disposal and new energy development services, including domestic waste treatment, sludge disposal, hazardous waste disposal, and industrial waste disposal services. Further, it provides environmental impact assessment, inspection and testing, and design consulting services; and smart sanitation services. The company also exports its technologies and products to eastern Europe, the ASEAN, Russia, and South America. Guangxi Bossco Environmental Protection Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Nanning, China.

name: Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD
summary: Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of high and low voltage electrical equipment in China. It offers prefabricated substations, insulated busducts, cable bridges, etc.; and KYN-40.5, KYN28-12, MNS, L-GGD, L-GCS, L-GCK, XGN2-12, HXGN17-12, ZNYBW, and other series of products, as well as supplies CNPC and CNOOC materials. The company also exports its products to Russia, India, Malaysia, Iran, Angola, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Shandong Luyitong Intelligent Electric Plc. and changed its name to Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD in September 2020. Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD was founded in 2003 and is based in Laiyang, China.

name: Guangzhou Hangxin Aviation Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Hangxin Aviation Technology Co., Ltd., an aviation technology oriented company, provides aircraft engineering and safety services in the People's Republic of China. It offers heavy and light maintenance, and component maintenance services; asset management services, such as aircraft project evaluation, asset disposal, aircraft teardown, design and manufacturing, engineering services, technical training, etc.; airborne equipment research and development; and aviation test equipment research and development. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Cscec Scimee Sci. and Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Cscec Scimee Sci. and Tech. Co., Ltd. develops environment protection equipment in China. The company offers magnetic separation water purification equipment in metallurgy, coal, river, oil, car, sanitation, sludge treatment, and other fields. It also engages in sludge treatment activities. The company was formerly known as Scimee Sci.&Tech. Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Cscec Scimee Sci. and Tech. Co., Ltd. in October 2019. Cscec Scimee Sci. and Tech. Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Zhejiang Talent Television and Film Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Talent Television and Film Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, operates as an entertainment company in China. The company is involved in the investment, production, and distribution of TV drama and films; artist management; ads production; post production; and cinema chain investment and management activities. It also engages in the performance consultancy and star agent business; frame and sound production; development and industrialization of movie and TV scripts and other screenwriting related activities; film and television arts and cultural exchange planning, television drama planning and literary creation, and film and television drama promotion and publicity, as well as talent agency and promotion businesses; Internet video production; and equipment leasing for films and TV drama. The company is based in Beijing, China.

name: Red phase INC.
summary: Red phase INC. provides grid systems, power generation systems, and other products worldwide. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Red Phase Instruments Inc. and changed its name to Red phase INC. in February 2018. The company is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Hebei Sitong New Metal Material Co., Ltd
summary: Hebei Sitong New Metal Material Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of aluminum based functional master alloys in China. The company offers aluminum, magnesium, zinc, and copper based master alloys in coiled rod, cut rod, waffle ingot, cast cut bar, button, and compact forms. Its products are used in aluminum alloy sheet, strip, foil, alloy tube, bar/billet, profile, and wire applications, as well as in aluminum alloy castings. The company also exports its products to approximately 40 countries worldwide. Hebei Sitong New Metal Material Co., Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Baoding, China.

name: Changzhou Tronly New Electronic Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Changzhou Tronly New Electronic Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of photoresist chemical materials in China and internationally. It offers photointiators, photosensitizers, photo acid generators, and free radical photointiators. The company also provides resins, such as polymers, prepolymers, and monomers. Its products are used in advanced electronic materials, including printed circuit boards, liquid crystal displays, and semiconductors.
