name: Puyang Huicheng Electronic Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Puyang Huicheng Electronic Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and trade of acid anhydrides and other functional material intermediates in China. The company's acid anhydride products include tetrahydrophthalic, hexahydrophthalic, methyltrahydrophthalic, methylhexahydrophthalic, nadic, methyl nadic, and other anhydrides. It also offers esters, acids, amines, and other products. The company's products are used in painting and dye, plastic, military and electric power, and electronic information industries, as well as in medicines, pesticides, paints, fuels, petrochemicals, and other materials. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, and Southeast Asia. The company was formerly known as Puyang Huicheng Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Puyang Huicheng Electronic Material Co., Ltd. in August 2011. Puyang Huicheng Electronic Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Puyang, China.

name: Guangzhou Wondfo Biotech Co.,Ltd
summary: Guangzhou Wondfo Biotech Co.,Ltd, a biological company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of rapid diagnostic reagents and related equipment in China and internationally. The company offers rapid test kits for fertility, DOA, tumor, and sexually transmitted diseases, as well as immunofluorescence system for use in diagnose conditions, such as infection, inflammation, diabetes, cardiovascular diseases, renal injury and cancers, etc. It also provides blood gas, optical coagulation, and dry chemistry analyzer test strips for healthcare professionals. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: OMH SCIENCE Group Co., Ltd
summary: OMH Science Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells logistics convey systems, logistics storage systems, three-dimensional parking systems, and AGV industrial robots. The company's logistic convey products consist of friction conveyor systems, skid conveyor systems, and chain conveyor systems primarily used in automobile, medicine, electronic commerce, household appliance, mechanical, and other industries. It also offers ASRS, stereo garage, sorting and distributing, automated conveyors, and AGV products, as well as supply chain software. The company was formerly known as Shanxi Oriental Material Handling Co., Ltd. and changed its name to OMH Science Group Co., Ltd. in June 2020. OMH Science Group Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Taiyuan, China.

name: Sunresin New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunresin New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of specialty resins in China and internationally. The company offers ion exchange, chelating, solid phase synthesis, adsorbent, and chromatography resins; and SEPSOLUT equipment and enzyme carriers. Its products are used in food and beverage, pharmaceutical, herbal extraction, enzyme immobilization, chromatography media, membrane caustic soda, solid-phase peptide synthesis, hydrometallurgy, mining, biodiesel purification, waste water and reuse, aquarium treatment, industrial and municipal water treatment chemicals, and SEPSOLUT ion exchange system and solutions. Sunresin New Materials Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Xi'an, China.

name: Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD., together with its subsidiary, provides aluminum products in China. The company offers aluminum alloy forgings, extrusions, and machine parts. It is also involved in the production and sale of mechanical equipment and instrumentation; mechanical processing activities, as well as offers technical services. In addition, the company offers extrusion bars, pipes, small diameter bars, profiles, shaped tubes, and ingots; and heat treatment furnaces, vacuum brazing furnaces, and tension stretching machines. Its aluminum products are used in nuclear energy, aviation, military, electronic, machinery, and equipment manufacturing industries. The company was formerly known as Harbin ZhongFei New Technology Ltd. and changed its name to Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD. in November 2010. Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD. was founded in 2006 and is based in Harbin, China.

name: HNAC Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HNAC Technology Co., Ltd. provides EPC services and automation solutions to hydropower stations, substations, pump station, and water treatment projects in China and internationally. Its products include hydropower automatic systems, pump station automatic systems, intelligent distribution automate systems, water treatment systems, industrial process control systems, DCS control systems, solar power systems, and computer monitoring and control systems. It also offers engineering services, such as pre project consultation, project construction, personnel training, financing plan management, debugging, project design, quality control and assurance, and quality service and warranty, as well as procurement, logistics, and installation of complete sets of equipment. HNAC Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shijiazhuang Tonhe Electronics Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shijiazhuang Tonhe Electronics Technologies Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of high frequency switch mode power supply and related products in China and internationally. The company offers modular switch mode rectifiers, controller systems, and DC power supply systems; EV charging stations, including compact and separated DC fast chargers, AC chargers, and charger modules; on-board chargers and DC converters; and railway signal power supply, special power supply, and EPS products, as well as PV grid-connected inverters. Shijiazhuang Tonhe Electronics Technologies Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.

name: Huatu Cendes Co., Ltd.
summary: Huatu Cendes Co., Ltd., an architectural design company, provides professional, designing, consulting, and engineering services to state-owned enterprises, multinational corporations, private companies, and institutions in China. The company was formerly known as Cendes Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huatu Cendes Co., Ltd. in January 2020. Huatu Cendes Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Xi'an, China.

name: Shanghai Fortune Techgroup Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Fortune Techgroup Co., Ltd. provides semiconductor products and solutions in China. Its products include wired and wireless communications, radio frequency and power amplifier type of components, sensors and others, as well as module for NBIoT (5G) usage. It provides various solutions for smart home, smart cities, surveillance, and finger print identification applications. Shanghai Fortune Techgroup Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Misho Ecology & Landscape Co.,Ltd.
summary: Misho Ecology & Landscape Co.,Ltd. engages in the ecological restoration and environmental construction business in China. The company is involved in the ecological restoration and landscape, and eco-tourism activities, as well as resources recycling and agricultural product development. It also repairs and reconstructs ecological environment. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Misho Ecology Landscape Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Misho Ecology & Landscape Co.,Ltd. in April 2016. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.

name: Jiangxi Fushine Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Fushine Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of APIs and pharmaceutical intermediates in China and internationally. The company offers penicillin, carbapenem, and other products. It also provides contract research, development, and manufacturing services. The company was formerly known as Jingdezhen Fuxiang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd and changed its name to Jiangxi Fushine Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in August 2012. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Jingdezhen, China.

name: Wens Foodstuff Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Wens Foodstuff Group Co., Ltd. operates as a livestock and poultry farming company in China. The company engages in the breeding and distribution of chickens and pigs, cows, meat ducks, deep sea fish, meat goats, and meat pigeons; and food processing, farming implement manufacturing, veterinary drug making, and fresh meat logistics activities. It also supplies eggs, raw milk and dairy products, and fresh and processed meat products. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Wens Foodstuff Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wens Foodstuff Group Co., Ltd. in August 2018. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Yunfu, China.

name: Guangzhou Goaland Energy Conservation Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Goaland Energy Conservation Tech. Co., Ltd. develops and supplies pure water cooling equipment for power electronic devices in China and internationally. It offers water cooling equipment for HVDC converters; flexible AC transmission and distribution thyristor valves; renewable energy converters; and high power electrical drive converters, as well as accessory water distributing pipes. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Haishun New Pharmaceutical Packaging Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Haishun New Pharmaceutical Packaging Co.,Ltd. manufactures, sells, and exports primarily pharmaceutical packaging films in China and internationally. It offers cold-forming aluminum foils, PVC/Aclar high barrier thermoformable films, tropical blister foils, lidding foils for PTP blisters, AL/PE suppository laminates, child-resistant packaging, complex laminated flexible films, AL/PE strip packs, and PVC/PVDC transparent films under the HiPack brand name. The company is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Eoptolink Technology Inc., Ltd.
summary: Eoptolink Technology Inc., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of optical transceiver modules and optical components. Its products are used in various ICT applications, such as data center, telecom networks, security monitoring, smart grid, and others. The company operates in approximately 60 countries and regions worldwide. Eoptolink Technology Inc., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Guangzhou Haozhi Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Haozhi Industrial Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, sells, and repairs precision electro-spindles and related spare parts in China. It offers PCB, glass grinding, lathe, engraving, machining, grinding, woodworking, ultrasonic, engraving and milling motorized, hydraulic static, and straight and belt-type mechanical spindles; drilling centers; and reducer, turntable and pendulum, tool holder, linear motor, and chuck series products. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Sichuan Tianyi Comheart Telecom Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Tianyi Comheart Telecom Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, and services optical and mobile communication products in China. Its products include physical links and protective devices in communication networks, broadband network terminal equipment, mobile communication network optimizing system equipment, and heat shrinkable products and communication pipes. The company also provides system integration services. Sichuan Tianyi Comheart Telecom Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Kunming Chuan Jin Nuo Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Kunming Chuan Jin Nuo Chemical Co., Ltd. produces and sells phosphate products in China. The company's products include feed grade phosphate, fertilizer grade phosphate, and industrial grade phosphoric acid and fine phosphates, as well as iron concentrate powder. Kunming Chuan Jin Nuo Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Kunming, China.

name: Shenzhen Minkave Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Minkave Technology Co., Ltd. engages in undertaking lighting engineering projects in China. It undertakes projects in the areas of urban night planning, cultural tourism scenic spot, smart street light systems, and light shows. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Minkave City Lighting Technology Co., Ltd. Shenzhen Minkave Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Olive Sensors High-Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Olive Sensors High-Tech Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells auto parts. It offers sensors and accessories, fuel system accessories, and automotive interior parts. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Hi-Tech Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Olive Sensors High-Tech Co., Ltd. in October 2010. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Yangzhou, China.

name: Shanghai Weihong Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Weihong Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. provides motion control system solutions in China and internationally. It offers control cards; integrated and handheld CNC systems; servo drivers; and CNC accessories, including manual pulse generators and tool sensors. The company sells its CNC controllers for machine tool manufacturers. Its products are used in various industries, such as machining centers, laser and waterjet cutting, engraving and milling, mold making, advertising, glass and stone machining, etc. Shanghai Weihong Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Jiangsu Newamstar Packaging Machinery Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Newamstar Packaging Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of beverage packaging machinery in China and internationally. The company offers pretreatment systems, including water treatment, processing, UHT, CIP, COP/SOP, and disinfectant blending systems, as well as carbon mixers; Starbloc, bottled water, container, aseptic, ultra-clean, CSD, hot-fill, and non-beverage combiblocks; blowing systems, such as bottle, container, and gallon blowers; and aseptic, ultra-clean, hot, water, gallon-water, CSD, liquor, condiment, edible oil, and daily chemical product filling systems. It also provides secondary packaging systems comprising conveyor systems, bottle warmers, bottle tilting systems, shower cooling tunnels, film and carton wrappers, sorting robots, robot encasers and palletizers, and mechanical palletizers; and automated warehouse systems, rail guided vehicles, automated guided vehicles, and warehouse management systems. The company is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: Jilin Jinguan Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin Jinguan Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design engineering, manufacture, construction, operation, and maintenance of power supply solutions for cities and communities in China. The company offers full gas insulated intelligent, semi gas insulated, and solid insulated ring main units, as well as outdoor ring main unit switching stations; fixed and movable high-voltage switchgears; vacuum circuit breaker and column switch series medium-voltage switchgears; box-type substations; and fixed, drawer, and fix partitioned low voltage switchgears. It also provides power cables and accessories, such as cold shrinkable cross-linked cable accessories, cross-linked cable silicone rubber GIS terminals, full cold shrinkable cross-linked cable silicone insulated joints and straight joints, and pull-type cable plug terminals. In addition, the company offers smart grid system, municipal engineering system, energy and chemical system, rail transit system, and international cooperation solutions. Jilin Jinguan Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Changchun, China.

name: Shanghai Xuerong Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Xuerong Biotechnology Co., Ltd., a bio-agricultural company, engages in the research, production, and marketing of edible fungi primarily in the People's Republic of China. It offers various mushroom products, such as white enoki, white-shimeji, brown-shimeji, seafood mushroom, king crab mushroom, king oyster mushroom, pleurotus nebrodensis, agaricus bisporus, and shiitake. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hangzhou Zhongya Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Zhongya Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of packaging equipment for liquid products in China and internationally. Its products include filling sealing equipment comprising pouch filling equipment, such as aseptic soft-packaging forming filling sealing equipment; cup filling equipment, which include plastic cup forming, linear preformed cup, and rotary preformed cup filling sealing equipment, as well as PET cup forming filling sealing machines; and bottle filling equipment consisting of linear clean type and ultra clean type plastic bottle filling capping, linear aseptic plastic bottle filling capping, rotary plastic bottle weighing filling capping, and rotary plastic bottle filling sealing equipment, as well as blowing filling capping integrated machines. The company also provides bottle blow equipment, including full automatic and electric extrusion blow molding machines, full automatic injection blow and stretch blow molding machines, full electric injection stretch blow molding machines, and full automatic high speed rotary stretch blow molding machines. In addition, it offers downstream packaging equipment, such as sleeve wrapping, case packing and box packing, and stick product case packing equipment, as well as case packing machines; and integrated lines solutions comprising aseptic soft pouch product packaging, multi-pack product packaging, preformed cup product packaging, liquid ultra clean bottle beverage product, high volume bottle product packaging, pouch product downstream case packing, daily chemicals bottle product packaging, bottle carbonated beverage ultra clean, and preformed can product ultra clean production lines. The company's products are used in dairy, beverage, edible oil and grease, seasoning, household, and other industries. Hangzhou Zhongya Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Friendcom Technology Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Friendcom Technology Development Co., Ltd. provides wireless M2M solutions worldwide. The company offers low voltage power collection terminal products, including micro power wireless, power line carrier, and CFDA auxiliary equipment; intelligent power distribution products; water and gas heat meter low power modules; wireless digital radios; RF modules; water meters; gas meters; energy meters; automatic meter reading equipment; electric meters; wireless M-Bus modules; cellular network modules; LoRa products, which includes WAN modules and terminals; and sewage treatment. The company's products are used in smart grid, utility metering, wireless connectivity, and test equipment; and in the areas of smart home, intelligent security, intelligent transportation, precision agriculture, utilities meter data collection, etc. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hunan Sundy Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Sundy Science and Technology Co., Ltd. supplies coal analysis solutions in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers bomb calorimeters; elemental analyzers, including carbon hydrogen and nitrogen, infrared sulfur, coulomb sulfur, and fluorine and chlorine analyzers; and thermogravimetric analyzers comprising loss on ignition analyzers, moisture analyzers, and intelligent muffle furnaces. It also provides ash fusion testers; hardgrove grindability index testers; sample preparation equipment, such as quick dryer, hammer crusher and divider, jaw crusher, double roll crusher, humid coal hammer crusher and divider, pulverizer, automatic divider, standard sieve shaker, environmental sieve, and crushing dividing combined products; and auto sampling systems comprising fuel management and control, integrated sampling and sample preparation system, and coal yard dynamic management and control systems. In addition, the company offers preceding stage sample preparation, online total moisture test, automatic sample storing and checking cabinet, dust extraction, and coal quality management systems, as well as stationery laser and unmanned aerial vehicle stockpile inventorying equipment. Its products are used in coal and coke, biomass fuel, food and feed, and environmental applications. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.

name: Hubei Jiuzhiyang Infrared System Co., Ltd
summary: Hubei Jiuzhiyang Infrared System Co., Ltd engages in the research, production, and marketing of infrared thermal imagers in China. The company offers uncooled and cooled infrared imagers; laser range finders; and hand-held and physical thermoscopes. Its products are used in the areas of marine surveillance, law enforcement, security and protection monitoring, forest fire prevention, supervising and rescue for aquatic transportation, search and rescue, industrial detection, inspection and quarantine, assistant driving, etc. The company is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Haibo Heavy Engineering Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Haibo Heavy Engineering Science and Technology Co., Ltd. engages in construction and installation of steel bridge structures in China. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Wuhan, China.

name: Shen Zhen Shengxunda Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shen Zhen Shengxunda Technology Co.,Ltd engages in Internet content development activities in Thailand, Indonesia, China, and internationally. The company is involved in game research and development, agency publishing, platform operation, and mobile application development activities. Shen Zhen Shengxunda Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2006 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang Xinguang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Xinguang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. produces and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers pharmaceutical products in the areas of cardiovascular, orthopedics, health food, respiratory system, digestive system, and urinary system; and products for the removal of heat and toxic substances, as well as tonic and other products. It offers its products in the form of oral solution, troche, capsule, granule, syrup, and bulks. Zhejiang Xinguang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is based in Shengzhou, China.

name: GuoChuang Software Co.,Ltd.
summary: GuoChuang Software Co.,Ltd operates as a software company in China and internationally. It offers software research and development services, including offshore software development, software application development, system integration, and maintenance service for various industries, such as tobacco, telecom, electric power, financing, healthcare, manufacturing, e-commerce, education, retail, etc., as well as governments. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Hefei, China.

name: AMSKY Technology Co., Ltd
summary: AMSKY Technology Co., Ltd researches, develops, manufactures, and sells industrial printing technology in China and internationally. The company provides 3D printing series and CTP series printers. Its products are applied in 3D printing, digital garment printing, electronic printing, inkjet ceramics, outdoor inkjet, and label printing. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Amsky Technology Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to AMSKY Technology Co., Ltd in May 2018. AMSKY Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Suzhou Sunmun Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Sunmun Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of water based colorants and computer toning integrated systems in the People's Republic of China. Its products include pigment printing paste, such as architectural pigment paste, water based industrial, and solvent based paste; textile fiber paste; latex paste; and SUA additives, as well as colorant used for coating, latex products, paper making, leather, textile, fiber, ink, etc. Suzhou Sunmun Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kunshan, the People's Republic of China.

name: China Harzone Industry Corp., Ltd
summary: China Harzone Industry Corp., Ltd engages in the research and development, production, and sales of emergency traffic engineering equipment in China and internationally. The company offers emergency traffic equipment, such as road equipment series for highways, waterways, aviation, and railway emergency traffics. It also provides emergency rescue disposal equipment, including medical vehicles, high-power long-distance water supply and drainage special vehicles, squad and power cars, command vehicles, snowplow, office vehicles, emergency rescue disposal, emergency rescue obstacle-crossing passage, and HZ-sand-throwing emergency vehicles and launch vehicles. In addition, the company offers fire rescue equipment; and public emergency fitting equipment comprising emergency lighting products, non-woven face masks, emergency kits, gas masks, on-board emergency kits, emergency data lines, multi-purpose vehicle window breakers, and portable fire extinguishers. Further, it offers floating bridges, such as belt-type, split, and powered floating bridges; motorized piers; floating docks; and amphibious mechanized bridge, such as tank and wheeled impact bridges, and others. It offers its products for military and civil sectors. China Harzone Industry Corp. was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Wuhan, China.

name: Omnijoi Media Corporation
summary: Omnijoi Media Corporation operates in the television and movie industry. The company produces and distributes drama series and movies. It also operates and franchises cineplexes with screens. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Jafron Biomedical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jafron Biomedical Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of biomaterials and medical devices in China. It offers solutions for kidney, liver, critical, and rheumatoid immune diseases, as well as poisoning; adsorption products and blood purification machines; and other products, such as disinfectants, online hemodialysis B powder bags/buckets, hemodialysis concentrates, PGA absorbable sutures with needles, and resin bandages. The company offers its products in Germany, Austria, Greece, Turkey, Vietnam, India, Thailand, Iran, Malaysia, Bangladesh, Bulgaria, the Philippines, Sweden, Uganda, Ethiopia, and internationally. Jafron Biomedical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Zhuhai, China.

name: Guangdong DaZhi Environmental Protection Technology Incorporated Company
summary: Guangdong DaZhi Environmental Protection Technology Incorporated Company engages in the research, production, sale, application, and servicing of surface engineering chemicals in China. It offers electroplating additives, intermediates, electronic chemicals, paint additives, polyethylene carbonate polyol, and other environmental chemicals. The company is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

name: Urovo Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Urovo Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells mobile computers and payment terminals in China and internationally. It offers portable printers, scanners, and accessories, as well as provides terminal management software. The company also provides technical support and after sales services. Its products are used in transportation and logistics, warehousing, retail, finance, government enforcement, healthcare, and other sectors. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. Urovo Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Urovo Technology (Hong Kong) Holdings Limited.

name: Shenzhen Bingchuan Network Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Bingchuan Network Co.,Ltd. operates as an online gaming company in China and internationally. It is involved in technology development, technical consulting, and sales of computer hardware and software; research, development, and operation of online games; animation design; industrial and project investment activities; venture capital; digital cultural and creative content application service provision and software development; data processing; and big data services provision. In addition, it provides internet data services and information technology consulting services. Shenzhen Bingchuan Network Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Gansu Longshenrongfa Pharmaceutical Industry Co.,Ltd
summary: Gansu Longshenrongfa Pharmaceutical Industry Co.,Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells traditional Chinese medicines. It offers Yuan Hu Zhitong dropping pills for abdominal pain, stomach pain, hypochondriac pain, and headache, as well as to regulate qi and promote blood; Ma Xing Zhi cough capsules for acute and chronic bronchitis and wheezing; Qiwei Wenyang capsules; Xiaoshuan Tongluo and Compound Danshen tablets to promote blood circulation; Astragalus Angelica capsules for radiation hazards; and Citrate bismuth bacteriostatic gels. The company also provides Berberine citrate films for the treatment of cervical erosion; Shu Xinning tablets to improve coronary blood circulation, as well as treat hypertension, coronary heart disease, and angina pectoris; Sanqi injury pills for bruises, rheumatism, joint pain, acute and chronic contusion, and neuralgia; and anti-inflammatory and gallbladder tablets for heat, dampness, and daring treatment. In addition, it offers Pediatric Qingfei Zhike tablets for the treatment of heat, cough, and phlegm; pediatric clearing spirit tablets; and Suanzaoren oil drop pills to regulate blood lipids. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Lanzhou, China.

name: Sichuan Dowell Science and Technology Inc.
summary: Sichuan Dowell Science and Technology Inc. researches, develops, produces, and sells leather chemicals in China. The company offers tanning materials, leather functional additives, finishing materials, and colorants, industrial coating, waterborne wood paints; and wood adhesive, as well as provides intelligent device. It also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Europe, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.

name: Wuhan Nusun Landscape Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Nusun Landscape Co., Ltd. engages in landscape services in China. The company provides landscape construction, landscape architecture design, municipal public works construction, garden construction, and building decoration engineering contracts. Wuhan Nusun Landscape Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Wuhan, China.

name: Jiangsu Kuangshun Photosensitivity New-Material Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Kuangshun Photosensitivity New-Material Stock Co., Ltd. develops and produces photosensitive materials in China. It offers liquid photosensitive solder resist ink, UV-curable tag printing ink, heat curing marking ink, photosensitive circuit ink, UV curing acid resistant and anti-etching ink, water-based ink, and glass ink. The company is headquartered in Jiangyin, China.

name: Shenzhen Tongyi Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Tongyi Industry Co., Ltd. provides chemical and electronic materials solutions. It offers chemical and electronic materials for smart mobile terminals, smart home appliances, LED lighting, and other segments. The company's products include high performance mobile phone housing materials, LED materials, elastomer materials, injection automation and intelligent systems, and celanese materials. Shenzhen Tongyi Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Ningbo Henghe Precision Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Henghe Mould Co., Ltd. researches, develops, designs, manufactures, and sells precision injection molds. It is also involved in the injection molding and assembly of products. The company's products are used in home appliances, medical equipment parts, sanitary ware parts, laptop parts, electronic components, connectors, automotive parts, motors, pipe joints, etc. It also exports its products to the United States, France, Switzerland, Germany, Italy, Japan, etc. Ningbo Henghe Mould Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Cixi, China.

name: Chengdu Shenleng Liquefaction Plant Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Shenleng Liquefaction Plant Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of cryogenic technology for liquefaction of varied gases in China. The company provides products, such as natural gas liquefaction plants, coke-oven gas liquefaction plants, coal-bed methane liquefaction plants, air separation units, tail gas from chemical plants and LPG/NGL recovery facilities, N2 and O2 liquefiers, energy storage facilities, LNG/LCNG refueling stations, large-scale cryogenic storage tanks, and booster turbo-expander units. It also offers process package design, equipment manufacturing, project management, project safety control, technical training, and after sales services. The company exports its products to the United States, the United Kingdom, Egypt, India, Indonesia, and others. Chengdu Shenleng Liquefaction Plant Co., Ltd. is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Brilliance Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Brilliance Technology Co., Ltd. provides software development, system integration, and professional and technical services in China. The company's software solutions include international business, corporate settlement system, bank settlement system, and bank intermediary business platform solutions; channel integration cloud platform, total cooperation cloud platform, television banking system, online banking system, and call center application platform solutions; and data exchange applications and service products. It also provides IT infrastructure solutions comprising information security system, enterprise network construction, and data center infrastructure solutions; and IT services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shenzhen Longood Intelligent Electric Co.,LTD
summary: Shenzhen Longood Intelligent Electric Co.,LTD designs, manufactures, sells, and services electronic products in China and internationally. The company offers intelligent controllers and power supply products, battery management system (BMS) and battery packs, motors, and OEM assembly products. Its products are used in smart home appliances, power tools, lithium-ion battery BMS, LED and HID lighting, electrical motor systems, energy products, and other fields. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Liande Automation Equipment co.,ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Liande Automation Equipment co.,ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells industrial automatic equipment in China and intentionally. It offers production supporting equipment and non-standard automation equipment for LCMs, OLEDs, and CTPs. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Sichuan Chuanhuan Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Chuanhuan Technology Co.,Ltd. produces and sells rubber hoses in China. It provides oil cooling pipes, fuel hoses, body attachment systems, cooling system hoses, turbocharger pipes, braking system hoses, power steering system hoses, in and out of the system hose, and nylon tubes, as well as assemblies. The company's products are used in automobiles, motorcycles, and other machinery. It also exports its products in the United States, Canada, Japan, Vietnam, India, South Africa, Italy, Croatia, and internationally. The company is based in Dazhou, China.

name: Broadex Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Broadex Technologies Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells integrated optoelectronic devices in the field of optical communications worldwide. The company offers built-in and external temperature-controlled array waveguide grating; fiber array; adjustable optical power wavelength division multiplexer; reflective and light blocking MEMS VOA; silicon-based dimmable attenuator; chassis, box, and bare fiber optical splitter; cabinet and box type PLC splitter; optical splitter with branch; dense fiber array; and optical fiber accessories. It also provides active optical cable, and optical transceiver module. name: Yangzhou Chenhua New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Yangzhou Chenhua New Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of chemicals in China. The company's products include organophosphorus flame retardants; alkyl polyglucoside, polyether, amine-terminated polyether, and silicone oil; high temperature vulcanized silicone rubber and room temperature vulcanized silicone rubber; and waterborne polyurethane resins, rare earth organic red fluorescence materials, amino alcohol, and polyether amine. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Baoying, China.

name: Zhejiang Meili High Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Meili High Technology Co., Ltd. provides automotive products in China. It offers suspension system springs, seat and interior springs, gearbox spring and spring assembly products, valve springs, stabilizer bars, hot coil series springs, precision springs, composite plate springs, tail door and clutch springs, fine stamping parts, and elastic stamping parts. The company provides precision injection mold and engineering plastic parts. Zhejiang Meili High Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Xinchang, China.

name: Shunya International Martech (Beijing) Co., Ltd.
summary: Shunya International Martech (Beijing) Co., Ltd. operates as an integrated communications organization in China. The company offers various communication solutions for consumer insight system. The company was formerly known as Shunya International Brand Consulting (Beijing) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shunya International Martech (Beijing) Co., Ltd. in May 2019. Shunya International Martech (Beijing) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Shanghai Fullhan Microelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Fullhan Microelectronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chips and solutions for video surveillance products in China. The company offers H.264 codec SoC, image signal processor IC products, and analog and IP cameras, as well as IoT and vehicle application products. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: XDC Industries (Shenzhen) Limited
summary: XDC Industries (Shenzhen) Limited researches and develops, manufactures, and sells radio frequency metal components for the mobile communication industry worldwide. The company offers radio frequency internal components that are used for radio frequency signal transmission, resonance, frequency adjustment, signal filtration, restriction, coupling, and other electromagnetic field functions, as well as for use in filter, diplexer, tower amplifier, combiner, and other parts at mobile communication stations. It also provides light communication components that are used for transmitting light wave signals with optical fiber; precise spare parts; and RF structures primarily used to build an enclosed electromagnetic environment. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangzhou Shangpin Home Collection Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Shangpin Home Collection Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells customized panel furniture in China. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Shangpin Zhaipei Household Products Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Guangzhou Shangpin Home Collection Co., Ltd. in August 2012. Guangzhou Shangpin Home Collection Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Ankura Smart Transmission Engineering Technology Co.Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Ankura Smart Transmission Engineering Technology Co.Ltd engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of equipment for ultra-high voltage cable transmission lines and ultra-high voltage cable connectors in China. It offers porcelain sleeve terminals, composite terminals, GIS/transformer terminals, intermediate joints, and branch connectors, as well as smart grids. The company also provides gas pipeline bus, GIL casing, and GIL monitoring systems. In addition, it engages in laying materials, and monitoring and control of equipment; provision of design, construction, and equipment comprehensive professional services, including testing, operation, and maintenance; and developing gas pipeline busbar for large-capacity underground transmission. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Liyang, China.

name: Nanjing Hanrui Cobalt Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Hanrui Cobalt Co.,Ltd. engages in the extraction of cobalt and copper ores. The company is also involved in the smelting, research and development, production, and sale of cobalt powder and other cobalt-based powder. Its products include cobalt metal powder, cobalt concentrates, cobalt hydroxide, cobalt salts, copper cathode, etc. The company sells its products in China, South Korea, Japan, Germany, Switzerland, Israel, India, and the United States. Nanjing Hanrui Cobalt Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.

name: Foshan Golden Milky Way Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Foshan Golden Milky Way Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of conveying, metering, mixing, dispersing, reaction, filling, packaging, online testing, central control, and other intelligent systems in China. Its products are applied in the fields of organic silicon, polymer compounds, lithium battery slurry, and biochemistry. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Foshan, China.

name: ShenZhen WeiYe Decoration Group Co.,LTD
summary: ShenZhen WeiYe Decoration Group Co.,LTD engages in the field of domestic architecture decoration in China. The company undertakes building decoration works; curtain wall for building; the electrical and mechanical design consultant and intelligence service; steel structure engineering comprising industrial and civil construction, municipal engineering, and factory building with steel structure and other projects; and industrial park construction. ShenZhen WeiYe Decoration Group Co.,LTD was founded in 1994 and is based in Jingzhou, China.

name: Doctorglasses Chain Co.,Ltd
summary: Doctorglasses Chain Co., Ltd engages in retail of eyewear in China. The company offers glasses under the President optical, Dr. glasses z√É¬®le, and artificial stone brand names. It operates 318 chain stores, including 304 direct stores and 14 franchised stores. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu JieJie Microelectronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu JieJie Microelectronics Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, and markets semiconductor discrete components and power electronic devices in China and internationally. It offers thyristor wafers, including TRIACS, SCRS, power transistors, Darlington transistors, etc.; protective device wafers, such as TSS, SIDAC, TVS, ESD, etc.; and FRD wafers comprising FRD, STD, etc. The company also provides triode device packaging and testing products; and diode device packaging and testing products. Its products are used in washing machines, vacuum cleaners, electronic fans, water purifiers, instant electronic showers, negative ion generators, and leakage circuit breakers. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Qidong, China.

name: Huarui Electrical Appliance Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huarui Electrical Appliance Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells commutators and other precision parts for motors in China and internationally. It offers riser type, hook type, shell type, and planar type commutators. Its products are used in automobile industry, power tools, household appliances, medical and office equipment, aerospace, other motors, etc. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Ningbo, China.

name: Shanghai Huace Navigation Technology Ltd
summary: Shanghai Huace Navigation Technology Ltd. operates as a GNSS positioning technology and products company in China and internationally. The company offers GNSS survey and engineering products, as well as software solutions for high precision surveying and positioning, engineering, mapping, GIS data collection, road stakeout, and pipeline surveying; GIS data collection products; GNSS infrastructures; unmanned aircraft systems; and precision agricultural products for various applications and industries, such as auto-steering, ditching, ridging, seeding, inter-tillage, etc. It also provides rugged total stations for optical surveying; and vehicle-independent mobile mapping solutions, as well as products for marine construction industry. Shanghai Huace Navigation Technology Ltd. has a strategic collaboration agreement with CMMB Silkwave Limited to jointly develop the BeiDou navigation applications and services. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: Yealink Network Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yealink Network Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides video conferencing, voice communications, and collaboration solutions in Europe, the Americas, and internationally. The company offers Microsoft and Zoom device products comprising Teams rooms systems, Zoom rooms systems, USB cameras and BYOD kits, space IOT devices, room audio devices, room system accessories, room mount kits and cables, teams phones, and zoom phones; headset products consisting of Bluetooth and DECT wireless headsets, wired headsets, speakerphones, headset accessories, and headset selectors; IP phone products, such as team phones, zoom phones, conference phones, DECT phones, Wi-Fi IP phones, 4G phones, and phone accessories; management platforms comprising device management platforms, management cloud services, and USB connect management services; and EoS and EoL products. It also provides finance, education, healthcare, and manufacturing solutions; future workers, headset and handset, personal collaboration, and desktop video solutions; Microsoft Teams room and phone, AV ONE, SkySound audio, and BYOD solutions; small, medium, large, and extra-large room solutions; Zoom rooms, phone, and meetings solutions; RingCentral, 3CX, Extron, Broadsoft, Metaswitch, and BlueJeans solutions; and home support, pre-sale, after-sale, and Yealink Academy services. In addition, the company engages in software development and information system integration services; technology promotion and application services; and the sale of unified communication terminals. Yealink Network Technology Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Hainan Poly Pharm. Co., Ltd.
summary: Hainan Poly Pharm. Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers APIs. The company offers formulations in various therapeutic areas, which include anti-allergy, non-steroid anti-inflammatory, antibiotic, and digestive drugs. Its products include desloratadine preparations in anti-allergy drugs, diclofenac preparations in non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, azithromycin for injection and clarithromycin preparations in antibiotic drugs, and trimebutine maleate preparations in digestive drugs. Hainan Poly Pharm. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Haikou, China.

name: JiangSu JiuWu Hi-Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: JiangSu JiuWu Hi-Tech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ceramic membranes in China. The company provides ceramic membranes element, module, machine lab and pilot, and filtration systems, as well as flat sheet membranes. It offers organic membrane modules, machine lab and pilots, and filtration systems. Its products are used in various industries such as food and beverage, bio-pharm, chemical and petro chemical, water and wastewater treatment, gas cleaning system, river and lake cleaning, and seawater desalination. JiangSu JiuWu Hi-Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Xiamen Guangpu Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Guangpu Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of LED packaging and application products in China. It offers LED panel lights, LED ceiling lights, LED lights, LED downlights, LED light sources, LED landscape lightings, LED bracket lights, LED night lights; CHIP series; LED backlight modules; and FPC products. Xiamen Guangpu Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: SonoScape Medical Corp.
summary: SonoScape Medical Corp. develops and manufactures medical equipment in China and internationally. The company offers ultrasound diagnostic systems, such as trolley color Doppler, portable color Doppler, B/W ultrasound, and veterinary ultrasound equipment; and endoscopy equipment, such as image processors, light sources, and gastroenterology products. It also provides technical and spare parts support, training, upgradation, and field services. SonoScape Medical Corp. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd. provides industrial Internet solutions and technical services in China. It provides cloud platform construction and operation, big data analysis, network monitoring, and mobile application development services. The company also offers color messaging system, color messaging enterprise network disk, multimedia unified office platform, color messaging application performance management system, color communication automation test platform, color data management platform, color message precision marketing intelligent recommendation platform, multimedia integrated marketing resource management platform, color messaging mobile application portal, color media operations management platform, color data big data intelligent analysis platform, color message management platform, color messaging mobile application data insight system, color message mail delivery platform, and multimedia anti-spam security gateway. In addition, it provides industry solutions for operators, financial insurance, government business and organization, electric and energy, enterprise, educational institution, retail and logistics, and education and research industries. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Richinfo Technology Limited and changed its name to Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2016. Richinfo Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: SinoDaan Co., Ltd.
summary: SinoDaan Co., Ltd. provides engineering consulting services in China. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Daan Project Management Co., Ltd. and changed its name to SinoDaan Co., Ltd. in April 2018. SinoDaan Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Guangzhou, China.

name: Jiangxi Synergy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Synergy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells APIs worldwide. It offers APIs, liquid crystal compounds, and intermediates. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Yichun, the People's Republic of China.

name: Zhejiang Yangfan New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yangfan New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of UV curing products, and sulfur-containing fine chemicals and related new materials worldwide. It offers thiophenol, phenyl sulfide, thioanisole, thiofuran, pyridine and aniline, sulfone and sulfoxide, and other intermediates; and photoinitiators. Zhejiang Yangfan New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shangyu, China.

name: Fibocom Wireless Inc.
summary: Fibocom Wireless Inc. provides wireless communication modules and solutions worldwide. The company offers LPWA, GSM/GPRS, WCDMA/HSPA+, LTE, and SoC modules. It serves Internet of Things and consumer electronic segments. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Guangdong Hybribio Biotech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Hybribio Biotech Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, marketing, and after-sales technical support services of in-vitro diagnostic products for hospitals and medical institutes. It provides in-vitro diagnostic kits for human papilloma virus, sexually transmitted diseases, thalassemia, and prenatal neonatal. The company also offers female sample collection kits; DNA extraction kits, such as hepatitis B virus real-time PCR kits and thalassemia gene diagnostic kits; and devices/instruments, including flow-through hybridization, auto DNA extraction, and fluorescent quantitative detection systems. Its products are used in the fields of clinical detection, large scale screening, research, and prenatal and neonatal management applications. The company operates in the Asia Pacific, the South East Asia, the Middle East, Europe, Africa, and South America. Guangdong Hybribio Biotech Co.,Ltd. is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.

name: Jiangsu Zhengdan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Zhengdan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells environmental protection materials and fine chemicals in China. Its products include vinyltoluene, a mixture of m-methylstyrene and p-methylstyrene, which is used as a replacement of styrene monomer for the manufacture of unsaturated polyester resin, modified alkyd resin, vinyl resin, and others; and high-flash aromatic naphthas that is used as a solvent and diluent of environment-friendly coating and paint, as well as ingredient of printing ink, extractant for production of hydrogen peroxide, solvent for baking coating, emulsion of insecticide, solvent for rubber resin, etc. The company's products also comprise trimellitic anhydride, which is primarily used to produce plasticizers, such as trioctyl trimellitate (TOTM), polyester resin for powder coating, polyamide-imide resin for insulating varnish, water-soluble alkyd resin coating, epoxy curing agent, lubricant, etc.; TOTM, a heatproof and durable plasticizer, which is applied to vinyl chloride copolymer, nitrocellulose, ethyl cellulose and polymethyl methacrylate, etc.; and Pseudocumene that is used for synthesis of trimellitic anhydride, resin, dyes, and vitamin E, as well as solvent for paint. Jiangsu Zhengdan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is based in Zhenjiang, China.

name: Tellgen Corporation
summary: Tellgen Corporation researches and develops, manufactures, and distributes IVDs in China and internationally. It offers tumor markers, human papilloma virus test kits, ToRCH products, Y chromosome microdeletions test kits, and multiplex immunoassay systems. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Hamaton Automotive Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hamaton Automotive Technology Co.,Ltd. manufactures and supplies various products to automotive industry worldwide. It offers TPMS systems, maintenance tools, parts, and sensors; commercial car, passenger car, tank, and tube valves, as well as valve extensions and valve parts; tire gauges comprising ruler, dial, and digital gauges; and tire repair, valve maintenance, and tire inflation tools. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Nanjing Julong Science&Technology Co.,LTD
summary: Nanjing Julong Science&Technology Co.,LTD manufactures and sells wood-plastic composites in China. It offers various modified plastics, including PA66, PA6, PP, LFT, PC, ABS, PBT, TPE, and other plastics. Its products are used in the fields of automobile, hi-speed railway, electronic appliance, tooling, equipment, sport, and recreation. The company was formerly known as Nanjing Julong Chemical Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nanjing Julong Science& Technology Co.,LTD in September 2009. Nanjing Julong Science&Technology Co.,LTD was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.

name: Zhejiang Zhengyuan Zhihui Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Zhengyuan Zhihui Technology Co.,Ltd. provides system construction, operation and maintenance, intelligent management, and control of smart card related services to schools, government, and military police in China. It offers cards, intensive cards, and freestanding card platforms; basic and online education platform in the school; and card application subsystems, operation platforms, payment and self-service terminals, IC card readers, remote identification products, and visitor channels. The company also provides hacking and communication controlling products. In addition, it offers electronic payment, identification, access control, and attendance, as well as energy-saving and smart home products. The company is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Fluence Technology PLC.
summary: Shenzhen Fluence Technology PLC. researches and develops, produces, and sells radiators, heat sinks, and LED lights in China and internationally. The company offers LED lighting products, including sports, education, facade, solar, infrastructure, industrial facilities, commercial, and household lightings. It also provides consumer electronics, such as radiators, storage devices, memory products, power supply devices, computer accessories, and cases; and flood light, highbay light, street light, and tunnel light heatsinks. In addition, the company offers heat dissipation systems comprising medical equipment cooling solutions; generating set and transportation solutions; aerospace and military testing equipment; and IDC data center and cloud computing centers. Further, it provides smart city solutions for transportation, humanities scenic spots, education facilities, and other fields. Shenzhen Fluence Technology PLC. was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Fujian Nebula Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Nebula Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells battery test equipment and solutions in China. Its product portfolio includes Li-ion battery pack PCM testers, Li-ion battery pack semi-product/end product testers, Li-ion battery pack cycle testers, power battery pack BMS testers, power battery pack EOL testers, power battery pack working condition simulators, ES inverters, wind-solar- charging-ESS control systems, automatic cell sorting machines, automatic cell and spot welding machines, Li-ion battery intelligent manufacture solution and MES, etc. The company also offers bidirectional inverters, charging piles, plasma cleaning machines, Li-on cell distance detection machines, polarity detect machines, cell holders uploading machines, and cell tidying machines, as well as laser welding and dispensing machines. Fujian Nebula Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.

name: Hangzhou Landscape Architecture Design Institute Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Landscape Architecture Design Institute Co., Ltd. provides landscape design services in China. The company was formerly known as Hangzhou Garden Design Institute and changed its name to Hangzhou Landscape Architecture Design Institute Co., Ltd. in 2002. Hangzhou Landscape Architecture Design Institute Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Tecnon (Fujian) Commercial Lighting Co., Ltd
summary: Tecnon (Fujian) Commercial Lighting Co., Ltd researches, designs, develops, produces, sells, and services commercial lighting products in China. The company offers light fixtures, including track spotlight, recessed spotlight, downlight, linear light, wall light, and decorative light products. It also provides LED signage products; standard and customized LED display products; and rental LED display products. The company offers its products for use in retail shops, hotel chains, supermarkets, business spaces, and offices, as well as in the educational, jewelry, photoelectric, residential, urban landscape, and other industries. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Zhangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Jinling Sports Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Jinling Sports Equipment Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells sports equipment worldwide. It offers equipment for various kinds of sports events, including basketball, football, volleyball, track and field, gymnastic, weightlifting, wrestling and judo, tennis, billiards, swimming, badminton, table tennis, handball and hockey, fitness, and fencing and boxing equipment, as well as equipment for disabled and optoelectronic products. The company also provides stadium construction, fitness, event security, and sports facility integration services. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.

name: HangZhou Radical Energy Saving Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HangZhou Radical Energy Saving Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, design, manufacture, and sale of automotive bearings. It offers wheel bearings and hub units, tapered roller bearings, belt tensioners and pulleys, clutch release bearings, tripods for C.V. joints, and other products. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Yantai Zhenghai Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yantai Zhenghai Biotechnology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of regenerative medical materials in China. It offers bone repair material, a partially deproteinised bone prepared from cancellous bones of calves after a series of treatment, such as decellularization and degreasing; oral cavity repair membrane line of products, which are used to treat defects of shallow oral cavity's soft tissue; and bio-membrane line of products that are used in neurosurgery to repair cerebral dura mater defect under the Heal-All brand name. The company also provides skin repair membrane line of products to repair wounds in dermal layer under the Heal-Full brand name. Yantai Zhenghai Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Suzhou Crystal Clear Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Crystal Clear Chemical Co.,Ltd. produces and sells ultra-pure chemical materials and other fine chemical products for the microelectronics industry in China. The company offers various chemicals, including ammonia, isopropyl alcohol, hydrogen peroxide, ammonium hydroxide, nitric acid, sulfuric acid, hydrofluoric acid, chlorhydric acid, ammonium fluoride, BOE, IPA, ethanol, methanol, butyl acetate, acetone, acetic acid, oxalic acid, sodium hydroxide, potassium hydroxide, and others. It also provides aluminum, poly-si, chromium, and ITO etches; etching liquid gold; mixed acids; stripping commodities; KOH developing solutions; tetramethylammonium hydroxide; nano fingerprint resistant fluids; liquid crystal display chemicals; solid thermal resistance to strong acid spray waxes; cleaning fluids; and supplementary reagents. The company' products are primarily used in VLSI, LED, TFT-LCD panel manufacturing processes, solar wafer etching, and cleaning applications. Suzhou Crystal Clear Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen MinDe Electronics Technology Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen MinDe Electronics Technology Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells barcode scan instruments in China and internationally. The company's products include handheld barcode scanners, cordless barcode scanners, scan engines, image platforms, lightweight data terminals, etc., as well as software tools. It also provides OEM barcode scanner engine integration solutions for AIDC equipment manufacturer, such as mobile computer manufacturers, kiosk and factory process control equipment manufacturers, etc.; support services for various customization activities, including decoding software, barcode encryption, resizing and reshaping, etc.; and OEM production and design services. The company's products are used in manufacturing, retailing, postage, logistic, and medical service application domains. Shenzhen MinDe Electronics Technology Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: XiaMen HongXin Electron-tech Group Co.,Ltd
summary: XiaMen HongXin Electron-tech Group Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of flexible printed circuit boards (FPCs) in China. It offers thin double-sided, wearable, and fingerprint identification FPCs; rigid-flex, CCM module rigid-flex, and TP and LCD module multilayer boards; and automotive and other LCD modules. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Xiamen, China.

name: Xiamen Yanjan New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Yanjan New Material Co., Ltd. operates as a material supplier for disposable hygiene products in china. The company offers PE perforated films, 3D aperture non-woven, hot air through Non-woven, and ADL surge, which are primarily used in sanitary napkins, pads, and baby and adult diapers, as well as in medical treatment and food packaging industries. It also supplies raw materials for various hygiene products. The company also exports its products. Xiamen Yanjan New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.

name: Zhongfu Information Inc.
summary: Zhongfu Information Inc. provides information security software and hardware products. The company offers protection products, including host protection products that consists of computer and mobile storage media security management systems, host monitoring and auditing systems, print security monitoring and auditing systems, CD burning monitoring and auditing systems, terminal security login systems, storage media information elimination and removal tools, USB mobile storage media usage management systems, keyboard and mouse display switchers, and mobile hard and U disks, as well as cyber security products comprising network security isolation and information one-way import systems, and network access control systems. It also provides inspection products, such as inspection and evidence collection systems, database and terminal security check systems, and email check systems; and password applications and security solutions. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Jinan, China.

name: Jiangsu Leili Motor Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Leili Motor Co., Ltd researches and develops, manufactures, and supplies micro-motors in China. The company offers micro-motors, such as micro stepping, synchronous, DC brush and brushless, HM hysteresis synchronous, U series, and stepper motors; and drain pumps, peristaltic pumps, electronic water pumps, and pump solution components. It also provides precision stamping parts, metal components, and automotive precision stamping parts; and electronic controllers and drives. In addition, the company is involved in equity investment, management consulting, and import and export trade activities. Jiangsu Leili Motor Co., Ltd was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Beijing Career International Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Career International Co., Ltd. provides recruitment solutions. The company offers executive search services; recruitment process outsourcing services; flexible staffing services, including short-term to long-term dispatcher hires, and project and staffing outsourcing services; recruitment consulting services; and talent assessment consultancy services. It also provides recruitment training services; campus talent search, campus recruitment event, and employer branding services; layoff design, compensation consulting, and labor dispute processing services; and knowledge-sharing think tank expert services, as well as payroll and tax solutions. The company serves multinational corporations, listed companies, fast-growing firms, non-profit organizations, government, etc. in Mainland China, Hong Kong, India, Singapore, Malaysia, the United States, the United Kingdom, and Australia. Beijing Career International Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: Client Service International, Inc.
summary: Client Service International, Inc. develops and sells financial software products for high-tech companies in China. The company offers various software solutions for the banking industry; and consulting services. Its products and services include direct Internet banking; financial open platform; e-banking solutions; and online banking security solutions, as well as business series solutions. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Penyao Environmental Protection Co., Ltd.
summary: Penyao Environmental Protection Co., Ltd. engages in the environmental protection equipment business in China. It manufactures and sells sewage treatment, water purification, environmental protection, and sludge treatment and disposal equipment. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Yixing, China.

name: Zhuzhou Feilu High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuzhou Feilu High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of metal anti-corrosion and concrete protection products in China. It offers anti-corrosion coatings for high and medium grade metals; waterproof and anti-seepage coatings for concretes; water born paint products for industrial applications; and various protective materials for concrete interfaces. The company's products are used in building projects of railway equipment, engineering machinery, highway traffic equipment, high-speed railways, subways, intercity-rails, construction works of water conservancy, coal mines, salt fields, and other markets. Zhuzhou Feilu High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Zhuzhou, China.

name: Konfoong Materials International Co., Ltd
summary: Konfoong Materials International Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells metal materials and sputtering targets for the semiconductor and integrated circuit industries in Europe, the United States, Japan, South Korea, Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Mainland China. The company offers semiconductor targets; metal sputtering targets and backing plates for the solar industry; and metal sputtering target and spare parts for the liquid crystal displays, and shield plates for PVD and liquid crystal glass handing parts for carbon fiber reinforced plastics. It also provides precision parts for semiconductors; clamp rings and collimators for PVD tools; face plates and shower heads for CVD and etching tools; and diamond disks and retainer rings for CMP tools. In addition, the company offers materials for applications in sputtering targets, anodes, solar products, audio devices, vacuum electron devices and cables, etc., as well as technical support services. Konfoong Materials International Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Yuyao, China.

name: Beijing Beetech Inc.
summary: Beijing Beetech Inc. develops, produces, and sells wireless sensor network related products in China. It offers industrial process wireless monitoring system solutions for use in the areas of smart industry, digital oil fields, smart grids, etc.; mechanical parameters wireless detection systems for use in the areas of equipment manufacturing, research and testing, teaching and experimentation, and defense research; and MEMS pressure sensor chip and module products for use in automotive and consumer electronics. The company is based in Beijing, China.

name: Hangzhou Huning Elevator Parts Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Huning Elevator Parts Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells elevator parts in China and internationally. It offers roller guide shoes, hydraulic buffer products, safety gear, rope brakes, UCMP products, electromagnetic rail clamp devices, and pulling devices. The company is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Daybright Intelligent Electric Co.,LTD.
summary: Jiangsu Daybright Intelligent Electric Co.,LTD. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of distribution network automation products in China. It offers pole-mounted switch controllers, feeder automation terminals, and distribution automation terminals; digital circuit, voltage, motor, and distribution transformer protection, measurement, and control devices; communication management devices; digital standby power supply auto-input devices; outdoor high-voltage AC load switches and circuit breakers; and power transformation and distribution boxes, electric energy metering boxes, low-voltage cable branch boxes, metal-clad enclosed switch gears, low-voltage draw-out type switch cabinets, box type switching stations, and metal closed box and indoor AC high-voltage looped network switch gears. The company also provides maintenance and repair, consulting, and door-to-door services. It serves customers through sales outlets. The company is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Shenzhen Fine Made Electronics Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fine Made Electronics Group Co., Ltd. engages in the design, development, packaging, testing, and sale of analog and digital-analog hybrid integrated circuits in China. Its products are used in power management class, LED lights, LED control and drivers, MCU class, audio amplifiers, MOSFET class, infrared remote control, and others.
