name: Huabao Flavours & Fragrances Co., Ltd.
summary: Huabao Flavours & Fragrances Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of tobacco flavors, food flavors, daily chemical flavors, and food ingredients in China and internationally. Its food flavor products are used in dairy products, beverages, cold drinks, baking products, candies, roasted nuts, betel nuts, spices, instant noodles, meat products, snack foods, catering, and other fields; and food ingredient products are used in natural and healthy ingredients for food and beverages, health care, nourishment, and personal care products. The company offers its products under the Huabao, Peacock, Tianhong, Xideng, Huafang, Owada, Australian Huada, Amber, HEDON, H&K, and OWADA brands. The company was formerly known as Huabao Food Flavours & Fragrances (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huabao Flavours & Fragrances Co., Ltd. in 2016. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Lhasa, China. Huabao Flavours & Fragrances Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Smart Sino International Investment Holding (China) Co., Ltd.

name: Nanjing Yueboo Power System Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Yueboo Power System Co., Ltd. manufactures commercial vehicles, passenger cars, power train systems, and buses. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Hangzhou Todaytec Digital Co., Ltd
summary: Hangzhou Todaytec Digital Co., Ltd manufactures and sells thermal transfer ribbons in China and internationally. The company offers wax ribbons, wax/resin ribbons, resin ribbons, fax ribbons, hot stamping foils, tattoo stencil papers, and jumbo rolls. Its products are used in inventory label, medical wrist strap, wash care, blood bank, medicare, logistice, engine, jewelry, tag, chemical barrel, ticket/bill, super market, nameplate, outdoor tag, and ID card copy applications. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shinry Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Shinry Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies charging and distribution solutions in NEV market worldwide. It offers DC/DC converters, on-board chargers, D+C integration products, CDU integrated products, and high power charging products, such as non-isolated type, isolated type, and bidirectional conversion chargers for passenger cars, buses, special purpose vehicles, and mini cars. The company also offers technical support services, including on-site technical support, services network, and lifecycle management services. Shinry Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Hanjia Design Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hanjia Design Group Co., Ltd. engages in architecture and engineering activities in China. The company is involved in planning, architecture, landscape architecture, interior decoration and engineering of municipal administration, intelligence, curtain walls, and geotechnical engineering, as well as construction drawing review, energy saving assessment, and transportation assessment. Hanjia Design Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Wuhan Raycus Fiber Laser Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wuhan Raycus Fiber Laser Technologies Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells high power fiber lasers and devices in the People's Republic of China. The company offers single module CW fiber, short-pulse fiber, fiber delivered direct diode laser, quasi-continuous fiber, 10-100W Q-switched pulse fiber, and high-power multimode continuous fiber lasers. It also exports its products to Asia, Europe, the United States, the Middle East, and internationally. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Wuhan, the People's Republic of China.

name: Guangdong Topstrong Living Innovation and Integration Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Topstrong Living Innovation and Integration Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of home furnishing products worldwide. It offers wardrobe products; hardware products, including intelligent door lock systems, security door lock systems, and art hardware systems; and ecotypic, bathroom, and hollow doors. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Zhongshan, China.

name: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited engages in research and development, production, and sale of electric vehicle and energy storage battery systems in China and internationally. The company's Li-ion batteries are used in electric passenger vehicles, electric buses, electric trucks, and other special vehicles; and energy storage systems are used in renewable energy, grid frequency modulation, communication base station, commercial and industrial building, and household energy storage. Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Ningde, China.

name: Suzhou Maxwell Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Maxwell Technologies Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells production equipment for the solar cell and OLED panel industries. It also offers solar screen printing equipment. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Longli Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Longli Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, production, and sale of LED backlight display modules in China. Its products are used in communication, computer, industrial control, vehicle, medical display, and other fields. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Jiangsu Apon Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Apon Medical Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of medical devices in China. Its principal products include microcomputer injection pumps, disposable injection pumps, wireless analgesia management systems, and pulse oximeters, as well as medical devices, such as sensors in the field of pain management and nasal care sprayers in the field of nasal care. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Nantong, China.

name: VATS Liquor Chain Store Management Joint Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: VATS Liquor Chain Store Management Joint Stock Co., Ltd. operates a chain of liquor stores in China. It distributes domestic and international wines and alcohol products. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited
summary: Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited designs, manufactures, installs, and manages amusement rides in China and internationally. It offers roller coasters, tower rides, water rides, giant wheels, classic rides, carousels, family rides, scenery trains, and dark rides. The company was formerly known as Golden Horse Technology Entertainment Corporation Limited and changed its name to Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited in February 2021. Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited was founded in 2007 and is based in Zhongshan, China.

name: RoboTechnik Intelligent Technology Co., LTD
summary: RoboTechnik Intelligent Technology Co., LTD engages in designing, developing, manufacturing, and selling smart manufactory automated solutions in China. The company offers manufacturing execution systems; clean energy systems, such as diffusion processing automation systems, PECVD processing automation systems, PERC processing automation systems, tesing and sorting, and wet processing automation systems; and assembly and test lines for motor brushes, transformer coils, oil and water pumps, oil control valves, solenoids, VVT intake and exhaust systems, and central valves, as well as assembly lines for valve bodies. It also provides smart rack and storage, FPC layup, laser cutting, FPC sorting, FPC PSA, FPC multi-function testing and sorting, and product unloading machines, as well as bagged milk packaging automation systems. The company offers its solutions for clean energy, electronic and semi-conductor, and automotive, as well as food and pharmaceutical industry segments. RoboTechnik Intelligent Technology Co., LTD is based in Suzhou, China.

name: Anshan Hifichem Co., Ltd.
summary: Anshan Hifichem Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells high performance organic pigments, solvent dyestuff, and intermediates in China. The company serves a range of customers in the ink, coating, and plastic industries, as well as in electronic products, paper-coloring, and seed coloring industries. Anshan Hifichem Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Anshan, China.

name: Pharmaron Beijing Co., Ltd.
summary: Pharmaron Beijing Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides pharmaceutical research and development services to the life sciences industry in North America, Europe, Mainland China, rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Laboratory Services; Chemistry, Manufacturing and Controls (CMC) Services; Clinical Development Services; and Others. It offers laboratory chemistry, drug metabolism and pharmacokinetics/absorption, distribution, metabolism and excretion, and in vitro biology and in vivo pharmacology services, as well as safety assessment and discovery biologics services; process development and manufacturing, material science/pre-formulation, formulation development and manufacturing, and analytical development services; and clinical research, site management, regulatory bioanalysis, and radiolabelled science services. The company also provides business development; and contract research, development, and manufacturing services for pharmaceutical products. Pharmaron Beijing Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: Shenzhen Mindray Bio-Medical Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Mindray Bio-Medical Electronics Co., Ltd. provides medical devices and solutions in the People's Republic of China. The company offers patient monitoring and life support products, such as patient monitoring systems, electrocardiographs, defibrillators, anesthesia machines, ventilators, infusion pumps, surgical lights, operating tables, medical supply units, endoscopes, and accessories, as well as emergency care, peri-operative care, critical care, and IT solutions. It also provides in-vitro diagnostics products, including hematology and chemistry analyzers and reagents, chemiluminescence immunoassay products, hemoglobin systems, flow cytometry products, and micro plate readers and washers; medical imaging systems comprising ultrasound and radiology products; and veterinary products. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China. Shenzhen Mindray Bio-Medical Electronics Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Mindray Medical International Limited.

name: Jiangsu Lihua Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Lihua Animal Husbandry Co., Ltd. engages in the grass chicken farming in China. It is involved in the chicken, egg, goose, and food processing businesses. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Jushri Technologies, Inc
summary: Jushri Technologies Inc. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of military broadband mobile communication systems and tactical communication equipment. The company is also involved in the provision of communication technologies, and integrated information solutions for railway and urban rail transit. In addition, it offers electronic welfare system. The company's products are used in various military applications, including base station, relay, terminal, module, and system software. It has 33 patents and 67 software copyrights. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Ginlong Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Ginlong Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells string inverters worldwide. The company provides single and three phase inverters; data logging sticks and boxes; rapid shutdown devices; and module level rapid shutdown devices, as well as after-sales services. It sells its products for home owners, business owners, utilities, solar developers, and investors in the residential, commercial, and utility scale solar markets under the Ginlong Solis brand. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.

name: CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells caffeine, and vitamin C health supplement and beverage products. The company is based in Shijiazhuang, China. CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of CSPC Pharmaceutical Group Limited.

name: QuakeSafe Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: QuakeSafe Technologies Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells anti-seismic products and shock absorber products in China. The company offers building isolation rubber support block products, such as rubber bearings for building isolation; elastic slip bearings; and high damping rubber isolation bearings, as well as viscoelastic and metal mild steel dampers. It is also involved in the anti-seismic product testing; installation guidance and replacement; anti-seismic building monitoring; and after-sales maintenance activities. The company was formerly known as Yunnan QuakeSafe Seismic Isolation Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to QuakeSafe Technologies Co., Ltd. in June 2019. QuakeSafe Technologies Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Kunming, China.

name: Hangzhou DPtech Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou DPtech Technologies Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells network security and application delivery products and solutions in China. The company offers application firewall, intrusion prevention system, bandwidth management, deep packet inspection, Web application firewall, anti-DDoS, application network, industrial Ethernet, unified threat management, and WLAN products, as well as technical solutions. It serves customers in various industries, such as service providers, governments, power grid, finance, education, etc. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen Dynanonic Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Dynanonic Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of nano materials in China. It offers nano-lithium iron phosphate, carbon nanotube conductive liquid, carbon nanotube, and bag graphene. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Zhilai Sci and Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Zhilai Sci and Tech Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services lockers in China and internationally. The company offers delivery, refrigerator, barcode, RFID, APP, and charging lockers. It also provides after-sale services. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang Windey Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Windey Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells wind turbines and wind farm O&M products. It also provides wind farm planning, technical consulting, and construction services, as well as supplies spare parts. Zhejiang Windey Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Lakala Payment Co., Ltd.
summary: Lakala Payment Corporation provides third-party payment and financial technology services in China. The company offers third-party payment, personal payment, merchant receipt, and related derivative services in the form of online/offline and hardware/software. It provides convenient payment, POS receipt, and cross-border payment services; and Internet finance and community e-commerce services to community residents. The company also offers receipt and convenient terminal, and payment bracelet products. It provides value-added services for various industries, such as catering, retail, insurance, education, tourism, etc. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Xi'an Triangle Defense Co.,Ltd
summary: Xi'an Triangle Defense Co.,Ltd produces and sells airplane structure parts, engine discs, and large and medium-sized die forgings in China and internationally. It serves the aviation, aerospace, ships, weapons, and nuclear industries. The company is based in Xi'an, China.

name: Sinofibers Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sinofibers Technology Co.,Ltd. manufactures carbon fiber. The company manufactures and sells polyacrylonitrile fibers, textile products, and other related products. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.

name: Shenzhen New Land Tool Planning & Architectural Design Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen New Land Tool Planning & Architectural Design Co., Ltd. engages in urban construction activities in China. Its services include urban planning, architectural design, municipal design, transportation planning, low-carbon urban construction planning, landscape architecture design, land preparation and comprehensive development consulting services. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Qingdao Huicheng Environmental Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Huicheng Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. produces and supplies FCC catalyst and additives in China. It offers various formulations of FCC catalyst under the Essence, Enhance, Excel, Endure, Evoke, Agile, Attain, Extend, and Erudite names; and Y and NaX zeolite, specialty alumina, and aluminosilicates for various applications. The company also provides FCC additives, such as HCSP, a ZSM-5 additive; HCSO, a ZSM-5 additive focused on gasoline octane improvement; HIPA, a ZSM-5 additive with enhanced gasoline cracking; HCBA, a butylene selective ZSM-5 additive; VTRAC, a metal and vanadium trap; STRAC, a Sox reduction additive; and BUA, a bottoms upgrading additive. In addition, it offers technical services, including catalyst formulation, routine analytic and on-site visit, and pilot plant services. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pulley, bushing, and other mechanical transmission parts in China. It provides pulleys, gears, sprockets, timing pulleys, couplings, locking assemblies, bushes, gear motors, machine tool accessories, industrial belts, and other machinery spare parts. The company also offers its products through online. Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. also exports its products to the regions of Europe, North America, Asia and Africa. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Dwan Drive Machinery Limited Liability Company and changed its name to Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. in May 2015. Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Meishan, China.

name: Maxscend Microelectronics Company Limited
summary: Maxscend Microelectronics Company Limited develops and markets communication RF components and Internet of Things (IoT) ICs. Its products are used in IoT and RF component applications. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China.

name: Three Squirrels Inc.
summary: Three Squirrels Inc. provides casual snacks. The company primarily offers nuts, meat clams, dried fruits, and puffed products. It sells its products through online and offline shops. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Wuhu, China.

name: Beijing Zhidemai Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Zhidemai Technology Co., Ltd. integrates shopping, media, tools, and community attributes to introduce various products and services to users with consumer content. The company offers its services through smzdm.com Website. Beijing Zhidemai Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2011 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Qingdao Guolin Environmental Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Guolin Environmental Technology Co., Ltd., along with its subsidiary, engages in the design and manufacture, installation, debugging, and maintenance of ozone equipment. The company offers large ozone generators, middle ozone generators, small ozone generators, ozone generators for swimming pools, ozone generators for space, high-concentration ozone dissolved water machines, ozone disinfector, porous diffusers, oxygen generators, titanium diffusion sticks, and injectors. It also provides pressure vessels, such as adsorption air dryers, ozone mixing oxidation towers, PSA oxygen generators, ozone generation tanks, and pressure gas storage tanks; transformers, including dry type air core reactors, flat wave reactors, line reactors, control transformers, and dry type transformers; piezoelectric ceramics comprising needle selection ceramic plates, atomization ceramic plates, piezoelectric vibrating plates, tire balancing machine sensors, piezoelectric power generation ceramic pieces, ultrasonic cleaning oscillators, and ultrasonic cleaning ceramic plates; and glyoxalic acid crystals. Qingdao Guolin Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Anfu CE LINK Limited
summary: Anfu CE LINK Limited manufacturers and sells custom-made Cables and accessories for AV, PC, and mobile applications in Mainland China. The company offers a range of cables and adapters, and smart wireless accessories, as well as power related products, including USB power stations power banks travel and car chargers, wireless charging products, and inverters. It also provides AV distribution products, such as HDMI matrix, switcher, splitter, converter, and extender products; HDBaseT and AV/USB extenders; and AV matrix, switcher, splitter/hub, and converter products. The company is based in Ji'an, China.

name: Chengdu Tangyuan Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Tangyuan Electric Co.,Ltd. operates as a rail transit operation and maintenance solution provider in China. It also develops, manufactures, and sells inspection and monitoring, and information management systems. The company's products include car contact network detection, car contact network HD imaging monitoring, contact network ground detection and monitoring, track and tunnel inspection and monitoring, diagnostic and evaluation, and management information systems. It offers traction power supply and public works engineering services for the rail transit industry. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: DongGuan YuTong Optical Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: DongGuan YuTong Optical Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and after-sales service of optical lenses and parts, CCTV lenses, and related products in China. It offers zoom, 4K, starlight, fish-eye, MTV, vari-focal, and motorized zoom lens products used in the CCTV surveillance, industry, vehicle, consumer products, and other fields. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.

name: Sirio Pharma Co., Ltd.
summary: Sirio Pharma Co., Ltd. operates as a contract manufacturer for dietary supplements to customers worldwide. The company develops and manufactures a range of softgel dietary supplements; vegetarian softgel under Veggiesoft brand; various nutraceutical gummies; probiotic products; tablet and powder products; capsules; and functional beverages. It also offers a range of services, including primary and final packaging. Sirio Pharma Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shantou, China.

name: Hangzhou Onechance Tech Crop.
summary: Hangzhou Onechance Tech Crop. provides brand online marketing and management services. The company offers brand image building, product design planning, integrated marketing planning, material design, visual design, big data analysis, online brand operation, targeted advertising, precision advertising delivery, pre-sales and after-sales service, online brand operations, CRM management, warehouse and logistics services, etc. It operates Tmall and e-commerce live streaming platforms. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Cosonic Intelligent Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Cosonic Intelligent Technologies Co., Ltd. is engaged in the research and development, production, and sale of professional headphones. It offers touch panel Bluetooth headphones, gaming headsets, bone conduction headsets, sports headsets, in-ear earphones, and noise cancelling headphones. The company s products are widely applicable in the fields of communications, mobile video, personal audio, Internet, gaming and health and sports, etc. It provides the OEM/ODM services for clients in China and internationally. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Zhejiang Meorient Commerce Exhibition Inc.
summary: Zhejiang Meorient Commerce Exhibition Inc. provides convention and exhibition services. It organizes the HOMELIFE, the China's household products fair in seven countries, including the Middle East, North Africa, South America, Central Asia, and other places. The company's exhibitions also include the MACHINEX, a global machinery show; and the SILKSHOW, a silk fair, and GOCHINA, a China merchant's global sourcing fair, which provides online precision trade matching service. It serves companies, and professional and bulk buyers. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: Shaoxing BSM Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shaoxing BSM Chemical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, and production of pesticide and medical intermediates worldwide. It offers mononitroxylene isomers and dimethylaniline series reduction products, such as 4-nitro-o-xylene, N-(1-ethylpropyl) -3,4-dimethylaniline, etc. The company is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: NCS Testing Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: NCS Testing Technology Co., Ltd. provides third-party testing services in China. The company offers testing services, including chemical composition testing, mechanical property testing, material failure analysis, nondestructive testing, and measurement calibration services, as well as proficiency testing services. It also develops and sells analysis and testing instruments, NDT equipment, certified reference materials, and other products; and provides anti-corrosion products, as well as related engineering services. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. NCS Testing Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Iron & Steel Research Institute Group Co., Ltd.

name: JiangSu Jinji Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: JiangSu Jinji Industrial Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of reactive and disperse dyes, dye intermediates, and other products in China. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Taixing, China.

name: Beijing Zuojiang Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Zuojiang Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the design, research and development, production, and sale of hardware platform and boards related for network information safety applications. It operates through Products Sales; and Subcontracted Research and Development segments. The company's products include secure heterogeneous dual host platforms and secure homogenous dual host platforms. It serves the military sector. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Lihe Technology (Hunan) Co., Ltd.
summary: Lihe Technology (Hunan) Co., Ltd. manufactures monitoring instruments for environmental automation. The company offers automatic water quality monitoring systems, air/smoke automatic monitoring systems, emergency testing products, and automated laboratory equipment, as well as an integrated information management platform for environmental monitoring. It also provides system integration and operational services. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Changsha, China.

name: Shandong Taihe Water Treatment Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Taihe Water Treatment Technologies Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of water treatment chemicals. Its products include phosphonates antiscalants, corrosion inhibitors, and chelating agents; salts of phosphonates; polycarboxylic and biodegradable antiscalants and dispersants; biocide and algicide; built scale and corrosion inhibitors and pretreatment filming agents; corrosion inhibitors; oxygen scavengers; reverse osmosis chemicals; and other products. These products are used in the applications, such as industrial circulating cooling water system in electricity, metallurgy, petrochemical industries, etc.; reverse osmosis system in seawater desalination, pure water production, etc.; and oil extraction, household, textile and dyeing, paper and pulp, ceramic, coating, electronic cleaning, sugar making, aquaculture, agriculture etc. The company is based in Zaozhuang, China.

name: Jutze Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jutze Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and manufacturing of automatic optical inspection equipment and laser marker stations in China and internationally. It offers inline and offline optical inspection equipment and related accessories; LED packaging cosmetic inspection equipment; and solder paste inspection equipment. The company also provides system integration services, including electro-mechanical assembly, box build, and sub-systems assembly through full system integration; and sheet metal fabrication services, as well as manufactures custom cable assemblies, wire harnesses, and custom specialty assemblies for communication, industrial, healthcare and medical, and automotive and financial markets. Jutze Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: Guangdong Brandmax Marketing Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Brandmax Marketing Co.,Ltd. provides electroacoustic marketing services in China. It offers regional marketing, public relation, conference and exhibition, offline brand planning, road show, tour, display, campus channel coverage, office building coverage, experience equipment, and promotion management services. The company is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Jiangsu Sidike New Materials Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Sidike New Materials Science & Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells multifunctional coating composite material in China. It offers protective material, including computer and phone protective films; electronic grade adhesive materials, such as sided fixing and sided sealing material; functional coating material such as functional protective, conducting functional, insulation functional, shielding, and marked functional material; and film packaging material. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Suqian, China.

name: Zhengzhou Tiamaes Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Zhengzhou Tiamaes Technology Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of vehicle electronic products for urban public transport smart solutions. Its products include fare box and cashier counting machines; on-board computers, driving recorders, intelligent passenger counters, LED screens, and section station apparatus products; electronic bus-stop boards and guiding screens; and scheduling screens, dispatching terminals, and bus dispatching communication machines. The company also offers software products, such as enterprise resource management comprehensive information management system, urban public traffic intelligent application platform, bus comprehensive operation detecting monitoring platform, bus cashier system, bus intelligent dispatching system, travel services mobile client, bus operation monitoring platform, bus oiling management system, intelligent fare collection management cloud platform, passenger flow scheduling analysis system, and energy charging monitoring system solutions. It serves bus companies and cities. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.

name: Hiecise Precision Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hiecise Precision Equipment Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacturing, delivery, installation, and maintenance of fully automatic CNC roll grinders. Its products are used in hot-rolled steel sheet, medium-thick steel strip, headless strip, home appliance board, tinplate and auto sheet cold rolling line, aluminum foil and mirror aluminum wire, copper plate strip, non-woven fabric production line, paper production line, machinery manufacturing and other fields. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Kunshan, China.

name: Beijing Zhongkehaixun Digital S&T Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Zhongkehaixun Digital S&T Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of related products in the sonar field. It provides signal processing platforms, sonar systems, underwater acoustic big data and simulation systems, unmanned anti-submarine systems, and other related products to military customers. The company is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

name: POCO Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: POCO Holding Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells alloy soft magnetic powder, and alloy soft magnetic core and related inductance components for the downstream users of electricity electronic equipment. Its products are used in photovoltaic power generation, inverter air conditioner, UPS, energy vehicles, charging piles, and other areas. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Shenzhen Etmade Automatic Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen ETmade Automatic Equipment Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells equipment for the flat panel display industry in China. The company offers liquid crystal display module, liquid crystal glass manufacturing, touch screen, and OLED display equipment. Its products include fully automatic medium and small size polarizing attachment equipment; full fitting equipment; backlight assembly equipment; and semi-automatic film attachment equipment. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: Zhejiang Tailin BioEngineering Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Tailin BioEngineering Co.,Ltd manufactures microbial test and control equipment, mainly for pharmaceutical and medical sector. The company offers sterility testing equipment, microbiological testing equipment, TOC analyzers, sterile isolation systems, hydrogen peroxide sterilization systems, sterile delivery system, and filters, as well as technical services. Its products are primarily used in bio-pharmaceutical, medical, disease control, food, environmental protection, electronics, and other fields, as well as in bio-security equipment manufacturing industries. The company was formerly known as Hangzhou Tailin Biotechnology Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhejiang Tailin BioEngineering Co.,Ltd in April 2015. Zhejiang Tailin BioEngineering Co.,Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Hangzhou, China.

name: ActBlue Co., Ltd.
summary: ActBlue Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and sells diesel, gasoline, and natural gas engine exhaust after-treatment products. Its products are used for emission testing and calibration applications in vehicles. The company is headquartered in Chizhou, China.

name: Zhejiang Sf Oilless Bearing Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Sf Oilless Bearing Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells sliding bearing/bushing series products in China. The company offers self-lubricating, boundary lubricating, solid lubrication, and oil or grease lubricating bearings, as well as sliding blocks, shock absorber parts, and gear pump bushing blocks. Its products have applications in the fields of hydraulic system, car and truck, engineering machinery, die/mold industry, office equipment, steel metallurgy, industrial automation, agricultural machinery, clean source of energy, oil drilling platform, medical devices, injection molding of plastics, and pressure diecasts. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Jiashan, China.

name: Naipu Mining Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Naipu Mining Machinery Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, distributes, and services mining equipment and spares in China and internationally. It offers slurry pumps and rubber wet ends, hydrocyclones, rubber mill liners and trommels, rubber stators and impellers for flotation machines, rubber and polyurethane screen panels and plates, steel and rubber composite pipes, and hard-wall mining hoses for use in the mine, metallurgy, iron and steel, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Jiangxi Naipu Mining Machinery and New Materials Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Naipu Mining Machinery Co., Ltd. in August 2020. Naipu Mining Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Shangrao, China.

name: Jiangsu Jujie Microfiber Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Jujie Microfiber Technology Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of microfiber fabrics, clothing, and textile products in China. It offers superfine fiber leather fabrics; hygroscopic fast drying, velvet, and cool type fabrics; dustless wipe clothes, clean cotton swabs, car wiping papers, oblique and straight type piece suits, and family portraits; and microfiber bathrobe, swimwear, sports towel, beach towel, sports clothing, bedspread, sofa cover, and textile products. The company also exports its products to Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, and other countries. Jiangsu Jujie Microfiber Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Wujiang, China.

name: Sichuan Injet Electric Stock Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Injet Electric Stock Co.,Ltd. engages in research and development, production, and sale of electronics, microelectronics and power electronics, and other control equipment. Its products include AC DC power supply modules, induction heisting, polysilicon CVD reactor power system, polysilicon ingot furnace power supply, single crystal furnace power supply, sapphire furnace power supply, special power supply, power controller and system, active power filter, and other power products, as well as industrial power system solutions. The company sells its products in the United States, Japan, South Korea, Russia, India, Turkey, Mexico, Thailand, Kazakhstan, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Deyang, China.

name: Shandong Dongyue Organosilicon Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Dongyue Organosilicon Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of silicone materials in China. Its principal products include silicone monomers, silicone intermediates, fumed silica, and silicone rubber, silicone oil, and other deep-processed products. The company also exports its products to Dubai, South Korea, Belgium, the United States, Italy, India, Malaysia, Turkey, and Taiwan. Shandong Dongyue Organosilicon Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Zibo, China.

name: Shenzhen Bestek Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Bestek Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of smart controllers and smart products. Its products include lithium battery intelligent control protection devices and motor controllers; and smart induction lamps. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: Tjk Machinery (Tianjin) Co., Ltd.
summary: Tjk Machinery (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. manufactures reinforcement steel processing machines in China and internationally. The company provides coil and bar stirrup benders; cutters, benders, shear lines, and bending and shaping centers; rotor and roller type wire straightening machines; cage making machines; cold rolling and drawing machines; lattice girders; and reinforcement, fine and livestock, and mesh cutter and bender wire meshes. It also offers accessory devices, including payoffs and lifting devices. Tjk Machinery (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Shenzhen Crastal Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Shenzhen Crastal Technology Co.,Ltd. provides small kitchen appliances, and ancillary products and services. The company offers pots, electric kettles, water dispensers, and ovens through offline and online platforms. It sells its products in Europe, the United States, Australia, the Middle East, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

name: NanJing Research Institute of Surveying, Mapping & Geotechnical Investigation, Co.Ltd
summary: NanJing Research Institute of Surveying, Mapping & Geotechnical Investigation, Co.Ltd provides surveying and mapping services in China. The company is involved in various activities, including surveying and mapping geographic information, survey and geotechnical design, three-dimensional urban planning and design, smart city system integration, urban and rural planning, municipal construction, and environmental protection. It also provides topography, pipeline, and urban construction facility survey, as well as geological exploration design and precision measurement services; and offers smart drainage and garden systems, underground space systems, and subway operation monitoring solutions. The company is based in Nanjing, China.

name: Sineng Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sineng Electric Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and marketing of power and electronic products. The company provides power and electronic products, and solutions including grid-connected photovoltaic (PV) inverters; operation and maintenance of PV power plants; and development of PV power plant, power quality control, energy storage bidirectional converter, and energy automobiles charging. Its products include PV solutions, including utility PV, hilly terrain PV, water front PV, commercial PV, and residential PV solutions; power filters comprising active power filters, static Var generators, and smart power quality correction productions; and DC and AC energy storage products. The company offers solutions in power and related industries comprising power generation, power supply, and power distribution system. Sineng Electric Co.,Ltd. is based in Wuxi, China.

name: Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the extrusion of aluminum alloy profiles. It processes aluminum alloy parts. The company's products and operations include pressing, heat transmission heatsink, communication heatsink, standard heatsink, aluminum precision parts, GPS heatsink, electromagnetic shielding shell, high finned heatsink, battery power supply heatsink, medium voltage drive heatsink, moto housing, heatsink samples, pump body, industrial profile, TV station heatsink, filter housing, LED heatsink, inserted fins assembly heatsink, train traction heatsink, and actuator housing. Its products are used in various applications, such as medical equipment, safety material of automobile light weight, and products of fluid control. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Ruixinchang Light Alloy Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd in November, 2017. Tianjin Ruixin Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2004 and is based in Tianjin, China.

name: Henan Jindan Lactic Acid Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Henan Jindan Lactic Acid Technology Co., Ltd produces and sells lactic acid and lactate products in China. The company offers lactic acid, calcium lactate, sodium lactate, potassium lactate, ferrous lactate, lactic acid powder, ethyl lactate, magnesium lactate, zinc lactate, buffered lactic acid, sodium lactate and sodium di-acetate blend, and sodium lactate and potassium. It exports its products to Europe, North America, South America, Oceania, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Zhoukou, China.

name: JinXianDai Information Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: JinXianDai Information Industry Co.,Ltd. develops software products in China. It offers data visualization, mobile application, testing, UED, artificial intelligence, and other software products. The company also provides information solutions and services for various industries, such as power, petrochemical, public security, railway, government, aerospace, communications, coal, and others. It distributes its products in 22 provinces, 5 autonomous regions, and 4 municipalities. JinXianDai Information Industry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Jinan, China.

name: Xi'an Peri Power Semiconductor Converting Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xi'an Peri Power Semiconductor Converting Technology Co.,Ltd. designs, develops, produces, and services power semiconductor discrete devices, power electronic converters, and power semiconductor device test and other equipment. The company offers power semiconductor devices, such as high-power thyristors and rectifiers, power semiconductor modules, IGBT modules, and heat sinks; and power electronics, including aluminum electrolytic rectifier cabinet, high-power IGBT switching power supply, and DC test station power supply products. It also provides test and non-standard equipment comprising power semiconductor device discrete, comprehensive, conventional, and custom test equipment. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Xi'an, China. Xi'an Peri Power Semiconductor Converting Technology Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Xi'an Power Electronics Technology Research Institute.

name: Guangzhou Haoyang Electronic Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Haoyang Electronic Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production engineering, manufacture, sale, and service of professional stage, TV, concert, theatre and architectural lighting products worldwide. It offers entertainment HID products, such as moving heads, follow spots, EOLs, and accessories; Entertainment LED products comprising moving heads, theatre fixtures, static fixtures, and EOLs; and indoor and outdoor architainment products, as well as LED displays, including indoor and outdoor, and EOL displays. The company markets its products under the TERBLY brand name. Guangzhou Haoyang Electronic Co.,Ltd. is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.

name: Sinomag Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Sinomag Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of permanent ferrite and commutator products. Its products are used in the automobile, transportation, home appliance, electric tool, fitness equipment, and other markets. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Hefei, China.

name: Kunshan TopA Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd
summary: Kunshan TopA Intelligent Equipment Co.,Ltd offers intelligent manufacturing equipment and components, and related technical services primarily for vehicle and consumer electronics markets in China and internationally. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Kunshan, China.

name: Zhejiang Linuo Flow Control Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Linuo Flow Control Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of fluid control equipment in China and internationally. The company offers segment ball, knife gate, ball, globe control, and butterfly valves; and actuators. It serves energy, petrochemical, metallurgy, chemical, paper, environmental protection, pharmaceutical, and mining industries. Zhejiang Linuo Flow Control Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Ruian, China.

name: Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd produces and sells aromatics, fuel oil, hydrocarbons, and other products in China. It offers rubber chemicals, plastic additives, asphalt additives, lubricant additives, and light fuel oil products. The company provides its products for use in rubber, plastic, asphalt, and lubrication oil processing, and other fields. It was formerly known as Ningbo Bohui Petrochemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd in March 2014. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Ningbo, China. Ningbo Bohui Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Ningbo Wenkui Holding Group Co.,Ltd.

name: Qingdao Kute Smart Co Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Kute Smart Co Ltd. manufactures and sells men's and women's wear in China and internationally. It also operates stores. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Qingdao, China.

name: Chengdu Kanghua Biological Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Kanghua Biological Products Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, sale, and technical service of biological products in China. It offers group ACYW135 meningococcal polysaccharide vaccines; and freeze-dried human diploid cell rabies vaccines. The company also develops seasonal influenza vaccines without preservatives, which completed phase III clinical trials; and human H5N1 influenza vaccine that completed pre-clinical studies. In addition, it exports its products. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Chengdu, China.

name: Shenglan Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenglan Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells electronic connectors and precision components. The company offers Type-C series, USB connector, FFC/FPC, connector assembly, WAFER connector, and wiring harness products; new energy products; and TV lens. Its products are used in the consumer electronics, new energy vehicles, and other fields. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Dongguan, China.

name: Capitalonline Data Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Capitalonline Data Service Co., Ltd. provides cloud computing services. It also offers IDC hosting and IT value-added, IT outsourcing, communication integration, and other information services for e-commerce, gaming, finance, big data, medical, PaaS/SaaS, and various other industries. The company operates in Beijing and Wuxi, China; Hong Kong; Taipei, Taiwan; Dallas, Los Angeles, and New York, the United States; Tokyo, Japan; Singapore; Frankfurt, Germany; Amsterdam, the Netherlands, and internationally. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

summary: Miracll Chemicals Co.,Ltd, a material science company, researches, develops, manufactures, and sells thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) elastomers and polyol specialty products. It offers polyester, polyether, and polycaprolactone based TPUs; expandable and expanded, and functional TPUs; and hot melt and solvent-based adhesive TPUs. The company provides its products for use in electronics, sports and leisure, automotive, medical, mechanical, and industrial applications. Miracll Chemicals Co.,Ltd was founded in 2009 and is based in Yantai, China.

name: Luoyang Xinqianglian Slewing Bearing Co., Ltd.
summary: Luoyang Xinqianglian Slewing Bearing Co., Ltd. manufactures heavy duty slewing bearings for industrial purposes in China and internationally. The company offers four-point contact ball, double row ball, three-row roller, ball-roller combination, and cross-roller slewing bearings. Its products are used in various applications, which include cranes, wind turbines, tunnel boring machines, concrete pump trucks, CT scanners, stackers and reclaimers, etc. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Luoyang, China.

The company offers balise transmission modules (BTM), track circuit readers, lineside electronic units, balise telegram programmers, transparent data loop, and transparent data and fixed data balise products; on-board cab signaling equipment, track circuit readers, cab signaling plugin boards for railcar, and digital general cab signaling equipment; and onboard cab signaling data recorders, BTM recorders, remote monitoring systems, and telegram encoding systems. Its products are used in railway, urban transit, and other projects. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.

name: Sihui Fuji Electronics Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Sihui Fuji Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures printed circuit boards for FA, medical, power, communication, and automobile sectors worldwide. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Zhaoqing City, China.

It has strategic partnership agreements with GCL-Poly, JinkoSolar, Longi, etc. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Yangling, China.

It serves central banks, political banks, state-owned banks, joint-stock banks, local commercial banks, and non-banking financial institutions. Tansun Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Lhasa, China.

name: Hichain Logistics Co.,Ltd.

summary: Ningbo Jianan Electronics Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and sale of smart meters, electricity information collection terminals, and energy metering boxes. name: Anhui Hyea Aromas Co., Ltd.

summary: Shenzhen XFH Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the research and development, production, and sale of lithium ion battery cathode materials. name: Guangdong Huiyun Titanium Industry Co., Ltd.
